sta[++top]=x; } inline void pop(int x) { int cnt=0; while(sta[top]!=x) undo(),b[++cnt]=sta[top--]; undo(),top--; for(int i=1,len=cnt;i<=len&&top>0;i++) undo(),b[++cnt]=sta[top--]; sort(b+1,b+cnt+1); for(int i=cnt;i>=1;i--) work(b[i]),sta[++top]=b[i]; } bbbï¼Œن½ éœ€è¦پو‍„é€ ن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه­—ه…¸ه؛ڈوœ€ه°ڈçڑ„و­£و•´و•°ه؛ڈهˆ— AAAï¼Œن½؟ه¾— bbb ه…³ن؛ژ AAA وک¯ه¥½çڑ„ï¼Œوˆ–وٹ¥ه‘ٹو— è§£م€‚ 1â‰¤n,mâ‰¤3أ—1051\\le n,m\\le 3\\times 10^51â‰¤n,mâ‰¤3أ—105م€‚ è€ƒè™‘و“چن½œçڑ„è؟‡ç¨‹ï¼Œن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژن¸چو–­وٹٹوœ€ه°ڈه€¼çڑ„ن½چç½®وٹ¬ن¸ٹهژ»ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و“چن½œو—¶ه؛ڈهˆ— AAA çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯هچ•è°ƒن¸چé™چçڑ„م€‚ è€ƒè™‘وŒ‰ç…§و“چن½œو—¶ AAA çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ه°† bbb هˆ†و®µï¼Œن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ن¸€ن¸ھهˆ†و®µو–¹ه¼ڈهگˆو³•ï¼ˆه­کهœ¨ه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„ AAAï¼‰ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ï¼ڑ و¯ڈن¸€و®µن¸­çڑ„و•°ن؛’ن¸چç›¸هگŒï¼› é™¤ن؛†وœ€هگژن¸€و®µه¤–ï¼Œç¬¬ iii و®µçڑ„و•°و‍„وˆگçڑ„é›†هگˆهŒ…هگ«ç¬¬ iâˆ’1i-1iâˆ’1 و®µçڑ„و•°و‍„وˆگçڑ„é›†هگˆï¼› ç¬¬ن؛Œن¸ھé™گهˆ¶ن¹ںç›¸ه½“ن؛ژè¦پو±‚و¯ڈن¸€و®µ [l,r][l,r][l,r] ن¸­çڑ„و•°çڑ„é›†هگˆهŒ…هگ« b[1,lâˆ’1]b_{[1,l-1]}b[1,lâˆ’1]â€‹ ن¸­çڑ„و•°çڑ„é›†هگˆم€‚ وک¾ç„¶è‹¥ن¸€و®µن»¥ iii ه¼€ه¤´ï¼Œهˆ™ن¸‹ن¸€و®µçڑ„ه¼€ه¤´ه؛”è¯¥هœ¨ن¸€ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ه†…ï¼Œè®¾ه…¶ن¸؛ [li,ri][l_i,r_i][liâ€‹,riâ€‹]م€‚وک¾ç„¶ âˆ€j<i\\forall j<iâˆ€j<i éƒ½وœ‰ ljâ‰¤li,rjâ‰¤ril_j\\le l_i,r_j\\le r_iljâ€‹â‰¤liâ€‹,rjâ€‹â‰¤riâ€‹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥هڈŒوŒ‡é’ˆو±‚ه‡؛ lil_iliâ€‹ ه’Œ rir_iriâ€‹م€‚ وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥هڈ¯ن»¥ن»ژهگژه¾€ه‰چو‰«ï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ fif_ifiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛è‹¥وںگن¸€و®µن»¥ iii ه¼€ه¤´çڑ„è¯‌ï¼Œb[i,n]b_{[i,n]}b[i,n]â€‹ èƒ½هگ¦ه®Œوˆگهگˆو³•çڑ„هˆ†و®µم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè‹¥ f1=0f_1=0f1â€‹=0 ه°±و— è§£م€‚ ç„¶هگژن»ژه‰چه¾€هگژè´ھه؟ƒï¼Œوک¾ç„¶و¯ڈن¸€و®µè‚¯ه®ڑéƒ½وک¯è¶ٹé•؟è¶ٹه¥½ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و¯ڈو¬،è´ھه؟ƒو‰¾هˆ° jâˆˆ[li,ri],fj=1j\\in [l_i,r_i],f_j=1jâˆˆ[liâ€‹,riâ€‹],fjâ€‹=1 çڑ„وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ jjjï¼Œهˆ†ه‡؛و®µ [i,jâˆ’1][i,j-1][i,jâˆ’1] هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈè؟™ن¹ںç›¸ه½“ن؛ژ jâˆˆ[1,ri]j\\in[1,r_i]jâˆˆ[1,riâ€‹]ï¼Œو•…هپڑه‰چç¼€وœ€ه¤§ه€¼هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ وœ€هگژو‰«ن¸€éپچهچ³هڈ¯و±‚ه‡؛ç­”و،ˆï¼Œو³¨و„ڈن¸چهœ¨ bbb ن¸­ه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ن½چç½®ن¹ںè¦په،«و•°م€‚ وœ€هگژن¸€و®µè¦پç‰¹و®ٹه¤„çگ†ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n+m)O(n+m)O(n+m)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <map> #include <vector> using namespace std; const int S=300005; int n,m,a[S]; int ct[S]; int lb[S],rb[S]; bool flg[S]; int sm[S],mx[S]; bool vis[S]; int ans[S]; int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); cin>>n>>m; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) cin>>a[i]; ct[a[1]]=1; lb[1]=2; for(int i=2,j=1;i<=m;i++) { ct[a[i-1]]--; while(j<=m&&ct[a[i-1]]==0) ct[a[++j]]++; if(j==m+1) lb[i]=-1; else lb[i]=j+1; } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ct[i]=0; ct[a[1]]=1; for(int i=1,j=1;i<=m;i++) { ct[a[i-1]]--; while(j<m&&ct[a[j+1]]==0) ct[a[++j]]++; rb[i]=j+1; } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ct[i]=0; int L=m; flg[m+1]=true; for(int i=m;i>=1;i--) { if(++ct[a[i]]==2) break; flg[i]=true; L=i; } sm[m+1]=1; for(int i=m;i>=1;i--) { if(lb[i]!=-1&&lb[i]<=rb[i]) flg[i]|=(sm[lb[i]]-sm[rb[i]+1]>0); sm[i]=flg[i]+sm[i+1]; } if(!flg[1]) return cout<<"-1\\n",0; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { mx[i]=mx[i-1]; if(flg[i]) mx[i]=i; } int p=1,t=0; while(p<L) { int np=mx[rb[p]]; t++; for(int i=p;i<np;i++) if(!vis[a[i]]) ans[a[i]]=t,vis[a[i]]=true; p=np; } if(p<=m) { t++; for(int i=p;i<=m;i++) if(!vis[a[i]]) ans[a[i]]=t,vis[a[i]]=true; } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) if(!vis[i]) ans[i]=t; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cout<<ans[i]<<' ';cout<<'\\n'; return 0; } /* و±‚ه‡؛ i ن¸؛وںگن¸€و®µه¼€ه¤´و—¶ن¸‹ن¸€و®µه¼€ه¤´و‰€هœ¨çڑ„هŒ؛é—´ [l_i,r_i] é‚£ن¹ˆ l[i] <= l[i+1] r[i] <= r[i+1] ç„¶هگژوˆ‘è‚¯ه®ڑوƒ³و¯ڈن¸€و®µé•؟ه؛¦و‍„وˆگçڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„ه­—ه…¸ه؛ڈوœ€ه¤§ é‚£ن¹ˆه¤„çگ†ه‡؛و¯ڈن¸€ن¸ھç‚¹èƒ½ن¸چèƒ½هˆ°ç»ˆç‚¹هچ³هڈ¯ï¼ں */ \n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھ nأ—nn\\times nnأ—n çڑ„ 01 çں©éکµ AAAï¼Œه’Œن¸¤ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„é‌‍è´ںو•´و•°و•°ç»„ ca,cbca,cbca,cbم€‚è¯·و‍„é€ ن¸¤ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ 01 و•°ç»„ fa,fbfa,fbfa,fbï¼Œو»،è¶³ï¼ڑ âˆ€iâˆˆ[1,n]\\forall i\\in [1,n]âˆ€iâˆˆ[1,n] éƒ½وœ‰ cai=âˆ‘1â‰¤jâ‰¤nAi,jâٹ•faiâٹ•fbjca_i=\\sum\\limits_{1\\le j\\le n} A_{i,j}\\oplus fa_i\\oplus fb_jcaiâ€‹=1â‰¤jâ‰¤nâˆ‘â€‹Ai,jâ€‹âٹ•faiâ€‹âٹ•fbjâ€‹ï¼› âˆ€jâˆˆ[1,n]\\forall j\\in [1,n]âˆ€jâˆˆ[1,n] éƒ½وœ‰ cbj=âˆ‘1â‰¤iâ‰¤nAi,jâٹ•faiâٹ•fbjcb_j=\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i\\le n} A_{i,j}\\oplus fa_i\\oplus fb_jcbjâ€‹=1â‰¤iâ‰¤nâˆ‘â€‹Ai,jâ€‹âٹ•faiâ€‹âٹ•fbjâ€‹ï¼› 1â‰¤nâ‰¤10001\\le n\\le 10001â‰¤nâ‰¤1000ï¼Œ0â‰¤cai,cbi<n40\\le ca_i,cb_i<\\frac{n}{4}0â‰¤caiâ€‹,cbiâ€‹<4nâ€‹م€‚ و€ژن¹ˆè؟™ن¹ˆç¬¨م€‚ ه…³é”®و­¥éھ¤ï¼ڑه…ˆé€ڑè؟‡هˆ—ç؟»è½¬ه°†ç¬¬ن¸€è،Œهڈکوˆگ 000م€‚ ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ï¼Œه°† fafafa ه’Œ fbfbfb ه…¨éƒ¨هڈ–هڈچن¸چه½±ه“چهگˆو³•و€§ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هڈ¯ن»¥é’¦ه®ڑ fa1=0fa_1=0fa1â€‹=0م€‚وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥ç”±ن؛ژ ca1<n4ca_1<\\frac{n}{4}ca1â€‹<4nâ€‹ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هˆ—ç؟»è½¬و¬،و•°ï¼ˆâˆ‘ifbi\\sum\\limits_i fb_iiâˆ‘â€‹fbiâ€‹ï¼‰ن¹ں <n4<\\frac{n}{4}<4nâ€‹م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€è،Œ iiiï¼Œè‹¥و­¤و—¶ n2â‰¤âˆ‘jAi,j\\frac{n}{2}\\le \\sum\\limits_{j}A_{i,j}2nâ€‹â‰¤jâˆ‘â€‹Ai,jâ€‹ هˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ fai=1fa_i=1faiâ€‹=1ï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ fai=0fa_i=0faiâ€‹=0م€‚ و•… fafafa ه°±ç،®ه®ڑن؛†ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ fbfbfb ن¹ںهڈ¯ن»¥ç›´وژ¥ç،®ه®ڑن؛†م€‚ ه†چهˆ¤ن¸€ن¸‹هگˆو³•و€§هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=1005; int n; char a[S][S]; int cnta[S],cntb[S]; int ra[S],rb[S]; inline void slove() { cin>>n; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { cin>>a[i]; for(int j=n;j>=1;j--) a[i][j]=a[i][j-1]-'0'; } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>cntb[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>cnta[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { ra[i]=a[1][i]; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) a[j][i]^=ra[i]; } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int cnt=0; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) cnt+=a[i][j]; rb[i]=cnt>=(n+1)/2; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) a[i][j]^=rb[i]; } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int cnt=0; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) cnt+=a[j][i]; bool fl=cnt!=cnta[i]; ra[i]^=fl; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) a[j][i]^=fl; } bool fl=true; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int cnt=0; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) cnt+=a[j][i]; fl&=cnt==cnta[i]; cnt=0; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) cnt+=a[i][j]; fl&=cnt==cntb[i]; } if(!fl) cout<<"No\\n"; else { cout<<"Yes\\n"; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cout<<rb[i];cout<<'\\n'; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cout<<ra[i];cout<<'\\n'; } } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); int T; cin>>T; while(T-->0) slove(); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"ARC199A Flip Row or Col 2 هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/arc199a-flip-row-or-col-2-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"4 min read","time":221000,"words":657,"minutes":4},"date":"2025-06-04 18:59:40","dateFormat":"2025-06-04"},{"abstract":"

SSS çڑ„ه­گé›† TTT و»،è¶³ x=âˆ‘yâˆˆTyx=\\sum\\limits_{y\\in T}yx=yâˆˆTâˆ‘â€‹yم€‚ه¯¹ 998244353998244353998244353 هڈ–و¨،م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤15001\\le n\\le 15001â‰¤nâ‰¤1500م€‚ ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژç”¨ SSS ن¸­çڑ„و•°هپڑ 01 èƒŒهŒ…هگژèƒŒهŒ…و•°ç»„ن¸­ [1,n][1,n][1,n] و¯ڈن¸ھن½چç½®çڑ„ه€¼éƒ½وک¯ 111 وˆ–è€… 222م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ن»ژه°ڈهˆ°ه¤§هٹ ه…¥ SSS ن¸­çڑ„و•°ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژه°†èƒŒهŒ…و•°ç»„و•´ن½“ه¾€هگژç§»ن½چه†چه¯¹ن½چç›¸هٹ م€‚é‚£ن¹ˆه¦‚و‍œوںگن¸€و—¶هˆ»ه‡؛çژ°ن؛† >1>1>1 ن¸ھè؟‍ç»­é‌‍ 000 و®µï¼Œهˆ™ه®ƒن»¬ن¹‹é—´çڑ„ 000 ه°±ه†چن¹ںو— و³•è¢«è¦†ç›–هˆ°ن؛†م€‚و•…و¯ڈن¸ھو—¶هˆ»èƒŒهŒ…و•°ç»„ن¸­é‌‍ 000 çڑ„ن½چç½®ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯ن¸€ن¸ھه‰چç¼€ï¼Œن¸”è¯¥ه‰چç¼€é•؟ه؛¦وک¯ SSS ن¸­و‰€وœ‰و•°çڑ„ه’Œه†چ +1+1+1ï¼ˆbbb çڑ„ن¸‹و ‡ن»ژ 000 ه¼€ه§‹ï¼‰م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè®¾èƒŒهŒ…و•°ç»„ن¸؛ bbbï¼ŒSSS ن¸­و•°çڑ„ه’Œن¸؛ smsmsmï¼Œهˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ bx=bsmâˆ’xb_x=b_{sm-x}bxâ€‹=bsmâˆ’xâ€‹م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ç¬¬ن¸€و¬،è®© bbb ن¸­ه‡؛çژ° 222 çڑ„و•° aaaï¼Œو­¤ه‰چهٹ ه…¥çڑ„و•°ن¸€ه®ڑéƒ½وک¯ 222 çڑ„و¬،ه¹‚م€‚è®¾ lenlenlen ن¸؛وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ 2x2^x2x و»،è¶³ len>alen>alen>aï¼Œهˆ™و­¤و—¶ bbb ن¸€ه®ڑه½¢ه¦‚ï¼ڑ 11â€¦1âژµa ن¸ھ 122â€¦2âژµlenâˆ’a ن¸ھ 211â€¦1âژµa ن¸ھ 1\\underset{\\text{$a$ ن¸ھ $1$}}{\\underbrace{11\\dots1}}\\underset{\\text{$len-a$ ن¸ھ $2$}}{\\underbrace{22\\dots2}}\\underset{\\text{$a$ ن¸ھ $1$}}{\\underbrace{11\\dots1}} a ن¸ھ 111â€¦1â€‹â€‹lenâˆ’a ن¸ھ 222â€¦2â€‹â€‹a ن¸ھ 111â€¦1â€‹â€‹ وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥و¯ڈو¬،و“چن½œو–°ن؛§ç”ںçڑ„ 222 éƒ½و‌¥è‡ھن؛ژوœ€هگژن¸€و®µ 111 ه’Œç¬¬ن¸€و®µ 111 çڑ„هڈ هگˆï¼Œç›´هˆ° b[0,n]b_{[0,n]}b[0,n]â€‹ éƒ½é‌‍ 000ï¼Œو­¤و—¶وک¾ç„¶هڈھèƒ½ه†چو“چن½œوœ€ه¤ڑن¸€و¬،م€‚é—®é¢کوک¯è؟™ن¸€و¬،و“چن½œن¸­ç¬¬ن¸€و®µ 111 هڈ هگˆçڑ„هڈ¯èƒ½ن¸چه†چوک¯وœ€هگژن¸€و®µ 111م€‚ è§‚ه¯ںهˆ° bbb çڑ„و€§è´¨ه¾ˆه¥½ï¼ˆوک¯ه›‍و–‡ن¸²ن¸”ç چوژ‰وœ€هگژن¸€و¬،و“چن½œهڈ هگˆه‡؛çڑ„ن¸­é—´é‚£و®µهگژï¼Œن¸¤è¾¹ن¹ںوک¯ه›‍و–‡ن¸²ï¼‰ï¼Œè€ƒè™‘ه»؛و ‘ï¼Œهژ»وژ‰ه¼€ه¤´çڑ„ aaa ن¸ھ 111 هگژï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،و“چن½œهڈ هگˆه‡؛çڑ„ن¸­é—´و®µï¼ˆé•؟ه؛¦èŒƒه›´ [a,2a][a,2a][a,2a]ï¼‰ن½œن¸؛èٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼Œهگ‘ه·¦هڈ³ن¸¤è¾¹وœ€هگژن¸€و¬،و“چن½œه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹è؟‍è¾¹م€‚هڈ¶ه­گèٹ‚ç‚¹ه¯¹ه؛” lenâˆ’alen-alenâˆ’a ن¸ھ 222ï¼ˆç¬¬ن¸€و¬،ه‡؛çژ° 222 çڑ„و“چن½œï¼‰م€‚ è؟™و ·وˆ‘ن»¬ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥و‍ڑن¸¾وک¯هœ¨ه“ھن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ه¤„çˆ† [0,n][0,n][0,n]ï¼ŒوŒ‰ه±‚هپڑèƒŒهŒ…هچ³هڈ¯ç»ںè®،ç­”و،ˆم€‚ ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ï¼ڑ و‍ڑن¸¾ aaa ه¸¦و‌¥ن¸€ن¸ھ O(n)O(n)O(n)ï¼› ن¸€ه…±وœ‰ O(na)O(\\frac{n}{a})O(anâ€‹) ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼› و¯ڈن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ه¤„éœ€è¦پهپڑèƒŒهŒ…ï¼Œه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(nlnâپ،n)O(n\\ln n)O(nlnn) çڑ„ï¼ˆlnâپ،\\lnln و‌¥è‡ھن؛ژè°ƒه’Œç؛§و•°ï¼‰; و‰€ن»¥و€»ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ âˆ‘aO(naأ—nlnâپ،n)\\sum\\limits_{a}O(\\frac{n}{a}\\times n\\ln n)aâˆ‘â€‹O(anâ€‹أ—nlnn)ï¼Œهچ³ O(n2lnâپ،2n)O(n^2\\ln^2n)O(n2ln2n)م€‚ ه®‍çژ°èµ·و‌¥وœ‰ه¾ˆه¤ڑç»†èٹ‚ï¼Œè¦پè€ƒè™‘ه¥½و¯ڈç§چوƒ…ه†µçڑ„è´،çŒ®ه؛”è¯¥ç®—هœ¨ن»€ن¹ˆèٹ‚ç‚¹ن¸ٹم€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> using namespace std; typedef long long ll; const int S=1505,BS=10; #define p 998244353 int n; ll siz[BS+5]; int g[S],tmp[BS+5][S]; int ans; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } void dfs(int a,int len,int hei,int cnt,ll sm) { if(sm>n+1) return; if(hei>1) { {// left memcpy(tmp[hei],g,sizeof(g)); if(cnt>1) { int ml=cnt-1; for(int i=n+1;i>=0;i--) { for(int j=a;j<=a*2&&i+j*ml<=n+1;j++) add(g[i+j*ml],g[i]); g[i]=0; } } dfs(a,len,hei-1,(cnt-1)*2+1,sm); memcpy(g,tmp[hei],sizeof(g)); } if(sm+a+siz[hei-1]<=n+1) {// right memcpy(tmp[hei],g,sizeof(g)); int ml=cnt; for(int i=n+1;i>=0;i--) { for(int j=a;j<=a*2&&i+j*ml<=n+1;j++) add(g[i+j*ml],g[i]); g[i]=0; } dfs(a,len,hei-1,cnt*2,sm+a+siz[hei-1]); memcpy(g,tmp[hei],sizeof(g)); } } if(a+sm+siz[hei-1]>n+1) return; memcpy(tmp[hei],g,sizeof(g)); ll ml=(cnt-1)*2+1; for(int i=hei-1;i>=1;i--,ml*=2) { int lb,rb; if(i>1) lb=a,rb=a*2; else lb=rb=len-a; for(int j=n+1;j>=0;j--) { for(int k=lb;k<=rb&&j+k*ml<=n+1;k++) add(g[j+k*ml],g[j]); g[j]=0; } } if(hei>1) // not leaf { for(int i=0;i<n+1-a;i++) for(int x=a;x<=a*2&&a+i+x*(cnt-1)<n+1;x++) { int pos=a+i+x*(cnt-1); int c1=x-a; if(pos+x<n+1) continue; if(cnt==1&&pos+c1>n+1) break; add(ans,g[i]); int r1=0; if(cnt==1) { if(pos+x-c1<n+1) r1=n+1-(pos+x-c1)-(x==a*2); } else { if(pos+c1>=n+1) r1=n+1-pos; else if(x==a*2) r1=min(n+1-pos,a); else if(pos+x-c1<n+1) r1=n+1-(pos+x-c1); } add(ans,1ll*r1*g[i]%p); } } else { int ad=a+(len-a)*(cnt-1); for(int i=0;i<n+1-ad;i++) { int pre=i+ad; int x=len-a; if(pre+x<n+1) continue; add(ans,g[i]); } } memcpy(g,tmp[hei],sizeof(g)); } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); cin>>n; ans=1; for(int a=1;a<=n+1;a++) { int len=1; while(len<=a) len<<=1; if(len==a*2) continue; siz[1]=len-a; for(int i=2;i<=BS;i++) siz[i]=siz[i-1]*2+a; g[0]=1; int lst=ans; dfs(a,len,BS,1,0); // for(int i=1;i<=BS-3;i++) // { // int lst=ans; // dfs(a,len,i,1,0); // if(ans>lst) printf("%d: %d\\n",i,ans-lst); // } // printf(">> %d %d %d : %d\\n",a,len-a,a,ans-lst); } cout<<ans<<'\\n'; return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"ARC143F Counting Subsets هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/arc143f-counting-subsets-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"7 min bu<mxub_u<mx_ubuâ€‹<mxuâ€‹ é‚£ن¹ˆن¸€ه®ڑو— è§£م€‚ هˆڑه¼€ه§‹è®¾çڑ„çٹ¶و€پوک¯ fu,0/1,if_{u,0/1,i}fu,0/1,iâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ uuu çڑ„ه­گو ‘ï¼Œç،®ه®ڑ â‰¤mxu\\le mx_uâ‰¤mxuâ€‹ çڑ„ aaa éƒ½ه،«ه®Œن؛†ï¼Œوک¯هگ¦وœ‰ =mxu=mx_u=mxuâ€‹ çڑ„ aaaï¼Œ>mxu> mx_u>mxuâ€‹ çڑ„è؟کوœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„ aaa وœ‰ iii ن¸ھçڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°ï¼Œهڈ¯وک¯è؟™و ·ç”±ن؛ژوœ‰ه®¹و–¥و‰€ن»¥وˆ‘ن¸چن¼ڑن¼کهŒ–ï¼Œهڈھèƒ½هپڑهˆ° O(n3)O(n^3)O(n3)م€‚ è€ƒè™‘è®¾ visu,ivis_{u,i}visu,iâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ uuu ه­گو ‘ه†… iii وک¯هگ¦ç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°ï¼Œهˆ™ن¸€ن¸ھو•° xxx ç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ه­گو ‘ه†…وœ‰وںگن¸ھ av=xa_v=xavâ€‹=x وˆ– x<mxux<mx_ux<mxuâ€‹م€‚ è®¾ fu,0/1,if_{u,0/1,i}fu,0/1,iâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ uuu çڑ„ه­گو ‘ï¼Œï¼ˆaaa ن¸­ï¼‰ç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°è؟‡çڑ„و•°éƒ½ه،«ه®Œن؛†ï¼Œوک¯هگ¦وœ‰ =mxu=mx_u=mxuâ€‹ çڑ„و•°ï¼Œه…±ه،«ن؛† iii ç§چوœھç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°è؟‡çڑ„و•°ï¼Œن¸”è؟™ iii ç§چو•°çڑ„ه¤§ه°ڈé،؛ه؛ڈè؟کوœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°م€‚ è€ƒè™‘هگˆه¹¶ه­گو ‘çڑ„è؟‡ç¨‹ï¼Œé¦–ه…ˆه¯¹ن؛ژ visu,x=1,visv,x=0vis_{u,x}=1,vis_{v,x}=0visu,xâ€‹=1,visv,xâ€‹=0 çڑ„و•° xxxï¼Œvvv ه­گو ‘ن¸­هڈ¯èƒ½وœ‰ن¸€ç§چوœھç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°è؟‡çڑ„و•°ن¸؛ xxxï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و»ڑن¸€و¬،èƒŒهŒ…ï¼›ه¯¹ن؛ژ visu,x=0,visv,x=1vis_{u,x}=0,vis_{v,x}=1visu,xâ€‹=0,visv,xâ€‹=1 çڑ„و•°هگŒçگ†م€‚ وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥è¦په¤„çگ†ن¸¤é¢—ه­گو ‘ن¸­éƒ½وœھه‡؛çژ°è؟‡ï¼Œن½†ç›¸هگŒçڑ„و•°ï¼Œن¹ںوک¯ç›´وژ¥و»ڑèƒŒهŒ…ï¼Œهچ³çœ‹ن¸€ن¸‹ vvv ه­گو ‘ن¸­وœھç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°çڑ„و•°وک¯هگ¦وœ‰ن¸€ç§چه’Œ uuu ه­گو ‘ن¸­ç¬¬ iii ç§چوœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„و•°ç›¸هگŒم€‚ هپڑه®Œè؟™ن؛›ه¤„çگ†ن¹‹هگژç›´وژ¥هچ·ç§¯هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈو»ڑèƒŒهŒ…çڑ„و—¶ه€™è¦پن¹کç³»و•°ï¼Œهچ³ن»ژ iii ç§چو•°ن¸­é€‰ن¸€ç§چه‡؛و‌¥é…چه¯¹ï¼Œç³»و•°ن¸؛ iiiم€‚ وœ€هگژه†چوٹٹ visvisvis هگˆه¹¶ن¸€ن¸‹م€‚ ن½†وک¯è€ƒè™‘ه·²ç»ڈهگˆه¹¶è؟› uuu çڑ„وںگن¸ھه„؟ه­گ vvvï¼Œهœ¨هگˆه¹¶و–°çڑ„ه„؟ه­گ vâ€²v'vâ€² و—¶ï¼Œmxvmx_vmxvâ€‹ è؟™ن¸ھو•°و¯”è¾ƒç‰¹و®ٹï¼Œهچ³ن½؟ visu,mxv=0,visvâ€²,mxv=1vis_{u,mx_v}=0,vis_{v',mx_v}=1visu,mxvâ€‹â€‹=0,visvâ€²,mxvâ€‹â€‹=1 ن¹ںن¸چèƒ½وœ‰ vvv ه­گو ‘ن¸­وœھç،®ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°è؟‡çڑ„و•°â€œé›ھè—ڈâ€‌هœ¨è؟™é‡Œï¼Œè€Œوˆ‘ن»¬çڑ„çٹ¶و€پن¸­ه¹¶وœھè®°ه½•ç›¸ه…³ن؟،وپ¯م€‚و‰€ن»¥éœ€è¦په°†ه„؟ه­گوŒ‰ç…§ mxvmx_vmxvâ€‹ ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈçڑ„é،؛ه؛ڈهگˆه¹¶م€‚ وœ€هگژè‹¥ buî€ =âˆ’1b_u\\not=-1buâ€‹î€ â€‹=âˆ’1 هˆ™è¦په°† mex\\text{mex}mex وژ¨ن¸ٹهژ»ï¼Œهچ³é€‰ن¸€ن؛›وœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„و•°ه‡؛و‌¥ه،«ن؛†م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه°±وک¯و ‘ن¸ٹèƒŒهŒ…çڑ„ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ï¼Œهچ³ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> #include <cstring> using namespace std; const int S=5005; #define p 1000000007 int fra[S],C[S][S]; int n,a[S],b[S],fa[S]; bool vis[S][S]; vector<int> son[S]; int tu[S],tv[S],tmp[S],h[2][S],th[2][S]; int siz[S],f[S][2][S]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } int main() { for(int i=0;i<=S-3;i++) { fra[i]=(i==0?1:1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p); C[i][0]=1; for(int j=1;j<=i;j++) C[i][j]=(C[i-1][j]+C[i-1][j-1])%p; } ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); cin>>n; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>a[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>b[i]; fa[1]=0; for(int i=2;i<=n;i++) cin>>fa[i],son[fa[i]].push_back(i); for(int u=n;u>=1;u--) { sort(son[u].begin(),son[u].end(),[&](int x,int y){return b[x]>b[y];}); int lb=-1; for(int v:son[u]) lb=max(lb,b[v]); siz[u]=1; memset(h,0,sizeof(h)); if(a[u]!=-1) vis[u][a[u]]=true,h[a[u]==lb][0]=1; else { h[0][1]=1; if(lb!=-1) h[1][0]=1; } for(int v:son[u]) { auto doit=[&](int id,int vt,bool has){ memcpy(tu,h[id],sizeof(h[id])); memset(tv,0,sizeof(tv)); if(vt&1) for(int i=0;i<=siz[v];i++) add(tv[i],f[v][0][i]); if(vt&2) for(int i=0;i<=siz[v];i++) add(tv[i],f[v][1][i]); memset(tmp,0,sizeof(tmp)); if(lb!=-1&&!has&&vis[v][lb]) return; for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) if(i==lb) { if(vt==3&&has&&!vis[v][i]) for(int j=1;j<=siz[v];j++) tv[j-1]=1ll*tv[j]*j%p,tv[j]=0; } else { if(vis[u][i]==vis[v][i]) continue; if(!vis[u][i]) for(int j=1;j<=siz[u];j++) add(tu[j-1],1ll*tu[j]*j%p); if(!vis[v][i]&&i!=b[v]) for(int j=1;j<=siz[v];j++) add(tv[j-1],1ll*tv[j]*j%p); } for(int i=0;i<=siz[u];i++) { for(int j=0;j<=siz[v];j++) add(tmp[i+j],1ll*tu[i]*tv[j]%p); for(int j=1;j<=siz[v];j++) add(tv[j-1],1ll*tv[j]*j%p); } }; memset(th,0,sizeof(th)); if(lb==-1||b[v]!=lb) { if(lb==-1||!vis[u][lb]) {// 0->0 doit(0,3,false); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[0][i],tmp[i]); } if(lb!=-1) {// 0->1 doit(0,3,true); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[1][i],tmp[i]); } {// 1->1 doit(1,3,false); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[1][i],tmp[i]); doit(1,3,true); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[1][i],tmp[i]); } } else { if(lb==-1||!vis[u][lb]) {// 0->0 doit(0,1,false); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[0][i],tmp[i]); } if(lb!=-1) {// 0->1 doit(0,2,true); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[1][i],tmp[i]); } {// 1->1 doit(1,1,false); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[1][i],tmp[i]); doit(1,2,true); for(int i=0;i<=siz[u]+siz[v];i++) add(th[1][i],tmp[i]); } } memcpy(h,th,sizeof(h)); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) vis[u][i]|=vis[v][i]; siz[u]+=siz[v]; } if(b[u]==lb) for(int i=0;i<=siz[u];i++) f[u][0][i]=h[0][i]; else if(b[u]==-1) for(int i=0;i<=siz[u];i++) add(f[u][0][i],h[0][i]), add(f[u][1][i],h[1][i]); else { int cnt=0; for(int i=lb+1;i<b[u];i++) cnt+=!vis[u][i]; if(vis[u][lb]) for(int i=cnt;i<=siz[u];i++) add(f[u][0][i-cnt],1ll*h[0][i]*C[i][cnt]%p*fra[cnt]%p), add(f[u][0][i-cnt],1ll*h[1][i]*C[i][cnt]%p*fra[cnt]%p); else for(int i=cnt;i<=siz[u];i++) add(f[u][0][i-cnt],1ll*h[lb!=-1][i]*C[i][cnt]%p*fra[cnt]%p); } if(b[u]!=-1&&vis[u][b[u]]) return cout<<"0\\n",0; b[u]=max(b[u],lb); for(int i=0;i<b[u];i++) vis[u][i]=true; } int cnt=n-b[1]; for(int i=b[1]+1;i<=n;i++) cnt-=vis[1][i]; int ans=0; for(int i=0;i<=siz[1];i++) add(ans,1ll*(f[1][0][i]+f[1][1][i])*C[cnt][i]%p*fra[i]%p); cout<<ans<<'\\n'; return 0; } /* vis[u][i]=1 ن¸” vis[v][i]=0 çڑ„و€ژن¹ˆهگˆه¹¶ f[u][i] è،¨ç¤؛ u ه­گو ‘ï¼Œه،«ه®Œن؛†ه؟…ه®ڑه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ه€¼ï¼Œوœ‰ i ç§چوœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„وœھه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ه€¼ - que1ï¼ڑè؟™ i ç§چه€¼é،؛ه؛ڈç،®ه®ڑه¥½ن؛†هگ— و²،ç،®ه®ڑه¥½ */ ","tags":[{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"م€گç¬¬ن¸ƒه±ٹه›¾çپµو‌¯é«کç؛§ç»„م€‘A. و£‹و— ه¸¸و ‘ هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/di-qi-jie-tu-ling-bei-gao-ji-zu-a-qi-wu-chang-shu-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"10 min \n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaa ه’Œ mmm ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ [li,ri][l_i,r_i][liâ€‹,riâ€‹]ï¼Œن½ è¦پé‡چوژ’ aaa çڑ„ه…ƒç´ ï¼Œن½؟ه¾—ه؛ڈهˆ— bi=maxâپ،jâˆˆ[li,ri]ajb_i=\\max\\limits_{j\\in[l_i,r_i]} a_jbiâ€‹=jâˆˆ[liâ€‹,riâ€‹]maxâ€‹ajâ€‹ çڑ„ه­—ه…¸ه؛ڈوœ€ه¤§ï¼Œè¾“ه‡؛ه­—ه…¸ه؛ڈوœ€ه¤§çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— bbbم€‚ 1â‰¤n,mâ‰¤1051\\le n,m\\le 10^51â‰¤n,mâ‰¤105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤n1\\le a_i\\le n1â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤nï¼Œ1â‰¤liâ‰¤riâ‰¤n1\\le l_i\\le r_i\\le n1â‰¤liâ€‹â‰¤riâ€‹â‰¤nم€‚ è€ƒè™‘è´ھه؟ƒï¼Œè‹¥ aaa ن؛’ن¸چç›¸هگŒï¼Œهˆ™هڈ¯ن»¥ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈè€ƒè™‘و¯ڈن¸ھ aia_iaiâ€‹ï¼ڑ هœ¨هŒ؛é—´ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸ٹن»ژه‰چه¾€هگژو‰«ï¼Œç»´وٹ¤ bj=aib_j=a_ibjâ€‹=aiâ€‹ çڑ„هŒ؛é—´é›†هگˆ SSSم€‚و‰«هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھ bjb_jbjâ€‹ ه°ڑوœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„هŒ؛é—´ [lj,rj][l_j,r_j][ljâ€‹,rjâ€‹] و—¶ï¼Œè‹¥هٹ ه…¥ه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´هگژ SSS ن¸­و‰€وœ‰هŒ؛é—´è؟کوœ‰ن؛¤ï¼Œهˆ™ن»¤ bj=aib_j=a_ibjâ€‹=aiâ€‹ï¼Œه¹¶هگ‘ SSS هٹ ه…¥ه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´ï¼› è€Œ aaa هڈ¯èƒ½وœ‰é‡چه¤چه…ƒç´ ï¼Œو•…éœ€è¦پç¨چه¾®ن؟®و”¹ن¸€ن¸‹è´ھه؟ƒم€‚ن¾‌و—§وک¯ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈè€ƒè™‘ [1,n][1,n][1,n] ن¸­çڑ„و¯ڈن¸ھو•° xxxï¼Œè®¾ xxx هœ¨ aaa ن¸­ه‡؛çژ°ن؛† cntcntcnt و¬،ï¼ڑ هœ¨هŒ؛é—´ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸ٹن»ژه‰چه¾€هگژو‰«ï¼Œç»´وٹ¤ bj=xb_j=xbjâ€‹=x çڑ„هŒ؛é—´é›†هگˆ SSSم€‚و‰«هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھ bjb_jbjâ€‹ ه°ڑوœھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„هŒ؛é—´ [lj,rj][l_j,r_j][ljâ€‹,rjâ€‹] و—¶ï¼Œè‹¥هٹ ه…¥ه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´هگژ SSS هڈ¯ن»¥هˆ’هˆ†وˆگ cntcntcnt ن¸ھه­گé›†ه¹¶و»،è¶³و¯ڈن¸ھه­گé›†ن¸­و‰€وœ‰هŒ؛é—´وœ‰ن؛¤ï¼Œهˆ™ن»¤ bj=aib_j=a_ibjâ€‹=aiâ€‹ï¼Œه¹¶هگ‘ SSS هٹ ه…¥ه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´ï¼› ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°هڈھè¦پو¯ڈو¬،ه‡†ç،®هœ°و‰¾هˆ° bj=xb_j=xbjâ€‹=x çڑ„é‚£ن؛›ن½چç½®ï¼Œه‌‡و‘ٹو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه°±وک¯ه¯¹çڑ„م€‚و‰€ن»¥çژ°هœ¨é—®é¢کهڈکن¸؛ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€ن¸ھ xxxï¼Œه¦‚ن½•ه؟«é€ںو‰¾هˆ°و‰€وœ‰ bj=xb_j=xbjâ€‹=x çڑ„ن½چç½® jjjï¼Œه¹¶ه°†ه®ƒن»¬هˆ هژ»م€‚ ه…ˆè€ƒè™‘و€ژن¹ˆهˆ¤ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´é›†هگˆ SSS وک¯هگ¦هگˆو³•ï¼ˆèƒ½è¢«هˆ’هˆ†ن¸؛ cntcntcnt ن¸ھوœ‰ن؛¤ه­گé›†ï¼‰ï¼Œè؟™ه…¶ه®‍ç­‰ن»·ن؛ژهˆ¤و–­èƒ½هگ¦é€‰ cntcntcnt ن¸ھç‚¹ن½؟ه¾— SSS ن¸­هŒ؛é—´ه‌‡هŒ…هگ«è‡³ه°‘ن¸€ن¸ھç‚¹م€‚è؟™وک¯ن¸€ن¸ھç»ڈه…¸è´ھه؟ƒï¼ڑ ه°† SSS ن¸­هŒ؛é—´وŒ‰هڈ³ç«¯ç‚¹وژ’ه؛ڈهگژن»ژه‰چه¾€هگژو‰«ï¼ŒهگŒو—¶ç»´وٹ¤وœ€هگژن¸€ن¸ھé€‰و‹©çڑ„ç‚¹ xxxï¼› è‹¥ه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´ [l,r][l,r][l,r] و»،è¶³ l>xl>xl>xï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهœ¨ rrr ه¤„é¢‌ه¤–é€‰و‹©ن¸€ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼Œن»¤ x=rx=rx=rï¼› و³¨و„ڈهˆ°è؟™ن¸ھè´ھه؟ƒه®‍é™…ن¸ٹèƒ½و±‚ه‡؛ç¬¬ iii ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„وœ€ه¤§ن½چç½® rbirb_irbiâ€‹ï¼Œè€ŒوŒ‰ lll وژ’ه؛ڈهڈچè؟‡و‌¥è´ھه؟ƒن¸€و¬،èƒ½و±‚ه‡؛ç¬¬ iii ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈن½چç½® lbilb_ilbiâ€‹م€‚و•…وœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھç»“è®؛ï¼ڑ هŒ؛é—´ [l,r][l,r][l,r] èƒ½هٹ ه…¥هŒ؛é—´é›†هگˆ SSS ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ه…¶ه’Œ SSS ه¯¼ه‡؛çڑ„وںگن¸ھ [lbi,rbi][lb_i,rb_i][lbiâ€‹,rbiâ€‹] وœ‰ن؛¤م€‚ ه¹¶ن¸”è؟™ن؛›هŒ؛é—´è؟کوک¯ن¸¤ن¸¤ن¸چن؛¤çڑ„ï¼ڑه¦‚و‍œن¸¤ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ç›¸ن؛¤ï¼Œهˆ™هœ¨ه®ƒن»¬çڑ„ن؛¤ن¸­و”¾ن¸€ن¸ھç‚¹ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥ن؛†ï¼Œن¸چç”¨هœ¨ن¸¤ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ن¸­éƒ½ç‚¹م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè€ƒè™‘و±‚ه‡؛ن¸€و®µهگˆو³•çڑ„ه‰چç¼€ [l1,r1],[l2,r2],â€¦,[lk,rk][l_1,r_1],[l_2,r_2],\\dots,[l_k,r_k][l1â€‹,r1â€‹],[l2â€‹,r2â€‹],â€¦,[lkâ€‹,rkâ€‹]ï¼Œو­¤و—¶è¦پن¹ˆ bbb ç،®ه®ڑه®Œن؛†ï¼Œè¦پن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬ه°±ç،®ه®ڑن؛† SSS ه¯¼ه‡؛çڑ„è؟™ cntcntcnt ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´م€‚وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥é€ڑè؟‡ç؛؟و®µو ‘ن¸چو–­و‰¾هˆ°ç¼–هڈ·وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ه’Œè؟™ن؛›هŒ؛é—´وœ‰ن؛¤çڑ„هŒ؛é—´م€‚ è؟™ن¸€و­¥ن¸چèƒ½ç›´وژ¥ن؛Œهˆ†ï¼Œه› ن¸؛هچ•و¬، check ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(klogâپ،k)O(k\\log k)O(klogk) çڑ„م€‚è€ƒè™‘ç»ڈه…¸وٹ€ه·§ï¼Œه…ˆه€چه¢‍ç،®ه®ڑه‡؛ kâˆˆ[2p,2p+1)k\\in [2^p,2^{p+1})kâˆˆ[2p,2p+1)ï¼Œه†چهœ¨ [2p,2p+1)[2^p,2^{p+1})[2p,2p+1) ن¸­ن؛Œهˆ† kkkم€‚è؟™و ·ç”±ن؛ژوœ€ç»ˆè‡³ه°‘هˆ é™¤ه‰چ 2p2^p2p ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ï¼Œو•…ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ه¯¹çڑ„ï¼Œهچ³ه‌‡و‘ٹ O(mlogâپ،m)O(m\\log m)O(mlogm)م€‚ çژ°هœ¨é—®é¢کهڈکن¸؛ن¸چو–­و‰¾هˆ°ç¼–هڈ·وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„هگˆو³•هŒ؛é—´ï¼Œه°†ه…¶هٹ ه…¥ SSS ن¸­ï¼Œه¹¶ç»´وٹ¤è؟™ cntcntcnt ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´م€‚ è€ƒè™‘è‹¥هŒ؛é—´ [li,ri][l_i,r_i][liâ€‹,riâ€‹] ه®Œه…¨هŒ…هگ«ن؛†وںگن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ [lbj,rbj][lb_j,rb_j][lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹]ï¼Œهˆ™ [li,ri][l_i,r_i][liâ€‹,riâ€‹] و— è®؛ه¦‚ن½•ن¸€ه®ڑèƒ½هٹ ه…¥ SSSم€‚è؟™وک¯ه› ن¸؛ [lbj,rbj][lb_j,rb_j][lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹] هœ¨ن¹‹هگژهڈھن¼ڑç¼©ه‡ڈم€‚ه¹¶ن¸”è؟™و ·çڑ„هŒ؛é—´وک¾ç„¶ن¸چن¼ڑه¯¹è؟™ cntcntcnt ن¸ھ [lbj,rbj][lb_j,rb_j][lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹] é€ وˆگه½±ه“چم€‚و•…هڈ¯ن»¥ن½؟ç”¨ن¸€و£µç؛؟و®µو ‘ç»´وٹ¤ liâ‰¤lbjl_i\\le lb_jliâ€‹â‰¤lbjâ€‹ çڑ„وœ€ه¤§ rir_iriâ€‹ هڈٹه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„ç¼–هڈ· iiiï¼Œو¯ڈو¬، [lbj,rbj][lb_j,rb_j][lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹] و”¹هڈکçڑ„و—¶ه€™éƒ½ن¸چو–­و‰¾هˆ°ه®Œه…¨هŒ…هگ«ه®ƒçڑ„هŒ؛é—´ï¼Œه°†ه®ƒن»¬هˆ وژ‰م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆçژ°هœ¨هڈھéœ€è¦پو‰¾هˆ° âˆƒj,liâˆˆ[lbj,rbj]\\exist j,l_i\\in [lb_j,rb_j]âˆƒj,liâ€‹âˆˆ[lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹] ه’Œ âˆƒj,riâˆˆ[lbj,rbj]\\exist j,r_i\\in [lb_j,rb_j]âˆƒj,riâ€‹âˆˆ[lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹] çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ iii هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œè؟™ن¹ںهڈ¯ن»¥é€ڑè؟‡ç؛؟و®µو ‘ه’Œ set ç®€هچ•ç»´وٹ¤م€‚ وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥éœ€è¦پè€ƒè™‘هٹ ه…¥ن¸€ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ [l,r][l,r][l,r] ه¯¹è؟™ cntcntcnt ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´çڑ„ه½±ه“چï¼ڑ è‹¥ âˆƒj,lâˆˆ[lbj,rbj]\\exist j,l\\in [lb_j,rb_j]âˆƒj,lâˆˆ[lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹]ï¼Œهˆ™وک¾ç„¶هڈھن¼ڑه½±ه“چهˆ° lb[1,j]lb_{[1,j]}lb[1,j]â€‹م€‚è€Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´çڑ„ه·¦ç«¯ç‚¹هڈھن¼ڑهœ¨ن¸€و®µهŒ؛é—´çڑ„و—¶é—´ه†…وˆگن¸؛وںگن¸€ن¸ھ lbjlb_jlbjâ€‹ï¼Œو•…ç›´وژ¥وڑ´هٹ›ن؟®و”¹ه°±وک¯ه¯¹çڑ„م€‚è؟™é‡Œè؟کè¦په¼€ن¸€و£µç؛؟و®µو ‘و‰¾هˆ° SSS ن¸­هڈ³ç«¯ç‚¹ <x< x<x çڑ„هŒ؛é—´çڑ„وœ€ه¤§ه·¦ç«¯ç‚¹ï¼› è‹¥ âˆƒj,râˆˆ[lbj,rbj]\\exist j,r\\in [lb_j,rb_j]âˆƒj,râˆˆ[lbjâ€‹,rbjâ€‹]ï¼Œهˆ™وک¾ç„¶هڈھن¼ڑه½±ه“چهˆ° rb[j,cnt]rb_{[j,cnt]}rb[j,cnt]â€‹ï¼ŒهگŒن¸ٹï¼Œوڑ´هٹ›ن؟®و”¹هچ³هڈ¯ï¼› و•…و€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)ï¼ˆè®¤ن¸؛ n,mn,mn,m هگŒéک¶ï¼‰ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> #include <set> using namespace std; const int S=100005; int n,m,a[S]; int lb[S],rb[S],nxt[S],pre[S]; int mn[S<<2],mx[S<<2]; set<int> idl[S],idr[S]; set<pair<int,int> > str[S]; int mnr[S],mxl[S],ans[S]; inline int calc(int p,int len) { vector<pair<int,int> > vec; for(int i=1,u=p;i<=len;i++,u=nxt[u]) vec.emplace_back(rb[u],lb[u]); sort(vec.begin(),vec.end()); int x=0,res=0; for(auto t:vec) if(x<t.second) x=t.first,res++; return res; } inline void gets(int p,int len,vector<pair<int,int> > &res) { vector<pair<int,int> > vec; for(int i=1,u=p;i<=len;i++,u=nxt[u]) vec.emplace_back(rb[u],lb[u]); sort(vec.begin(),vec.end()); int x=0; for(auto t:vec) if(x<t.second) res.emplace_back(0,x=t.first); vec.clear(); for(int i=1,u=p;i<=len;i++,u=nxt[u]) vec.emplace_back(lb[u],rb[u]); sort(vec.begin(),vec.end(),greater<pair<int,int> >()); x=n+1; int pos=res.size()-1; for(auto t:vec) if(x>t.second) res[pos--].first=x=t.first; } inline void upda(int u) { int ls=u<<1,rs=u<<1|1; mn[u]=min(mn[ls],mn[rs]); mx[u]=rb[mx[ls]]>rb[mx[rs]]?mx[ls]:mx[rs]; } inline void initu(int u,int p) { mn[u]=m+1; if(!idl[p].empty()) mn[u]=min(mn[u],*idl[p].begin()); if(!idr[p].empty()) mn[u]=min(mn[u],*idr[p].begin()); mx[u]=0; if(!str[p].empty()) mx[u]=str[p].rbegin()->second; } void build(int u,int l,int r) { if(l==r) return initu(u,l),void(); int mid=l+r>>1; build(u<<1,l,mid),build(u<<1|1,mid+1,r); upda(u); } void updp(int u,int l,int r,int p) { if(l==r) return initu(u,l),void(); int mid=l+r>>1; if(p<=mid) updp(u<<1,l,mid,p); else updp(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,p); upda(u); } int quelr(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,int &rmx) { if(l>R||r<L) return m+1; if(l>=L&&r<=R) return rmx=rb[rmx]>rb[mx[u]]?rmx:mx[u],mn[u]; int mid=l+r>>1,res=m+1; if(L<=mid) res=min(res,quelr(u<<1,l,mid,L,R,rmx)); if(R>=mid+1) res=min(res,quelr(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R,rmx)); return res; } inline void delp(int p) { nxt[pre[p]]=nxt[p]; pre[nxt[p]]=pre[p]; idl[lb[p]].erase(p),idr[rb[p]].erase(p); str[lb[p]].erase(make_pair(rb[p],p)); updp(1,1,n,lb[p]),updp(1,1,n,rb[p]); } namespace seg2 { int mn[S<<2]; inline void upda(int u){mn[u]=min(mn[u<<1],mn[u<<1|1]);} int quelr(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R) { if(l>R||r<L) return n+1; if(l>=L&&r<=R) return mn[u]; int mid=l+r>>1,res=n+1; if(L<=mid) res=min(res,quelr(u<<1,l,mid,L,R)); if(R>=mid+1) res=min(res,quelr(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R)); return res; } void updp(int u,int l,int r,int p,int x) { if(l==r) return mn[u]=x,void(); int mid=l+r>>1; if(p<=mid) updp(u<<1,l,mid,p,x); else updp(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,p,x); upda(u); } } namespace seg3 { int mx[S<<2]; inline void upda(int u){mx[u]=max(mx[u<<1],mx[u<<1|1]);} int quelr(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R) { if(l>R||r<L) return 0; if(l>=L&&r<=R) return mx[u]; int mid=l+r>>1,res=0; if(L<=mid) res=max(res,quelr(u<<1,l,mid,L,R)); if(R>=mid+1) res=max(res,quelr(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R)); return res; } void updp(int u,int l,int r,int p,int x) { if(l==r) return mx[u]=x,void(); int mid=l+r>>1; if(p<=mid) updp(u<<1,l,mid,p,x); else updp(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,p,x); upda(u); } } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); cin>>n>>m; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>a[i]; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) cin>>lb[i]>>rb[i]; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) nxt[i]=i+1,pre[i]=i-1; nxt[0]=1; sort(a+1,a+n+1,greater<int>()); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { idl[lb[i]].insert(i),idr[rb[i]].insert(i); str[lb[i]].emplace(rb[i],i); } build(1,1,n); for(int i=1;i<=(S<<2)-3;i++) seg2::mn[i]=n+1,seg3::mx[i]=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) mnr[i]=n+1; int prem=m; for(int i=1;i<=n&&prem>0;) { int cnt=0; while(i+cnt<=n&&a[i+cnt]==a[i]) cnt++; int len=1; while(len*2<=prem&&calc(nxt[0],len*2)<=cnt) len*=2; int l=len+1,r=min(prem,len*2); while(l<=r) { int mid=l+r>>1; if(calc(nxt[0],mid)<=cnt) len=mid,l=mid+1; else r=mid-1; } vector<pair<int,int> > seg; gets(nxt[0],len,seg); set<int> st; vector<int> del; auto work=[&](int p) { del.push_back(p); mnr[lb[p]]=min(mnr[lb[p]],rb[p]); mxl[rb[p]]=max(mxl[rb[p]],lb[p]); seg2::updp(1,1,n,lb[p],mnr[lb[p]]); seg3::updp(1,1,n,rb[p],mxl[rb[p]]); ans[p]=a[i]; delp(p); prem--; }; auto fndid=[&](int x) { int p=upper_bound(seg.begin(),seg.end(),make_pair(x,n+1))-seg.begin()-1; bool inx=(p>=0&&seg[p].second>=x); return inx?p:-1; }; auto ins=[&](int i) { int rmx=0; // printf("ins %d\\n",quelr(1,1,n,seg[i].first,seg[i].second,rmx)); st.insert(quelr(1,1,n,seg[i].first,seg[i].second,rmx)); }; auto doit=[&](pair<int,int> x){ while(1) { int rmx=0; quelr(1,1,n,1,x.first,rmx); if(rb[rmx]>=x.second) { int p=rmx; work(p); int pl=fndid(lb[p]),pr=fndid(rb[p]); if(pl!=-1) ins(pl); if(pr!=-1) ins(pr); } else break; } }; auto updrb=[&](int id) { for(int i=id;i<seg.size();i++) { int nr=seg2::quelr(1,1,n,i==0?1:seg[i-1].second+1,n); if(nr==seg[i].second) { ins(i); break; } seg[i].second=nr; ins(i); doit(seg[i]); } }; auto updlb=[&](int id) { for(int i=id;i>=0;i--) { int nl=seg3::quelr(1,1,n,1,i+1==seg.size()?n:seg[i+1].first-1); if(nl==seg[i].first) { ins(i); break; } seg[i].first=nl; ins(i); doit(seg[i]); } }; // printf("%d: ",a[i]); // for(auto t:seg) printf("[%d %d] ",t.first,t.second); // printf("\\n"); for(int i=1;i<=len;i++) work(nxt[0]); for(auto t:seg) doit(t); for(int i=0;i<seg.size();i++) ins(i); while(!st.empty()) { int p=*st.begin(); // printf("pop %d\\n",p); if(p==m+1||ans[p]!=0) st.erase(p); else { st.erase(p); int pl=fndid(lb[p]),pr=fndid(rb[p]); // printf("> %d: [%d %d] (%d %d)\\n", // p,lb[p],rb[p],pl,pr); if(pl==-1&&pr==-1) continue; work(p); if(pl!=-1) updlb(pl); if(pr!=-1) updrb(pr); // for(auto t:seg) printf("[%d %d] ",t.first,t.second); // printf("\\n"); } } for(int p:del) { mnr[lb[p]]=n+1; mxl[rb[p]]=0; seg2::updp(1,1,n,lb[p],mnr[lb[p]]); seg3::updp(1,1,n,rb[p],mxl[rb[p]]); } i+=cnt; } for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) cout<<ans[i]<<'\\n'; return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"è´ھه؟ƒ","slug":"PR_0Eh8tb","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/PR_0Eh8tb/"},{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"P11983 [JOIST 2025] ه±•è§ˆن¼ڑ 3 / Exhibition 3 هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/p11983-joist-2025-zhan-lan-hui-3-exhibition-3-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"16 min read","time":937000,"words":2928,"minutes":16},"date":"2025-05-27 20:43:18","dateFormat":"2025-05-27"},{"abstract":"
\n

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaa ه’Œن¸€ن¸ھو­£و•´و•° kkkï¼Œو±‚و‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ Sâٹ†{1,2,3,â€¦,n}S\\subseteq \\{1,2,3,\\dots,n\\}Sâٹ†{1,2,3,â€¦,n} ن¸” âˆ€iâˆˆS,i+1î€ âˆˆS\\forall i\\in S,i+1\\not\\in Sâˆ€iâˆˆS,i+1î€ â€‹âˆˆS çڑ„é›†هگˆ SSS çڑ„ âˆ‘iâˆˆSai\\sum\\limits_{i\\in S}a_iiâˆˆSâˆ‘â€‹aiâ€‹ çڑ„ه’Œï¼Œه¯¹ 998244353998244353998244353 هڈ–و¨،م€‚

\n

2â‰¤nâ‰¤3أ—1052\\le n\\le 3\\times 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤3أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤kâ‰¤âŒˆn2âŒ‰1\\le k\\le \\lceil\\frac{n}{2}\\rceil1â‰¤kâ‰¤âŒˆ2nâ€‹âŒ‰م€‚

\n
\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaa ه’Œن¸€ن¸ھو­£و•´و•° kkkï¼Œو±‚و‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ Sâٹ†{1,2,3,â€¦,n}S\\subseteq \\{1,2,3,\\dots,n\\}Sâٹ†{1,2,3,â€¦,n} ن¸” âˆ€iâˆˆS,i+1î€ âˆˆS\\forall i\\in S,i+1\\not\\in Sâˆ€iâˆˆS,i+1î€ â€‹âˆˆS çڑ„é›†هگˆ SSS çڑ„ âˆ‘iâˆˆSai\\sum\\limits_{i\\in S}a_iiâˆˆSâˆ‘â€‹aiâ€‹ çڑ„ه’Œï¼Œه¯¹ 998244353998244353998244353 هڈ–و¨،م€‚ 2â‰¤nâ‰¤3أ—1052\\le n\\le 3\\times 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤3أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤kâ‰¤âŒˆn2âŒ‰1\\le k\\le \\lceil\\frac{n}{2}\\rceil1â‰¤kâ‰¤âŒˆ2nâ€‹âŒ‰م€‚ é¦–ه…ˆè€ƒè™‘و€ژن¹ˆç®—و–¹و،ˆو•°ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶هڈ¯ن»¥ن½؟ç”¨وڈ’و‌؟و³•ï¼Œهˆ™é•؟ nnn çڑ„é“¾ن¸ٹه¤§ه°ڈن¸؛ kkk çڑ„ç‹¬ç«‹é›†ه…±وœ‰ f(n,k)=(nâˆ’k+1k)f(n,k)=\\binom{n-k+1}{k}f(n,k)=(knâˆ’k+1â€‹) ن¸ھم€‚ è€ƒè™‘و‹†è´،çŒ®è®،ç®—و€»ه’Œï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆç›¸ه½“ن؛ژè¦پو‍ڑن¸¾ن¸€ن¸ھن½چç½® iii ه¹¶é’¦ه®ڑ aia_iaiâ€‹ هœ¨ç‹¬ç«‹é›†ن¸­م€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°é“¾ن¸چه¥½هپڑï¼Œن؛؛ç±»و™؛و…§هœ°è€ƒè™‘çژ¯çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼Œهچ³ن»¤ a1a_1a1â€‹ ه’Œ ana_nanâ€‹ ن¹ںن¸چèƒ½هگŒو—¶é€‰ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆو­¤و—¶éڑڈن¾؟é’¦ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھ iii ه؟…é€‰çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°éƒ½وک¯ f(nâˆ’3,kâˆ’1)f(n-3,k-1)f(nâˆ’3,kâˆ’1)م€‚ ن¸چè؟‡وˆ‘ن»¬ç®—ه°‘ن؛† a1a_1a1â€‹ ه’Œ ana_nanâ€‹ هگŒو—¶é€‰çڑ„وƒ…ه†µم€‚ه¯¹ن؛ژ a1a_1a1â€‹ ه’Œ ana_nanâ€‹ï¼Œه®ƒن»¬هœ¨ه°‘ç®—çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸­çڑ„و€»è´،çŒ®ن¸؛ (a1+an)أ—f(nâˆ’4,kâˆ’2)(a_1+a_n)\\times f(n-4,k-2)(a1â€‹+anâ€‹)أ—f(nâˆ’4,kâˆ’2)ï¼›è€Œه¯¹ن؛ژ a[3,nâˆ’2]a_{[3,n-2]}a[3,nâˆ’2]â€‹ï¼Œه®ƒن»¬ه°‘ç®—çڑ„è´،çŒ®ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژ aâ€²=a[3,nâˆ’2],kâ€²=kâˆ’2a'=a_{[3,n-2]},k'=k-2aâ€²=a[3,nâˆ’2]â€‹,kâ€²=kâˆ’2 çڑ„ه­گé—®é¢کï¼Œé€’ه½’هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،è®،ç®—éƒ½وک¯ O(1)O(1)O(1) çڑ„ï¼Œè€Œوœ€ه¤ڑé€’ه½’ nnn و¬،ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ O(n)O(n)O(n)م€‚ è¾¹ç•Œوƒ…ه†µè¦پç‰¹هˆ¤ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=300005; #define p 998244353 inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1,x=1ll*x*x%p) res=y&1?1ll*res*x%p:res; return res; } inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } int fra[S],inv[S]; int n,k,d,a[S],s[S]; inline int C(int n,int m) { if(n<0||m<0||n<m) return 0; return 1ll*fra[n]*inv[n-m]%p*inv[m]%p; } inline int f(int n,int k){return C(n-k+1,k);} int calc(int l,int r,int k) { if(k<=0) return 0; if(r<=l+1) return k!=1?0:(s[r]-s[l-1]+p)%p; if(r==l+2) { if(k==1) return (s[r]-s[l-1]+p)%p; if(k==2) return (a[l]+a[r])%p; return 0; } int res=0; res=1ll*(s[r]-s[l-1]+p)*f(r-l+1-3,k-1)%p; add(res,1ll*(a[l]+a[r])*f(r-l+1-4,k-2)%p); add(res,calc(l+2,r-2,k-2)); return res; } int main() { fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) fra[i]=1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p; inv[S-3]=qpow(fra[S-3],p-2); for(int i=S-3;i>=1;i--) inv[i-1]=1ll*inv[i]*i%p; ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); cin>>n>>k>>d; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>a[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) s[i]=a[i],add(s[i],s[i-1]); cout<<calc(1,n,k)<<'\\n'; return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"ARC120F Wine Thief هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/arc120f-wine-thief-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"5 min read","time":243000,"words":754,"minutes":5},"date":"2025-05-27 19:54:49","dateFormat":"2025-05-27"},{"abstract":"

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaaï¼Œو±‚وœ€ه¤ڑèƒ½è؟›è،Œه¤ڑه°‘و¬،ن¸ٹè؟°و“چن½œم€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤8001\\le n\\le 8001â‰¤nâ‰¤800ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤n1\\le a_i\\le n1â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤nم€‚ ن¸چن¼ڑ *2600م€‚ هˆ é™¤çڑ„è؟‡ç¨‹ن¸چه¥½هˆ»ç”»ï¼Œè€ƒè™‘وںگن¸ھن½چç½® aia_iaiâ€‹ ه’Œن¸ژه®ƒن¸€èµ·è¢«هˆ هژ»çڑ„ن½چç½® aja_jajâ€‹ï¼ˆi<ji<ji<jï¼‰ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶ a[i+1,jâˆ’1]a_{[i+1,j-1]}a[i+1,jâˆ’1]â€‹ éƒ½è¦پè¢«هˆ هژ»ï¼Œن¸”ه®ƒن»¬ن¸€ه®ڑه…ˆن؛ژ (ai,aj)(a_i,a_j)(aiâ€‹,ajâ€‹) è¢«هˆ هژ»م€‚ è؟™هگ¯هڈ‘وˆ‘ن»¬è®¾è®،çٹ¶و€پï¼ڑfl,rf_{l,r}fl,râ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه®Œه…¨هˆ é™¤ a[l,r]a_{[l,r]}a[l,r]â€‹ è‡³ه°‘éœ€è¦پهœ¨ [1,lâˆ’1][1,l-1][1,lâˆ’1] ن¸­و‰§è،Œه¤ڑه°‘و¬،هˆ é™¤و“چن½œم€‚ è½¬ç§»è€ƒè™‘و‍ڑن¸¾ه’Œ ala_lalâ€‹ ن¸€èµ·هˆ هژ»çڑ„ aka_kakâ€‹م€‚وک¾ç„¶ l<all<a_ll<alâ€‹ وˆ–è€… lî€ â‰،al(mod2)l\\not\\equiv a_l\\pmod 2lî€ â€‹â‰،alâ€‹(mod2) هˆ™ ala_lalâ€‹ ه°±و— و³•è¢«هˆ هژ»ï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™è®¾ v=lâˆ’al2v=\\frac{l-a_l}{2}v=2lâˆ’alâ€‹â€‹م€‚ç”±ن؛ژ ala_lalâ€‹ ه’Œ aka_kakâ€‹ ن¸€èµ·هˆ é™¤ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ a[l+1,kâˆ’1]a_{[l+1,k-1]}a[l+1,kâˆ’1]â€‹ ه‰چé‌¢وœ€ه¤ڑèƒ½و‰§è،Œ vvv و¬،و“چن½œï¼Œو•…è¦پو±‚ fl+1,kâˆ’1â‰¤vf_{l+1,k-1}\\le vfl+1,kâˆ’1â€‹â‰¤vï¼Œو­¤و—¶وœ‰ maxâپ،(v,fk+1,râˆ’kâˆ’l+12)â†’fl,r\\max(v,f_{k+1,r}-\\frac{k-l+1}{2})\\to f_{l,r}max(v,fk+1,râ€‹âˆ’2kâˆ’l+1â€‹)â†’fl,râ€‹م€‚ è¾¹ç•Œن¸؛ fi+1,i=0f_{i+1,i}=0fi+1,iâ€‹=0م€‚ و±‚ç­”و،ˆوک¯ç®€هچ•çڑ„ï¼Œè®¾ gig_igiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ a[1,i]a_{[1,i]}a[1,i]â€‹ ن¸­وœ€ه¤ڑو‰§è،Œه¤ڑه°‘و¬،و“چن½œï¼Œهˆ©ç”¨ fff è½¬ç§»هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n3)O(n^3)O(n3)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=805,inf=1e8; int n,a[S]; int f[S][S],g[S]; inline void slove() { cin>>n; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>a[i]; for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) f[i+1][i]=0; for(int len=2;len<=n;len+=2) for(int l=1;l<=n-len+1;l++) { int r=l+len-1; f[l][r]=inf; if(l>=a[l]&&(l-a[l]&1^1)) { int val=(l-a[l])/2; for(int k=l+1;k<=r;k+=2) if(f[l+1][k-1]<=val) { int pre=max( val, f[k+1][r]-(k-l+1)/2 ); f[l][r]=min(f[l][r],pre); } } } g[0]=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { g[i]=g[i-1]; for(int j=i-1;j>=1;j-=2) if(g[j-1]>=f[j][i]) g[i]=max(g[i],g[j-1]+(i-j+1)/2); } cout<<g[n]<<'\\n'; } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); int T; cin>>T; while(T-->0) slove(); return 0; } F_XG_{S-X}(Fأ—G)Sâ€‹=Xâٹ†Sâˆ‘â€‹FXâ€‹GSâˆ’Xâ€‹ 2. é«کç»´ه‰چç¼€ه’Œï¼ˆFMTï¼‰ ه®ڑن¹‰é›†هگˆه¹‚ç؛§و•°çڑ„é«کç»´ه‰چç¼€ه’Œï¼ˆFMTï¼‰ï¼ڑ FMT(F)S=âˆ‘Tâٹ†SFT\\text{FMT}(F)_S=\\sum\\limits_{T\\subseteq S} F_T FMT(F)Sâ€‹=Tâٹ†Sâˆ‘â€‹FTâ€‹ وک¾ç„¶هڈ¯ن»¥هœ¨ O(n2n)O(n2^n)O(n2n) çڑ„ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه†…و±‚ه‡؛ï¼Œè€Œه…¶é€†هڈکوچ¢ IFMT\\text{IFMT}IFMT ن¹ںهڈ¯ن»¥هœ¨ O(n2n)O(n2^n)O(n2n) çڑ„ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه†…ه®Œوˆگم€‚ è€ƒè™‘ه…¶و€§è´¨ï¼ڑ FMT(F+G)S=âˆ‘Tâٹ†SFT+GT=FMT(F)+FMT(G)\\text{FMT}(F+G)_S=\\sum\\limits_{T\\subseteq S}F_T+G_T=\\text{FMT}(F)+\\text{FMT}(G)FMT(F+G)Sâ€‹=Tâٹ†Sâˆ‘â€‹FTâ€‹+GTâ€‹=FMT(F)+FMT(G)ï¼› FMT(Fâˆ—G)S=âˆ‘Tâٹ†Sâˆ‘X,Yâٹ†U,XâˆھY=TFXGY=âˆ‘X,Yâٹ†U,XâˆھYâٹ†SFXGY=FMT(F)Sأ—FMT(G)S\\text{FMT}(F*G)_S=\\sum\\limits_{T\\subseteq S}\\sum\\limits_{X,Y\\subseteq U,X\\cup Y = T} F_XG_Y=\\sum\\limits_{X,Y\\subseteq U,X\\cup Y\\subseteq S} F_XG_Y=\\text{FMT}(F)_S\\times هٹ ن¸€و¬، IFMT\\text{IFMT}IFMT ه®Œوˆگï¼Œه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n2n)O(n2^n)O(n2n)م€‚ è€Œه¯¹ن؛ژ FMT(Fأ—G)\\text{FMT}(F\\times G)FMT(Fأ—G)ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ°ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژهœ¨è®،ç®— FMT(Fâˆ—G)\\text{FMT}(F*G)FMT(Fâˆ—G) çڑ„هگŒو—¶è¦پو±‚ âˆ£Xâˆ£+âˆ£Yâˆ£=âˆ£Sâˆ£|X|+|Y|=|S|âˆ£Xâˆ£+âˆ£Yâˆ£=âˆ£Sâˆ£ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥ن»¤ Râ€²=R[x]R'=R[x]Râ€²=R[x]ï¼Œهچ³ RRR ن¸ٹçڑ„ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçژ¯ï¼Œه¹¶ن»¤ FSâ€²=xâˆ£Sâˆ£FSF'_S=x^{|S|}F_SFSâ€²â€‹=xâˆ£Sâˆ£FSâ€‹ï¼ŒGSâ€²=xâˆ£Sâˆ£GSG'_S=x^{|S|}G_SGSâ€²â€‹=xâˆ£Sâˆ£GSâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ FMT(Fأ—G)S=[xâˆ£Sâˆ£]FMT(Fâ€²âˆ—Gâ€²)S\\text{FMT}(F\\times G)_S=[x^{|S|}]\\text{FMT}(F'*G')_SFMT(Fأ—G)Sâ€‹=[xâˆ£Sâˆ£]FMT(Fâ€²âˆ—Gâ€²)Sâ€‹م€‚ ن؛ژوک¯ Fأ—GF\\times GFأ—G هڈ¯ن»¥é€ڑè؟‡ R[x]R[x]R[x] ن¸ٹçڑ„ن¸¤و¬، FMT\\text{FMT}FMTï¼Œن¸€و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈن¹کو³•ه’Œن¸€و¬، IFMT\\text{IFMT}IFMT ه®Œوˆگï¼Œه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ n22nn^22^nn22nم€‚ 3. é›†هگˆه¹‚ç؛§و•°ه’Œه½¢ه¼ڈه¹‚ç؛§و•°ه¤چهگˆ ه¯¹ن؛ژهگŒو ·ه®ڑن¹‰هœ¨ RRR ن¸ٹçڑ„و­£وŒ‡و•°ه½¢ه¼ڈه¹‚ç؛§و•° H(x)âˆˆR[x]H(x)\\in R[x]H(x)âˆˆR[x]ï¼Œè®¾ه…¶ن¸؛ H(x)=âˆ‘i=1âˆ‍hixiH(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^\\infin h_ix^iH(x)=i=1âˆ‘âˆ‍â€‹hiâ€‹xiم€‚ه®ڑن¹‰é›†هگˆه¹‚ç؛§و•° FFF هœ¨ HHH ن¸ٹçڑ„ه¤چهگˆ H(F)H(F)H(F)ï¼ڑ H(F)=âˆ‘i=1âˆ‍hiFiH(F)=\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^\\infin h_iF^i H(F)=i=1âˆ‘âˆ‍â€‹hiâ€‹Fi ه…¶ن¸­ FiF^iFi ن¸؛ iii ن¸ھ FFF çڑ„و— ن؛¤ه¹¶ن¹کç§¯م€‚ è؟™é‡Œهپ‡ه®ڑ 0,cnt'_{p_2}:=cnt_{p_1},\\dots,cnt'_{p_k}:=cnt_{p_{k-1}}cntp1â€‹â€²â€‹:=0,cntp2â€‹â€²â€‹:=cntp1â€‹â€‹,â€¦,cntpkâ€‹â€²â€‹:=cntpkâˆ’1â€‹â€‹ï¼Œç„¶هگژن»¤ cntar+1cnt_{a_{r+1}}cntar+1â€‹â€‹ و”¹ن¸؛ iiiم€‚è€Œو±‚ç­”و،ˆهڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ç»´وٹ¤و¯ڈن¸ھ yyy هœ¨ cntcntcnt و•°ç»„ن¸­ه‡؛çژ°è؟‡ ctyct_yctyâ€‹ و¬،ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهچ•و­¥و‰«وڈڈç؛؟ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژه°† ctict_{i}ctiâ€‹ هٹ ن¸€ï¼Œç„¶هگژه°†ç»“و‌ںهگژçڑ„ Aâ€²A'Aâ€² çڑ„ ctAâ€²ct_{A'}ctAâ€²â€‹ ه‡ڈن¸€م€‚ هپڑو³•è€ƒè™‘هˆ†ه‌—ï¼Œهپ‡è®¾ه‌—é•؟ن¸؛ BBBم€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژو•´ه‌—ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھو•°è؟›ه…¥ن¸€ن¸ھه‌—هگژه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„و•°وک¾ç„¶هڈھه’Œè؟™ن¸ھه‌—çڑ„وœ€ه¤§ه€¼وœ‰ه…³ç³»ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆو¯ڈن¸ھه‌—ه¼€ن¸ھه¤§و ¹ه †ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،è‹¥ AAA و¯”ه †é،¶ه°ڈهˆ™ن؛¤وچ¢ن¸€ن¸‹ AAA ه’Œه †é،¶م€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژو•£ه‌—ï¼Œç®€هچ•هˆ†è®¨هڈ¯ن»¥هڈ‘çژ°ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸¤و¬،ه¯¹و•´ه‌—çڑ„ن؟®و”¹ x,yx,yx,yï¼Œه…ˆهپڑ A=xA=xA=x ه†چهپڑ A=yA=yA=y ه’Œه…ˆهپڑ A=yA=yA=y ه†چهپڑ A=xA=xA=x çڑ„ç»“و‍œوک¯ن¸€و ·çڑ„ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸چه¦¨é’¦ه®ڑوک¯ن»ژه°ڈهˆ°ه¤§و“چن½œم€‚ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œوٹٹه¯¹و•´ه‌—çڑ„و“چن½œه­کè؟›ن¸€ن¸ھه°ڈو ¹ه †ï¼Œç„¶هگژن»ژه·¦ه¾€هڈ³éپچهژ†ه‌—ه†…çڑ„ aia_iaiâ€‹ï¼Œè‹¥ aia_iaiâ€‹ و¯”ه †é،¶ه¤§ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه°±ن؛¤وچ¢ aia_iaiâ€‹ ه’Œه †é،¶م€‚è؟™و ·ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥هœ¨ O(Blogâپ،n)O(B\\log n)O(Blogn) çڑ„ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦é‡چو‍„وںگن¸ھه‌—ï¼Œن»ژè€Œوڑ´هٹ›è؟›è،Œو•£ه‌—çڑ„ن؟®و”¹م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆو€»ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ O(n2Blogâپ،n+nBlogâپ،n)O(\\frac{n^2}{B}\\log n+nB\\log n)O(Bn2â€‹logn+nBlogn)ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ BBB ه؛”هڈ– n\\sqrt nnâ€‹م€‚ن¸چè؟‡ç”±ن؛ژن؟®و”¹و•´ه‌—ه¸¸و•°è¾ƒه°ڈï¼ˆهڈھç”¨è؟›è،Œè‡³ه¤ڑن¸€و¬،ن؛¤وچ¢ه †é،¶و“چن½œï¼‰ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ BBB هڈ¯ن»¥ه¼€ه°ڈن¸€ç‚¹م€‚ ه›‍هˆ°وœ¬é¢کï¼Œه†چç”¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ç»´وٹ¤ ctctct هچ³هڈ¯هپڑهˆ° O(nnlogâپ،n+qlogâپ،n)O(n\\sqrt n\\log n+q\\log n)O(nnâ€‹logn+qlogn)ï¼Œن¹ںهڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ن؟®و”¹ O(n)O(\\sqrt n)O(nâ€‹) وں¥è¯¢ O(1)O(1)O(1) çڑ„ه‰چç¼€ه’Œهˆ†ه‌—هپڑهˆ° O(nnlogâپ،n+q)O(n\\sqrt n\\log n+q)O(nnâ€‹logn+q)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <queue> using namespace std; template<typename T> inline void read(T &x) { x=0; T w=1; char c=getchar(); while(c<'0'||c>'9') w=(c=='-'?-w:w),c=getchar(); while(c>='0'&&c<='9') x=x*10+(c^48),c=getchar(); x*=w; } const int S=100005,BS=150,QS=1000005; int n,q; int a[S],c[S]; int lb[S/BS+5],rb[S/BS+5]; priority_queue<int> b[S/BS+5],que[S/BS+5]; vector<pair<int,int> > vec[S]; int tr[S],ans[QS]; inline void dwntag(int u) { if(que[u].empty()) return; int l=lb[u],r=rb[u]; for(int i=l;i<=r;i++) { int x=-que[u].top(); if(c[i]>x) { swap(c[i],x); que[u].pop(); que[u].push(-x); } } while(!que[u].empty()) que[u].pop(); } inline void rebuild(int u) { int l=lb[u],r=rb[u]; while(!b[u].empty()) b[u].pop(); for(int i=l;i<=r;i++) b[u].push(c[i]); } inline int doit(int l,int x) { int ul=(l-1)/BS+1; if(rb[ul]==n) { dwntag(ul); for(int i=l;i<=n;i++) if(c[i]>x) swap(c[i],x); rebuild(ul); return x; } dwntag(ul); for(int i=l;i<=rb[ul];i++) if(c[i]>x) swap(c[i],x); rebuild(ul); for(int i=ul+1;i<=(n-1)/BS+1;i++) { int mx=b[i].top(); if(mx>x) { que[i].push(-x); swap(mx,x); b[i].pop(); b[i].push(mx); } } return x; } inline void addtr(int p,int x){for(int i=p;i<=n;i+=i&-i) tr[i]+=x;} inline int quetr(int p) { int res=0; for(int i=p;i>=1;i-=i&-i) res+=tr[i]; return res; } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); read(n),read(q); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) read(a[i]); for(int i=1;i<=n;i+=BS) { int u=(i-1)/BS+1; lb[u]=(u-1)*BS+1,rb[u]=min(u*BS,n); rebuild(u); } for(int i=1;i<=q;i++) { int l,r; read(l),read(r); vec[r].emplace_back(l,i); } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int del=doit(a[i],0); int u=(a[i]-1)/BS+1; dwntag(u); c[a[i]]=i; rebuild(u); if(del!=0) addtr(n-del+1,-1); addtr(n-i+1,1); for(auto t:vec[i]) ans[t.second]=quetr(n-t.first+1); } for(int i=1;i<=q;i++) cout<<ans[i]<<'\\n'; return 0; } ه“ˆه¸Œه€¼ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھé›†هگˆçڑ„ه“ˆه¸Œه€¼وک¯ه…¶ه…ƒç´ çڑ„ه“ˆه¸Œه€¼çڑ„ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œم€‚ ن¾‹é¢کï¼ڑ P8819 [CSP-S 2022] وکںوˆک م€گ2025وڑ‘وœںACM04م€‘ه›¾è®،ç®— Schwartz-Zippel ه®ڑçگ† ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€ن¸ھهںں FFFï¼ˆé€ڑه¸¸ن¸؛ mod p\\text{mod}\\, pmodp هںںï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ ppp ن¸؛ه¤§è´¨و•°ï¼‰ن¸‹çڑ„ mmm ه…ƒ nnn و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ f(x1,x2,â€¦,xm)f(x_1,x_2,\\dots,x_m)f(x1â€‹,x2â€‹,â€¦,xmâ€‹)ï¼Œè‹¥و¯ڈن¸ھ xix_ixiâ€‹ ه‌‡هœ¨ FFF ن¸­ç‹¬ç«‹ç­‰و¦‚çژ‡éڑڈوœ؛ï¼Œهˆ™ f(x1,x2,â€¦,xm)=0f(x_1,x_2,\\dots,x_m)=0f(x1â€‹,x2â€‹,â€¦,xmâ€‹)=0 çڑ„و¦‚çژ‡ â‰¤nâˆ£Fâˆ£\\le \\frac{n}{|F|}â‰¤âˆ£Fâˆ£nâ€‹م€‚ و„ںو€§çگ†è§£ï¼Œن¸€ه…ƒçڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹ fff وœ‰ nnn ن¸ھو ¹ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶م€‚ è؟™ن¸ھن¸œè¥؟هچپهˆ†ه®‍ç”¨ï¼Œه¸¸ç”¨ن؛ژو£€éھŒهگ„ç§چن¸œè¥؟وک¯هگ¦ن¸؛ 000ï¼ˆن¾‹ه¦‚é€ڑè؟‡è،Œهˆ—ه¼ڈه؟«é€ںو£€éھŒç§¯ه’Œه¼ڈوک¯هگ¦ن¸؛ 000ï¼‰م€‚ ن¾‹é¢کï¼ڑ P10102 [GDKOI2023 وڈگé«کç»„] çں©éکµ وœ€ه¤§ه›¢çڑ„ç»ڈه…¸éڑڈوœ؛ç®—و³• éڑڈوœ؛ن¸€ن¸ھهٹ ç‚¹é،؛ه؛ڈï¼ŒوŒ‰ç…§è؟™ن¸ھé،؛ه؛ڈهٹ ç‚¹م€‚è‹¥هٹ è؟›هژ»هگژè؟کوک¯ه›¢هˆ™هٹ è؟›هژ»ï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™ن¸چهٹ م€‚è؟™ن¸ھن¸œè¥؟ه®‍é™…ن¸ٹه¾ˆéڑ¾هچ،م€‚ ه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•°ه¤§ن؛ژن¸€هچٹï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،éڑڈوœ؛هŒ–هڈ¯ن»¥ç¼©ه°ڈن¸€هچٹé”™è¯¯çژ‡ ن¾‹é¢کï¼ڑCF364D Ghd é¢کè§£ è‡³ه°‘ن¸€هچٹçڑ„و•°çڑ„ه› و•°ï¼Œè؟™هگ¯هڈ‘وˆ‘ن»¬وƒ³هˆ°éڑڈوœ؛هŒ–م€‚ ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،éڑڈوœ؛ن¸€ن¸ھ ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه­—ç¬¦ن¸²ï¼Œو±‚وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ LLL ن½؟ه¾— S[1,L]S_{[1,L]}S[1,L]â€‹ ه’Œ S[nâˆ’L+1,n]S_{[n-L+1,n]}S[nâˆ’L+1,n]â€‹ وک¯ه¾ھçژ¯هگŒو‍„çڑ„م€‚

1â‰¤nâ‰¤1061\\le n\\le 10^61â‰¤nâ‰¤106م€‚

\n","content":" ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸¤ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ن¸² A,BA,BA,Bï¼Œè‹¥èƒ½ه°† AAA çڑ„ن¸€ن¸ھهگژç¼€و•´ن½“ç§»هٹ¨هˆ° AAA çڑ„ه‰چé‌¢هˆ™ç§°ه®ƒن»¬وک¯ه¾ھçژ¯هگŒو‍„çڑ„م€‚ ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه­—ç¬¦ن¸²ï¼Œو±‚وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ LLL ن½؟ه¾— S[1,L]S_{[1,L]}S[1,L]â€‹ ه’Œ S[nâˆ’L+1,n]S_{[n-L+1,n]}S[nâˆ’L+1,n]â€‹ وک¯ه¾ھçژ¯هگŒو‍„çڑ„م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤1061\\le n\\le 10^61â‰¤nâ‰¤106م€‚ ç¬¬ن¸€و­¥ه°±و²،وƒ³هˆ°م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ن¸¤ن¸ھن¸²ه¾ھçژ¯هگŒو‍„ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ن¸€ن¸ھن¸²وک¯ ABABAB è€Œهڈ¦ن¸€ن¸ھن¸²وک¯ BABABAï¼Œو•…وœ‰ S=ABCBAS=ABCBAS=ABCBAم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆو‍ڑن¸¾ AAA çڑ„é•؟ه؛¦ï¼Œç„¶هگژé—®é¢که°±هڈکوˆگو±‚ه¤´ه°¾éƒ½هژ»وژ‰ xxx ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦هگژçڑ„ borderم€‚ è®¾ fif_ifiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه¤´ه°¾éƒ½هژ»وژ‰ iii ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦هگژçڑ„ borderï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوک¾ç„¶وœ‰ fi+1â‰¥fiâˆ’2f_{i+1}\\ge f_i-2fi+1â€‹â‰¥fiâ€‹âˆ’2ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ iii ن»ژه¤§ه¾€ه°ڈو¯ڈو¬،وڑ´هٹ›ه¾€ه‰چè·‘و‰¾هˆ°ç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھهگˆو³•هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œه®‍çژ°و³¨و„ڈéœ€è¦پهڈŒه“ˆه¸Œم€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; typedef long long ll; const int S=1000005; const int bse=31,p1=1000000007,p2=998244353; int n; char a[S]; int pw1[S],pw2[S]; int h1[S],h2[S]; inline int cal1(int l,int r) { return (h1[r]-1ll*pw1[r-l+1]*h1[l-1]%p1+p1)%p1; } inline int cal2(int l,int r) { return (h2[r]-1ll*pw2[r-l+1]*h2[l-1]%p2+p2)%p2; } inline bool chk(int l,int r,int k) { if(k==0) return true; return cal1(l,l+k-1)==cal1(r-k+1,r)&& cal2(l,l+k-1)==cal2(r-k+1,r); } int main() { scanf("%d%s",&n,a+1); pw1[0]=pw2[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { pw1[i]=1ll*pw1[i-1]*bse%p1; pw2[i]=1ll*pw2[i-1]*bse%p2; h1[i]=(1ll*h1[i-1]*bse+a[i]-'a'+1)%p1; h2[i]=(1ll*h2[i-1]*bse+a[i]-'a'+1)%p2; } int ans=0; for(int l=n/2,r=n/2+1+(n&1),len=0;l>=1;l--,r++) { if(chk(1,n,l)) ans=max(ans,l+len); if(len+2<=(r-l+1)/2&&chk(l,r,len+2)) len+=2; else if(len+1<=(r-l+1)/2&&chk(l,r,len+1)) len++; while(!chk(l,r,len)) len--; } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"ه­—ç¬¦ن¸²","slug":"wtMqnxQGh","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/wtMqnxQGh/"}],"title":"P3546 [POI2012] PRE-Prefixuffix هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/p3546-poi2012-pre-prefixuffix-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"3 min read","time":157000,"words":497,"minutes":3},"date":"2025-04-14 19:25:41","dateFormat":"2025-04-14"},{"abstract":"

\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸‰ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— A,B,CA,B,CA,B,Cï¼Œو‰¾هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھç¬¦هگˆن»¥ن¸‹و‌،ن»¶ن¸”ه¤§ه°ڈوœ€ه¤§çڑ„é›†هگˆ SSSï¼ڑ ه…¶èƒ½è¢«è؟™و ·ç”ںوˆگï¼ڑه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈن¸ھ iâˆˆ[1,n]i\\in [1, n]iâˆˆ[1,n]ï¼Œهگ‘ SSS ن¸­هٹ ه…¥ AiA_iAiâ€‹ وˆ–è€… BiB_iBiâ€‹ï¼› ه…¶èƒ½è¢«è؟™و ·ç”ںوˆگï¼ڑه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈن¸ھ iâˆˆ[1,n]i\\in [1, n]iâˆˆ[1,n]ï¼Œهگ‘ SSS ن¸­هٹ ه…¥ AiA_iAiâ€‹ وˆ–è€… CiC_iCiâ€‹ï¼› éœ€è¦پè¾“ه‡؛و–¹و،ˆم€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤50001\\le n\\le 50001â‰¤nâ‰¤5000ï¼Œ1â‰¤Ai,Bi,Ciâ‰¤100001\\le A_i,B_i,C_i\\le 100001â‰¤Aiâ€‹,Biâ€‹,Ciâ€‹â‰¤10000م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ه¼±هŒ–é™گهˆ¶ï¼Œه¦‚و‍œç»™و¯ڈو¬،و“چن½œه¢‍هٹ ن¸€ن¸ھâ€œن»€ن¹ˆéƒ½ن¸چهپڑâ€‌çڑ„é€‰é،¹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥ç›´وژ¥è·‘وœ€ه¤§وµپم€‚ ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥ه»؛ه››وژ’ç‚¹ï¼Œو‰€وœ‰è¾¹وµپé‡ڈéƒ½وک¯ 111ï¼ڑï¼ˆه›¾و‌¥è‡ھ Schi2oid çڑ„é¢کè§£ï¼‰ è؟™و ·هپڑçڑ„é—®é¢کوک¯è·‘ه®Œوœ€ه¤§وµپهگژوœ‰هڈ¯èƒ½ه­کهœ¨وںگن؛›ç¬¬ن؛Œوژ’وˆ–è€…ه€’و•°ç¬¬ن؛Œوژ’çڑ„ç‚¹ه®‍é™…ن¸ٹن»€ن¹ˆéƒ½و²،هپڑï¼Œهچ³ه®ƒن»¬ه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„ه‡؛è¾¹/ه…¥è¾¹ن¸­و²،وœ‰ç‚¹è¢«وµپç»ڈم€‚ن¸چه¦¨ç§°è؟™ن؛›ç‚¹ن¸؛â€œç©؛ç‚¹â€‌م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ن¸چو–­è·‘وµپçڑ„è؟‡ç¨‹ن¸­ن»€ن¹ˆو—¶ه€™ن¼ڑه¢‍هٹ و–°çڑ„â€œç©؛ç‚¹â€‌ uuuï¼Œه…ˆو‌¥è€ƒè™‘ uuu هœ¨ç¬¬ن؛Œوژ’çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼ˆهœ¨ه€’و•°ç¬¬ن؛Œوژ’هگŒçگ†ï¼‰م€‚وک¾ç„¶ن¸چهڈ¯èƒ½هگŒو—¶é€€وژ‰ uuu çڑ„ن¸¤ن¸ھه‡؛ç‚¹ï¼Œو•…ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯é€€وژ‰ن؛† uuu çڑ„ن¸€ن¸ھه‡؛ç‚¹ xxxم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆé€€وµپن¹‹ه‰چ Sâ†’uS\\to uSâ†’u çڑ„è¾¹è‚¯ه®ڑو²،و»،وµپï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™ uuu وµپهگ‘ن؛† xxxï¼Œè؟™و¬،é€€وµپن¸€ه®ڑن¼ڑç»ڈè؟‡ uuuï¼Œهˆ™ uuu ن¸چن¼ڑهڈکوˆگâ€œç©؛ç‚¹â€‌م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆن¸€ه®ڑهڈ¯ن»¥ه°† Sâ†’...â†’xS\\to ...\\to xSâ†’...â†’x è؟™ن¸€و®µè·¯ه¾„ç›´وژ¥وچ¢وˆگ Sâ†’uâ†’xS\\to u\\to xSâ†’uâ†’xï¼Œè؟™و ·ه¢‍ه¹؟è·¯çڑ„é•؟ه؛¦ه؟…ه®ڑن¼ڑهڈکçں­ï¼Œè€Œ uuu ه°†ن¸چه†چوک¯â€œç©؛ç™½ç‚¹â€‌م€‚ و‰€ن»¥و¯ڈو¬،و‰¾وœ€çں­çڑ„ه¢‍ه¹؟è·¯هژ»ه¢‍ه¹؟ه°±ن¸€ه®ڑن¸چن¼ڑن½؟â€œç©؛ç™½ç‚¹â€‌هڈکه¤ڑم€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ° dinic و¯ڈو¬،و‰¾çڑ„ه¢‍ه¹؟è·¯ه°±وک¯وœ€çں­çڑ„ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ه…ˆé’¦ه®ڑو¯ڈو¬،éƒ½é€‰و‹© AiA_iAiâ€‹ï¼Œه†چè·‘ dinic هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <queue> using namespace std; const int S=300005,V=10000,inf=1e8; int n,A[S],B[S],C[S]; int vis[S],idx[S]; int esum=1,to[S],c[S],nxt[S],h[S]; int s,t; int dep[S],cur[S]; inline void added(int x,int y,int w) { to[++esum]=y; c[esum]=w; nxt[esum]=h[x]; h[x]=esum; } inline void add(int x,int y,int w) { added(x,y,w),added(y,x,w^1); } inline bool bfs() { for(int i=s;i<=t;i++) dep[i]=0,cur[i]=h[i]; queue<int> q; dep[s]=1; q.push(s); while(!q.empty()) { int u=q.front(); q.pop(); for(int i=h[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i],w=c[i]; if(w>0&&dep[v]==0) { dep[v]=dep[u]+1; q.push(v); } } } return dep[t]>0; } int dfs(int u,int w) { if(u==t) return w; int sum=0; for(int &i=cur[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { if(c[i]==0) continue; int v=to[i]; if(dep[v]!=dep[u]+1) continue; int r=dfs(v,min(c[i],w)); c[i]-=r; c[i^1]+=r; w-=r; sum+=r; if(w==0) break; } if(sum==0) dep[u]=0; return sum; } inline int dinic() { int res=0; while(bfs()) res+=dfs(s,inf); return res; } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&A[i]); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&B[i]); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&C[i]); s=0,t=n*2+V*2+1; int res=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int x=1; if(vis[A[i]]==0) { vis[A[i]]=1; res++; x=0; } add(s,i,x); add(n+i,t,x); add(i,n*2+A[i],x); add(i,n*2+B[i],1); add(n*2+V+A[i],n+i,x); add(n*2+V+C[i],n+i,1); } for(int i=1;i<=V;i++) add(n*2+i,n*2+V+i,vis[i]^1),idx[i]=esum; res+=dinic(); printf("%d\\n",res); for(int i=1;i<=V;i++) if(c[idx[i]]>0) printf("%d ",i); printf("\\n"); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"ه›¾è®؛","slug":"GE8D1uUdm","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/GE8D1uUdm/"},{"name":"ç½‘ç»œوµپ","slug":"19EjLeSB_D","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/19EjLeSB_D/"}],"title":"ARC156F ه®ڑن¹‰و­£و•´و•° nnn çڑ„و‹†هˆ† خ»[1,k]={خ»1,خ»2,â€¦,خ»k}\\lambda_{[1,k]}=\\{\\lambda_{1},\\lambda_{2},\\dots,\\lambda_{k}\\}خ»[1,k]â€‹={خ»1â€‹,خ»2â€‹,â€¦,خ»kâ€‹}ï¼Œه…¶éœ€è¦پو»،è¶³ï¼ڑ âˆ€1â‰¤iâ‰¤k\\forall 1\\le i\\le kâˆ€1â‰¤iâ‰¤kï¼Œéƒ½وœ‰ خ»iâˆˆN+\\lambda_i\\in \\N^+خ»iâ€‹âˆˆN+ï¼› n=âˆ‘i=1kخ»in=\\sum \\limits_{i=1}^k \\lambda_in=i=1âˆ‘kâ€‹خ»iâ€‹ï¼› âˆ€1â‰¤i<k\\forall 1\\le i<kâˆ€1â‰¤i<kï¼Œéƒ½وœ‰ خ»iâ‰¥خ»i+1\\lambda_i\\ge \\lambda_{i+1}خ»iâ€‹â‰¥خ»i+1â€‹ï¼› ه®ڑن¹‰ 1.2ï¼ˆو‌¨ه›¾ï¼‰ ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€ن¸ھ nnn çڑ„و‹†هˆ† خ»[1,k]\\lambda_{[1,k]}خ»[1,k]â€‹ï¼Œه®ڑن¹‰ه…¶ه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„و‌¨ه›¾ن¸؛ن¸€ن¸ھ kkk è،Œçڑ„éک¶و¢¯çٹ¶ç½‘و ¼ه›¾ï¼Œو»،è¶³ç¬¬ iii è،Œوœ‰ خ»i\\lambda_iخ»iâ€‹ ن¸ھو ¼ه­گم€‚ ن¾‹ه¦‚è؟™وک¯ خ»[1,8]={9,9,7,3,3,3,3,1}\\lambda_{[1,8]}=\\{9,9,7,3,3,3,3,1\\}خ»[1,8]â€‹={9,9,7,3,3,3,3,1} ه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„و‌¨ه›¾ï¼ڑ ه®ڑن¹‰ 1.3.1ï¼ˆو ‡ه‡†و‌¨è،¨ï¼‰ ه°† [1,n][1,n][1,n] ه،«ه…¥ ه€¼ه¾—و³¨و„ڈçڑ„وک¯ï¼ŒPpP_pPpâ€‹ çڑ„ç¬¬ن¸€è،Œه¹¶ن¸چن¸€ه®ڑه°±وک¯ ppp çڑ„ LIS وœ¬è؛«ï¼Œو•…ن¸چèƒ½ç”¨و‌¨è،¨هپڑ LIS هˆ’هˆ†ن¹‹ç±»çڑ„é—®é¢کم€‚ ه¼•çگ† 4.2 ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€ن¸ھو‌¨è،¨ SSS ه’Œن¸¤ن¸ھه…ƒç´  x,yx,yx,yï¼Œوœ‰ xâ†’(Sâ†گy)=(xâ†’S)â†گyx\\rightarrow (S\\leftarrow y)=(x\\rightarrow S)\\leftarrow yxâ†’(Sâ†گy)=(xâ†’S)â†گyم€‚ ه®ڑن¹‰و‌¨è،¨ SSS çڑ„è½¬ç½® STS^TST ن¸؛ن؛¤وچ¢ SSS çڑ„è،Œهˆ—هگژه¾—هˆ°çڑ„و‌¨è،¨ï¼Œهˆ™ Sâ†گx=(xâ†’ST)TS\\leftarrow x=\\left(x\\rightarrow S^T\\right)^TSâ†گx=(xâ†’ST)Tï¼Œهˆ—وڈ’ه…¥هگŒçگ†م€‚ ç¬¬ن¸€ç‚¹è¯پوکژوک¯ç®€هچ•çڑ„ï¼Œè€ƒè™‘وڈ’ه…¥è؟‡ç¨‹ن¸­é،¶و›؟وژ‰çڑ„و ¼ه­گه½¢وˆگçڑ„è·¯ه¾„ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶è،Œوڈ’ه…¥çڑ„è·¯ه¾„وک¯و–œهگ‘ه·¦ن¸‹çڑ„ï¼Œè€Œهˆ—وڈ’ه…¥çڑ„è·¯ه¾„وک¯و–œهگ‘هڈ³ن¸ٹçڑ„ï¼Œç„¶هگژهˆ†è®¨ن¸€ن¸‹ x,yx,yx,y é—´ه¤§ه°ڈه…³ç³»هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ è€Œç¬¬ن؛Œç‚¹وک¯وک¾ç„¶çڑ„م€‚ ç”±و­¤ه¼•çگ†ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬ه¾—ن»¥ه¯¼ه‡؛ PpP_pPpâ€‹ ه’Œ PpRP_{p^R}PpRâ€‹ é—´çڑ„ه…³ç³»م€‚ ه®ڑçگ† 4.2 ه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€ن¸ھوژ’هˆ— pppï¼Œه®ڑن¹‰ pRp^RpR ن¸؛ه…¶ه¤´ه°¾ç؟»è½¬ه½¢وˆگçڑ„وژ’هˆ—ï¼ˆpiR=pnâˆ’i+1p^R_i=p_{n-i+1}piRâ€‹=pnâˆ’i+1â€‹ï¼‰م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ Pp=PpRTP_p=P_{p_R}^TPpâ€‹=PpRâ€‹Tâ€‹م€‚ و³¨و„ڈè¯¥ه®ڑçگ†ه¯¹ QQQ ن¸چوˆگç«‹م€‚ è¯پوکژè€ƒè™‘ه½’ç؛³ï¼Œâˆ£pâˆ£=2|p|=2âˆ£pâˆ£=2 و—¶وک¾ç„¶وˆگç«‹م€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژ n=âˆ£pâˆ£>2n=|p|>2n=âˆ£pâˆ£>2 çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ Pp=Pp[1,nâˆ’1]â†گpn=Pp[1,nâˆ’1]RTâ†گpn=(p1â†’Pp[2,nâˆ’1]RT)â†گpn=p1â†’(Pp[2,nâˆ’1]RTâ†گpn)=p1â†’(Pp[2,nâˆ’1]â†گpn)=p1â†’Pp[2,n]=p1â†’Pp[2,n]RT=PpRT\\begin{aligned} P_p&=P_{p_{[1,n-1]}}\\leftarrow p_n\\\\ &=P^T_{p_{[1,n-1]}^R}\\leftarrow p_n\\\\ &=\\left(p_1\\rightarrow P^T_{p_{[2,n-1]}^R}\\right)\\leftarrow p_n\\\\ &=p_1\\rightarrow \\left(P^T_{p_{[2,n-1]}^R}\\leftarrow p_n\\right)\\\\ &=p_1\\rightarrow \\left(P_{p_{[2,n-1]}}\\leftarrow p_n\\right)\\\\ &=p_1\\rightarrow P_{p_{[2,n]}}\\\\ &=p_1\\rightarrow P^T_{p^R_{[2,n]}}\\\\ &=P^T_{p^R}\\\\ \\end{aligned} Ppâ€‹â€‹=Pp[1,nâˆ’1]â€‹â€‹â†گpnâ€‹=Pp[1,nâˆ’1]Râ€‹Tâ€‹â†گpnâ€‹=(p1â€‹â†’Pp[2,nâˆ’1]Râ€‹Tâ€‹)â†گpnâ€‹=p1â€‹â†’(Pp[2,nâˆ’1]Râ€‹Tâ€‹â†گpnâ€‹)=p1â€‹â†’(Pp[2,nâˆ’1]â€‹â€‹â†گpnâ€‹)=p1â€‹â†’Pp[2,n]â€‹â€‹=p1â€‹â†’Pp[2,n]Râ€‹Tâ€‹=PpRTâ€‹â€‹ و•…وˆگç«‹م€‚ è¯¥ه®ڑçگ†è؟کوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھو‹“ه±•ï¼ڑ ه®ڑçگ† 4.2.1ï¼ˆO(nnlogâپ،n)O(n\\sqrt n\\log n)O(nnâ€‹logn) و±‚و‌¨è،¨ï¼‰ ه®ڑن¹‰ piâˆ’=âˆ’pip^-_i=-p_ipiâˆ’â€‹=âˆ’piâ€‹ï¼ŒPp=âˆ’Ppâˆ’TP_p=-P_{p^-}^TPpâ€‹=âˆ’Ppâˆ’Tâ€‹م€‚ è¯پوکژو–¹و³•ç±»ن¼¼م€‚ و ¹وچ®è؟™ن¸ھه®ڑçگ†ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬ه¾—ن»¥هœ¨ç؛؟هœ°ه؟«é€ںو±‚ه‡؛ن¸€ن¸ھوژ’هˆ— ppp çڑ„ (P,Q)(P,Q)(P,Q)م€‚ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژن¸€ن¸ھه¤§ه°ڈن¸؛ nnn çڑ„و‌¨è،¨ن¸­çڑ„و ¼ه­گ (x,y)(x,y)(x,y)ï¼Œن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ xâ‰¤nx\\le \\sqrt nxâ‰¤nâ€‹ وˆ– yâ‰¤ny\\le \\sqrt nyâ‰¤nâ€‹ï¼Œو•…ن»…éœ€و±‚ه‡؛ه…¶ه‰چ n\\sqrt nnâ€‹ è،Œه’Œه‰چ n\\sqrt nnâ€‹ هˆ—ه†چه¹¶èµ·و‌¥هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ه‰چ n\\sqrt nnâ€‹ è،Œوک¯ç®€هچ•çڑ„ï¼Œوڑ´هٹ›وڈ’ه…¥هچ³هڈ¯م€‚è€Œه¯¹ن؛ژه‰چ n\\sqrt nnâ€‹ هˆ—ï¼Œه؛”ç”¨è¯¥ه®ڑçگ†هگژç›¸ه½“ن؛ژوڈ’ه…¥ âˆ’pi-p_iâˆ’piâ€‹ ه¾—هˆ°çڑ„و‌¨è،¨çڑ„ه‰چ n\\sqrt nnâ€‹ è،Œï¼Œو•…ن¹ںهڈ¯ن»¥ç»´وٹ¤م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆو€»ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(nnlogâپ،n)O(n\\sqrt n\\log n)O(nnâ€‹logn) çڑ„م€‚ ه®ڑçگ† 4.3 ن¸€ن¸ھوژ’هˆ— ppp çڑ„ LDS é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ PpP_pPpâ€‹ ç¬¬ن¸€هˆ—çڑ„é«که؛¦م€‚ و ¹وچ®ه®ڑçگ† 4.2ï¼ŒpRp^RpR çڑ„ LIS é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ PpP_pPpâ€‹ ç¬¬ن¸€هˆ—çڑ„é«که؛¦ï¼Œè€Œوک¾ç„¶ pRp^RpR çڑ„ LIS وک¯ç”± ppp çڑ„ LDS ç؟»è½¬ه¾—هˆ°çڑ„ï¼Œو•…وˆگç«‹م€‚ Part 4.1 وœ€é•؟ k-LIS ه­گه؛ڈهˆ— ه®ڑن¹‰ 4.1.1ï¼ˆk-LIS ه؛ڈهˆ—ه’Œ k-LDS ه؛ڈهˆ—ï¼‰ ه®ڑن¹‰ن¸€ن¸ھه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸؛ k-LIS ه؛ڈهˆ—ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ه…¶ LIS é•؟ه؛¦ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ kkkم€‚ هگŒçگ†ه®ڑن¹‰ k-LDS ه؛ڈهˆ—م€‚ وک¾ç„¶وœ€é•؟ 1-LIS ه°±وک¯هژںه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„ LDSï¼Œهچ³و‌¨è،¨ç¬¬ن¸€هˆ—çڑ„é«که؛¦م€‚ è؟™ه¼•ه¯¼وˆ‘ن»¬ن½œه‡؛çŒœوƒ³ï¼ڑ ه®ڑçگ† 4.1.1ï¼ˆوœ€é•؟ k-LIS ه­گه؛ڈهˆ—é•؟ه؛¦ï¼‰ ه¯¹ن؛ژوژ’هˆ— pppï¼ڑ وœ€é•؟ k-LIS ه­گه؛ڈهˆ—é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ PpP_pPpâ€‹ ه‰چ kkk ن¼ڑه¯¹هˆ†ه­گé€ وˆگه½±ه“چï¼Œن¸”هڈھوœ‰ LjL_jLjâ€‹ ن¼ڑه¯¹هˆ†و¯چé€ وˆگه½±ه“چم€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°ï¼ڑï¼ˆè€ƒè™‘ XiX_iXiâ€‹ ه’Œ YiY_iYiâ€‹ çڑ„ن½چç½®ï¼‰ hMjخ»=h(aj+1,bi)خ»=ctD(aj+1,bi)âˆ’ctR(aj+1,bi)+1=xiâˆ’yjhLjخ¼(i)=h(aj,bi)خ»âˆ’1=ctD(aj,bi)âˆ’ctR(aj,bi)=xiâˆ’xjh^{\\lambda}_{M_j}=h^{\\lambda}_{(a_j+1,b_i)}=ct_{D_{(a_j+1,b_i)}}-ct_{R_{(a_j+1,b_i)}}+1=x_i-y_j\\\\ hMjâ€‹خ»â€‹=h(ajâ€‹+1,biâ€‹)خ»â€‹=ctD(ajâ€‹+1,biâ€‹)â€‹â€‹âˆ’ctR(ajâ€‹+1,biâ€‹)â€‹â€‹+1=xiâ€‹âˆ’yjâ€‹hLjâ€‹خ¼(i)â€‹=h(ajâ€‹,biâ€‹)خ»â€‹âˆ’1=ctD(ajâ€‹,biâ€‹)â€‹â€‹âˆ’ctR(ajâ€‹,biâ€‹)â€‹â€‹=xiâ€‹âˆ’xjâ€‹ ç›¸ن¼¼çڑ„ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژهگŒن¸€è،Œçڑ„ه½±ه“چï¼Œوœ‰ Lj=(ai,bj)L_j=(a_i,b_j)Ljâ€‹=(aiâ€‹,bjâ€‹)ï¼ˆi<jâ‰¤mi< j\\le mi<jâ‰¤mï¼‰ï¼ŒMj=(ai,bj+1+1)M_j=(a_i,b_{j+1}+1)Mjâ€‹=(aiâ€‹,bj+1â€‹+1)ï¼ˆiâ‰¤jâ‰¤mi\\le j\\le miâ‰¤jâ‰¤mï¼‰ï¼Œن¸”ï¼ڑ hMjخ»=yjâˆ’xihLjخ¼(i)=xjâˆ’xih^{\\lambda}_{M_j}=y_j-x_i\\\\ h^{\\mu^{(i)}}_{L_j}=x_j-x_i\\\\ hMjâ€‹خ»â€‹=yjâ€‹âˆ’xiâ€‹hLjâ€‹خ¼(i)â€‹=xjâ€‹âˆ’xiâ€‹ é‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ âˆڈh(i,j)خ»âˆڈh(i,j)خ¼(i)=âˆڈhMjخ»âˆڈhLjخ¼(i)=âˆڈ0â‰¤j<i(xiâˆ’yj)âˆڈiâ‰¤jâ‰¤m(yjâˆ’xi)âˆڈ1â‰¤j<i(xiâˆ’xj)âˆڈi<jâ‰¤m(xjâˆ’xi)=âˆ’âˆڈj=0m(xiâˆ’yj)âˆڈj=1,jî€ =im(xiâˆ’xj)\\begin{aligned} \\frac{\\prod h^\\lambda_{(i,j)}}{\\prod h^{\\mu^{(i)}}_{(i,j)}}&=\\frac{\\prod\\limits h^{\\lambda}_{M_j}}{\\prod h^{\\mu(i)}_{L_j}}\\\\ &=\\frac{\\prod\\limits_{0\\le j<i} (x_i-y_j)\\prod\\limits_{i\\le j\\le m}(y_j-x_i)}{\\prod\\limits_{1\\le j<i}(x_i-x_j)\\prod\\limits_{i<j\\le m}(x_j-x_i)}\\\\ &=-\\frac{\\prod\\limits_{j=0}^m(x_i-y_j)}{\\prod\\limits_{j=1,j\\not=i}^m(x_i-x_j)} \\end{aligned} âˆڈh(i,j)خ¼(i)â€‹âˆڈh(i,j)خ»â€‹â€‹â€‹=âˆڈhLjâ€‹خ¼(i)â€‹âˆڈhMjâ€‹خ»â€‹â€‹=1â‰¤j<iâˆڈâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’xjâ€‹)i<jâ‰¤mâˆڈâ€‹(xjâ€‹âˆ’xiâ€‹)0â‰¤j<iâˆڈâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’yjâ€‹)iâ‰¤jâ‰¤mâˆڈâ€‹(yjâ€‹âˆ’xiâ€‹)â€‹=âˆ’j=1,jî€ â€‹=iâˆڈmâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’xjâ€‹)j=0âˆڈmâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’yjâ€‹)â€‹â€‹ x_i^2-y_i^2 âˆ’i=1âˆ‘mâ€‹j=1,jî€ â€‹=iâˆڈmâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’xjâ€‹)j=0âˆڈmâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’yjâ€‹)â€‹=âˆ’21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹xi2â€‹âˆ’yi2â€‹ è¯پوکژ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°è؟™ن¸ھه¼ڈه­گه¾ˆهƒڈو‹‰وڈ’ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸چه¦¨è®¾ï¼ڑï¼ˆن¸چçں¥éپ“و€ژن¹ˆوƒ³هˆ°çڑ„ï¼‰ P(t)=âˆ’âˆ‘i=1mâˆڈj=0m(xiâˆ’yj)âˆڈj=1,jî€ =im(xiâˆ’xj)âˆڈj=1,jî€ =im(tâˆ’xj)Q(t)=âˆڈi=0m(tâˆ’yi)P(t)=-\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^m\\frac{\\prod\\limits_{j=0}^m(x_i-y_j)}{\\prod\\limits_{j=1,j\\not=i}^m(x_i-x_j)}\\prod\\limits_{j=1,j\\not=i}^m (t-x_j)\\\\ Q(t)=\\prod\\limits_{i=0}^m(t-y_i) P(t)=âˆ’i=1âˆ‘mâ€‹j=1,jî€ â€‹=iâˆڈmâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’xjâ€‹)j=0âˆڈmâ€‹(xiâ€‹âˆ’yjâ€‹)â€‹j=1,jî€ â€‹=iâˆڈmâ€‹(tâˆ’xjâ€‹)Q(t)=i=0âˆڈmâ€‹(tâˆ’yiâ€‹) é‚£ن¹ˆ P(t)P(t)P(t) وک¯ mâˆ’1m-1mâˆ’1 و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼ŒQ(t)Q(t)Q(t) وک¯ m+1m+1m+1 و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬è¦پو±‚çڑ„ه€¼ه°±وک¯ [tmâˆ’1]P(t)[t^{m-1}]P(t)[tmâˆ’1]P(t)م€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ° P(t)+Q(t)P(t)+Q(t)P(t)+Q(t) هœ¨ t=xit=x_it=xiâ€‹ï¼ˆiî€ =0i\\not=0iî€ â€‹=0ï¼‰و—¶ن¸؛ 000ï¼Œن¸” xix_ixiâ€‹ ن؛’ن¸چç›¸هگŒï¼ˆو¯ڈو–œè،Œوپ°ه¥½وœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھè¾¹è§’ï¼‰ï¼Œن¸” [tm+1](P(t)+Q(t))=1[t^{m+1}](P(t)+Q(t))=1[tm+1](P(t)+Q(t))=1ï¼Œو•…ه­کهœ¨ خ±\\alphaخ± ن½؟ه¾—ï¼ڑ P(t)+Q(t)=(t+خ±)âˆڈi=1m(tâˆ’xi)P(t)+Q(t)=(t+\\alpha)\\prod\\limits_{i=1}^m(t-x_i) P(t)+Q(t)=(t+خ±)i=1âˆڈmâ€‹(tâˆ’xiâ€‹) é‚£ن¹ˆï¼ڑ P(t)=(t+خ±)âˆڈi=1m(tâˆ’xi)âˆ’âˆڈi=0m(tâˆ’yi)=(خ±âˆ’âˆ‘i=1mxi+âˆ‘i=0myi)tm+(âˆ’خ±âˆ‘i=1mxi+âˆ‘1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mxixjâˆ’âˆ‘0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤myiyj)tmâˆ’1+â€¦\\begin{aligned} P(t)&=(t+\\alpha)\\prod\\limits_{i=1}^m(t-x_i)-\\prod\\limits_{i=0}^m(t-y_i)\\\\ &=\\left(\\alpha-\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^m x_i+\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m y_i\\right)t^m+\\left(-\\alpha\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^mx_i+\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j\\le m}x_ix_j-\\sum\\limits_{0\\le i<j\\le m}y_iy_j\\right)t^{m-1}+\\dots \\end{aligned} P(t)â€‹=(t+خ±)i=1âˆڈmâ€‹(tâˆ’xiâ€‹)âˆ’i=0âˆڈmâ€‹(tâˆ’yiâ€‹)=(خ±âˆ’i=1âˆ‘mâ€‹xiâ€‹+i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹yiâ€‹)tm+(âˆ’خ±i=1âˆ‘mâ€‹xiâ€‹+1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mâˆ‘â€‹xiâ€‹xjâ€‹âˆ’0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mâˆ‘â€‹yiâ€‹yjâ€‹)tmâˆ’1+â€¦â€‹ و ¹وچ®ن¹‹ه‰چçڑ„ç»“è®؛ï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ âˆ‘i=0mxi=âˆ‘i=0myi\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m x_i=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m y_i i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹xiâ€‹=i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹yiâ€‹ ن¸” x0=0x_0=0x0â€‹=0ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ âˆ‘i=0myiâˆ’âˆ‘i=1mxi=0\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m y_i-\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^m x_i=0i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹yiâ€‹âˆ’i=1âˆ‘mâ€‹xiâ€‹=0ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ خ±=0\\alpha=0خ±=0م€‚ و•… [tmâˆ’1]P(t)=âˆ‘1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mxixjâˆ’âˆ‘0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤myiyj=âˆ‘0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mxixjâˆ’yiyj[t^{m-1}]P(t)=\\sum\\limits_{1\\le i<j\\le m}x_ix_j-\\sum\\limits_{0\\le i<j\\le m}y_iy_j=\\sum\\limits_{0\\le i<j\\le m}x_ix_j-y_iy_j[tmâˆ’1]P(t)=1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mâˆ‘â€‹xiâ€‹xjâ€‹âˆ’0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mâˆ‘â€‹yiâ€‹yjâ€‹=0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mâˆ‘â€‹xiâ€‹xjâ€‹âˆ’yiâ€‹yjâ€‹م€‚ ç»§ç»­ï¼ڑ âˆ‘0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mxixjâˆ’yiyj=12((âˆ‘i=0mxi)2âˆ’âˆ‘i=0mxi2âˆ’(âˆ‘i=0myi)2+âˆ‘i=0myi2)=12âˆ‘i=0myi2âˆ’xi2=âˆ’12âˆ‘i=0mxi2âˆ’yi2\\begin{aligned} \\sum\\limits_{0\\le i<j\\le m}x_ix_j-y_iy_j&=\\frac{1}{2}\\left(\\left(\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m x_i\\right)^2-\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m x_i^2-\\left(\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m y_i\\right)^2+\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m y_i^2\\right)\\\\ &=\\frac{1}{2}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m}y_i^2-x_i^2\\\\ &=-\\frac{1}{2}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m}x_i^2-y_i^2\\\\ \\end{aligned} 0â‰¤i<jâ‰¤mâˆ‘â€‹xiâ€‹xjâ€‹âˆ’yiâ€‹yjâ€‹â€‹=21â€‹âژ‌âژ›â€‹(i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹xiâ€‹)2âˆ’i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹xi2â€‹âˆ’(i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹yiâ€‹)2+i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹yi2â€‹âژ âژ‍â€‹=21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹yi2â€‹âˆ’xi2â€‹=âˆ’21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹xi2â€‹âˆ’yi2â€‹â€‹ è¯پو¯•م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆن»£ه…¥ xi=aiâˆ’bix_i=a_i-b_ixiâ€‹=aiâ€‹âˆ’biâ€‹ ه’Œ yi=aiâˆ’bi+1y_i=a_i-b_{i+1}yiâ€‹=aiâ€‹âˆ’bi+1â€‹ï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ âˆ’12âˆ‘i=0mxi2âˆ’yi2=âˆ’12âˆ‘i=0m(aiâˆ’bi)2âˆ’(aiâˆ’bi+1)2=âˆ’12âˆ‘i=0mai2âˆ’2aibi+bi2âˆ’ai2âˆ’bi+12+2aibi+1=âˆ’12âˆ‘i=0mâˆ’2aibi+bi2+2aibi+1âˆ’bi+12=âˆ’12(b02âˆ’bm+12+âˆ‘i=0m2ai(bi+1âˆ’bi))=âˆ‘i=0maibi+1âˆ’aibi\\begin{aligned} -\\frac{1}{2}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m}x_i^2-y_i^2&=-\\frac{1}{2}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m(a_i-b_i)^2-(a_i-b_{i+1})^2\\\\ &=-\\frac{1}{2}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m a_i^2-2a_ib_i+b_i^2-a_i^2-b_{i+1}^2+2a_ib_{i+1}\\\\ &=-\\frac{1}{2}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m -2a_ib_i+b_i^2+2a_ib_{i+1}-b_{i+1}^2\\\\ &=-\\frac{1}{2}\\left(b_0^2-b_{m+1}^2+\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m2a_i(b_{i+1}-b_i)\\right)\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m a_ib_{i+1}-a_ib_i \\end{aligned} âˆ’21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹xi2â€‹âˆ’yi2â€‹â€‹=âˆ’21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹(aiâ€‹âˆ’biâ€‹)2âˆ’(aiâ€‹âˆ’bi+1â€‹)2=âˆ’21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹ai2â€‹âˆ’2aiâ€‹biâ€‹+bi2â€‹âˆ’ai2â€‹âˆ’bi+12â€‹+2aiâ€‹bi+1â€‹=âˆ’21â€‹i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹âˆ’2aiâ€‹biâ€‹+bi2â€‹+2aiâ€‹bi+1â€‹âˆ’bi+12â€‹=âˆ’21â€‹(b02â€‹âˆ’bm+12â€‹+i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹2aiâ€‹(bi+1â€‹âˆ’biâ€‹))=i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹aiâ€‹bi+1â€‹âˆ’aiâ€‹biâ€‹â€‹ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°è؟™ن¸ھه®‍é™…ن¸ٹç›¸ه½“ن؛ژه°†و‌¨ه›¾ç«–ç‌€هˆ’هˆ†وˆگه¾ˆه¤ڑن¸ھé•؟و–¹ه½¢هٹ èµ·و‌¥ï¼Œç»“و‍œه°±وک¯و‌¨ه›¾çڑ„é‌¢ç§¯ï¼Œو•…ï¼ڑ n=âˆ‘i=0maibi+1âˆ’aibin=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m a_ib_{i+1}-a_ib_i n=i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹aiâ€‹bi+1â€‹âˆ’aiâ€‹biâ€‹ هچ³è¯پو¯•م€‚ \n

وœ‰ن¸€و£µ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و ‘ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ن¸ٹوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘م€‚

\n

ç„¶هگژن¾‌و¬،è؟›è،Œ mmm و¬،و“چن½œï¼ڑ

\n
    \n
  • \n

    1 u v xï¼ڑهœ¨ uâ†’vu\\to vuâ†’v è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„ن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘ن¸­وڈ’ه…¥ه…ƒç´  xxxï¼Œهچ³ âˆ€pâˆˆ{uâ†’v}\\forall p\\in \\{u\\to v\\}âˆ€pâˆˆ{uâ†’v} و‰§è،Œ insert(rtp,x)\\text{insert}(rt_p,x)insert(rtpâ€‹,x)ï¼ڑ

    \n
    void insert(int&p,int x){\n    if(!p) return p=x,void();\n    if(x<p) insert(ch[p][0],x);\n    else insert(ch[p][1],x);\n}\n
    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    0 u wï¼ڑهœ¨ç‚¹ uuu ن¸ٹçڑ„ن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘ن¸­و‰§è،Œ ask(rtu,w)\\text{ask}(rt_u,w)ask(rtuâ€‹,w)ï¼Œو±‚ه…¶è؟”ه›‍ه€¼ï¼ڑ

    \n
    long long ask(int p,int x){\n    if(x==p) return x;\n    if(x<p) return ch[p][0]?ask(ch[p][0])+p:p;\n    else return ch[p][1]?ask(ch[p][1])+p:p;\n}\n
    \n
    • \n
\n

1â‰¤n,m,x,wâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n,m,x,w\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤n,m,x,wâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬، 111 و“چن½œçڑ„ xxx ن؛’ن¸چç›¸هگŒم€‚

\n","content":" وœ‰ن¸€و£µ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و ‘ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ن¸ٹوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘م€‚ ç„¶هگژن¾‌و¬،è؟›è،Œ mmm و¬،و“چن½œï¼ڑ 1 u v xï¼ڑهœ¨ uâ†’vu\\to vuâ†’v è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„ن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘ن¸­وڈ’ه…¥ه…ƒç´  xxxï¼Œهچ³ âˆ€pâˆˆ{uâ†’v}\\forall p\\in \\{u\\to v\\}âˆ€pâˆˆ{uâ†’v} و‰§è،Œ insert(rtp,x)\\text{insert}(rt_p,x)insert(rtpâ€‹,x)ï¼ڑ void insert(int&p,int x){ if(!p) return p=x,void(); if(x<p) insert(ch[p][0],x); else insert(ch[p][1],x); } 0 u wï¼ڑهœ¨ç‚¹ uuu ن¸ٹçڑ„ن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘ن¸­و‰§è،Œ ask(rtu,w)\\text{ask}(rt_u,w)ask(rtuâ€‹,w)ï¼Œو±‚ه…¶è؟”ه›‍ه€¼ï¼ڑ long long ask(int p,int x){ if(x==p) return x; if(x<p) return ch[p][0]?ask(ch[p][0])+p:p; else return ch[p][1]?ask(ch[p][1])+p:p; } 1â‰¤n,m,x,wâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n,m,x,w\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤n,m,x,wâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬، 111 و“چن½œçڑ„ xxx ن؛’ن¸چç›¸هگŒم€‚ ه…ˆè€ƒè™‘هچ•ç‚¹و€ژن¹ˆهپڑï¼Œç›´وژ¥ç»´وٹ¤ن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘ن¸­و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„çˆ¶ن؛²هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھç‚¹ xxx çڑ„çˆ¶ن؛²وک¯ه…¶وڈ’ه…¥و—¶ه‰چé©±ه’Œهگژç»§ن¸­وڈ’ه…¥و—¶é—´è¾ƒو™ڑçڑ„é‚£ن¸ھم€‚ وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥è€ƒè™‘é“¾ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھوœ´ç´ çڑ„وƒ³و³•وک¯ه·®هˆ†ï¼Œé—®é¢کهڈکن¸؛ç»´وٹ¤هٹ ه…¥/هˆ é™¤وںگو¬،و“چن½œهگژن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘çڑ„ه½¢و€پم€‚ ن½؟ç”¨è¶…ه¼؛و³¨و„ڈهٹ›ï¼Œç”¨ن؛Œه…ƒç»„ (a,b)(a,b)(a,b) è®°ه½•ç‚¹ aaa çڑ„وڈ’ه…¥و—¶é—´وک¯ bbbï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆو³¨و„ڈهˆ° aâˆˆ[1,x]a\\in [1,x]aâˆˆ[1,x] çڑ„ç‚¹ه’Œ aâˆˆ[x,m]a\\in [x,m]aâˆˆ[x,m] çڑ„ç‚¹وک¯ç‹¬ç«‹çڑ„م€‚ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژ aâˆˆ[1,x]a\\in [1,x]aâˆˆ[1,x] çڑ„ç‚¹ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥è؟™و ·هˆ¤و–­ه®ƒن»¬ن¸­ه“ھن؛›وک¯ (x,i)(x,i)(x,i) çڑ„ç¥–ه…ˆï¼ڑ ه°†è؟™ن؛›ç‚¹وŒ‰ç…§ aaa ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈوژ’ه؛ڈï¼› ن»¤ t=it=it=iï¼Œن¾‌و¬،éپچهژ†وژ’ه¥½ه؛ڈهگژçڑ„و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ (a,b)(a,b)(a,b)ï¼ڑ è‹¥ b<tb<tb<t هˆ™ه…¶ن¸؛ (x,i)(x,i)(x,i) ç¥–ه…ˆï¼Œç­”و،ˆهٹ ن¸ٹ aaaï¼Œن»¤ t=bt=bt=bï¼› هگ¦هˆ™ه…¶é‌‍ (x,i)(x,i)(x,i) ç¥–ه…ˆï¼› ه¯¹ن؛ژ aâˆˆ[x,m]a\\in [x,m]aâˆˆ[x,m] çڑ„ç‚¹وک¯ن¸€و ·çڑ„ï¼Œه°†ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈوژ’ه؛ڈو”¹ن¸؛ن»ژه°ڈهˆ°ه¤§وژ’ه؛ڈهچ³هڈ¯م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆé—®é¢کè½¬هŒ–ن¸؛هŒ؛é—´ن¸­ aaa çڑ„ه‰چç¼€/هگژç¼€وœ€ه°ڈه€¼çڑ„ bbb çڑ„ه’Œï¼Œç›´وژ¥و¥¼وˆ؟é‡چه»؛ç؛؟و®µو ‘هچ³هڈ¯ O(nlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log ^2n)O(nlog2n) ç»´وٹ¤م€‚ çژ°هœ¨è€ƒè™‘و ‘ï¼Œن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ه’Œé“¾وک¯هں؛وœ¬ن¸€و ·çڑ„ï¼Œç؛؟و®µو ‘هگˆه¹¶هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log ^2 n)O(nlog2n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; typedef long long ll; /* insert/delete pot query [l,r] premin sum or sufmin sum */ namespace seg { const int TS=30000005,inf=1e8; int cnt,ls[TS],rs[TS]; int mn[TS]; ll sml[TS],smr[TS]; inline void init(){mn[0]=inf;} ll quesml(int u,int l,int r,int k) // premin(<k) sum { if(u==0||mn[u]>=k) return 0; if(l==r) return mn[u]<k?sml[u]:0; int mid=l+r>>1; if(mn[ls[u]]<k) return quesml(ls[u],l,mid,k)+sml[u]-sml[ls[u]]; else return quesml(rs[u],mid+1,r,k); } ll quesmr(int u,int l,int r,int k) // sufmin(<k) sum { if(u==0||mn[u]>=k) return 0; if(l==r) return mn[u]<k?smr[u]:0; int mid=l+r>>1; if(mn[rs[u]]<k) return smr[u]-smr[rs[u]]+quesmr(rs[u],mid+1,r,k); else return quesmr(ls[u],l,mid,k); } inline void upda(int u,int l,int r) { int mid=l+r>>1; int sl=ls[u],sr=rs[u]; mn[u]=min(mn[sl],mn[sr]); sml[u]=sml[sl]+quesml(sr,mid+1,r,mn[sl]); smr[u]=quesmr(sl,l,mid,mn[sr])+smr[sr]; } void updp(int &u,int l,int r,int p,int x,int val) { if(u==0) u=++cnt; if(l==r) return mn[u]=x,sml[u]=smr[u]=val,void(); int mid=l+r>>1; if(p<=mid) updp(ls[u],l,mid,p,x,val); else updp(rs[u],mid+1,r,p,x,val); upda(u,l,r); } int merge(int x,int y,int l,int r) { if(x==0||y==0) return x+y; if(l==r) { mn[x]=min(mn[x],mn[y]); sml[x]=max(sml[x],sml[y]); smr[x]=sml[x]; return x; } int mid=l+r>>1; ls[x]=merge(ls[x],ls[y],l,mid); rs[x]=merge(rs[x],rs[y],mid+1,r); upda(x,l,r); return x; } void quesmllr(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,int &k,ll &res) { if(u==0||l>R||r<L) return; if(l>=L&&r<=R) { res+=quesml(u,l,r,k); k=min(k,mn[u]); return; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(L<=mid) quesmllr(ls[u],l,mid,L,R,k,res); if(R>=mid+1) quesmllr(rs[u],mid+1,r,L,R,k,res); } void quesmrlr(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,int &k,ll &res) { if(u==0||l>R||r<L) return; if(l>=L&&r<=R) { res+=quesmr(u,l,r,k); k=min(k,mn[u]); return; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(R>=mid+1) quesmrlr(rs[u],mid+1,r,L,R,k,res); if(L<=mid) quesmrlr(ls[u],l,mid,L,R,k,res); } } const int S=200005,BS=25; int n,m; vector<int> g[S]; int dep[S],fat[S][BS]; vector<pair<int,int> > vec[S]; int tot,b[S],val[S],rt[S]; ll ans[S]; void dfs(int u,int fa) { dep[u]=dep[fa]+1; fat[u][0]=fa; for(int i=1;i<=BS-3;i++) fat[u][i]=fat[fat[u][i-1]][i-1]; for(int v:g[u]) if(v!=fa) dfs(v,u); } inline int quelca(int x,int y) { if(dep[x]<dep[y]) swap(x,y); for(int i=BS-3;i>=0;i--) if(dep[fat[x][i]]>=dep[y]) x=fat[x][i]; if(x==y) return x; for(int i=BS-3;i>=0;i--) { if(fat[x][i]!=fat[y][i]) { x=fat[x][i]; y=fat[y][i]; } } return fat[x][0]; } void dfs2(int u,int fa) { for(int v:g[u]) { if(v==fa) continue; dfs2(v,u); rt[u]=seg::merge(rt[u],rt[v],1,tot); } for(auto t:vec[u]) { int x=t.first,y=t.second; if(y==-1) { int k=x; seg::quesmrlr(rt[u],1,tot,1,val[x],k,ans[x]); k=x; seg::quesmllr(rt[u],1,tot,val[x],tot,k,ans[x]); k=x; ll del=0; seg::quesmllr(rt[u],1,tot,val[x],val[x],k,del); ans[x]-=del; } else { if(x==1) seg::updp(rt[u],1,tot,val[y],y,b[val[y]]); else seg::updp(rt[u],1,tot,val[y],seg::inf,0); } } } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false),cin.tie(0),cout.tie(0); cin>>n>>m; for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) { int x,y; cin>>x>>y; g[x].push_back(y); g[y].push_back(x); } dfs(1,0); vector<int> queid; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int op,x,y; cin>>op>>x>>y; if(op==1) { int w; cin>>w; int l=quelca(x,y); vec[x].emplace_back(1,i); vec[y].emplace_back(1,i); vec[fat[l][0]].emplace_back(-1,i); b[++tot]=val[i]=w; } else { vec[x].emplace_back(i,-1); b[++tot]=val[i]=y; queid.push_back(i); } } sort(b+1,b+tot+1); tot=unique(b+1,b+tot+1)-b-1; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) val[i]=lower_bound(b+1,b+tot+1,val[i])-b; seg::init(); dfs2(1,0); for(int x:queid) cout<<ans[x]<<'\\n'; return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"و•°وچ®ç»“و‍„","slug":"8ldJi7oB4","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/8ldJi7oB4/"},{"name":"ç؛؟و®µو ‘","slug":"Mhc6P6aymU","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Mhc6P6aymU/"}],"title":"م€گPR #15م€‘ن؛Œهڈ‰وگœç´¢و ‘ هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/pr-15-er-cha-sou-suo-shu-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"10 min read","time":543000,"words":1616,"minutes":10},"date":"2025-02-17 20:34:59","dateFormat":"2025-02-17"},{"abstract":"

1â‰¤kâ‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le k\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤kâ‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤Lâ‰¤10121\\le L\\le 10^{12}1â‰¤Lâ‰¤1012م€‚

ن¸ھه…³é”®ç‚¹ï¼Œوœ€ه°ڈهŒ–و¯ڈن¸ھن؛؛هˆ°وœ€è؟‘çڑ„ه…³é”®ç‚¹çڑ„è·‌ç¦»çڑ„ه’Œم€‚è¾“ه‡؛و–¹و،ˆم€‚ 1â‰¤kâ‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le k\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤kâ‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤Lâ‰¤10121\\le L\\le 10^{12}1â‰¤Lâ‰¤1012م€‚ é¦–ه…ˆو³¨و„ڈهˆ°وœ€è؟‘ه…³é”®ç‚¹ç›¸هگŒçڑ„ن؛؛ن¸€ه®ڑن½چن؛ژهŒ؛é—´ه†…ï¼Œو•…é—®é¢کهڈ¯ن»¥è½¬هŒ–ن¸؛ه°†ن؛؛هˆ’هˆ†ن¸؛è‹¥ه¹²ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ï¼ŒهŒ؛é—´ [l,r][l,r][l,r] ن»£ن»·ن¸؛ âˆ‘lâ‰¤iâ‰¤râˆ£aiâˆ’aâŒٹl+r2âŒ‹âˆ£\\sum\\limits_{l\\le i\\le r} \\left|a_i-a_{\\lfloor\\frac{l+r}{2}\\rfloor}\\right|lâ‰¤iâ‰¤râˆ‘â€‹âˆ£âˆ£âˆ£â€‹aiâ€‹âˆ’aâŒٹ2l+râ€‹âŒ‹â€‹âˆ£âˆ£âˆ£â€‹ï¼Œوœ€ه°ڈهŒ–ن»£ن»·ه’Œم€‚ è€ƒè™‘é“¾çڑ„وƒ…ه†µو€ژن¹ˆهپڑï¼Œç”±ن؛ژ [l,r][l,r][l,r] ه’Œ [l+1,râˆ’1][l+1,r-1][l+1,râˆ’1] çڑ„ن¸­ن½چو•°ç›¸هگŒï¼Œو•…هŒ؛é—´ن»£ن»· wl,rw_{l,r}wl,râ€‹ و»،è¶³ه››è¾¹ه½¢ن¸چç­‰ه¼ڈم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè؟™وک¯è’™و—¥çں©éکµوœ€çں­è·¯é—®é¢کï¼Œç›´وژ¥ wqs ن؛Œهˆ† + ن؛Œهˆ†éکںهˆ—ن¼کهŒ–è½¬ç§»هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،Vlogâپ،n)O(n\\log V\\log n)O(nlogVlogn)م€‚ وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥هڈ‘و‰¬ن؛؛ç±»و™؛و…§ï¼Œه…ˆéڑڈن¾؟و‰¾ن¸ھن½چç½®ï¼ˆهپ‡ه®ڑن¸؛ 111 ه‰چï¼‰ه°†çژ¯و–­ه¼€ï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛و­¤و—¶çڑ„وœ€ن¼کè§£çڑ„هˆ†ç•Œç‚¹ aaaم€‚é‚£ن¹ˆه¯¹ن؛ژçژ¯ن¸ٹçڑ„وœ€ن¼کè§£ bbbï¼Œن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ bib_ibiâ€‹ هœ¨هŒ؛é—´ [aiâˆ’1,ai][a_{i-1},a_i][aiâˆ’1â€‹,aiâ€‹] ن¸­ï¼ڑ è¯پوکژè€ƒè™‘è‹¥ن¸چوک¯è؟™ç§چوƒ…ه†µهˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑ وœ‰وںگو®µç؛¢è‰²هŒ؛é—´هŒ…هگ«ن¸¤ن¸ھè“‌è‰²ç«¯ç‚¹ ن¸” وœ‰وںگو®µè“‌è‰²هŒ؛é—´هŒ…هگ«ن¸¤ن¸ھç؛¢è‰²ç«¯ç‚¹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆو ¹وچ®ç›¸ن؛¤ن¼کن؛ژهŒ…هگ«ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥è°ƒو•´è؟™ن¸¤ه¤„ï¼ˆç»؟è‰²ç؛؟ï¼‰ï¼Œن½؟ه¾—è؟™ن¸¤ن¸ھو–¹و،ˆçڑ„ن»£ن»·ن¹‹ه’Œه‡ڈه°ڈï¼ˆهڈکن¸؛ç´«è‰²ه’Œو£•è‰²ç؛؟ï¼‰ï¼ڑ ç”±ن؛ژو­¤و—¶وںگو‌،ç؛؟ن»چç„¶وک¯ن»ژ 111 ه¤„و–­ه¼€çڑ„و–¹و،ˆï¼Œو•…è¦پن¹ˆ aaa ن¸چوک¯ن»ژ 111 ه¤„و–­ه¼€çڑ„وœ€ن¼کو–¹و،ˆï¼Œè¦پن¹ˆ bbb ن¸چوک¯çژ¯ن¸ٹçڑ„وœ€ن¼کو–¹و،ˆï¼Œçں›ç›¾م€‚ و ¹وچ®è؟™ن¸ھو€§è´¨ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژوںگن¸ھ xâˆˆ[1,a1]x\\in [1,a_1]xâˆˆ[1,a1â€‹]ï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ن»ژ x+1x+1x+1 ه¤„و–­ه¼€çڑ„وœ€ن¼کو–¹و،ˆï¼ˆèµ·ه§‹ç‚¹هœ¨ xxx çڑ„وœ€ن¼کو–¹و،ˆï¼‰cxc_xcxâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ c[1,xâˆ’1],iâˆˆ[aiâˆ’1,cx,i]c_{[1,x-1],i}\\in [a_{i-1},c_{x,i}]c[1,xâˆ’1],iâ€‹âˆˆ[aiâˆ’1â€‹,cx,iâ€‹] ن¸” c[x+1,a1],iâˆˆ[cx,i,ai]c_{[x+1,a_1],i}\\in[c_{x,i},a_{i}]c[x+1,a1â€‹],iâ€‹âˆˆ[cx,iâ€‹,aiâ€‹]ï¼ڑ é‚£ن¹ˆè€ƒè™‘هˆ†و²»ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،و±‚ه‡؛ midmidmid ن¸؛èµ·ه§‹ç‚¹çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈو–¹و،ˆï¼Œه¾€ن¸¤è¾¹é€’ه½’م€‚و±‚وœ€ه°ڈو–¹و،ˆن½؟ç”¨هˆ†و²»ن¼کهŒ–è½¬ç§»ï¼Œè؟™و ·و¯ڈن¸€ه±‚éƒ½ن¼ڑéپچهژ†و•´ن¸ھçژ¯ï¼Œه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log^2 n)O(nlog2n)م€‚ ن½†وک¯è؟کوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھé—®é¢کï¼Œو¯ڈن¸€ه±‚هڈ¯èƒ½ن¼ڑه¤ڑن¸€ن؛›ç‚¹م€‚ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ°و¯ڈو¬،و±‚ن¸€ن¸ھèµ·ه§‹ç‚¹çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈو–¹و،ˆè‡³ه°‘وک¯ O(k)O(k)O(k) çڑ„ï¼Œè€Œè‹¥é€‰و‹©çڑ„هŒ؛é—´é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ lll هˆ™هˆ†و²»ه؛•ه±‚è¦پè·‘ lll و¬،ï¼Œه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦è‡³ه°‘وک¯ O(lk)O(lk)O(lk)م€‚و‰€ن»¥è؟کéœ€è¦پو‰¾هˆ°وœ€çں­çڑ„هŒ؛é—´è؟›è،Œهˆ†و²»ï¼Œè؟™و ·ه؛•ه±‚ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه°±وک¯ O(nkأ—k)=O(n)O(\\frac{n}{k}\\times k)=O(n)O(knâ€‹أ—k)=O(n) çڑ„ï¼Œو­£ç،®م€‚ و€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،Vlogâپ،n+nlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log V\\log n+n\\log ^2n)O(nlogVlogn+nlog2n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; typedef long long ll; const int S=200005; const ll inf=1e18; int n,k; ll L,a[S*2],sm[S*2]; ll tmp[S]; ll ans; vector<int> res; inline ll getsm(int l,int r){return sm[r]-sm[l-1];} inline ll calc(int l,int r) { if(l>r) r+=n; int m=l+r>>1; // printf("[%d %d %d] %lld %lld %lld\\n",l,m,r,a[m],getsm(l,m),getsm(m+1,r)); return a[m]*(m-l+1)-getsm(l,m)+ getsm(m+1,r)-a[m]*(r-m); } namespace wqs { ll f[S]; int ctl[S],ctr[S]; int hed,til,q[S],ql[S],qr[S]; inline bool cmp(int i1,int i2,int j,bool sml) // i1<i2 { ll x1=f[i1]+calc(i1+1,j); ll x2=f[i2]+calc(i2+1,j); if(x1!=x2) return x1<x2; if(sml) return ctl[i1]<ctl[i2]; else return ctr[i1]>ctr[i2]; } void get(ll k,bool sml) { for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) f[i]=inf; if(sml) for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ctl[i]=1e8; else for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ctr[i]=-1e8; f[0]=0; (sml?ctl:ctr)[0]=0; hed=1,til=0; q[++til]=0,ql[til]=1,qr[til]=n; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { while(qr[hed]<i) hed++; int j=q[hed]; f[i]=f[j]+calc(j+1,i)-k; // printf("%d: %d\\n",i,j); (sml?ctl:ctr)[i]=(sml?ctl:ctr)[j]+1; if(qr[hed]==i) hed++; else ql[hed]=i+1; while(hed<=til&&cmp(i,q[til],ql[til],sml)) til--; if(hed>til) q[++til]=i,ql[til]=i+1,qr[til]=n; else { int lb=ql[til],rb=qr[til],res=rb; while(lb<=rb) { int mid=lb+rb>>1; if(!cmp(i,q[til],mid,sml)) res=mid,lb=mid+1; else rb=mid-1; } int rr=qr[til]; qr[til]=res; if(res<n) q[++til]=i,ql[til]=res+1,qr[til]=n; } } } inline vector<int> slove() { ll lb=-inf,rb=0,res=0; while(lb<=rb) { ll mid=lb+rb>>1; get(mid,false); if(ctr[n]>=k) res=mid,rb=mid-1; else lb=mid+1; } get(res,true); get(res,false); vector<int> vec; vec.push_back(n); for(int i=n-1,lst=n,tk=k-1;i>=1;i--) { // printf("%lld %lld %d [%d %d]\\n", // f[i]+calc(i+1,lst)-res,f[lst],tk,ctl[i],ctr[i]); if(f[i]+calc(i+1,lst)-res==f[lst]&&ctl[i]<=tk&&tk<=ctr[i]) { // printf(">> %d\\n",i); vec.push_back(i); lst=i; tk--; } } reverse(vec.begin(),vec.end()); return vec; } } namespace slove { ll f[S]; int lst[S*2],idx[S]; void get(int l,int r,int kl,int kr) { if(l>r) return; int mid=l+r>>1,p=kl; f[mid]=inf; for(int i=kl;i<=kr;i++) { ll pre=f[i]+calc(i+1,mid); if(pre<f[mid]) f[mid]=pre,p=i; } lst[mid]=p; if(l==r) return; get(l,mid-1,kl,p),get(mid+1,r,p,kr); } void slove(vector<pair<int,int> > &seq) { int l0=seq[0].first,r0=seq[0].second; if(l0>r0) return; // for(auto x:seq) printf("[%d %d] ",x.first,x.second); // printf("\\n"); int mid=l0+r0>>1; f[mid]=0; for(int i=1;i<k;i++) { int l,r; if(i==1) l=r=mid; else l=seq[i-1].first,r=seq[i-1].second; int pl=seq[i].first,pr=seq[i].second; if(r==pl) { get(pl+1,pr,l,r); f[pl]=inf; for(int j=l;j<=r-1;j++) { ll pre=f[j]+calc(j+1,pl); if(pre<f[pl]) f[pl]=pre,lst[n+pl]=j; } } else get(pl,pr,l,r); } for(int i=k-1;i>=1;i--) { int pl=seq[i].first,pr=seq[i].second; for(int j=pl;j<=pr;j++) idx[j]=i+1; } idx[mid]=1; ll premn=inf; int p=0; for(int i=seq[k-1].first;i<=seq[k-1].second;i++) { ll pre=f[i]+calc(i+1,mid); if(pre<premn) premn=pre,p=i; } // printf("%lld\\n",premn); vector<int> vec; int tk=k; vec.push_back(p); while(p!=mid) { if(idx[p]!=tk) p=lst[n+p]; else p=lst[p]; tk--; vec.push_back(p); // printf(">> %d\\n",p); } reverse(vec.begin(),vec.end()); // printf("]]]] "); // for(int x:vec) printf("%d ",x); // printf("\\n"); if(premn<ans) { ans=premn; res=vec; } if(l0==r0) return; vector<pair<int,int> > s1,s2; s1.emplace_back(l0,mid-1); s2.emplace_back(mid+1,r0); for(int i=1;i<k;i++) { int l=seq[i].first,r=seq[i].second,m=vec[i]; s1.emplace_back(l,m); s2.emplace_back(m,r); } slove(s1),slove(s2); } } int main() { scanf("%d%d%lld",&n,&k,&L); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]),a[i+n]=L+a[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n*2;i++) sm[i]=sm[i-1]+a[i]; if(k==1) { ll ans=inf,res=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { ll pre=calc(i,i+n-1); if(pre<ans) ans=pre,res=a[i+i+n-1>>1]; } if(res>=L) res-=L; printf("%lld\\n%lld\\n",ans,res); return 0; } vector<int> pot=wqs::slove(); // rotate int mnd=n,mnp=0; for(int i=0;i<k;i++) { int pre=(pot[(i+1)%k]-pot[i]+n)%n; if(pre<mnd) mnd=pre,mnp=i; } // for(int x:pot) printf("%d ",x); // printf("\\n"); // printf(">> %d\\n",mnd); int beg=pot[mnp]+1; for(int i=beg;i<=n;i++) tmp[i-beg+1]=a[i]; for(int i=1;i<beg;i++) tmp[n-beg+1+i]=L+a[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) a[i]=tmp[i],a[i+n]=L+a[i]; for(int i=1;i<=n*2;i++) sm[i]=sm[i-1]+a[i]; for(int i=0;i<k;i++) pot[i]=(pot[i]-beg+1-1+n)%n+1; sort(pot.begin(),pot.end()); // for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) printf("%lld ",a[i]); // printf("\\n"); // for(int x:pot) printf("%d ",x); // printf("\\n"); // printf("%lld\\n",calc(1,3)+calc(4,5)); vector<pair<int,int> > seq; for(int i=0,lst=1;i<k;i++) { seq.emplace_back(lst,pot[i]); lst=pot[i]; } pot=wqs::slove(); ans=0; for(int i=0,lst=0;i<k;i++) ans+=calc(lst+1,pot[i]),lst=pot[i]; res=pot; // printf("pot0: %d\\n",pot[0]); // for(int x:pot) printf("%d ",x); // printf("\\n"); // if(pot[0]>n/k) printf("ERR"); // if(n==200000&&L==1000000000000ll) return 0; slove::slove(seq); printf("%lld\\n",ans); vector<ll> tmp; for(int i=0;i<k;i++) { int lb=res[(i-1+k)%k]+1,rb=res[i]; if(lb>rb) rb+=n; tmp.push_back(a[lb+rb>>1]%L); } sort(tmp.begin(),tmp.end()); for(ll x:tmp) printf("%lld ",x); printf("\\n"); return 0; } çڑ„ç³»و•°ï¼ˆé’¦ه®ڑوک¯ âˆ’1-1âˆ’1ï¼Œوœھè¢«é’¦ه®ڑهˆ™وک¯ 111ï¼‰ï¼Œو•… uuu çڑ„و‰€وœ‰ه„؟ه­گهŒ؛é—´éƒ½ه؟…é،»و»،è¶³ râ‰¤mlr\\le m_lrâ‰¤mlâ€‹ï¼Œه¹¶ن¼ڑه¸¦و‌¥ âˆ’1-1âˆ’1 çڑ„ç³»و•°م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè€ƒè™‘هŒ؛é—´ dpï¼Œè®¾ fl,rf_{l,r}fl,râ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛هŒ؛é—´ [l,r][l,r][l,r] çڑ„ه­گو ‘çڑ„ç­”و،ˆï¼›gl,r,kg_{l,r,k}gl,r,kâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛هŒ؛é—´ [l,r][l,r][l,r] ه†…ن¸”و•£ç‚¹ن¸ھو•°ن¸؛ kkk و—¶ه„؟ه­گçڑ„ fff çڑ„ن¹کç§¯ï¼ˆè®،ç®—ن؛†ه®¹و–¥ç³»و•°ن½†وœھè®،ç®— k!k!k! çڑ„ç³»و•°ï¼‰ï¼Œè½¬ç§» O(n4)O(n^4)O(n4) هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=205; #define p 1000000007 int fra[S]; int n,a[S]; int g[S][S][S],f[S][S]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } int main() { fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) fra[i]=1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p; scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); if(a[1]==n) return puts("0"),0; for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) g[i+1][i][0]=1; for(int len=1;len<=n;len++) { for(int l=1;l<=n-len+1;l++) { int r=l+len-1; for(int k=0;k<=len;k++) { for(int x=r;x>=l+1;x--) if(r<=a[x]) add(g[l][r][k], p-1ll*g[l][x-1][k]*f[x][r]%p); if(k>0) add(g[l][r][k],g[l][r-1][k-1]); } for(int k=0;k<=len;k++) add(f[l][r],1ll*fra[k]*g[l][r][k]%p); if(r<=a[l]) add(g[l][r][0],p-f[l][r]); } } printf("%d\\n",f[1][n]); return 0; } è¾¹ه®¹و–¥ï¼Œه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼Œè´ھه؟ƒهˆ¤و–­ن¸چç­‰ه¼ڈé“¾هگˆو³•و€§çڑ„è؟‡ç¨‹وœ€ç»ˆن¼ڑه¾—هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ن¸²ï¼Œè؟™ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ن¸²ه’Œهگˆو³•çڑ„ن¸چç­‰ه¼ڈé“¾وک¯هڈŒه°„çڑ„ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸چه¦¨ه¯¹è؟™ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ن¸² dpم€‚ è®¾ fi,j,kf_{i,j,k}fi,j,kâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه،«ن؛† [1,i][1,i][1,i] è؟™ن؛›ه­—ç¬¦ï¼Œç›®ه‰چه­—ç¬¦ن¸²é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ jjjï¼Œوœ«ه°¾ï¼ˆوœھه¤„çگ†è´،çŒ®çڑ„ï¼‰و®µé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ kkkم€‚é‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ f0,0,0=1f_{0,0,0}=1f0,0,0â€‹=1ï¼Œç­”و،ˆن¸؛ n!أ—âˆ‘ifi,n,0n!\\times \\sum\\limits_{i}f_{i,n,0}n!أ—iâˆ‘â€‹fi,n,0â€‹م€‚ è€ƒè™‘è½¬ç§»ï¼ڑ ه،«ه®Œ ci+1c_{i+1}ci+1â€‹ è؟کن¸چه¤ںه،«و»،è؟™ن¸€و®µï¼ڑfi,j,kâ†’fi+1,j+ci+1,k+ci+1f_{i,j,k}\\to f_{i+1,j+c_{i+1},k+c_{i+1}}fi,j,kâ€‹â†’fi+1,j+ci+1â€‹,k+ci+1â€‹â€‹ï¼› ه،«ن؛† xxx ن¸ھ i+1i+1i+1 هگژهˆ†و®µن؛†ï¼ˆه‡؛çژ°ن؛† <<<ï¼‰ï¼ڑfi,j,kأ—1(k+x)!â†’fi+1,j+x,0f_{i,j,k}\\times \\frac{1}{(k+x)!}\\to f_{i+1,j+x,0}fi,j,kâ€‹أ—(k+x)!1â€‹â†’fi+1,j+x,0â€‹ï¼› ه،«ن؛† xxx ن¸ھ i+1i+1i+1 هگژç¢°هˆ°ن؛†ن¸€ن¸ھé’¦ه®ڑن»ژ <<< هڈکو‌¥çڑ„ $\\le ï¼ˆهژںوœ¬è¦پهˆ†و®µï¼Œن½†وک¯é’¦ه®ڑن¸چهˆ†و®µï¼‰ï¼ڑï¼ˆهژںوœ¬è¦پهˆ†و®µï¼Œن½†وک¯é’¦ه®ڑن¸چهˆ†و®µï¼‰ï¼ڑï¼ˆهژںوœ¬è¦پهˆ†و®µï¼Œن½†وک¯é’¦ه®ڑن¸چهˆ†و®µï¼‰ï¼ڑf_{i,j,k}\\times (-1)\\to f_{i+1,j+x,k+x}$ï¼› و³¨و„ڈهˆ°ç”±ن؛ژè½¬ç§»ن¸­ 1â‰¤xâ‰¤ci+11\\le x\\le c_{i+1}1â‰¤xâ‰¤ci+1â€‹ï¼Œو•…ç¬¬ن¸‰ن¸ھè½¬ç§»ه’Œç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھè½¬ç§»وٹµو¶ˆن؛†ï¼ڑ fi,j,kأ—1(k+x)!â†’fi+1,j+x,0f_{i,j,k}\\times \\frac{1}{(k+x)!}\\to f_{i+1,j+x,0}fi,j,kâ€‹أ—(k+x)!1â€‹â†’fi+1,j+x,0â€‹ï¼Œ1â‰¤xâ‰¤ci+11\\le x\\le c_{i+1}1â‰¤xâ‰¤ci+1â€‹ï¼› fi,j,kأ—(âˆ’1)â†’fi+1,j+x,k+xf_{i,j,k}\\times (-1)\\to f_{i+1,j+x,k+x}fi,j,kâ€‹أ—(âˆ’1)â†’fi+1,j+x,k+xâ€‹ï¼Œ1â‰¤x<ci+11\\le x<c_{i+1}1â‰¤x<ci+1â€‹ï¼› ه‰چç¼€ه’Œن¼کهŒ–هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(mn2)O(mn^2)O(mn2)م€‚ ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼ڑ fi,j,0=âˆ‘x=1ciâˆ‘kfiâˆ’1,jâˆ’x,kأ—1(k+x)!=âˆ‘x1x!âˆ‘k=xâˆ’cixâˆ’1fiâˆ’1,jâˆ’x+k,k\\begin{aligned} f_{i,j,0}&=\\sum\\limits_{x=1}^{c_i} \\sum\\limits_{k} f_{i-1,j-x,k}\\times \\frac{1}{(k+x)!}\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{x} \\frac{1}{x!}\\sum\\limits_{k=x-c_i}^{x-1} f_{i-1,j-x+k,k} \\end{aligned} fi,j,0â€‹â€‹=x=1âˆ‘ciâ€‹â€‹kâˆ‘â€‹fiâˆ’1,jâˆ’x,kâ€‹أ—(k+x)!1â€‹=xâˆ‘â€‹x!1â€‹k=xâˆ’ciâ€‹âˆ‘xâˆ’1â€‹fiâˆ’1,jâˆ’x+k,kâ€‹â€‹ è®°ه¾—ç‰¹هˆ¤ ci=0c_i=0ciâ€‹=0 çڑ„ه­—ç¬¦م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> using namespace std; const int S=505; #define p 1000000007 int fra[S],inv[S]; int n,m,c[S]; int sm[S][S],f[2][S][S]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1,x=1ll*x*x%p) res=y&1?1ll*res*x%p:res; return res; } int main() { fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) fra[i]=1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p; inv[S-3]=qpow(fra[S-3],p-2); for(int i=S-3;i>=1;i--) inv[i-1]=1ll*inv[i]*i%p; scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) scanf("%d",&c[i]); int ans=0; f[0][0][0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int u=i&1,v=u^1; memset(f[u],0,sizeof(f[u])); if(c[i]==0) { memcpy(f[u],f[v],sizeof(f[u])); continue; } for(int j=0;j<=n;j++) { for(int k=0;k<=n;k++) { sm[j][k]=f[v][j][k]; if(j>0&&k>0) add(sm[j][k],sm[j-1][k-1]); } } for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) { for(int x=1;x<=n&&x<=j;x++) { // x-c_i <= k <= x-1 int lb=max(x-c[i],0),rb=x-1; int pre=sm[j-x+rb][rb]; if(lb>0) add(pre,p-sm[j-x+lb-1][lb-1]); add(f[u][j][0],1ll*inv[x]*pre%p); } } for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) { for(int k=1;k<=n;k++) { add(f[u][j][k],p-sm[j-1][k-1]); if(j>=c[i]&&k>=c[i]) add(f[u][j][k],sm[j-c[i]][k-c[i]]); } } add(ans,f[u][n][0]); } printf("%d\\n",1ll*fra[n]*ans%p); return 0; }
