\n","content":" وœ‰ nnn ن¸ھن؛؛و‌¥è؟‡ï¼Œç¬¬ iii ن¸ھن؛؛هœ¨ aia_iaiâ€‹ و—¶هˆ»و‌¥هœ¨ bib_ibiâ€‹ و—¶هˆ»èµ°ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھن؛؛هڈ¯ن»¥هœ¨و‌¥و—¶وˆ–èµ°و—¶ç™»è®°ï¼Œé—®هڈ¯èƒ½çڑ„ç™»è®°é،؛ه؛ڈوœ‰ه¤ڑه°‘ç§چم€‚ nâ©½5أ—105n\\leqslant 5\\times 10^5nâ©½5أ—105ï¼Œai,bia_i,b_iaiâ€‹,biâ€‹ ن؛’ن¸چç›¸هگŒï¼Œâˆ€i<n,ai<ai+1,bi<bi+1\\forall i<n,a_i<a_{i+1},b_{i}<b_{i+1}âˆ€i<n,aiâ€‹<ai+1â€‹,biâ€‹<bi+1â€‹م€‚ ه®¹و–¥م€‚ è§‚ه¯ںهˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھ iii é€‰ aia_iaiâ€‹ ه’Œé€‰ bib_ibiâ€‹ وœ¬è´¨ن¸چهگŒه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ [ai,bi][a_i,b_i][aiâ€‹,biâ€‹] ن¸­وœ‰ه…¶ن»–ن؛؛é€‰م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆه®¹و–¥ن¸€ن¸‹ï¼Œé’¦ه®ڑ yyy ن¸ھن¸چهگŒçڑ„ iii و»،è¶³ [ai,bi][a_i,b_i][aiâ€‹,biâ€‹] ن¸­و²،وœ‰ه…¶ن»–ن؛؛é€‰ï¼Œهˆ™ه¯¹ç­”و،ˆçڑ„è´،çŒ®ن¸؛ 2x(âˆ’1)y2^{x}(-1)^y2x(âˆ’1)yï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ xxx ن¸؛ن¸ژè؟™ yyy ن¸ھهŒ؛é—´و²،وœ‰ن؛¤çڑ„هŒ؛é—´ن¸ھو•°م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè®¾ fif_{i}fiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ç®—ه®Œن؛†ه‰چ iii ن¸ھن؛؛ï¼Œé’¦ه®ڑن؛† [ai,bi][a_i,b_i][aiâ€‹,biâ€‹] ن¸­و²،وœ‰ه…¶ن»–ن؛؛é€‰çڑ„و€»è´،çŒ®ه’Œم€‚ è½¬ç§»ç›´وژ¥و‍ڑن¸¾ن¸ٹن¸€ن¸ھé’¦ه®ڑçڑ„ن؛؛هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ هڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ه‰چç¼€ه’Œن¼کهŒ–ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n)O(n)O(n)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑï¼ˆO(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn) و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ï¼‰ // Problem: [AGC061C] First Come First Serve // Contest: Luogu // URL: https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/AT_agc061_c // Memory Limit: 1 MB // Time Limit: 2000 ms // // Powered by CP Editor (https://cpeditor.org) #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=500005,p=998244353,inv2=499122177; struct node { int l,r; }a[S]; int n; int iv2[S],pw2[S]; int lst[S],nxt[S]; int f[S],sum[S*2]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } inline void addt(int p,int y) { if(p==0) return add(sum[p],y); for(int i=p;i<=2*n;i+=i&-i) add(sum[i],y); } inline int quet(int p) { int res=sum[0]; for(int i=p;i>=1;i-=i&-i) add(res,sum[i]); return res; } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d%d",&a[i].l,&a[i].r); iv2[0]=pw2[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) iv2[i]=1ll*iv2[i-1]*inv2%p; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) pw2[i]=1ll*pw2[i-1]*2%p; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { lst[i]=i==1?1:lst[i-1]; while(a[lst[i]].r<a[i].l) lst[i]++; } for(int i=n;i>=1;i--) { nxt[i]=i==n?n:nxt[i+1]; while(a[nxt[i]].l>a[i].r) nxt[i]--; } f[0]=1; addt(0,1ll*f[0]*iv2[0]%p); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int pre=p-1ll*pw2[lst[i]-1]*quet(a[i].l-1)%p; addt(a[nxt[i]].r,1ll*pre*iv2[nxt[i]]%p); } printf("%d\\n",1ll*pw2[n]*quet(2*n)%p); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ه®¹و–¥","slug":"1Ur0PWueZ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/1Ur0PWueZ/"},{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"AGC061C First Come First Serve هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/agc061c-first-come-first-serve-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"4 min read","time":198000,"words":611,"minutes":4},"date":"2023-09-12 21:17:42","dateFormat":"2023-09-12"},{"abstract":"
\n

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ nnn çڑ„ 01 ن¸²ï¼Œو±‚وœ€ه¤ڑهڈ¯ن»¥é€‰ه‡؛ه¤ڑه°‘ن؛’ن¸چç›¸ن؛¤çڑ„ه­گن¸²ï¼Œو»،è¶³è؟™ن؛›ه­گن¸²وŒ‰ç…§هژںن¸²ن¸­çڑ„é،؛ه؛ڈï¼Œه­—ه…¸ه؛ڈن¸¥و ¼هچ‡ه؛ڈم€‚

\n

1â‰¤nâ‰¤2.5أ—1041\\le n\\le 2.5\\times 10^41â‰¤nâ‰¤2.5أ—104م€‚

\n
\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ nnn çڑ„ 01 ن¸²ï¼Œو±‚وœ€ه¤ڑهڈ¯ن»¥é€‰ه‡؛ه¤ڑه°‘ن؛’ن¸چç›¸ن؛¤çڑ„ه­گن¸²ï¼Œو»،è¶³è؟™ن؛›ه­گن¸²وŒ‰ç…§هژںن¸²ن¸­çڑ„é،؛ه؛ڈï¼Œه­—ه…¸ه؛ڈن¸¥و ¼هچ‡ه؛ڈم€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤2.5أ—1041\\le n\\le 2.5\\times 10^41â‰¤nâ‰¤2.5أ—104م€‚ ن¸چè¦په†چè‡ھç„¶و ¹هڈ·ن؛†م€‚ è®¾وœ€ç»ˆé€‰ه‡؛çڑ„ه­گن¸²ن¸؛ s1,s2,â€¦,sks_1,s_2,\\dots,s_ks1â€‹,s2â€‹,â€¦,skâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ âˆ€1â‰¤i<k\\forall 1\\le i<kâˆ€1â‰¤i<kï¼Œه؟…ه®ڑوœ‰ âˆ£si+1âˆ£â‰¤âˆ£siâˆ£+1|s_{i+1}|\\le |s_i|+1âˆ£si+1â€‹âˆ£â‰¤âˆ£siâ€‹âˆ£+1م€‚ ه¹¶ن¸”ه؟…ه®ڑوœ‰ âˆ£s1âˆ£=1|s_1|=1âˆ£s1â€‹âˆ£=1م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆن¸چéڑ¾ه¾—ه‡؛ï¼Œ âˆ‘i=1maxâپ،{âˆ£siâˆ£}iâ‰¤n\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{\\max\\{|s_i|\\}}i\\le ni=1âˆ‘max{âˆ£siâ€‹âˆ£}â€‹iâ‰¤nï¼Œه› ن¸؛ه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰ iii éƒ½ه؟…ه®ڑه­کهœ¨ jjj و»،è¶³ âˆ£sjâˆ£=âˆ£siâˆ£âˆ’1|s_j|=|s_i|-1âˆ£sjâ€‹âˆ£=âˆ£siâ€‹âˆ£âˆ’1م€‚ و‰€ن»¥ maxâپ،{âˆ£siâˆ£}â‰¤2n\\max\\{|s_i|\\}\\le \\sqrt{2n}max{âˆ£siâ€‹âˆ£}â‰¤2nâ€‹م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè®¾ fif_ifiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ s[1,i]s_{[1,i]}s[1,i]â€‹ çڑ„ç­”و،ˆï¼Œوٹٹو‰€وœ‰é•؟ه؛¦ â‰¤2n\\le \\sqrt{2n}â‰¤2nâ€‹ çڑ„ه­گن¸²éƒ½و‹‰ه‡؛و‌¥و”¾هˆ° trie ن¸ٹï¼Œç”¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ç»´وٹ¤ fif_ifiâ€‹ çڑ„è½¬ç§»هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ç­”و،ˆهچ³ن¸؛ maxâپ،{fi}\\max\\{f_i\\}max{fiâ€‹}ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nnlogâپ،n)O(n\\sqrt n\\log n)O(nnâ€‹logn)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; const int S=25005,M=250,MS=10000005; int n; char a[S]; int cnt,son[MS][2]; vector<pair<int,int>> idx[MS]; int c[S],f[S]; inline void addt(int u,int val) { for(int i=u;i<=n;i+=i&-i) c[i]=max(c[i],val); } inline int quet(int u) { int res=0; for(int i=u;i>=1;i-=i&-i) res=max(res,c[i]); return res; } void dfs(int u) { for(auto u:idx[u]) { int l=u.first,r=u.second; f[r]=max(f[r],quet(l-1)+1); addt(r,f[r]); } if(son[u][0]!=0) dfs(son[u][0]); if(son[u][1]!=0) dfs(son[u][1]); } int main() { scanf("%d%s",&n,a+1); for(int i=n;i>=1;i--) { int u=0; for(int j=i;j<=n&&j<=i+M-1;j++) { int id=a[j]-'0'; if(son[u][id]==0) son[u][id]=++cnt; u=son[u][id]; idx[u].push_back({i,j}); } } dfs(0); int ans=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ans=max(ans,f[i]); printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"ABC240Ex Sequence of Substrings هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/abc240ex-sequence-of-substrings-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"3 min read","time":166000,"words":509,"minutes":3},"date":"2023-09-11 11:47:27","dateFormat":"2023-09-11"},{"abstract":"

ç»™ه®ڑé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aia_iaiâ€‹ï¼Œو»،è¶³ a1=an=maxâپ،{ai}a_1=a_n=\\max\\{a_i\\}a1â€‹=anâ€‹=max{aiâ€‹}م€‚

\n

و‍„ه»؛ن¸€ن¸ھ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و— هگ‘ه›¾ GGG ه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ

\n
    \n
  • âˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤n\\forall 1\\le i<j\\le nâˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤nï¼Œè‹¥ه­کهœ¨وںگن¸ھو­£و•´و•° kkk و»،è¶³ ai,ajâ‰¥ka_i,a_j\\ge kaiâ€‹,ajâ€‹â‰¥k ن¸” âˆ€i<p<j\\forall i<p<jâˆ€i<p<j éƒ½وœ‰ ap<ka_p<kapâ€‹<kï¼Œهˆ™ GGG ن¸­ه­کهœ¨è¾¹ (i,j)(i,j)(i,j)ï¼›
    • \n
\n

qqq و¬،è¯¢é—®ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،è¯¢é—®ç‚¹ xix_ixiâ€‹ ه’Œ yiy_iyiâ€‹ ن¹‹é—´çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯é•؟ه؛¦ه‡ڈن¸€م€‚

\n

1â‰¤n,qâ‰¤1051\\le n,q\\le 10^51â‰¤n,qâ‰¤105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤n1\\le a_i\\le n1â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤nم€‚

\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aia_iaiâ€‹ï¼Œو»،è¶³ a1=an=maxâپ،{ai}a_1=a_n=\\max\\{a_i\\}a1â€‹=anâ€‹=max{aiâ€‹}م€‚ و‍„ه»؛ن¸€ن¸ھ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و— هگ‘ه›¾ GGG ه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ âˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤n\\forall kâˆ’è¾¹k-\\text{è¾¹}kâˆ’è¾¹ (x,y)(x,y)(x,y)ï¼Œو‰€وœ‰ç«¯ç‚¹هœ¨ [x,y][x,y][x,y] ه†…çڑ„ (kâˆ’1)âˆ’è¾¹(k-1)-\\text{è¾¹}(kâˆ’1)âˆ’è¾¹ éƒ½وک¯ه®ƒçڑ„ه„؟ه­گم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆوœ€çں­è·¯çڑ„ه½¢و€پè‚¯ه®ڑوک¯ن¸چو–­ه¾€çˆ¶ن؛²èµ°ï¼Œèµ°هˆ° lca\\text{lca}lca هگژه†چه¾€ه„؟ه­گèµ°م€‚ ن¹ںه°±وک¯è¯´ï¼Œè®¾è·¯ه¾„ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸؛ pppï¼Œهˆ™ï¼ڑ ه­کهœ¨ن¸€ن¸ھهˆ†ç•Œç‚¹ lllï¼Œو»،è¶³ âˆ€i<l\\forall i< lâˆ€i<lï¼Œapiâ‰¤api+1a_{p_i}\\le a_{p_{i+1}}apiâ€‹â€‹â‰¤api+1â€‹â€‹ ن¸” âˆ€i>l\\forall i>lâˆ€i>lï¼Œapiâˆ’1â‰¥apia_{p_{i-1}}\\ge a_{p_i}apiâˆ’1â€‹â€‹â‰¥apiâ€‹â€‹ï¼Œهچ³è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹçڑ„ aia_iaiâ€‹ ه…ˆه¢‍ه†چه‡ڈï¼› âˆ€pi<j<pi+1\\forall p_i<j<p_{i+1}âˆ€piâ€‹<j<pi+1â€‹ï¼Œéƒ½وœ‰ ajâ‰¤minâپ،(api,api+1)a_j\\le \\min(a_{p_i},a_{p_{i+1}})ajâ€‹â‰¤min(apiâ€‹â€‹,api+1â€‹â€‹)ï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™وٹٹ jjj هٹ ه…¥ ppp è‚¯ه®ڑن¸چهٹ£ï¼› é‚£ن¹ˆè€ƒè™‘ه€چه¢‍ï¼Œن¸چه¦¨è®¾ lbi,jlb_{i,j}lbi,jâ€‹ ه’Œ rbi,jrb_{i,j}rbi,jâ€‹ هˆ†هˆ«è،¨ç¤؛ ppp é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ 2j2^j2j ن¸” p1=ip_1=ip1â€‹=i و—¶ pjp_jpjâ€‹ هڈ¯èƒ½çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ه’Œوœ€ه¤§ه€¼ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶ âˆ€lbi,j<k<rbi,j\\forall lb_{i,j}<k<rb_{i,j}âˆ€lbi,jâ€‹<k<rbi,jâ€‹ éƒ½وœ‰ ak<minâپ،(albi,j,arbi,j)a_k<\\min(a_{lb_{i,j}},a_{rb_{i,j}})akâ€‹<min(albi,jâ€‹â€‹,arbi,jâ€‹â€‹)م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆو ¹وچ®ن¹‹ه‰چçڑ„ç»“è®؛ï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ lbi,j=minâپ،(lblbi,jâˆ’1,jâˆ’1,lbrbi,jâˆ’1,jâˆ’1)rbi,j=maxâپ،(rblbi,jâˆ’1,jâˆ’1,rbrbi,jâˆ’1,jâˆ’1)lb_{i,j}=\\min(lb_{lb_{i,j-1},j-1},lb_{rb_{i,j-1},j-1})\\\\ rb_{i,j}=\\max(rb_{lb_{i,j-1},j-1},rb_{rb_{i,j-1},j-1})\\\\ lbi,jâ€‹=min(lblbi,jâˆ’1â€‹,jâˆ’1â€‹,lbrbi,jâˆ’1â€‹,jâˆ’1â€‹)rbi,jâ€‹=max(rblbi,jâˆ’1â€‹,jâˆ’1â€‹,rbrbi,jâˆ’1â€‹,jâˆ’1â€‹) è€Œ lbi,0lb_{i,0}lbi,0â€‹ ه’Œ rbi,0rb_{i,0}rbi,0â€‹ هˆ†هˆ«ن¸؛ iii ه·¦è¾¹ه’Œهڈ³è¾¹ç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھ aj>aia_j>a_iajâ€‹>aiâ€‹ çڑ„ jjjم€‚ ن¸چه¦¨ن»¤è¯¢é—®çڑ„ xiâ‰¤yix_i\\le y_ixiâ€‹â‰¤yiâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™و¯ڈو¬،è¯¢é—®ï¼ڑ ن»ژ xix_ixiâ€‹ ه¼€ه§‹هœ¨ rb<yirb<y_irb<yiâ€‹ çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹ن¸چو–­è·³ rbrbrbï¼Œè®¾وœ€هگژè·³هˆ°ن؛† rrrï¼› ن»ژ yiy_iyiâ€‹ ه¼€ه§‹هœ¨ lb>rlb>rlb>r çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹ن¸چو–­è·³ lblblbï¼› و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O((n+q)logâپ،n)O((n+q)\\log n)O((n+q)logn)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=100005,BS=25; int n,k,q,a[S]; int top,sta[S]; int lb[S][BS],rb[S][BS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&k,&q); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); top=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { while(top>0&&a[sta[top]]<a[i]) top--; lb[i][0]=top==0?i:sta[top]; sta[++top]=i; } top=0; for(int i=n;i>=1;i--) { while(top>0&&a[sta[top]]<a[i]) top--; rb[i][0]=top==0?i:sta[top]; sta[++top]=i; } for(int j=1;j<=BS-3;j++) { for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int l=lb[i][j-1],r=rb[i][j-1]; lb[i][j]=min(lb[l][j-1],lb[r][j-1]); rb[i][j]=max(rb[l][j-1],rb[r][j-1]); } } while(q--) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); if(x>y) swap(x,y); int ans=0; int l=x,r=x; for(int i=BS-3;i>=0;i--) { if(max(rb[l][i],rb[r][i])<y) { ans+=1<<i; int tl=l,tr=r; l=min(lb[tl][i],lb[tr][i]); r=max(rb[tl][i],rb[tr][i]); } } int u=r; l=y,r=y; for(int i=BS-3;i>=0;i--) { if(min(lb[l][i],lb[r][i])>u) { ans+=1<<i; int tl=l,tr=r; l=min(lb[tl][i],lb[tr][i]); r=max(rb[tl][i],rb[tr][i]); } } printf("%d\\n",ans); } return 0; } \n

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€و£µ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و ‘ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹وœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھو‌ƒه€¼ aia_iaiâ€‹م€‚

\n

ن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— bbb هگˆو³•ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ âˆ€1â‰¤uâ‰¤n\\forall 1\\le u\\le nâˆ€1â‰¤uâ‰¤nï¼Œéƒ½ه­کهœ¨ن¸¤ن¸ھو•´و•° x,yx,yx,y و»،è¶³ï¼ڑ

\n
    \n
  • 1â‰¤x,yâ‰¤n1\\le x,y\\le n1â‰¤x,yâ‰¤nï¼›
    • \n
  • xî€ =yx\\not=yxî€ â€‹=yï¼›
    • \n
  • uuu هœ¨ xxx هˆ° yyy çڑ„ç®€هچ•è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹï¼›
    • \n
  • minâپ،(bx,by)â‰¥au\\min(b_x,b_y)\\ge a_umin(bxâ€‹,byâ€‹)â‰¥auâ€‹ï¼›
    • \n
\n

è¾“ه‡؛و‰€وœ‰هگˆو³•çڑ„ bbb ن¸­وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ âˆ‘bi\\sum b_iâˆ‘biâ€‹م€‚

\n

2â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1052\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1091\\le a_i\\le 10^91â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤109م€‚

\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€و£µ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و ‘ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹وœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھو‌ƒه€¼ aia_iaiâ€‹م€‚ ن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— bbb هگˆو³•ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ âˆ€1â‰¤uâ‰¤n\\forall 1\\le u\\le nâˆ€1â‰¤uâ‰¤nï¼Œéƒ½ه­کهœ¨ن¸¤ن¸ھو•´و•° x,yx,yx,y و»،è¶³ï¼ڑ 1â‰¤x,yâ‰¤n1\\le x,y\\le n1â‰¤x,yâ‰¤nï¼› xî€ =yx\\not=yxî€ â€‹=yï¼› uuu هœ¨ xxx هˆ° yyy çڑ„ç®€هچ•è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹï¼› minâپ،(bx,by)â‰¥au\\min(b_x,b_y)\\ge a_umin(bxâ€‹,byâ€‹)â‰¥auâ€‹ï¼› è¾“ه‡؛و‰€وœ‰هگˆو³•çڑ„ bbb ن¸­وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ âˆ‘bi\\sum b_iâˆ‘biâ€‹م€‚ 2â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1052\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1091\\le a_i\\le 10^91â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤109م€‚ é¦–ه…ˆن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°هڈھوœ‰هڈ¶ه­گï¼ˆن¸€ه؛¦ç‚¹ï¼‰çڑ„ biî€ =0b_i\\not=0biâ€‹î€ â€‹=0م€‚ ن»¤ aia_iaiâ€‹ وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ç‚¹ rtrtrt هپڑو ¹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه…¶ن½™çڑ„ç‚¹ uuu هڈھè¦پو»،è¶³هœ¨ه®ƒه­گو ‘ه†…ه­کهœ¨ bvâ‰¥aub_v\\ge a_ubvâ€‹â‰¥auâ€‹ çڑ„ vvv هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆوŒ‰ç…§و·±ه؛¦ن»ژو·±ه¾€وµ…è´ھه؟ƒï¼Œè´ھهˆ° uuu و—¶é€‰ uuu ه­گو ‘ه†… bvb_vbvâ€‹ وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ vvv è®© bvâ†’maxâپ،(bv,au)b_v\\to \\max(b_v,a_u)bvâ€‹â†’max(bvâ€‹,auâ€‹) هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ وœ€هگژé€‰و ‘ن¸­وœ€ه¤§ه’Œو¬،ه¤§çڑ„ bib_ibiâ€‹ ن»¤ه®ƒن»¬ن¸؛ arta_{rt}artâ€‹ هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; const int S=200005; int n,a[S]; vector<int> g[S]; int val[S]; int mx[S],mx2[S]; void dfs(int u,int fa) { bool f=false; for(int v:g[u]) { if(v==fa) continue; f=true; dfs(v,u); if(val[mx[v]]>val[mx[u]]) mx2[u]=mx[u],mx[u]=mx[v]; else if(val[mx[v]]>val[mx2[u]]) mx2[u]=mx[v]; } if(!f) mx[u]=u; val[mx[u]]=max(val[mx[u]],a[u]); } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); g[x].push_back(y),g[y].push_back(x); } int rt=1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) if(a[i]>a[rt]) rt=i; dfs(rt,0); if(mx2[rt]==0) mx2[rt]=rt; val[mx[rt]]=val[mx2[rt]]=a[rt]; long long ans=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ans+=val[i]; printf("%lld\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"è´ھه؟ƒ","slug":"PR_0Eh8tb","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/PR_0Eh8tb/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"CF1637F Towers هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/cf1637f-towers-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"3 min read","time":153000,"words":476,"minutes":3},"date":"2023-09-04 11:11:47","dateFormat":"2023-09-04"},{"abstract":"

ç»™ه®ڑé‌‍è´ںو•´و•° n,x,yn,x,yn,x,yï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ âˆ‘i=1nai=x\\sum \\limits_{i=1}^n a_i=xi=1âˆ‘nâ€‹aiâ€‹=xï¼Œو‰€وœ‰ aia_iaiâ€‹ وŒ‰ن½چوˆ–ه’Œن¸؛ yyy çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaaï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ âٹ•i=1nai\\oplus_{i=1}^n a_iâٹ•i=1nâ€‹aiâ€‹ çڑ„ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œم€‚

\n

1â‰¤nâ‰¤2401\\le n\\le 2^{40}1â‰¤nâ‰¤240ï¼Œ0â‰¤x<2600\\le x< 2^{60}0â‰¤x<260ï¼Œ0â‰¤x<2200\\le x< 2^{20}0â‰¤x<220م€‚

\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑé‌‍è´ںو•´و•° n,x,yn,x,yn,x,yï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ âˆ‘i=1nai=x\\sum \\limits_{i=1}^n a_i=xi=1âˆ‘nâ€‹aiâ€‹=xï¼Œو‰€وœ‰ aia_iaiâ€‹ وŒ‰ن½چوˆ–ه’Œن¸؛ yyy çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaaï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ âٹ•i=1nai\\oplus_{i=1}^n a_iâٹ•i=1nâ€‹aiâ€‹ çڑ„ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œم€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤2401\\le n\\le 2^{40}1â‰¤nâ‰¤240ï¼Œ0â‰¤x<2600\\le x< 2^{60}0â‰¤x<260ï¼Œ0â‰¤x<2200\\le x< 2^{20}0â‰¤x<220م€‚ ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ç”±ن؛ژهڈ¯ن»¥ن»»و„ڈè°ƒوچ¢ن½چç½®ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و‰€وœ‰ aia_iaiâ€‹ وœ¬è´¨ç›¸هگŒï¼Œن¹ںه°±وک¯è¯´ï¼Œnnn ن¸؛هپ¶و•°و—¶ç­”و،ˆن¸؛ 000م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ nnn ن¸؛ه¥‡و•°çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼Œو­¤و—¶هڈھéœ€è¦پç»ںè®،و‰€وœ‰ a1a_1a1â€‹ çڑ„ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œهچ³هڈ¯م€‚ è€ƒè™‘و‹†ن½چï¼Œه¯¹و¯ڈن¸ھ iii è®،ç®— a1a_1a1â€‹ ç¬¬ iii ن½چن¸؛ 111 çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•° mod 2\\text{mod }2mod 2 çڑ„ç»“و‍œ cnticnt_icntiâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ç­”و،ˆهچ³ن¸؛ âˆ‘2icnti\\sum 2^icnt_iâˆ‘2icntiâ€‹م€‚ è€ƒè™‘é€ڑè؟‡ه®¹و–¥è®،ç®— cnticnt_icntiâ€‹ï¼Œè®¾ f(yâ€²)f(y')f(yâ€²) è،¨ç¤؛ aia_iaiâ€‹ çڑ„وˆ–ه’Œن¸؛ yâ€²y'yâ€² çڑ„ه­گé›†ن¸” a1a_1a1â€‹ ç¬¬ iii ن½چن¸؛ 111 çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°ï¼Œهˆ™ï¼ڑ cnti=âٹ•yâ€²âٹ†y(âˆ’1)âˆ£yâˆ£âˆ’âˆ£yâ€²âˆ£f(yâ€²)=âٹ•yâ€²âٹ†yf(yâ€²)cnt_i=\\oplus_{y'\\subseteq y}(-1)^{|y|-|y'|}f(y')=\\oplus_{y'\\subseteq y}f(y') cntiâ€‹=âٹ•yâ€²âٹ†yâ€‹(âˆ’1)âˆ£yâˆ£âˆ’âˆ£yâ€²âˆ£f(yâ€²)=âٹ•yâ€²âٹ†yâ€‹f(yâ€²) è€ƒè™‘è®،ç®— f(yâ€²)f(y')f(yâ€²)ï¼Œç”±ن؛ژ a1a_1a1â€‹ ç¬¬ iii ن½چن¸€ه®ڑن¸؛ 111ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸چه¦¨ن»¤ a1â†’a1âˆ’yia_1\\to a_1-y^ia1â€‹â†’a1â€‹âˆ’yiï¼Œهˆ™وœ‰ï¼ڑ f(yâ€²)=âˆ‘a1+a2+â‹¯+an=xâˆ’2i[a1âٹ†(yâ€²âˆ’2i)]âˆڈi=2n[aiâٹ†yâ€²]mod 2f(y')=\\sum\\limits_{a_1+a_2+\\dots+a_n=x-2^i}[a_1\\subseteq (y'-2^i)]\\prod\\limits_{i=2}^n[a_i\\subseteq y']\\mod 2 f(yâ€²)=a1â€‹+a2â€‹+â‹¯+anâ€‹=xâˆ’2iâˆ‘â€‹[a1â€‹âٹ†(yâ€²âˆ’2i)]i=2âˆڈnâ€‹[aiâ€‹âٹ†yâ€²]mod2 و³¨و„ڈهˆ° (nm) mod 2=[mâٹ†n]\\binom{n}{m}\\text{ mod }2=[m\\subseteq n](mnâ€‹) mod 2=[mâٹ†n]ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ï¼ڑ f(yâ€²)=âˆ‘a1+a2+â‹¯+an=xâˆ’2i(yâ€²âˆ’2ia1)âˆڈi=2n(yâ€²ai)mod 2=(nyâ€²âˆ’2ixâˆ’2i)mod 2=[(xâˆ’2i)âٹ†(nyâ€²âˆ’2i)]\\begin{aligned} f(y')&=\\sum\\limits_{a_1+a_2+\\dots+a_n=x-2^i}\\binom{y'-2^i}{a_1}\\prod\\limits_{i=2}^n\\binom{y'}{a_i}\\mod 2\\\\ &=\\binom{ny'-2^i}{x-2^i}\\mod 2\\\\ &=[(x-2^i)\\subseteq(ny'-2^i)]\\\\ \\end{aligned} f(yâ€²)â€‹=a1â€‹+a2â€‹+â‹¯+anâ€‹=xâˆ’2iâˆ‘â€‹(a1â€‹yâ€²âˆ’2iâ€‹)i=2âˆڈnâ€‹(aiâ€‹yâ€²â€‹)mod2=(xâˆ’2inyâ€²âˆ’2iâ€‹)mod2=[(xâˆ’2i)âٹ†(nyâ€²âˆ’2i)]â€‹ و‰€ن»¥ç­”و،ˆن¸؛ï¼ڑ âˆ‘2iâٹ•yâ€²âٹ†y[(xâˆ’2i)âٹ†(nyâ€²âˆ’2i)]\\sum 2^i\\oplus_{y'\\subseteq y}[(x-2^i)\\subseteq(ny'-2^i)] âˆ‘2iâٹ•yâ€²âٹ†yâ€‹[(xâˆ’2i)âٹ†(nyâ€²âˆ’2i)] و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(ylogâپ،y)O(y\\log y)O(ylogy)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; long long n,x; int y; int main() { scanf("%lld%lld%d",&n,&x,&y); if(n&1^1) return puts("0"),0; int ans=0; for(int i=0;i<20;i++) { int f=0; for(int j=y;j>0;j=(j-1)&y) { if(j>>i&1^1) continue; f^=((x-(1<<i))|(n*j-(1<<i)))==(n*j-(1<<i)); } ans+=f<<i; } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } \n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— AAAï¼Œو±‚و»،è¶³ن»¥ن¸‹و‌،ن»¶çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— BBB çڑ„ن¸ھو•°و¨، 998244353998244353998244353 çڑ„ç»“و‍œï¼ڑ ه€¼هںں [1,n][1, n][1,n]ï¼› iii çڑ„ن¸ھو•°ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ AiA_iAiâ€‹ï¼› BiB_iBiâ€‹ çڑ„ن¸ھو•°ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ AiA_iAiâ€‹ï¼› 1â‰¤Aiâ‰¤nâ‰¤5001 \\le A_i\\le n \\le 5001â‰¤Aiâ€‹â‰¤nâ‰¤500م€‚ هˆڑه¼€ه§‹وƒ³çڑ„وک¯وٹٹ AAA ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈوژ’ه؛ڈï¼Œè؟™و ·و¯ڈن¸ھو•°çڑ„ه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•°ه°±ç”±ه®ƒوœ€هگژن¸€و¬،ه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ن½چç½®ه†³ه®ڑï¼Œè®¾ fi,j,kf_{i,j,k}fi,j,kâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه¤„çگ†ه®Œه‰چ A[1,i]A_{[1,i]}A[1,i]â€‹ï¼Œن¸€ه…±ه،«ن؛† jjj ن¸ھن½چç½®ï¼Œن¸€ه…±ه،«ن؛† kkk ç§چو•°çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°ï¼Œن½†وک¯هڈ‘çژ°وک¯ O(n4)O(n^4)O(n4) çڑ„م€‚ çœ‹é¢کè§£هڈ‘çژ°ه؟½ç•¥ن؛†ن¸€ن¸ھه¾ˆé‡چè¦پçڑ„ن¸œè¥؟ï¼ڑè°ƒه’Œç؛§و•° âˆ‘i=1nO(ni)=O(nlnâپ،n)\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^n O(\\frac{n}{i})=O(n\\ln n)i=1âˆ‘nâ€‹O(inâ€‹)=O(nlnn)م€‚ è®¾ did_idiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ iii çڑ„ه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•°ï¼Œè§‚ه¯ں ddd éœ€è¦پو»،è¶³ن»€ن¹ˆو€§è´¨ï¼ڑ diâ‰¤Aid_i\\le A_idiâ€‹â‰¤Aiâ€‹ï¼› ه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ diâ‰¤Ajd_i\\le A_jdiâ€‹â‰¤Ajâ€‹ çڑ„ن½چç½® jjjï¼ŒBjB_jBjâ€‹ هڈ¯ن»¥ç­‰ن؛ژ iiiï¼› è§‚ه¯ںهˆ° âˆ€di<dj\\forall d_i<d_jâˆ€diâ€‹<djâ€‹ï¼Œjjj èƒ½و”¾çڑ„ن½چç½® iii éƒ½èƒ½و”¾ï¼Œهچ³ iii çڑ„ه†³ç­–هŒ…هگ« jjjم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè®¾ fi,j,kf_{i,j,k}fi,j,kâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه†³ه®ڑه®Œ dxâˆˆ[i,n]d_x\\in[i,n]dxâ€‹âˆˆ[i,n] çڑ„ xxxï¼Œه…±و”¾ن؛† jjj ç§چن¸چهگŒçڑ„و•°ï¼Œو¶ˆè€—ن؛† kkk ن¸ھن½چç½®çڑ„ç­”و،ˆم€‚ è½¬ç§»ç›´وژ¥و‍ڑن¸¾وœ‰ه¤ڑه°‘ن¸ھ xxx و»،è¶³ dx=id_x=idxâ€‹=i هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ç”±ن؛ژ jjj çڑ„ن¸ٹç•Œوک¯ ni\\frac{n}{i}inâ€‹ï¼Œdx=id_x=idxâ€‹=i çڑ„ xxx çڑ„ن¸ھو•°ن¸ٹç•Œن¹ںوک¯ ni\\frac{n}{i}inâ€‹ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ O(nâˆ‘i=1nn2i2)O(n\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^n\\frac{n^2}{i^2})O(ni=1âˆ‘nâ€‹i2n2â€‹)ï¼Œç؛¦ن¸؛ O(n2lnâپ،3n)O(n^2\\ln^3 n)O(n2ln3n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=505,p=998244353; int n,a[S]; int fra[S],inv[S],pinv[S][S],C[S][S],f[S][S][S]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1,x=1ll*x*x%p) res=y&1?1ll*res*x%p:res; return res; } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); sort(a+1,a+n+1); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { fra[i]=i==0?1:1ll*i*fra[i-1]%p; C[i][0]=1; for(int j=1;j<=i;j++) C[i][j]=(C[i-1][j]+C[i-1][j-1])%p; } inv[n]=qpow(fra[n],p-2); for(int i=n;i>=1;i--) inv[i-1]=1ll*inv[i]*i%p; for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { pinv[i][0]=1; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) pinv[i][j]=1ll*pinv[i][j-1]*inv[i]%p; } f[n+1][0][0]=1; for(int i=n,pp=n+1;i>=1;i--) { while(pp>1&&a[pp-1]>=i) pp--; int len=n-pp+1; for(int j=0;j<=n/i&&j<=len;j++) { for(int k=0;k<=n;k++) { for(int l=0;l<=j&&l<=n/i&&l<=k/i;l++) { int bse=1ll*C[len-j+l][l]*C[len-k+i*l][i*l]%p*fra[i*l]%p*pinv[i][l]%p; add(f[i][j][k],1ll*bse*f[i+1][j-l][k-i*l]%p); } } } } int ans=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) add(ans,f[1][i][n]); printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"و•°ه­¦","slug":"Dkn2lgn3B","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Dkn2lgn3B/"}],"title":"ARC162E Strange Constraints هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/arc162e-strange-constraints-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"5 min read","time":252000,"words":786,"minutes":5},"date":"2023-08-23 15:31:16","dateFormat":"2023-08-23"},{"abstract":"

\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھ Hأ—WH\\times WHأ—W çڑ„çں©éکµ ccc ه’Œن¸€ن¸ھو•´و•° nnnم€‚ èµ·هˆ‌هœ¨ن»»و„ڈو ¼ه­گن¸ٹو”¾ç½®ن¸€ن¸ھو£‹ه­گï¼Œوژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥و“چن½œ nnn و¬،ï¼Œç¬¬ iii و¬،و“چن½œï¼ڑ è‹¥ iii وک¯ه¥‡و•°ï¼Œهˆ™وٹٹو£‹ه­گç§»هٹ¨هˆ°ه½“ه‰چو‰€هœ¨è،Œن¸­ن»»و„ڈن¸€ن¸ھو ¼ه­گï¼ˆهڈ¯ن»¥ن¸چهٹ¨ï¼‰ï¼› è‹¥ iii وک¯هپ¶و•°ï¼Œهˆ™وٹٹو£‹ه­گç§»هٹ¨هˆ°ه½“ه‰چو‰€هœ¨هˆ—ن¸­ن»»و„ڈن¸€ن¸ھو ¼ه­گï¼ˆهڈ¯ن»¥ن¸چهٹ¨ï¼‰ï¼› وٹٹو¯ڈو¬،و“چن½œه®Œهگژو£‹ه­گو‰€هœ¨çڑ„و ¼ه­گن¸ٹçڑ„و•°ن¾‌و¬،ه†™ن¸‹ï¼Œه½¢وˆگن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ 2n2n2n çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— bbbï¼Œè¯·ن½ و±‚ه‡؛وœ‰ه¤ڑه°‘ç§چهڈ¯èƒ½çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— bbbï¼Œه¯¹ 998244353998244353998244353 هڈ–و¨،م€‚ 1â‰¤H,Wâ‰¤101\\le H,W\\leq101â‰¤H,Wâ‰¤10ï¼Œ1â‰¤nâ‰¤3001\\le n\\leq 3001â‰¤nâ‰¤300ï¼Œ1â‰¤ci,jâ‰¤91\\le c_{i,j}\\le 91â‰¤ci,jâ€‹â‰¤9م€‚ هڈ‘çژ°ه¥‡و•°و¬،و“چن½œن¹‹ه‰چن¸چه…³ه؟ƒو‰€هœ¨هˆ—ï¼Œهپ¶و•°و¬،و“چن½œن¹‹ه‰چن¸چه…³ه؟ƒو‰€هœ¨è،Œï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن¸€ن¸ھوœ´ç´ çڑ„وƒ³و³•وک¯è®¾ fi,jf_{i,j}fi,jâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ç¬¬ iii و¬،و“چن½œه®Œهگژهœ¨ç¬¬ jjj è،Œ/هˆ—çڑ„ç­”و،ˆم€‚ ن½†وک¯ç”±ن؛ژوœ‰هڈ¯èƒ½وœ‰و•°ه­—é‡چه¤چçڑ„و ¼ه­گï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هڈ¯èƒ½ن¼ڑç®—é‡چم€‚ è§‚ه¯ںهˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھو€§è´¨ï¼ڑè®¾ f(b)f(b)f(b) ن¸؛و‰€وœ‰èƒ½ه½¢وˆگ bbb çڑ„è·¯ه¾„çڑ„وœ«ه°¾ن½چç½®çڑ„é›†هگˆï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن¸¤ن¸ھ bbb ç›¸هگŒه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ f(b)f(b)f(b) ç›¸هگŒم€‚ è¯پوکژوک¯وک¾ç„¶çڑ„م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè®¾ fi,Sf_{i,S}fi,Sâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ç¬¬ iii و¬،و“چن½œه®Œن؛†هگژ f(b)=Sf(b)=Sf(b)=Sï¼ˆهڈھن؟‌ç•™è،Œوˆ–هˆ—ï¼‰çڑ„ç­”و،ˆم€‚ è½¬ç§»وک¯وک¾ç„¶çڑ„ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n(2H+2W)HW)O(n(2^H+2^W)HW)O(n(2H+2W)HW)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=15,BS=1<<10,KS=605,p=998244353; int n,m,k; int a[S][S]; int f[KS][BS]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } int main() { scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&m,&k); k*=2; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) scanf(" %c",&a[i][j]),a[i][j]-='0'; int nl=1<<n,ml=1<<m; f[0][nl-1]=1; for(int i=0;i<=k-1;i++) { if(i&1^1) { for(int j=1;j<nl;j++) { for(int v=1;v<=9;v++) { int nv=0; for(int x=1;x<=n;x++) { if(j>>x-1&1^1) continue; for(int y=1;y<=m;y++) if(a[x][y]==v) nv|=1<<y-1; } add(f[i+1][nv],f[i][j]); } } } else { for(int j=1;j<ml;j++) { for(int v=1;v<=9;v++) { int nv=0; for(int y=1;y<=m;y++) { if(j>>y-1&1^1) continue; for(int x=1;x<=n;x++) if(a[x][y]==v) nv|=1<<x-1; } add(f[i+1][nv],f[i][j]); } } } } int ans=0; for(int i=1;i<nl;i++) add(ans,f[k][i]); printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"ABC228G Digits on Grid هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/abc228g-digits-on-grid-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"4 min read","time":200000,"words":672,"minutes":4},"date":"2023-08-23 10:18:51","dateFormat":"2023-08-23"},{"abstract":"
\n

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه…ƒç´ ن¸¤ن¸¤ن¸چهگŒçڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaaï¼Œâˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤n\\forall 1\\le i<j\\le nâˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤nï¼Œè‹¥ ai<aja_i<a_jaiâ€‹<ajâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™è®© iii هگ‘ jjj è؟‍ن¸€و‌،و— هگ‘è¾¹م€‚

\n

qqq و¬،ن؟®و”¹و•°ç»„وںگن¸ھن½چç½®çڑ„ه€¼ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،ن؟®و”¹هگژè¾“ه‡؛ه›¾ن¸­è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸ھو•°م€‚

\n

1â‰¤n,qâ‰¤5أ—1051\\le n,q\\le 5\\times 10^51â‰¤n,qâ‰¤5أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1061\\le a_i\\le 10^61â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤106ï¼Œن؟‌è¯پن»»و„ڈو—¶هˆ»و•°ç»„ن¸­ه…ƒç´ ن¸¤ن¸¤ن¸چهگŒم€‚

\n
\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه…ƒç´ ن¸¤ن¸¤ن¸چهگŒçڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— aaaï¼Œâˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤n\\forall 1\\le i<j\\le nâˆ€1â‰¤i<jâ‰¤nï¼Œè‹¥ ai<aja_i<a_jaiâ€‹<ajâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™è®© iii هگ‘ jjj è؟‍ن¸€و‌،و— هگ‘è¾¹م€‚ qqq و¬،ن؟®و”¹و•°ç»„وںگن¸ھن½چç½®çڑ„ه€¼ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،ن؟®و”¹هگژè¾“ه‡؛ه›¾ن¸­è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸ھو•°م€‚ 1â‰¤n,qâ‰¤5أ—1051\\le n,q\\le 5\\times 10^51â‰¤n,qâ‰¤5أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1061\\le a_i\\le 10^61â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤106ï¼Œن؟‌è¯پن»»و„ڈو—¶هˆ»و•°ç»„ن¸­ه…ƒç´ ن¸¤ن¸¤ن¸چهگŒم€‚ é¦–ه…ˆوœ‰ن¸ھç»“è®؛ï¼ڑ è‹¥ iii ه’Œ jjj و»،è¶³ ai<aja_i<a_jaiâ€‹<ajâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ âˆ€iâ‰¤kâ‰¤j\\forall i\\le k\\le jâˆ€iâ‰¤kâ‰¤jï¼Œkkk ن¸ژ iiiم€پjjj è؟‍é€ڑم€‚ è¯پوکژوک¯وک¾ç„¶çڑ„م€‚ و ¹وچ®è؟™ن¸ھç»“è®؛ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯ن¸€ن¸ھè؟‍ç»­و®µم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆو³¨و„ڈهˆ° âˆ€2â‰¤iâ‰¤n\\forall 2\\le i\\le nâˆ€2â‰¤iâ‰¤nï¼Œiâˆ’1i-1iâˆ’1 ه’Œ iii ن¸چهœ¨هگŒن¸€ن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸­ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ minâپ،j=1iâˆ’1aj>maxâپ،j=inaj\\min\\limits_{j=1}^{i-1} a_j>\\max\\limits_{j=i}^n a_jj=1miniâˆ’1â€‹ajâ€‹>j=imaxnâ€‹ajâ€‹م€‚è€Œç”±ن؛ژو¯ڈن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—éƒ½وک¯è؟‍ç»­و®µï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸ھو•°ه°±وک¯è؟™و ·çڑ„ iii çڑ„ن¸ھو•° +1+1+1م€‚ ه®ڑن¹‰ xxx çڑ„ه‰چé©± pre(x)\\text{pre}(x)pre(x) ن¸؛و»،è¶³ 0â‰¤iâ‰¤n,ai<x0\\le i\\le n,a_i<x0â‰¤iâ‰¤n,aiâ€‹<x ن¸” aia_iaiâ€‹ وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ iiiï¼Œن»¤ bi=âˆ‘j=1n[pre(aj)+1â‰¤iâ‰¤j]b_i=\\sum\\limits_{j=1}^n [\\text{pre}(a_j)+1\\le i\\le j]biâ€‹=j=1âˆ‘nâ€‹[pre(ajâ€‹)+1â‰¤iâ‰¤j]ï¼Œهˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ï¼ڑ b1=0b_1=0b1â€‹=0ï¼› bbb ن¸­ 000 çڑ„ن¸ھو•°ه°±وک¯è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸ھو•°ï¼Œه› ن¸؛و¯ڈن¸ھ bi=0b_i=0biâ€‹=0 çڑ„ iii وک¾ç„¶éƒ½و»،è¶³ minâپ،j=1iâˆ’1aj>maxâپ،j=inaj\\min\\limits_{j=1}^{i-1} a_j>\\max\\limits_{j=i}^n a_jj=1miniâˆ’1â€‹ajâ€‹>j=imaxnâ€‹ajâ€‹ï¼› é‚£ن¹ˆç”¨ set ç»´وٹ¤ه‰چé©±هگژç»§م€پç؛؟و®µو ‘ç»´وٹ¤ bbb ن¸­وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ن»¥هڈٹوœ€ه°ڈه€¼ن¸ھو•°هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <set> using namespace std; const int S=500005; int n,q,a[S]; int tag[S<<2],mn[S<<2],mnc[S<<2]; set<pair<int,int>> st; inline void upda(int u) { int ls=u<<1,rs=u<<1|1; mnc[u]=0; mn[u]=min(mn[ls],mn[rs]); if(mn[ls]==mn[u]) mnc[u]+=mnc[ls]; if(mn[rs]==mn[u]) mnc[u]+=mnc[rs]; } inline void addtag(int u,int val) { tag[u]+=val; mn[u]+=val; } inline void dwntag(int u) { if(tag[u]==0) return; addtag(u<<1,tag[u]),addtag(u<<1|1,tag[u]); tag[u]=0; } void build(int u,int l,int r) { if(l==r) return tag[u]=0,mn[u]=0,mnc[u]=1,void(); int mid=l+r>>1; build(u<<1,l,mid),build(u<<1|1,mid+1,r); upda(u); } void upd(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,int val) { if(l>R||r<L) return; if(l>=L&&r<=R) return addtag(u,val); dwntag(u); int mid=l+r>>1; if(L<=mid) upd(u<<1,l,mid,L,R,val); if(R>=mid+1) upd(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R,val); upda(u); } inline void updd(int l,int r,int x) { if(l==0||r==n+1) return; r=min(r,n); if(l+1>r) return; upd(1,1,n,l+1,r,x); } inline void ins(int p,int x) { st.insert(make_pair(x,p)); auto lb=st.lower_bound(make_pair(x,p)); auto rb=st.lower_bound(make_pair(x,p)); lb--,rb++; updd(lb->second,rb->second,-1); updd(lb->second,p,1); updd(p,rb->second,1); } inline void del(int p,int x) { auto lb=st.lower_bound(make_pair(x,p)); auto rb=st.lower_bound(make_pair(x,p)); lb--,rb++; updd(lb->second,p,-1); updd(p,rb->second,-1); updd(lb->second,rb->second,1); st.erase(make_pair(x,p)); } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&q); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); build(1,1,n); st.insert(make_pair(-1e9,0)),st.insert(make_pair(1e9,n+1)); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) ins(i,a[i]); while(q-->0) { int p,x; scanf("%d%d",&p,&x); del(p,a[p]); a[p]=x; ins(p,a[p]); printf("%d\\n",mnc[1]); } return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"و•°وچ®ç»“و‍„","slug":"8ldJi7oB4","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/8ldJi7oB4/"}],"title":"CF1270H Number of Components هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/cf1270h-number-of-components-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"6 min read","time":310000,"words":930,"minutes":6},"date":"2023-08-22 11:50:25","dateFormat":"2023-08-22"},{"abstract":"

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ه¼  nnn ن¸ھç‚¹ mmm و‌،è¾¹çڑ„ DAGï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ه‡؛ه؛¦è‡³ه¤ڑن¸؛ 222م€‚هڈ¯ن»¥هˆ é™¤ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ 47n\\frac{4}{7}n74â€‹n ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼Œن½؟ه¾—هˆ ç‚¹هگژçڑ„ه›¾ن¸­ن¸چه­کهœ¨هŒ…هگ«ن¸‰ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„é“¾م€‚

1â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051 \\leq n \\leq 2 \\times 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105م€‚

\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ه¼  nnn ن¸ھç‚¹ mmm و‌،è¾¹çڑ„ DAGï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ه‡؛ه؛¦è‡³ه¤ڑن¸؛ 222م€‚هڈ¯ن»¥هˆ é™¤ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ 47n\\frac{4}{7}n74â€‹n ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼Œن½؟ه¾—هˆ ç‚¹هگژçڑ„ه›¾ن¸­ن¸چه­کهœ¨هŒ…هگ«ن¸‰ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„é“¾م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051 \\leq n \\leq 2 \\times 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105م€‚ هپڑé¢کو—¶هڈ¯ن»¥è®¾ه‡؛ن¸€ن؛›وœھçں¥é‡ڈï¼Œه†™ه‡؛ن¸€ن؛›ه·²çں¥و‌،ن»¶و–¹ن¾؟و€‌è€ƒم€‚ ه›¾ن¸­çڑ„ç‚¹ن¸€ه®ڑèƒ½هˆ†وˆگن¸‰ن¸ھé›†هگˆï¼ڑ هˆ هژ»çڑ„ç‚¹é›† SSSï¼› هˆ ه®Œç‚¹هگژو²،وœ‰ه…¥ه؛¦çڑ„ç‚¹é›† AAAï¼› هˆ ه®Œç‚¹هگژوœ‰ه…¥ه؛¦ن½†و²،وœ‰ه‡؛ه؛¦çڑ„ç‚¹é›† BBBï¼› و³¨و„ڈهˆ°هژںه›¾و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ه‡؛ه؛¦è‡³ه¤ڑن¸؛ 222ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ âˆ£Bâˆ£â‰¤2âˆ£Aâˆ£|B|\\le 2|A|âˆ£Bâˆ£â‰¤2âˆ£Aâˆ£م€‚هڈ‘çژ°هڈھوœ‰ BBB ن¸­ç‚¹ه‡؛è¾¹وŒ‡هگ‘çڑ„ç‚¹و‰چن¼ڑهˆ وژ‰ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وœ‰ âˆ£Sâˆ£â‰¤2âˆ£Bâˆ£|S|\\le 2|B|âˆ£Sâˆ£â‰¤2âˆ£Bâˆ£م€‚é‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ âˆ£Sâˆ£â‰¤2âˆ£Bâˆ£â‰¤4âˆ£Aâˆ£|S|\\le 2|B|\\le 4|A|âˆ£Sâˆ£â‰¤2âˆ£Bâˆ£â‰¤4âˆ£Aâˆ£ï¼Œهچ³ âˆ£Sâˆ£|S|âˆ£Sâˆ£ وœ€ه¤§ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ 47n\\frac{4}{7}n74â€‹nم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆè€ƒè™‘ه¢‍é‡ڈو‍„é€ ï¼Œéپچهژ†و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ï¼ڑ è‹¥ه®ƒو²،وœ‰ه…¥è¾¹وˆ–ه…¥è¾¹éƒ½و‌¥è‡ھ SSS هˆ™هٹ ه…¥ AAAï¼› è‹¥ه®ƒو²،وœ‰ه…¥è¾¹و‌¥è‡ھ BBB هˆ™هٹ ه…¥ BBBï¼› هگ¦هˆ™هٹ ه…¥ SSSï¼› و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)ï¼ˆlogâپ،n\\log nlogn و‌¥è‡ھ setï¼‰ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> #include <set> using namespace std; const int S=200005; int n,m; vector<int> g[S]; set<int> as,bs,st; inline void slove() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) g[i].clear(); as.clear(),bs.clear(),st.clear(); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); g[y].push_back(x); } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { if(g[i].size()==0) as.insert(i); else { bool f=false,f2=false; for(int v:g[i]) f|=bs.count(v),f2|=as.count(v); if(f) st.insert(i); else if(f2) bs.insert(i); else as.insert(i); } } printf("%d\\n",st.size()); for(int u:st) printf("%d ",u); printf("\\n"); } int main() { int T; scanf("%d",&T); while(T-->0) slove(); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"و‍„é€ ","slug":"Kb6MJqy9f","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Kb6MJqy9f/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"ه›¾è®؛","slug":"GE8D1uUdm","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/GE8D1uUdm/"}],"title":"CF1368E Ski Accidents هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/cf1368e-ski-accidents-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"3 min read","time":144000,"words":485,"minutes":3},"date":"2023-08-19 15:31:06","dateFormat":"2023-08-19"},{"abstract":"

وک¯وœ¬هœ؛و¸¸وˆڈçڑ„çژ©ه®¶ï¼Œè€Œ Alice هˆ™وک¯هœ؛و™¯ه¸ƒç½®è€…ï¼ŒAlice هڈ¯ن»¥ç»™و¯ڈن¸ھه®‌ç®±ن¸ٹن¸€ن؛›é”پï¼ˆç¬¬ jjj ç§چé”پéœ€è¦پç¬¬ jjj ç§چé’¥هŒ™و‰“ه¼€ï¼‰ ه¦‚و‍œ Bob iii ن¸ھه®‌ç®±ن¸ٹو”¾ç½®ç¬¬ jjj ç§چé”پçڑ„èٹ±è´¹ن¸؛ ci,jc_{i,j}ci,jâ€‹ï¼Œè¯·ه¸®هٹ© Alice و‰¾هˆ°ن¸€ç§چه¸ƒç½®é”پçڑ„و–¹و،ˆï¼Œن½؟ه¾—èٹ±è´¹وœ€ه°ڈï¼Œن¸” Alice ه°†هڈ–ه¾—èƒœهˆ©م€‚ 10^7n,mâ‰¤6,aiâ€‹,biâ€‹â‰¤4,ci,jâ€‹â‰¤107م€‚ è®¾ç®±ه­گ iii ن¸ٹçڑ„é”پçڑ„é›†هگˆن¸؛ LiL_iLiâ€‹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ LLL éœ€è¦پو»،è¶³ï¼ڑ âˆ€Sâٹ†{1,2,3,â€¦n},âˆ‘uâˆˆSauâ‰¤âˆ‘vâˆˆ(âˆھuâˆˆSLu)bv\\forall S\\subseteq\\{1,2,3,\\dots n\\},\\sum\\limits_{u\\in S} a_u\\le \\sum\\limits_{v\\in (\\cup_{u\\in S}L_u)}b_v âˆ€Sâٹ†{1,2,3,â€¦n},uâˆˆSâˆ‘â€‹auâ€‹â‰¤vâˆˆ(âˆھuâˆˆSâ€‹Luâ€‹)âˆ‘â€‹bvâ€‹ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°è؟™ن¸ھن¸œè¥؟ه¾ˆهƒڈ Hall ه®ڑçگ†ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆè€ƒè™‘ه»؛ç«‹ن¸€ه¼ è؟™و ·çڑ„ن؛Œهˆ†ه›¾ï¼ڑ ه·¦éƒ¨و¯ڈن¸ھç®±ه­گو‹†وˆگ aia_iaiâ€‹ ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼Œه…±وœ‰ âˆ‘i=1nai\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^n a_ii=1âˆ‘nâ€‹aiâ€‹ ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼› هڈ³éƒ¨و¯ڈن¸ھé”پو‹†وˆگ bib_ibiâ€‹ ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼Œه…±وœ‰ âˆ‘i=1mbi\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^m b_ii=1âˆ‘mâ€‹biâ€‹ ن¸ھç‚¹ï¼› è‹¥ iii هڈ·ç®±ه­گوœ‰ jjj هڈ·é”پï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن»ژ iii هڈ·ç®±ه­گو‹†ه‡؛çڑ„و‰€وœ‰ç‚¹ه’Œ jjj هڈ·é”پو‹†ه‡؛çڑ„و‰€وœ‰ç‚¹ن¹‹é—´è؟‍ن¸€و‌،è¾¹ï¼› é—®é¢کç­‰ن»·ن؛ژوœ€ه°ڈهŒ–وœ‰è؟‍è¾¹çڑ„é”پçڑ„ bib_ibiâ€‹ ه’Œï¼Œن½؟ه¾—ن؛Œهˆ†ه›¾ه­کهœ¨ه¤§ه°ڈن¸؛ âˆ‘i=1nai\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^n a_ii=1âˆ‘nâ€‹aiâ€‹ çڑ„هŒ¹é…چم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆç›´وژ¥و‰¾ه¤§ه°ڈن¸؛ âˆ‘i=1nai\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^n a_ii=1âˆ‘nâ€‹aiâ€‹ çڑ„هŒ¹é…چهچ³هڈ¯م€‚è®¾ dpi,stdp_{i,st}dpi,stâ€‹ ن¸؛ه‰چ iii ن¸ھç®±ه­گو‹†ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„ç‚¹éƒ½هŒ¹é…چه®Œن؛†ï¼Œé”پو‹†ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„ç‚¹çڑ„çٹ¶و€پن¸؛ stststï¼ˆن؛”è؟›هˆ¶ï¼Œو¯ڈن¸ھé”پو‹†ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„ç‚¹è؟کوœ‰ه¤ڑه°‘ن¸ھï¼‰و—¶çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈن»£ن»·م€‚é‚£ن¹ˆè½¬ç§»ç›´وژ¥و‍ڑن¸¾ه½“ه‰چç®±ه­گو‹†ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹هŒ¹é…چن؛†ه“ھن¸ھé”پو‹†وˆگçڑ„ç‚¹ï¼Œه¦‚و‍œهŒ¹é…چن؛†è‡³ه°‘ن¸€ن¸ھé”پ jjj و‹†ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„ç‚¹ï¼Œهˆ™éœ€è¦پهٹ ن¸ٹ ci,jc_{i,j}ci,jâ€‹ çڑ„ن»£ن»·م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nm22n)O(nm2^{2n})O(nm22n)ï¼Œè·‘ن¸چو»،و‰€ن»¥èƒ½è؟‡م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> using namespace std; const int S=8,SS=45,BS=20005; int n,m; int a[S],b[S],c[S][S]; int tot[SS],sta[SS][BS][S]; int st[S],pst[S]; int dp[S][BS]; inline int getval() { int val=0; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { val*=5; val+=st[i]; } return val; } inline void getsta(int val) { for(int i=m;i>=1;i--) { st[i]=val%5; val/=5; } } inline void tmin(int &x,int y) { x=min(x,y); } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) scanf("%d",&b[i]); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) scanf("%d",&c[i][j]); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) st[i]=b[i]; int mxval=getval(); for(int i=0;i<=mxval;i++) { getsta(i); int cnt=0; for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) cnt+=st[j]; tot[cnt]++; for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) sta[cnt][tot[cnt]][j]=st[j]; } memset(dp,127,sizeof(dp)); int inf=dp[0][0]; dp[0][mxval]=0; for(int i=0;i<=n-1;i++) { for(int j=0;j<=mxval;j++) { if(dp[i][j]==inf) continue; getsta(j); for(int k=1;k<=m;k++) pst[k]=st[k]; for(int k=1;k<=tot[a[i+1]];k++) { for(int l=1;l<=m;l++) st[l]=pst[l]; bool f=true; int sum=0; for(int l=1;l<=m&&f;l++) { int u=sta[a[i+1]][k][l]; if(u>st[l]) f=false; if(u>0) sum+=c[i+1][l]; st[l]-=u; } if(f) { int idx=getval(); tmin(dp[i+1][idx],dp[i][j]+sum); } } } } int ans=inf; for(int i=0;i<=mxval;i++) tmin(ans,dp[n][i]); printf("%d\\n",ans==inf?-1:ans); return 0; } \n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— a[1,n]a_{[1,n]}a[1,n]â€‹م€‚ è¾“ه‡؛وœ€é•؟çڑ„و»،è¶³ن¸چهگŒçڑ„ن¼—و•°ï¼ˆه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•°وœ€ه¤ڑçڑ„و•°ï¼‰è‡³ه°‘وœ‰ن¸¤ن¸ھçڑ„هŒ؛é—´çڑ„é•؟ه؛¦م€‚ D1ï¼ڑ1â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤minâپ،(100,n)1\\le a_i\\le \\min(100,n)1â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤min(100,n)ï¼› D2ï¼ڑ1â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤n1\\le a_i\\le n1â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤nï¼› çژ°ç‰¹هˆ¤وژ‰و•´ن¸ھه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸چهگŒن¼—و•°ن¸ھو•° >1>1>1 çڑ„وƒ…ه†µم€‚ è®¾ XXX ن¸؛و•´ن¸ھه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„ن¼—و•°ï¼Œوœ‰ن¸ھç»“è®؛ï¼ڑ XXX ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯ç­”و،ˆهŒ؛é—´çڑ„ه…¶ن¸­ن¸€ن¸ھن¼—و•°م€‚ è¯پوکژè€ƒè™‘هڈچè¯پï¼Œè‹¥ XXX ن¸چوک¯ç­”و،ˆهŒ؛é—´çڑ„ن¼—و•°ï¼Œه› ن¸؛ XXX وک¯ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸­وœ€ه¤ڑçڑ„و•°ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸€ه®ڑهڈ¯ن»¥هگ‘ه·¦هگ‘هڈ³و‹“ه±•ç­”و،ˆهŒ؛é—´ن½؟ه¾— XXX وک¯ç­”و،ˆهŒ؛é—´çڑ„ن¼—و•°ï¼Œè؟™و ·ن¸€ه®ڑن¸چهٹ£ه› ن¸؛هژںو‌¥çڑ„ن¼—و•°è؟کوک¯ن¼—و•°م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆ D1 ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥ç›´وژ¥و‍ڑن¸¾ç­”و،ˆهŒ؛é—´çڑ„هڈ¦ن¸€ن¸ھن¼—و•° YYY ç„¶هگژ O(n)O(n)O(n) و‰¾هˆ°وœ€é•؟çڑ„و»،è¶³ XXX ه’Œ YYY ه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•°ç›¸ç­‰çڑ„هŒ؛é—´ï¼Œو€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nV)O(nV)O(nV)م€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژ D2ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ°وک¯é¢œè‰²é¢کï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è€ƒè™‘و ¹هڈ·هˆ†و²»م€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•° >n> \\sqrt n>nâ€‹ çڑ„و•°ï¼Œç›´وژ¥ç”¨ D1 çڑ„هپڑو³•ï¼Œè؟™éƒ¨هˆ†و€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nn)O(n\\sqrt n)O(nnâ€‹)ï¼› ه¯¹ن؛ژه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•° â‰¤n\\le \\sqrt nâ‰¤nâ€‹ çڑ„و•°ï¼Œç›´وژ¥و‍ڑن¸¾ن¼—و•°çڑ„ه‡؛çژ°و¬،و•°ç„¶هگژهڈŒوŒ‡é’ˆو‰¾هˆ°وœ€é•؟çڑ„هگˆو³•هŒ؛é—´ï¼Œè؟™éƒ¨هˆ†و€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nn)O(n\\sqrt n)O(nnâ€‹)ï¼› و€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nn)O(n\\sqrt n)O(nnâ€‹)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; const int S=200005,B=450; int n,a[S]; int cnt[S]; int mnp[S*2],b[S]; int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cnt[a[i]]++; int mx=0,val; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) if(cnt[i]>mx) mx=cnt[i],val=i; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) if(i!=val&&cnt[i]==mx) return printf("%d\\n",n),0; int ans=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { if(i==val) continue; if(cnt[i]>B) { for(int j=0;j<=n+n;j++) mnp[j]=0; int cnt=0; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) { if(a[j]==i) cnt--; if(a[j]==val) cnt++; if(cnt==0||mnp[n+cnt]!=0) ans=max(ans,j-mnp[n+cnt]); else mnp[n+cnt]=j; } } } for(int i=1;i<=B;i++) { for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) b[j]=0; int l=1,cnt=0; for(int r=1;r<=n;r++) { cnt+=++b[a[r]]==i; while(l<=r&&b[a[r]]>i) { cnt-=b[a[l++]]--==i; } if(cnt>=2) ans=max(ans,r-l+1); } } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"}],"title":"CF1446D1&2 Frequency Problem هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/cf1446d1and2-frequency-problem-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"4 min read","time":202000,"words":674,"minutes":4},"date":"2023-08-16 19:50:05","dateFormat":"2023-08-16"},{"abstract":"

âˆ£aâˆ’bâˆ£î€ âˆˆ{x,y}|a-b|\\not\\in\\{x,y\\}âˆ£aâˆ’bâˆ£î€ â€‹âˆˆ{x,y}ï¼› ç»™ه®ڑ n,x,yn,x,yn,x,yï¼Œو±‚وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ âˆ£Sâˆ£|S|âˆ£Sâˆ£م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤1091\\le n\\le 10^91â‰¤nâ‰¤109ï¼Œ1â‰¤x,yâ‰¤221\\le x,y\\le 221â‰¤x,yâ‰¤22م€‚ é—®é¢کç­‰ن»·ن؛ژو‰¾هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—و»،è¶³ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸­ن»»و„ڈن¸¤ن¸ھ 111 çڑ„ن½چç½®ه·®ن¸چن¸؛ xxx وˆ– yyyï¼Œوœ€ه¤§هŒ– 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸­ 111 çڑ„ن¸ھو•°م€‚ ه¼•çگ† 1 ن»»و„ڈé•؟ x+yx+yx+y çڑ„هگˆو³•çڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—و— é™گé‡چه¤چو‍„وˆگçڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—ن»چç„¶هگˆو³•م€‚ è¯پوکژ هڈچè¯پو³•م€‚ è‹¥ه­کهœ¨ن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ x+yx+yx+y çڑ„هگˆو³•çڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ— sss و»،è¶³ه…¶و— é™گé‡چه¤چو‍„وˆگçڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ— aaa ن¸­ï¼ڑ aia_iaiâ€‹ ه’Œ ai+xa_{i+x}ai+xâ€‹ ه‌‡ن¸؛ 111ï¼ڑن¸چه¦¨هپ‡è®¾ iâ‰¤x+y,i+x>x+yi\\le x+y,i+x>x+yiâ‰¤x+y,i+x>x+yï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆو­¤و—¶ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ ai+xâˆ’xâˆ’y=aiâˆ’y=1a_{i+x-x-y}=a_{i-y}=1ai+xâˆ’xâˆ’yâ€‹=aiâˆ’yâ€‹=1ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ° aia_iaiâ€‹ ن¸؛ 111ï¼Œiâˆ’yâ‰¤x+yi-y\\le x+yiâˆ’yâ‰¤x+yï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و­¤و—¶ sss ن¸€ه®ڑن¸چهگˆو³•ï¼› aia_iaiâ€‹ ه’Œ ai+ya_{i+y}ai+yâ€‹ ه‌‡ن¸؛ 111ï¼ڑهگŒçگ†ï¼Œن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ ai=aiâˆ’x=1a_i=a_{i-x}=1aiâ€‹=aiâˆ’xâ€‹=1ï¼› Q.E.D. ه®ڑçگ† 1 وœ€ن¼کè§£ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯وںگن¸ھé•؟ x+yx+yx+y çڑ„هگˆو³• 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—و— é™گé‡چه¤چو‍„وˆگçڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ nnn çڑ„ه‰چç¼€م€‚ è¯پوکژ nâ‰،0(modx+y)n\\equiv 0\\pmod {x+y}nâ‰،0(modx+y) çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹وک¾ç„¶وˆگç«‹م€‚ è®¾ nâ‰،r(modx+y)n\\equiv r\\pmod{x+y}nâ‰،r(modx+y)ï¼ˆrî€ =0r\\not=0rî€ â€‹=0ï¼‰ï¼Œçژ°هœ¨و‌¥è¯پوکژوœ€هگژن¸€ه°ڈو®µé•؟ rrr çڑ„è·ںç‌€ه‰چé‌¢ه¾ھçژ¯وک¯ن¸چهٹ£çڑ„ï¼ڑ هڈچè¯پو³•ï¼Œè®¾وœ€هگژن¸€ه°ڈو®µé•؟ rrr çڑ„ 01 ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸؛ tttï¼Œè®¾ه¾ھçژ¯èٹ‚ï¼ˆé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ x+yx+yx+y çڑ„ن¸چو–­ه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ 01 ن¸²ï¼‰ن¸؛ sssï¼› ttt ن¸چè·ںç‌€ه‰چé‌¢ه¾ھçژ¯و›´ن¼کï¼Œه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ stststï¼ˆو‹¼èµ·و‌¥ï¼‰هگˆو³•ن½†ç”¨ ttt و›؟وچ¢وژ‰ sss çڑ„é•؟ âˆ£tâˆ£|t|âˆ£tâˆ£ çڑ„ه‰چç¼€ن¸چهگˆو³•ï¼Œن¸چه¦¨è®¾ç”¨ ttt و›؟وچ¢وژ‰ sss çڑ„é•؟ âˆ£tâˆ£|t|âˆ£tâˆ£ çڑ„ه‰چç¼€ه¾—هˆ°çڑ„ه­—ç¬¦ن¸²ن¸؛ tsâ€²ts'tsâ€²ï¼› è®¾ tsâ€²ts'tsâ€² ن¸­ن¸چهگˆو³•çڑ„ن¸¤ن¸ھن½چç½®ن¸؛ iii ه’Œ i+xi+xi+xï¼ˆi+yi+yi+y هگŒçگ†ï¼‰ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ iâ‰¤âˆ£tâˆ£,i+x>âˆ£tâˆ£i\\le |t|,i+x>|t|iâ‰¤âˆ£tâˆ£,i+x>âˆ£tâˆ£ï¼› è€ƒه¯ںç­”و،ˆçڑ„هگژç¼€ tsâ€²tts'ttsâ€²tï¼Œç”±ن؛ژن½چç½® iii ه’Œ i+xi+xi+x éƒ½وک¯ 111ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن½چç½® i+xi+xi+x ه’Œ i+x+yi+x+yi+x+y ن¸€ه®ڑن¹ںéƒ½وک¯ 111ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ sâ€²ts'tsâ€²t ن¸چهگˆو³•ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ ststst ن¸چهگˆو³•ï¼Œçں›ç›¾ï¼› Q.E.D. é‚£ن¹ˆ O((x+y)2maxâپ،(x,y))O((x+y)2^{\\max(x,y)})O((x+y)2max(x,y)) çٹ¶هژ‹ dp هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> using namespace std; const int BS=1<<22; int n,x,y; int f[2][BS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&x,&y); if(x<y) swap(x,y); memset(f,128,sizeof(f)); int p=0; f[p][0]=0; for(int i=0;i<=x+y-1&&i<=n-1;i++) { p^=1; memset(f[p],128,sizeof(f[p])); for(int j=0;j<(1<<x);j++) { int s0=(j<<1)&((1<<x)-1),s1=s0|1; if((s0&(j>>x-1))==0&&(s0&(j>>y-1))==0) f[p][s0]=max(f[p][s0],f[p^1][j]); if((s1&(j>>x-1))==0&&(s1&(j>>y-1))==0) f[p][s1]=max(f[p][s1],f[p^1][j]+n/(x+y)+(i+1<=n%(x+y))); } } int ans=0; for(int i=0;i<(1<<x);i++) ans=max(ans,f[p][i]); printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } و ‡è®°ن¸؛ idididï¼› ه†چéپچهژ†ن¸€و¬،و‰€وœ‰é“¾ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈو‌،é“¾ï¼ڑ و‰¾هˆ°é“¾ن»£è،¨çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹ AAAï¼› éپچهژ†é“¾ه°¾èٹ‚ç‚¹ TTT çڑ„و‰€وœ‰ه‡؛è¾¹ uuuï¼ڑ و‰¾هˆ° uuu è؟‍هگ‘çڑ„ç‚¹çڑ„ endpos\\text{endpos}endpos S[l,r]S_{[l,r]}S[l,r]â€‹ï¼Œو‰¾هˆ°ه“ˆه¸Œè،¨ن¸­ (l,r)(l,r)(l,r) çڑ„و ‡è®° idididï¼ˆè؟™و‌،é“¾ن»£è،¨çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼‰ï¼› وٹٹé“¾ن¸ٹèٹ‚ç‚¹éƒ½و ‡è®°ن¸ٹ idididï¼› ه†چéپچهژ†ن¸€و¬،و‰€وœ‰é“¾ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈو‌،é“¾ï¼ڑ و‰¾هˆ°é“¾ن»£è،¨çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹ AAAï¼› éپچهژ†é“¾ه°¾èٹ‚ç‚¹ TTT çڑ„و‰€وœ‰ه‡؛è¾¹ uuuï¼ڑ و‰¾هˆ° uuu è؟‍هگ‘çڑ„ç‚¹çڑ„ endpos\\text{endpos}endpos é›†هگˆن¸­çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ xxxï¼› و‰¾هˆ° uuu è؟‍هگ‘çڑ„ç‚¹çڑ„و ‡è®° BBBï¼› ن»ژ AAA هگ‘ BBB è؟‍ن¸€و‌،و‌ƒه€¼ن¸؛ xxx çڑ„ç؛µهگ‘è¾¹ï¼› و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n)O(n)O(n)ï¼Œه“ˆه¸Œè،¨ن½؟ç”¨ map ه®‍çژ°هˆ™ن¸؛ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)م€‚ çœ‹èµ·و‌¥ه¾ˆه¤چو‌‚ï¼Œن½†وک¯çœ‹ن»£ç په؛”è¯¥ه¾ˆه¥½و‡‚م€‚ ه±•ه¼€ن»£ç پ struct SBOOK { int n; char str[S]; int tot; struct node { int l,r; // ن»£è،¨ه…ƒن½چç½® vector<int> len; // و¯ڈن¸€هˆ—çڑ„é•؟ه؛¦ vector<pair<int,int>> tor,tol; // و¨ھهگ‘è¾¹ï¼Œç؛µهگ‘è¾¹ }a[S*2]; int nxt[S*2],til[S*2],idx[S*2]; bool vis[S*2]; struct SAM { int lst; int cnt,len[S*2],to[S*2][V],link[S*2]; vector<int> son[S*2]; int siz[S*2],mnr[S*2]; inline void init() { for(int i=0;i<=cnt;i++) { len[i]=link[i]=siz[i]=0; mnr[i]=1e8; memset(to[i],0,sizeof(to[i])); son[i].clear(); } cnt=lst=0; link[0]=-1; } inline void ins(int r,int x) { int pre=++cnt; len[pre]=len[lst]+1; int p=lst; while(p!=-1&&to[p][x]==0) to[p][x]=pre,p=link[p]; if(p==-1) link[pre]=0; else { int q=to[p][x]; if(len[q]==len[p]+1) link[pre]=q; else { int cpy=++cnt; len[cpy]=len[p]+1; siz[cpy]=0,mnr[cpy]=1e8; memcpy(to[cpy],to[q],sizeof(to[q])); link[cpy]=link[q]; link[pre]=cpy; while(p!=-1&&to[p][x]==q) to[p][x]=cpy,p=link[p]; link[q]=cpy; } } lst=pre; siz[pre]=1; mnr[pre]=r; } inline void build(){for(int i=1;i<=cnt;i++) son[link[i]].push_back(i);} void dfs(int u=0) { for(int v:son[u]) { dfs(v); siz[u]+=siz[v]; mnr[u]=min(mnr[u],mnr[v]); } } }sam[2]; struct HASH { int n; static const int mod=114547; vector<pair<pair<int,int>,int>> vec[mod]; inline void init(int x) { n=x; for(int i=0;i<mod;i++) vec[i].clear(); } inline void ins(pair<int,int> u,int val) { int idx=(1ll*u.first*n%mod+u.second)%mod; for(auto &v:vec[idx]) if(v.first==u) return v.second=val,void(); vec[idx].push_back(make_pair(u,val)); } inline int que(pair<int,int> u) { int idx=(1ll*u.first*n%mod+u.second)%mod; for(auto &v:vec[idx]) if(v.first==u) return v.second; return -1; } }mp; inline void build() { // و¸…ç©؛ for(int i=1;i<=tot;i++) a[i].l=a[i].r=0,a[i].len.clear(),a[i].tor.clear(),a[i].tol.clear(); tot=0; mp.init(n); // ه»؛و­£هڈچ SAM & é¢„ه¤„çگ†èٹ‚ç‚¹ endpos é›†هگˆن¸­وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ sam[0].init(),sam[1].init(); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) sam[0].ins(i,str[i]-'a'); for(int i=n;i>=1;i--) sam[1].ins(i,str[i]-'a'); sam[0].build(),sam[1].build(); sam[0].dfs(),sam[1].dfs(); // و­£ SAM و‰¾é“¾ for(int i=1;i<=sam[0].cnt;i++) nxt[i]=vis[i]=til[i]=0; for(int u=1;u<=sam[0].cnt;u++) { for(int i=0;i<V;i++) { int v=sam[0].to[u][i]; if(v!=0&&sam[0].siz[u]==sam[0].siz[v]) { nxt[u]=v; vis[v]=true; } } } // و­£ SAM ç¬¬ن¸€و¬،éپچهژ†é“¾ for(int u=1;u<=sam[0].cnt;u++) { if(!vis[u]) { tot++; int x=u; while(1) { idx[x]=tot; a[tot].len.push_back(sam[0].len[x]-sam[0].len[sam[0].link[x]]); if(nxt[x]==0) break; x=nxt[x]; } til[u]=x; a[tot].r=sam[0].mnr[x],a[tot].l=a[tot].r-sam[0].len[x]+1; mp.ins(make_pair(a[tot].l,a[tot].r),tot); } } // و­£ SAM ç¬¬ن؛Œو¬،éپچهژ†é“¾ for(int u=1;u<=sam[0].cnt;u++) { if(!vis[u]) { int x=til[u]; for(int j=0;j<V;j++) { int y=sam[0].to[x][j]; if(y==0) continue; int B=idx[y],val=sam[0].mnr[y]; a[idx[x]].tor.push_back(make_pair(B,val)); } } } // هڈچ SAM و‰¾é“¾ for(int i=1;i<=sam[1].cnt;i++) nxt[i]=vis[i]=til[i]=0; for(int u=1;u<=sam[1].cnt;u++) { for(int i=0;i<V;i++) { int v=sam[1].to[u][i]; if(v!=0&&sam[1].siz[u]==sam[1].siz[v]) { nxt[u]=v; vis[v]=true; } } } // هڈچ SAM ç¬¬ن¸€و¬،éپچهژ†é“¾ for(int u=1;u<=sam[1].cnt;u++) { if(!vis[u]) { int x=u; while(1) { if(nxt[x]==0) break; x=nxt[x]; } til[u]=x; int l=sam[1].mnr[x],r=l+sam[1].len[x]-1; int id=mp.que(make_pair(l,r)); x=u; while(x!=0) { idx[x]=id; x=nxt[x]; } } } // هڈچ SAM ç¬¬ن؛Œو¬،éپچهژ†é“¾ for(int u=1;u<=sam[1].cnt;u++) { if(!vis[u]) { int x=til[u]; for(int j=0;j<V;j++) { int y=sam[1].to[x][j]; if(y==0) continue; int B=idx[y],val=sam[1].mnr[y]; a[idx[x]].tol.push_back(make_pair(B,val)); } } } } }; 4.2 ن¾‹é¢ک CF1817F Entangled Substrings é¢کè§£ ه»؛ه‡؛هں؛وœ¬ه­گن¸²ç»“و‍„هگژï¼Œهگˆو³•çڑ„ aaa ه’Œ bbb ن¸€ه®ڑهœ¨هگŒن¸€ن¸ھç­‰ن»·ç±»ن¸­ن¸”و»،è¶³ه®ƒن»¬هœ¨ SSS ن¸­ç¬¬ن¸€و¬،ه‡؛çژ°ن½چç½®ن¸چن؛¤م€‚ ç”±ن؛ژه·²çں¥ن»£è،¨ه…ƒç¬¬ن¸€و¬،ه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ن½چç½®ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ç­‰ن»·ç±»ن¸­و¯ڈن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ن¸²çڑ„ç¬¬ن¸€و¬،ه‡؛çژ°çڑ„ن½چç½®éƒ½وک¯هڈ¯ن»¥و±‚ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„ï¼Œç”±ن؛ژéک¶و¢¯ه‍‹وœ¬è؛«ه…·وœ‰هچ•è°ƒو€§ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈن¸ھéک¶و¢¯ه‍‹هپڑن¸€éپچهڈŒوŒ‡é’ˆهچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n)O(n)O(n)م€‚ و ¸ه؟ƒن»£ç پï¼ڑ __int128 ans=0; for(int i=1;i<=bok.tot;i++) { SBOOK::node &pre=bok.a[i]; int m=pre.len.size(); int lb=pre.l,rb=pre.r-m+1; __int128 sm=0; for(int j=m-1,k=m;j>=0;j--) { int pr=rb+j; while(k>=1&&lb+pre.len[k-1]-1>=pr) sm+=pre.len[--k]; ans+=pre.len[j]*(sm-1ll*(pr-lb+1)*(m-k)); } } م€گ2023NOIو¨،و‹ںèµ›35م€‘ه­—ç¬¦ن¸² [p,2n+1âˆ’p][p,2n+1-p][p,2n+1âˆ’p] ن¸€ه®ڑéƒ½هœ¨ç¬¬ن؛Œن¸ھè؟‍ç»­و®µن¸­م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ن¸ٹè؟°هٹ ç²—و‌،ن»¶çڑ„è؟‍ç»­و®µé›†هگˆ SSSï¼Œن¸€ه®ڑèƒ½و‍„é€ ه‡؛هگˆو³•çڑ„و“چن½œه؛ڈهˆ—ï¼ڑه¯¹ن؛ژ SSS ن¸­çڑ„و¯ڈن¸ھè؟‍ç»­و®µçڑ„هڈ³هچٹéƒ¨هˆ†ï¼Œè‹¥ن¸­ن½چو•°ن¸­è¾ƒه¤§çڑ„ن¸€ن¸ھهœ¨ه…¶ن¸­هˆ™و‰§è،Œو“چن½œن؛Œï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™و‰§è،Œو“چن½œن¸€م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆهڈھè¦پو•°è؟™و ·çڑ„ SSS هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن¸؛ن؛†è®،و•°و–¹ن¾؟ï¼Œè®¾ f(n,m)f(n,m)f(n,m) è،¨ç¤؛ن»ژ nnn ن¸ھو•°ن¸­é€‰ه‡؛ 2m2m2m ن¸ھو•°ن¸”è؟™ن؛›و•°و‍„وˆگçڑ„و‰€وœ‰è؟‍ç»­و®µé•؟ه؛¦ه‌‡ن¸؛هپ¶و•°çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°م€‚è؟™ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژن»ژ nâˆ’mn-mnâˆ’m ن¸ھو•°ن¸­é€‰ه‡؛ mmm ن¸ھï¼Œو¯ڈو•°ه†چو‰©ه……وˆگن¸¤ن¸ھï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ f(n,m)=(nâˆ’mm)f(n,m)=\\binom{n-m}{m}f(n,m)=(mnâˆ’mâ€‹)م€‚ و‍ڑن¸¾ç¬¬ن¸€و®µçڑ„é•؟ه؛¦ 2i2i2iï¼ڑ é¦–ه…ˆوœ‰هڈ¯èƒ½ه‰©ن¸‹çڑ„و‰€وœ‰è؟‍ç»­و®µéƒ½وک¯ن¸€ن؛Œن؛¤و›؟هœ°هˆ é™¤çڑ„ï¼Œهچ³ç¬¬ن؛Œو®µçڑ„ç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھو•° >n>n>nï¼Œè؟™éƒ¨هˆ†çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°وک¯ f(minâپ،(k,kâˆ’2i+nâˆ’1),kâˆ’i)f(\\min(k,k-2i+n-1),k-i)f(min(k,kâˆ’2i+nâˆ’1),kâˆ’i)ï¼› è‹¥ 2i<n2i<n2i<n هˆ™ç¬¬ن؛Œو®µçڑ„ç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھو•°وœ‰هڈ¯èƒ½ â‰¤n\\le nâ‰¤nï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆéœ€è¦پو‍ڑن¸¾ ppp هچ³ç¬¬ن؛Œو®µçڑ„ç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھو•°ï¼Œو–¹و،ˆو•°وک¯ï¼ڑ âˆ‘p=2i+2nf(kâˆ’n+pâˆ’1,kâˆ’iâˆ’nâˆ’1+p)=âˆ‘p=2i+2nf(kâˆ’n+pâˆ’1,kâˆ’iâˆ’n+pâˆ’1)=âˆ‘p=2i+2n(ikâˆ’iâˆ’n+pâˆ’1)\\begin{aligned} \\sum\\limits_{p=2i+2}^nf(k-n+p-1,k-i-n-1+p)&=\\sum\\limits_{p=2i+2}^nf(k-n+p-1,k-i-n+p-1)\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{p=2i+2}^n\\binom{i}{k-i-n+p-1}\\\\ \\end{aligned} p=2i+2âˆ‘nâ€‹f(kâˆ’n+pâˆ’1,kâˆ’iâˆ’nâˆ’1+p)â€‹=p=2i+2âˆ‘nâ€‹f(kâˆ’n+pâˆ’1,kâˆ’iâˆ’n+pâˆ’1)=p=2i+2âˆ‘nâ€‹(kâˆ’iâˆ’n+pâˆ’1iâ€‹)â€‹ هڈ‘çژ°ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژوک¯و±‚ âˆ‘j=LiRi(ij)\\sum\\limits_{j=L_i}^{R_i} \\binom{i}{j}j=Liâ€‹âˆ‘Riâ€‹â€‹(jiâ€‹)ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ° [Li,Ri][L_i,R_i][Liâ€‹,Riâ€‹] هˆ° [Li+1,Ri+1][L_{i+1},R_{i+1}][Li+1â€‹,Ri+1â€‹] ن¸¤ç«¯وŒ‡é’ˆçڑ„ç§»هٹ¨وک¯ O(1)O(1)O(1) çڑ„ï¼Œه¹¶ن¸”è‹¥ه·²çں¥ sml=âˆ‘j=LiRi(iâˆ’1j)sml=\\sum\\limits_{j=L_i}^{R_i} \\binom{i-1}{j}sml=j=Liâ€‹âˆ‘Riâ€‹â€‹(jiâˆ’1â€‹) ن¹ںهڈ¯ن»¥ه؟«é€ںو±‚ه‡؛ smp=âˆ‘j=LiRi(ij)smp=\\sum\\limits_{j=L_i}^{R_i} \\binom{i}{j}smp=j=Liâ€‹âˆ‘Riâ€‹â€‹(jiâ€‹) ه› ن¸؛ smp=2sml+(iâˆ’1Liâˆ’1)âˆ’(iâˆ’1Ri)smp=2sml+\\binom{i-1}{L_i-1}-\\binom{i-1}{R_i}smp=2sml+(Liâ€‹âˆ’1iâˆ’1â€‹)âˆ’(Riâ€‹iâˆ’1â€‹)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈŒوŒ‡é’ˆç»´وٹ¤هچ³هڈ¯ï¼› و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n)O(n)O(n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ // Problem: Minimums or Medians // Contest: Luogu // URL: https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/CF1784F // Memory Limit: 500 MB // Time Limit: 4000 ms // // Powered by CP Editor (https://cpeditor.org) #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> int mod; // fastmod struct mint { int val; inline mint(){val=0;} operator int(){return val;} template<typename T>inline mint(T x){val=(x%mod+mod)%mod;} inline mint operator-(){return mod-val;} template<typename T>inline mint operator^(T b) { mint tmp=*this,res=1; for(;b>0;b>>=1,tmp*=tmp) res=b&1?res*tmp:res; return res; } template<typename T>inline mint operator^=(T b){return *this=*this^b;} inline mint inv(){return this->operator^(mod-2);} inline mint operator+(mint b){return val+b.val-(val+b.val>=mod?mod:0);} inline mint operator-(mint b){return val-b.val+(val-b.val<0?mod:0);} inline mint operator*(mint b){return 1ll*val*b.val%mod;} inline mint operator/(mint b){return 1ll*val*b.inv().val%mod;} inline mint operator+=(mint b){return val=val+b.val-(val+b.val>=mod?mod:0);} inline mint operator-=(mint b){return val=val-b.val+(val-b.val<0?mod:0);} inline mint operator*=(mint b){return val=1ll*val*b.val%mod;} inline mint operator/=(mint b){return val=1ll*val*b.inv().val%mod;} template<typename T>inline mint operator+(T b){return this->operator+(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator-(T b){return this->operator-(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator*(T b){return this->operator*(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator/(T b){return this->operator/(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator+=(T b){return this->operator+=(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator-=(T b){return this->operator-=(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator*=(T b){return this->operator*=(mint(b));}; template<typename T>inline mint operator/=(T b){return this->operator/=(mint(b));}; }; using namespace std; const int S=10000005; mint fra[S],inv[S]; int n,k; inline mint C(int n,int m) { if(n<0||m<0||n<m) return 0; return fra[n]*inv[n-m]*inv[m]; } inline mint f(int n,int m) { return C(n-m,m); } int main() { mod=998244353; fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=S-3;i++) fra[i]=fra[i-1]*i; inv[S-3]=fra[S-3].inv(); for(int i=S-3;i>=1;i--) inv[i-1]=inv[i]*i; scanf("%d%d",&n,&k); mint ans=0; int lb=1,rb=0,pr=-1; mint sum=0; for(int i=0;i<=k;i++) { ans+=i==n?(mint)1:f(min(k,k-i*2+n-1),k-i); if(i*2<n) { int L=k-n+i+1,R=k-i-1; if(pr>=0) sum=sum*2+C(pr,lb-1)-C(pr,rb); pr++; while(lb>L) sum+=C(pr,--lb); while(rb<R) sum+=C(pr,++rb); while(lb<L) sum-=C(pr,lb++); while(rb>R) sum-=C(pr,rb--); ans+=sum; } } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } è€ƒè™‘è؟™ه¼ ه›¾çڑ„è،¥ه›¾ï¼Œè،¥ه›¾ن¸­ن¸€و‌،è¾¹çڑ„و‌ƒه€¼ن¸؛هژںه›¾ن¸­è¯¥è¾¹ن¸¤ç«¯ç‚¹é—´çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯ï¼ˆè·¯ه¾„é•؟ه؛¦çڑ„ه®ڑن¹‰هگŒن¸ٹï¼‰م€‚ن؟‌è¯پè،¥ه›¾ن؛¦وک¯è؟‍é€ڑه›¾م€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژهژںه›¾ن¸­و¯ڈو‌،è¾¹ï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ه…¶ن¸¤ç«¯ç‚¹هœ¨è،¥ه›¾ن¸­çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯ï¼ˆه®ڑن¹‰ن»چهگŒن¸ٹï¼‰م€‚ 1â‰¤n,mâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n,m\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤n,mâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œè¾¹و‌ƒèŒƒه›´ [0,109][0,10^9][0,109]م€‚ ن¸‹و–‡و‰€وœ‰وœ€çں­è·¯çڑ„ه®ڑن¹‰éƒ½ن¸ژé¢کç›®ن¸­ن¸€è‡´م€‚ ه»؛ه‡؛ kruskal é‡چو‍„و ‘ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن¸¤ç‚¹é—´çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯ه°±وک¯ه®ƒن»¬ lca çڑ„و‌ƒه€¼ï¼Œè€Œ lca è¶ٹو·±و‌ƒه€¼è¶ٹه°ڈï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هœ¨é‡چو‍„و ‘çڑ„ dfn ه؛ڈن¸­هˆ° uuu çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯وœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ç‚¹ن¸€ه®ڑوک¯ uuu ه·¦è¾¹ç¦»ه®ƒوœ€è؟‘çڑ„ç‚¹وˆ– uuu هڈ³è¾¹ç¦»ه®ƒوœ€è؟‘çڑ„ç‚¹م€‚ è€ƒè™‘و‰¾ه‡؛è،¥ه›¾çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈç”ںوˆگو ‘ï¼Œوک“è¯پوکژن¸¤ç‚¹هœ¨è،¥ه›¾ن¸­çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯ç­‰ن¸ژه®ƒن»¬هœ¨è،¥ه›¾çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈç”ںوˆگو ‘ن¸­çڑ„وœ€çں­è·¯م€‚ هڈ‘çژ°è،¥ه›¾وک¯ن¸ھç¨ ه¯†ه›¾ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è€ƒè™‘ Boruvka ç®—و³•م€‚ è€ƒè™‘و€ژن¹ˆو‰¾هˆ°è،¥ه›¾ن¸­è·‌ç¦»وںگن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—وœ€è؟‘çڑ„ç‚¹ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥è½¬هŒ–ن¸؛و±‚ه‡؛è،¥ه›¾ن¸­هˆ°و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹وœ€è؟‘çڑ„ç‚¹م€‚è€ƒè™‘ç»™ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹وŒ‰ç…§ dfs ه؛ڈوژ’ه؛ڈï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆç›¸ه½“ن؛ژو‰¾هˆ° uuu ه·¦è¾¹ه’Œهڈ³è¾¹وœ€è؟‘çڑ„ن¸چهœ¨ uuu çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ن¸”هœ¨هژںه›¾ن¸­ن¸ژ uuu و²،وœ‰ç›´وژ¥è؟‍è¾¹çڑ„ç‚¹م€‚è؟™ن¸ھهڈ¯ن»¥è€ƒè™‘é¢„ه¤„çگ†هگŒن¸€ن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—çڑ„è؟‍ç»­و®µï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژç‚¹ uuuï¼Œç›´وژ¥وڑ´هٹ›ه¾€ه·¦ه¾€هڈ³ن¾‌و¬،و‰¾ï¼Œéپ‡هˆ°è؟‍ç»­çڑ„ن¸ژ uuu هœ¨هگŒن¸€ن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—çڑ„ç‚¹ه°±ç›´وژ¥ه؟«é€ںè·³ï¼Œéپ‡هˆ°ه’Œ uuu وœ‰ç›´وژ¥è؟‍è¾¹çڑ„ç‚¹ه°±è·³è؟‡م€‚ è؟™و ·هپڑçڑ„è¯‌ Boruvka ن¸€è½®و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(m)O(m)O(m)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆو€»و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ O(mlogâپ،n)O(m\\log n)O(mlogn)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; // fastI template<typename T> inline void read(T &x) { x=0; bool fl=false; char c=getchar(); while(c<'0'||c>'9') fl^=c=='-',c=getchar(); while(c>='0'&&c<='9') x=x*10+(c^48),c=getchar(); x=fl?-x:x; } template<>inline void read<char>(char &x) { x=getchar(); while(x==' '||x=='\\r'||x=='\\n') x=getchar(); } inline void read(){return;}; template<typename T,typename ...Args> inline void read(T &x,Args&...args){read(x),read(args...);} // fastO template<typename T> void write(T x){x>9?write(x/10),putchar(x%10|48):putchar(x%10|48);} template<>inline void write<char>(char x){putchar(x);} template<typename T,typename ...Args> inline void write(T x,Args...args){write(x),write(args...);} const int S=200005,TS=400005,BS=25; struct node { int x,y,w,id; }ed[S],ed2[S]; int n,m; int fa[TS]; int cnt,b[TS]; vector<int> son[TS]; int fat[TS],dep[TS],tot,dfn[TS],a[TS],mlog[TS],mn[TS][BS]; vector<int> vc[S]; int pp[S]; int lb[S],rb[S],el[S],er[S],nxt[S],lst[S]; int mnl[S],mnr[S],mnlu[S],mnru[S],mnlv[S],mnrv[S]; int m2; int fnd(int x) { return fa[x]==x?x:fa[x]=fnd(fa[x]); } void dfs(int u,int fa) { fat[u]=fa; dep[u]=dep[fa]+1; a[dfn[u]=++tot]=u; for(int v:son[u]) dfs(v,u); } inline void initlca() { mlog[0]=-1; for(int i=1;i<=tot;i++) mlog[i]=mlog[i>>1]+1,mn[i][0]=i; for(int j=1;j<=mlog[tot];j++) { for(int i=1;i<=tot-(1<<j)+1;i++) { int x=mn[i][j-1],y=mn[i+(1<<j-1)][j-1]; mn[i][j]=dep[a[x]]<dep[a[y]]?x:y; } } } inline int quelca(int x,int y) { if(x==y) return x; x=dfn[x],y=dfn[y]; if(x>y) swap(x,y); x++; int k=mlog[y-x+1]; int aa=mn[x][k],bb=mn[y-(1<<k)+1][k]; if(dep[a[aa]]<dep[a[bb]]) return fat[a[aa]]; else return fat[a[bb]]; } inline void kruskal(node *ed,int m) { for(int i=1;i<=n*2;i++) son[i].clear(); sort(ed+1,ed+m+1,[&](node x,node y){return x.w<y.w;}); for(int i=1;i<=n*2;i++) fa[i]=i; cnt=n; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) b[i]=0; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int x=ed[i].x,y=ed[i].y; int rx=fnd(x),ry=fnd(y); if(rx==ry) continue; fa[rx]=fa[ry]=++cnt; son[cnt].push_back(rx),son[cnt].push_back(ry); b[cnt]=ed[i].w; } tot=0; dfs(cnt,0); initlca(); } inline void boruvka() { for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) vc[i].clear(); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) pp[i]=i; sort(pp+1,pp+n+1,[&](int x,int y){return dfn[x]<dfn[y];}); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) vc[ed[i].x].push_back(ed[i].y),vc[ed[i].y].push_back(ed[i].x); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) sort(vc[i].begin(),vc[i].end(),[&](int x,int y){return dfn[x]<dfn[y];}); m2=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) fa[i]=i; while(1) { for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int j=i; while(j<n&&fnd(pp[j+1])==fnd(pp[i])) j++; for(int k=i;k<=j;k++) lb[pp[k]]=i-1,rb[pp[k]]=j+1; nxt[i]=j,lst[j]=i; i=j; } if(nxt[1]==n) break; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { el[i]=vc[i].size()-1; for(int j=0;j<vc[i].size();j++) { if(dfn[vc[i][j]]>dfn[pp[lb[i]]]) { el[i]=j-1; break; } } er[i]=0; for(int j=vc[i].size()-1;j>=0;j--) { if(dfn[vc[i][j]]<dfn[pp[rb[i]]]) { er[i]=j+1; break; } } } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) mnlv[i]=mnrv[i]=2e9; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int x=pp[i]; while(lb[x]>=1&&(el[x]>=0&&vc[x][el[x]]==pp[lb[x]])) { lb[x]--,el[x]--; if(lb[x]>=1&&fnd(pp[lb[x]])==fnd(x)) lb[x]=lst[lb[x]]-1; while(el[x]>0&&dfn[vc[x][el[x]-1]]>=dfn[pp[lb[x]]]) el[x]--; } if(lb[x]>=1&&b[quelca(pp[lb[x]],x)]<mnlv[fnd(x)]) { mnl[fnd(x)]=pp[lb[x]]; mnlu[fnd(x)]=x; mnlv[fnd(x)]=b[quelca(pp[lb[x]],x)]; } while(rb[x]<=n&&(er[x]<=vc[x].size()-1&&vc[x][er[x]]==pp[rb[x]])) { rb[x]++,er[x]++; if(rb[x]<=n&&fnd(pp[rb[x]])==fnd(x)) rb[x]=nxt[rb[x]]+1; while(er[x]<vc[x].size()-1&&dfn[vc[x][er[x]+1]]<=dfn[pp[rb[x]]]) er[x]++; } if(rb[x]<=n&&b[quelca(pp[rb[x]],x)]<mnrv[fnd(x)]) { mnr[fnd(x)]=pp[rb[x]]; mnru[fnd(x)]=x; mnrv[fnd(x)]=b[quelca(pp[rb[x]],x)]; } } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { if(fa[i]==i) { if(mnlv[i]<mnrv[i]) { int p=mnl[i]; if(fnd(p)!=i) { ed2[++m2]={p,mnlu[i],mnlv[i],0}; fa[fnd(p)]=i; } } else { int p=mnr[i]; if(fnd(p)!=i) { ed2[++m2]={p,mnru[i],mnrv[i],0}; fa[fnd(p)]=i; } } } } } } inline void slove() { read(n,m); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) read(ed[i].x,ed[i].y,ed[i].w),ed[i].id=i; kruskal(ed,m); boruvka(); kruskal(ed2,m2); sort(ed+1,ed+m+1,[&](node x,node y){return x.id<y.id;}); for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) write(b[quelca(ed[i].x,ed[i].y)],' '); write('\\n'); } int main() { int T; read(T); while(T-->0) slove(); return 0; } 09:43:51","dateFormat":"2023-08-12"},{"abstract":"","content":"و•°ه­¦وœںوœ›ه’Œç»„هگˆè®،و•°وœ‰è®¸ه¤ڑه…±é€ڑن¹‹ه¤„ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥çœ‹ن½œوک¯ه¸¦ç³»و•°çڑ„è®،و•°م€‚ Part 1 è®°هڈ·ه’Œه®ڑن¹‰ هœ¨وœ¬و–‡ن¸­ï¼ڑ ن»…è®¨è®؛هœ¨ه€¼هںںن¸­ه‌‡هŒ€éڑڈوœ؛çڑ„éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈï¼› è®¾ xxx ن¸؛وںگéڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈï¼Œهچ³هڈ–ه€¼هœ¨ه€¼هںںن¸­éڑڈوœ؛çڑ„هڈکé‡ڈï¼Œهˆ™ Px(i)P_x(i)Pxâ€‹(i) ن¸؛ xxx هڈ–هˆ° iii çڑ„و¦‚çژ‡ï¼› è®¾ xxx ن¸؛وںگéڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈï¼Œهˆ™ E(x)\\mathbb E(x)E(x) è،¨ç¤؛ xxx çڑ„وœںوœ›ه€¼ï¼Œهچ³ âˆ‘iiâ‹…Px(i)\\sum\\limits_{i} i\\cdot P_x(i)iâˆ‘â€‹iâ‹…Pxâ€‹(i) وˆ– âˆ«iâ‹…Px(i) di\\int i\\cdot P_x(i)\\,diâˆ«iâ‹…Pxâ€‹(i)diï¼› Part 2 و€§è´¨ه’Œوٹ€ه·§ وٹٹوœںوœ›çœ‹ن½œه¸¦ç³»و•°è®،و•° ن¸ژ è€ƒè™‘ç»„هگˆو„ڈن¹‰ éƒ½وک¯ه¸¸ç”¨çڑ„وژ¨ه¯¼و–¹و³•م€‚ 2.0 ç؛¦ه®ڑ è¯پوکژن¸­هڈھç”¨هˆ°ن؛† âˆ‘\\sumâˆ‘ ن¸”و²،وœ‰ç‰¹و®ٹè¯´وکژï¼ڑè؟™é‡Œهڈھè¯پوکژه€¼هںںç¦»و•£ï¼ˆéڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈهڈھèƒ½هڈ–و•´و•°ï¼‰çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹çڑ„و€§è´¨ï¼Œه€¼هںںè؟‍ç»­ï¼ˆéڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈهڈ¯ن»¥هڈ–ه®‍و•°ï¼‰çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹ن¹ںوœ‰è؟™ن؛›و€§è´¨ï¼Œه°†è؟™ن؛›è¯پوکژن¸­çڑ„ âˆ‘i\\sum\\limits_{i}iâˆ‘â€‹ وچ¢وˆگ âˆ« di\\int\\,diâˆ«di هچ³هڈ¯è¯پوکژï¼› è¯پوکژن¸­ç”¨هˆ°ن؛† âˆ«\\intâˆ« ن¸”و²،وœ‰ç‰¹و®ٹè¯´وکژï¼ڑè؟™ن؛›و€§è´¨هڈھوœ‰هœ¨ه€¼هںںè؟‍ç»­çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹و‰چèƒ½ه­کهœ¨ï¼› 2.1 هں؛ç،€و€§è´¨ è®¾ xxx ه’Œ yyy ن¸؛وںگن¸¤éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈï¼ˆن¸چن¸€ه®ڑو— ه…³ï¼Œهچ³ه®ƒن»¬هڈ¯èƒ½ن¼ڑن؛’ç›¸ه½±ه“چï¼‰م€‚ هڈ¯هٹ و€§ï¼ڑ E(x+y)=E(x)+E(y)\\mathbb E(x+y)=\\mathbb E(x)+\\mathbb E(y) E(x+y)=E(x)+E(y) è¯پوکژ E(x+y)=âˆ‘iiâ‹…âˆ‘jPx(j)Py(iâˆ’j)=âˆ‘jPx(j)âˆ‘kPy(k)â‹…(j+k)=âˆ‘jjâ‹…Px(j)+âˆ‘kkâ‹…Py(k)\\begin{aligned} \\mathbb E(x+y)&=\\sum\\limits_{i} i\\cdot \\sum \\limits_{j}P_x(j)P_y(i-j)\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j}P_x(j)\\sum\\limits_{k}P_y(k)\\cdot(j+k)\\\\ &=\\sum\\limits_{j}j\\cdot P_x(j)+\\sum\\limits_{k}k\\cdot P_y(k) \\end{aligned} E(x+y)â€‹=iâˆ‘â€‹iâ‹…jâˆ‘â€‹Pxâ€‹(j)Pyâ€‹(iâˆ’j)=jâˆ‘â€‹Pxâ€‹(j)kâˆ‘â€‹Pyâ€‹(k)â‹…(j+k)=jâˆ‘â€‹jâ‹…Pxâ€‹(j)+kâˆ‘â€‹kâ‹…Pyâ€‹(k)â€‹ Q.E.D. ç؛؟و€§و€§ï¼ڑ ه¯¹ن؛ژوںگه¸¸و•° خ±\\alphaخ±ï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ E(خ±x)=خ±E(x)\\mathbb E(\\alpha x)=\\alpha \\mathbb E(x) E(خ±x)=خ±E(x) è¯پوکژ E(خ±x)=âˆ‘iخ±â‹…Px(i)=خ±âˆ‘iiâ‹…Px(i)=خ±E(x)\\mathbb E(\\alpha x)=\\sum\\limits_{i}\\alpha \\cdot P_x(i)=\\alpha\\sum\\limits_{i}i\\cdot P_x(i)=\\alpha\\mathbb E(x) E(خ±x)=iâˆ‘â€‹خ±â‹…Pxâ€‹(i)=خ±iâˆ‘â€‹iâ‹…Pxâ€‹(i)=خ±E(x) Q.E.D. و— ه…³هڈ¯ن¹کو€§ï¼ڑ è‹¥ xxx ن¸ژ yyy و— ه…³ï¼Œهچ³ن¸€ن¸ھçڑ„هڈ–ه€¼ن¸چن¼ڑه½±ه“چهˆ°هڈ¦ن¸€ن¸ھï¼Œهˆ™وœ‰ï¼ڑ E(xy)=E(x)â‹…E(y)\\mathbb E(xy)=\\mathbb E(x)\\cdot\\mathbb E(y) E(xy)=E(x)â‹…E(y) è¯پوکژ E(xy)=âˆ‘iâˆ‘jijâ‹…Px(i)Py(j)=E(x)â‹…E(y)\\mathbb E(xy)=\\sum\\limits_{i}\\sum\\limits_{j}ij\\cdot P_x(i)P_y(j)=\\mathbb E(x)\\cdot \\mathbb E(y) E(xy)=iâˆ‘â€‹jâˆ‘â€‹ijâ‹…Pxâ€‹(i)Pyâ€‹(j)=E(x)â‹…E(y) Q.E.D. 2.2 ه¸¸ç”¨وٹ€ه·§ è‹¥و— ç‰¹و®ٹè¯´وکژï¼Œه…¬ه¼ڈن¸­ه‡؛çژ°çڑ„هڈکé‡ڈه‌‡ن¸؛éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈم€‚ هڈ‘ç”ںن؛‹ن»¶وœںوœ›و‰€éœ€و¬،و•°ï¼ڑ è‹¥وںگن؛‹ن»¶و¯ڈو¬،هڈ‘ç”ںçڑ„و¦‚çژ‡ن¸؛ aaaï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ aaa وک¯ن¸€ن¸ھç،®ه®ڑçڑ„ه®‍و•°ï¼Œهˆ™هڈ‘ç”ںè¯¥ن؛‹ن»¶و‰€éœ€çڑ„وœںوœ›و¬،و•°ن¸؛ 1a\\frac{1}{a}a1â€‹م€‚ è¯پوکژ E=a+(1âˆ’a)(E+1)E=a+E+1âˆ’aEâˆ’aaE=1E=1a\\mathbb E=a+(1-a)(\\mathbb E+1)\\\\ \\mathbb E=a+\\mathbb E+1-a\\mathbb E-a\\\\ a\\mathbb E=1\\\\ \\mathbb E=\\frac{1}{a} E=a+(1âˆ’a)(E+1)E=a+E+1âˆ’aEâˆ’aaE=1E=a1â€‹ Q.E.D. هˆ†é…چï¼ڑ E((a+b)(c+d))=E(ac)+E(ad)+E(bc)+E(bd)\\mathbb E((a+b)(c+d))=\\mathbb E(ac)+\\mathbb E(ad)+\\mathbb E(bc)+\\mathbb E(bd) E((a+b)(c+d))=E(ac)+E(ad)+E(bc)+E(bd) E(âˆڈi=1nâˆ‘j=1mxi,j)=E(x1,1أ—x2,1أ—â‹¯أ—xn,1)+E(x1,2أ—x2,1أ—â‹¯أ—xn,1)+â‹¯+E(x1,mأ—x2,mأ—â‹¯أ—xn,m)\\mathbb E\\left(\\prod\\limits_{i=1}^n\\sum\\limits_{j=1}^m x_{i,j}\\right)=\\\\ \\mathbb E(x_{1,1}\\times x_{2,1}\\times \\dots \\times x_{n,1})+E(x_{1,2}\\times x_{2,1}\\times \\dots \\times x_{n,1})+\\dots+E(x_{1,m}\\times x_{2,m}\\times \\dots \\times x_{n,m}) E(i=1âˆڈnâ€‹j=1âˆ‘mâ€‹xi,jâ€‹)=E(x1,1â€‹أ—x2,1â€‹أ—â‹¯أ—xn,1â€‹)+E(x1,2â€‹أ—x2,1â€‹أ—â‹¯أ—xn,1â€‹)+â‹¯+E(x1,mâ€‹أ—x2,mâ€‹أ—â‹¯أ—xn,mâ€‹) هچ³و¯ڈن¸€ن¸ھ E()\\mathbb E()E() ن¸­ن¸€ه…±وœ‰ nnn é،¹ç›¸ن¹کï¼Œç¬¬ iii é،¹هڈ¯ن»¥وک¯ xi,[1,m]x_{i,[1,m]}xi,[1,m]â€‹ ن¸­çڑ„ن»»و„ڈن¸€ن¸ھم€‚ و‹†و‹¬هڈ·هگژè؟گç”¨وœںوœ›çڑ„هڈ¯هٹ و€§هچ³هڈ¯è¯پوکژï¼Œç¬¬ن؛Œو‌،وک¯ç¬¬ن¸€و‌،çڑ„و‹“ه±•م€‚ nnn ن¸ھه€¼هںںç›¸هگŒçڑ„éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈçڑ„ç¬¬ kkk ه°ڈه€¼çڑ„وœںوœ›ï¼ڑ è®¾ nnn ن¸ھهœ¨ [0,1][0,1][0,1] é—´çڑ„è؟‍ç»­éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈ x1âˆ¼nx_{1\\sim n}x1âˆ¼nâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ E(kth-mink{xi})=kn+1\\mathbb E\\left(\\text{kth-min}_k\\{x_i\\}\\right)=\\frac{k}{n+1}E(kth-minkâ€‹{xiâ€‹})=n+1kâ€‹م€‚ è®¾ nnn ن¸ھهœ¨ [1,m][1,m][1,m] é—´çڑ„ç¦»و•£éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈ x1âˆ¼nx_{1\\sim n}x1âˆ¼nâ€‹ï¼Œهˆ™ E(kth-mink{xi})=kmn+1\\mathbb E\\left(\\text{kth-min}_k\\{x_i\\}\\right)=\\frac{km}{n+1}E(kth-minkâ€‹{xiâ€‹})=n+1kmâ€‹م€‚ è¯پوکژ ه…ˆè¯پوکژç¬¬ن¸€و‌،م€‚ ه¼•ه…¥هڈ¦ن¸€ن¸ھ [0,1][0,1][0,1] é—´çڑ„è؟‍ç»­éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈ yyyï¼Œè®¾ P(i)P(i)P(i) ن¸؛ iâ‰¤kth-mink{xi}i\\le\\text{kth-min}_k\\{x_i\\}iâ‰¤kth-minkâ€‹{xiâ€‹} çڑ„و¦‚çژ‡ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ E(kth-mink{xi})=âˆ«01P(i) di1=P(y)\\mathbb E\\left(\\text{kth-min}_k\\{x_i\\}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_0^1 P(i)\\,di}{1}=P(y)E(kth-minkâ€‹{xiâ€‹})=1âˆ«01â€‹P(i)diâ€‹=P(y)م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ç»™و‰€وœ‰éڑڈوœ؛هڈکé‡ڈهچ‡ه؛ڈوژ’ه؛ڈï¼Œç›¸هگŒهˆ™وŒ‰هژںو‌¥çڑ„ن½چç½®وژ’ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن¸€ه…±وœ‰ (n+1)!(n+1)!(n+1)! ç§چé،؛ه؛ڈï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ yyy وژ’هœ¨ه‰چ kkk ن½چçڑ„ن¸€ه…±وœ‰ kn!kn!kn! ç§چé،؛ه؛ڈï¼Œه…·ن½“çڑ„è€ƒè™‘وڈ’ه…¥هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆ P(y)=kn!(n+1)!=kn+1=E(kth-mink{xi})P(y)=\\frac{kn!}{(n+1)!}=\\frac{k}{n+1}=\\mathbb cu,x+y=minâپ،(cu,x+y,maxâپ،(cls,x,crs,yâˆ’sumls+xp))c_{u,x+y}=\\min(c_{u,x+y},\\max(c_{ls,x},c_{rs,y}-sum_{ls}+xp)) cu,x+yâ€‹=min(cu,x+yâ€‹,max(cls,xâ€‹,crs,yâ€‹âˆ’sumlsâ€‹+xp)) ن½†وک¯ç›´وژ¥هپڑوک¯ f(x,y)=maxâپ،(cls,x,crs,yâˆ’sumls+xp)f(x,y)=\\max(c_{ls,x},c_{rs,y}-sum_{ls}+xp)f(x,y)=max(cls,xâ€‹,crs,yâ€‹âˆ’sumlsâ€‹+xp)ï¼Œهˆ™ن¸€ه®ڑوœ‰ï¼ڑ f(x,y)<f(x+1,yâˆ’1)f(x,y)<f(x+1,y-1) f(x,y)<f(x+1,yâˆ’1) ه› ن¸؛ï¼ڑ cls,x+1âˆ’1+sumlsâˆ’xpâ‰¥crs,ycrs,yâˆ’sumls+xp+1â‰¤cls,x+1crs,yâˆ’sumls+xp<cls,x+1c_{ls,x+1}-1+sum_{ls}-xp\\ge c_{rs,y}\\\\ c_{rs,y}-sum_{ls}+xp+1\\le c_{ls,x+1}\\\\ c_{rs,y}-sum_{ls}+xp<c_{ls,x+1}\\\\ cls,x+1â€‹âˆ’1+sumlsâ€‹âˆ’xpâ‰¥crs,yâ€‹crs,yâ€‹âˆ’sumlsâ€‹+xp+1â‰¤cls,x+1â€‹crs,yâ€‹âˆ’sumlsâ€‹+xp<cls,x+1â€‹ و‰€ن»¥ f(x,y)<cls,x+1=f(x+1,yâˆ’1)f(x,y)<c_{ls,x+1}=f(x+1,y-1)f(x,y)<cls,x+1â€‹=f(x+1,yâˆ’1)م€‚ ç”±ن؛ژ cu,x+1â‰¥cu,x+pc_{u,x+1}\\ge c_{u,x}+pcu,x+1â€‹â‰¥cu,xâ€‹+p و‰€ن»¥è‹¥ x,yx,yx,y هگˆو³•هˆ™ x+1,yx+1,yx+1,y ن¹ںن¸€ه®ڑهگˆو³•ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆèƒ½هٹ¨ yyy ه°±ه°½é‡ڈه…ˆهٹ¨ yyy هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،n+mlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log n+m\\log^2n)O(nlogn+mlog2n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ // Problem: Nauuo and Bug // Contest: Luogu // URL: https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/CF1172F // Memory Limit: 1000 MB // Time Limit: 4000 ms // // Powered by CP Editor (https://cpeditor.org) #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; const int S=1000005; int n,m; long long p,a[S]; long long sum[S<<2]; vector<long long> c[S<<2]; inline void merge(int u) { int ls=u<<1,rs=u<<1|1; sum[u]=sum[ls]+sum[rs]; int lc=c[ls].size()-1,rc=c[rs].size()-1; for(int i=1;i<=lc+rc;i++) c[u][i]=1e17; for(int x=0,y=0;x<=lc;x++) { if(y>rc) y--; while(y<=rc) { if(x!=lc&&c[ls][x+1]-1+sum[ls]-x*p<c[rs][y]) { if(y>0) y--; break; } c[u][x+y]=min(c[u][x+y],max(c[ls][x],c[rs][y]-sum[ls]+x*p)); y++; } } } void build(int u,int l,int r) { c[u]=vector<long long>(r-l+2,0); c[u][0]=-1e17; if(l==r) return sum[u]=a[l],c[u][1]=p-a[l],void(); int mid=l+r>>1; build(u<<1,l,mid),build(u<<1|1,mid+1,r); merge(u); } long long que(int u,int l,int r,int L,int R,long long val) { if(l>R||r<L) return val; if(l>=L&&r<=R) return val+sum[u]-(upper_bound(c[u].begin(),c[u].end(),val)-c[u].begin()-1)*p; int mid=l+r>>1; return que(u<<1|1,mid+1,r,L,R,que(u<<1,l,mid,L,R,val)); } int main() { scanf("%d%d%lld",&n,&m,&p); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]); build(1,1,n); while(m--) { int l,r; scanf("%d%d",&l,&r); printf("%lld\\n",que(1,1,n,l,r,0)); } return 0; } é—®وœ€ه°‘è؟›è،Œه¤ڑه°‘و¬،و“چن½œن½؟ه¾— xi=aix_i=a_ixiâ€‹=aiâ€‹م€‚

1â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1091\\le a_i\\le 10^91â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤109م€‚

é€‰ه®ڑو•´و•° 1â‰¤kâ‰¤n1\\le k\\le n1â‰¤kâ‰¤n ن¸ژن¸چن¸‹é™چé‌‍è´ںو•´و•°ه؛ڈهˆ— c1,c2,â€¦,ckc_1,c_2,\\dots,c_kc1â€‹,c2â€‹,â€¦,ckâ€‹ï¼Œه¯¹و‰€وœ‰ 1â‰¤iâ‰¤k1\\le i \\le k1â‰¤iâ‰¤kï¼Œن»¤ xix_ixiâ€‹ هٹ ن¸ٹ cic_iciâ€‹م€‚ é€‰ه®ڑو•´و•° 1â‰¤kâ‰¤n1\\le k\\le n1â‰¤kâ‰¤n ن¸ژن¸چن¸ٹهچ‡é‌‍è´ںو•´و•°ه؛ڈهˆ— c1,c2,â€¦,ckc_1,c_2,\\dots,c_kc1â€‹,c2â€‹,â€¦,ckâ€‹ï¼Œه¯¹و‰€وœ‰ 1â‰¤iâ‰¤k1\\le i \\le k1â‰¤iâ‰¤kï¼Œن»¤ xnâˆ’k+ix_{n-k+i}xnâˆ’k+iâ€‹ هٹ ن¸ٹ cic_iciâ€‹م€‚ é—®وœ€ه°‘è؟›è،Œه¤ڑه°‘و¬،و“چن½œن½؟ه¾— xi=aix_i=a_ixiâ€‹=aiâ€‹م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—1051\\le n\\le 2\\times 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤2أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1091\\le a_i\\le 10^91â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤109م€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژè؟™ç§چه’Œهچ•è°ƒو€§وœ‰ه…³çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼Œن¸€èˆ¬è€ƒè™‘ه·®هˆ†ه؛ڈهˆ—م€‚é‚£ن¹ˆè®¾ bi=xi+1âˆ’xib_i=x_{i+1}-x_ibiâ€‹=xi+1â€‹âˆ’xiâ€‹م€‚ è€ƒè™‘هڈھوœ‰ن¸€ç§چو“چن½œو€ژن¹ˆهپڑï¼Œوک¾ç„¶ن¸¤ç§چو“چن½œوک¯ه¯¹ç§°çڑ„ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هڈھç”¨è€ƒè™‘ç¬¬ن¸€ç§چو“چن½œم€‚ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ç¬¬ن¸€ç§چو“چن½œç›¸ه½“ن؛ژوٹٹ b[1,kâˆ’1]b_{[1,k-1]}b[1,kâˆ’1]â€‹ éƒ½هٹ ن¸ٹن»»و„ڈé‌‍è´ںو•´و•°ï¼Œ وٹٹ bkb_kbkâ€‹ ه‡ڈهژ»ن»»و„ڈé‌‍è´ںو•´و•°م€‚è€Œوˆ‘ن»¬çڑ„ç›®çڑ„وک¯è®© bi=ai+1âˆ’aib_i=a_{i+1}-a_ibiâ€‹=ai+1â€‹âˆ’aiâ€‹ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ç­”و،ˆهچ³ن¸؛ âˆ‘i=1nâˆ’1[ai>ai+1]+1\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{n-1}[a_i>a_{i+1}]+1i=1âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹[aiâ€‹>ai+1â€‹]+1م€‚ هگŒçگ†ï¼Œهڈھوœ‰ç¬¬ن؛Œç§چو“چن½œو—¶çڑ„ç­”و،ˆن¸؛ âˆ‘i=1nâˆ’1[ai<ai+1]+1\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{n-1} [a_i<a_{i+1}]+1i=1âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹[aiâ€‹<ai+1â€‹]+1م€‚ è€ƒè™‘è®¾ yiy_iyiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ç¬¬ن¸€ç§چو“چن½œè®© xix_ixiâ€‹ ه¢‍هٹ ن؛†ه¤ڑه°‘ï¼ˆyn+1=an+1=y0=a0=0y_{n+1}=a_{n+1}=y_0=a_0=0yn+1â€‹=an+1â€‹=y0â€‹=a0â€‹=0ï¼‰ï¼Œهˆ™ç­”و،ˆن¸؛ âˆ‘i=1n+1[yiâˆ’1>yi]+[aiâˆ’1âˆ’yiâˆ’1<aiâˆ’yi]\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{n+1}[y_{i-1}>y_i]+[a_{i-1}-y_{i-1}<a_{i}-y_{i}]i=1âˆ‘n+1â€‹[yiâˆ’1â€‹>yiâ€‹]+[aiâˆ’1â€‹âˆ’yiâˆ’1â€‹<aiâ€‹âˆ’yiâ€‹]م€‚ è®¾ dpi,jdp_{i,j}dpi,jâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ç،®ه®ڑه®Œ y[1,i]y_{[1,i]}y[1,i]â€‹ ن¸” yi=jy_i=jyiâ€‹=j çڑ„ه‰چ iii é،¹çڑ„ç­”و،ˆï¼Œن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ه¯¹ن؛ژهگŒن¸€ن¸ھ iiiï¼Œjjj è¶ٹه¤§ dpi,jdp_{i,j}dpi,jâ€‹ è¶ٹه°ڈï¼Œè€Œè½¬ç§»و—¶ jâ€²j'jâ€² è¶ٹه°ڈ dpiâˆ’1,jâ€²dp_{i-1,j'}dpiâˆ’1,jâ€²â€‹ è½¬ç§»هˆ° dpi,jdp_{i,j}dpi,jâ€‹ çڑ„ن»£ن»·è¶ٹه°ڈم€‚و³¨و„ڈهˆ°ه¯¹ن؛ژهگŒن¸€ن¸ھ iiiï¼Œdpi,jdp_{i,j}dpi,jâ€‹ وœ€ه¤ڑهڈھوœ‰ن¸‰ç§چهڈ–ه€¼ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆè®°ه½•ن¸‹è؟™ن¸‰ç§چهڈ–ه€¼çڑ„ه€¼ه’Œوœ€ه°ڈçڑ„ jjj هچ³هڈ¯è½¬ç§»م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(n)O(n)O(n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=200005,inf=1e9; int n,a[S]; int f[S][3],g[S][3]; int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]); a[0]=a[n+1]=0; f[0][0]=0,g[0][0]=0; f[0][1]=g[0][1]=inf; f[0][2]=g[0][2]=inf; for(int i=1;i<=n+1;i++) { int y[7],dp[7]={inf,inf,inf,inf,inf,inf,inf}; for(int j=0;j<3;j++) y[j]=a[i]-a[i-1]+f[i-1][j]; for(int j=3;j<6;j++) y[j]=f[i-1][j-3]; y[6]=0; for(int j=0;j<7;j++) { int v=y[j]; if(v<0||v>a[i]) continue; for(int k=0;k<3;k++) { int u=f[i-1][k]; if(u<0||u>a[i-1]) continue; dp[j]=min(dp[j],g[i-1][k]+(u>v)+(a[i-1]-u<a[i]-v)); } } int id[7]={0,1,2,3,4,5,6}; sort(id,id+7,[&](int a,int b){return dp[a]<dp[b]||(dp[a]==dp[b]&&y[a]<y[b]);}); int p=0; for(int j=0;j<7&&p<3;j++) { int k=id[j]; if(p==0||dp[k]!=g[i][p-1]) { f[i][p]=y[k],g[i][p]=dp[k]; p++; } } for(int j=p;j<3;j++) f[i][j]=g[i][j]=inf; } printf("%d\\n",g[n+1][0]); return 0; } // (y[i]>y[i+1])+(a[i]-y[i]<a[i+1]-y[i+1]) ن¹ںه°±وک¯è¯´و ‘ن¸­و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„ه„؟ه­گوœ‰é،؛ه؛ڈم€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°وˆ‘ن»¬هڈھه…³ه؟ƒو ‘و ¹ه…ƒç´ çڑ„ه¤§ه°ڈه’Œو ‘çڑ„ه¤§ه°ڈï¼Œن؛ژوک¯è®¾ fi,uf_{i,u}fi,uâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه¤§ه°ڈن¸؛ iiiï¼Œو ‘و ¹ه…ƒç´ ن¸؛ uuu çڑ„و ‘çڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°ï¼Œè½¬ç§»è€ƒè™‘و‍ڑن¸¾وڈ’ه…¥و—¶é—´وœ€و—©çڑ„ه„؟ه­گ vvvï¼ˆه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸­وœ€è؟œç¦» uuuï¼‰ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰è½¬ç§»ï¼ڑ fi,u=âˆ‘j=1iâˆ’1(iâˆ’2jâˆ’1)أ—fiâˆ’j,uأ—âˆ‘v>ufj,vf_{i,u}=\\sum\\limits_{j=1}^{i-1}\\binom{i-2}{j-1}\\times f_{i-j,u}\\times\\sum\\limits_{v>u}f_{j,v} fi,uâ€‹=j=1âˆ‘iâˆ’1â€‹(jâˆ’1iâˆ’2â€‹)أ—fiâˆ’j,uâ€‹أ—v>uâˆ‘â€‹fj,vâ€‹ ه…¶ن¸­ç»„هگˆو•°ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژوœ‰ iii ن¸ھوڈ’ه…¥çڑ„و—¶é—´هڈ¯ن»¥é€‰و‹©ï¼Œrtrtrt ه’Œ vvv ه؟…ه®ڑوک¯ه‰چن¸¤ن¸ھوڈ’ه…¥çڑ„ï¼Œvvv ه­گو ‘ن¸­ç‚¹çڑ„وڈ’ه…¥و—¶é—´هڈ¯ن»¥ن»»و„ڈé€‰و‹©م€‚ ن½؟ç”¨ه‰چç¼€ه’Œن¼کهŒ–هڈ¯ن»¥هپڑهˆ° O(n2k)O(n^2k)O(n2k)م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=305; int n,k,p; int C[S][S],f[S][S],sum[S][S]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } int main() { scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&k,&p); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { C[i][0]=1; for(int j=1;j<=i;j++) C[i][j]=(C[i-1][j]+C[i-1][j-1])%p; } for(int i=0;i<=k;i++) f[1][i]=1; for(int i=k;i>=0;i--) sum[1][i]=(sum[1][i+1]+f[1][i])%p; for(int i=2;i<=n+1;i++) { for(int j=0;j<=k;j++) { for(int s=1;s<=i-1;s++) { add(f[i][j],1ll*sum[s][j+1]*C[i-2][s-1]%p*f[i-s][j]%p); } } for(int j=k;j>=0;j--) sum[i][j]=(sum[i][j+1]+f[i][j])%p; } printf("%d\\n",f[n+1][0]); return 0; } 2â‰¤nâ‰¤502\\le n\\le502â‰¤nâ‰¤50ï¼Œ1â‰¤kâ‰¤501\\le k\\le501â‰¤kâ‰¤50ï¼Œ0â‰¤liâ‰¤ri<2k0\\le l_i\\le r_i< 2^k0â‰¤liâ€‹â‰¤riâ€‹<2kï¼Œ0â‰¤ciâ‰¤10120\\le c_i\\le10^{12}0â‰¤ciâ€‹â‰¤1012م€‚

[li,ri][l_i,r_i][liâ€‹,riâ€‹]م€‚ ç»™ه‡؛و•°هˆ— c0,c1,â€¦,cKâˆ’1c_0,c_1,\\dots,c_{K-1}c0â€‹,c1â€‹,â€¦,cKâˆ’1â€‹ï¼Œه¹¶ç”±و­¤ه®ڑن¹‰ن¸€ن¸ھن»£ن»·ه‡½و•° f(x)f(x)f(x)ï¼ڑ f(x)=âˆ‘i=0kâˆ’1(âŒٹx2iâŒ‹ mod 2)â‹…cif(x)=\\sum_{i=0}^{k-1}(\\lfloor\\tfrac x{2^i}\\rfloor\\bmod 2)\\cdot c_i f(x)=i=0âˆ‘kâˆ’1â€‹(âŒٹ2ixâ€‹âŒ‹mod2)â‹…ciâ€‹ ç،®ه®ڑو¯ڈن¸ھهڈکé‡ڈçڑ„هڈ–ه€¼ï¼Œن½؟ه¾— âˆ‘i=2nf(xiâٹ•xiâˆ’1)\\sum_{i=2}^nf(x_i\\oplus x_{i-1})âˆ‘i=2nâ€‹f(xiâ€‹âٹ•xiâˆ’1â€‹) وœ€ه°ڈï¼Œè¾“ه‡؛è¯¥وœ€ه°ڈه€¼م€‚ 2â‰¤nâ‰¤502\\le n\\le502â‰¤nâ‰¤50ï¼Œ1â‰¤kâ‰¤501\\le k\\le501â‰¤kâ‰¤50ï¼Œ0â‰¤liâ‰¤ri<2k0\\le l_i\\le r_i< 2^k0â‰¤liâ€‹â‰¤riâ€‹<2kï¼Œ0â‰¤ciâ‰¤10120\\le c_i\\le10^{12}0â‰¤ciâ€‹â‰¤1012م€‚ è€ƒè™‘ن؛Œè؟›هˆ¶و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹ن»ژé«که¾€ن½ژن¸€ن½چن¸€ن½چه،«ï¼Œè‹¥ه½“ه‰چه،«هˆ°ن؛†ç¬¬ ppp ن½چن¸” x[l,r]x_{[l,r]}x[l,r]â€‹ ن¹‹هگژçڑ„ن½چو— è®؛و€ژن¹ˆه،«éƒ½ن¸چن¼ڑè¶…ه‡؛ [li,ri][l_i,r_i][liâ€‹,riâ€‹] çڑ„é™گهˆ¶ï¼Œهˆ™ x[l,r]x_{[l,r]}x[l,r]â€‹ هگژé‌¢çڑ„ن½چهڈ¯ن»¥è´ھه؟ƒهœ°ه’Œ xlâˆ’1x_{l-1}xlâˆ’1â€‹ ن¸€و ·ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ x[l,r]x_{[l,r]}x[l,r]â€‹ هڈ¯ن»¥هˆ وژ‰م€‚ ن¸چه¦¨èƒ½هˆ ه°±هˆ ï¼Œهچ³é’¦ه®ڑ xlâˆ’1x_{l-1}xlâˆ’1â€‹ ه’Œ xr+1x_{r+1}xr+1â€‹ çڑ„é«ک ppp ن½چéƒ½é،¶ç‌€ن¸ٹç•Œه’Œن¸‹ç•Œن¸­çڑ„è‡³ه°‘ن¸€ن¸ھم€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھوœ´ç´ çڑ„ dpï¼Œè®¾ fp,l,r,0/1,0/1f_{p,l,r,0/1,0/1}fp,l,r,0/1,0/1â€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه،«ه®Œé«ک ppp ن½چï¼Œهˆ وژ‰ن؛†هŒ؛é—´ x[l,r]x_{[l,r]}x[l,r]â€‹ï¼Œxlâˆ’1x_{l-1}xlâˆ’1â€‹ é،¶هˆ°ن¸ٹç•Œ/ن¸‹ç•Œï¼Œxr+1x_{r+1}xr+1â€‹ é،¶هˆ°ن¸ٹç•Œ/ن¸‹ç•Œم€‚ هڈ‘çژ°è؟™و ·è½¬ç§»ن¸چن؛†ï¼Œه› ن¸؛è‹¥ xkx_kxkâ€‹ هœ¨ç¬¬ ppp ن½چو—¶è§£é™¤ن؛†é™گهˆ¶ï¼Œهˆ™ه®ƒçڑ„ç¬¬ ppp ن½چéœ€è¦پç؟»è½¬م€‚ن¸چه¦¨وٹٹè؟™ن¸ھن¸œè¥؟هٹ ه…¥çٹ¶و€پï¼Œè®¾ fp,l,r,0/1,0/1,0/1,0/1f_{p,l,r,0/1,0/1,0/1,0/1}fp,l,r,0/1,0/1,0/1,0/1â€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ه،«ه®Œé«ک ppp ن½چï¼Œهˆ وژ‰ن؛†هŒ؛é—´ x[l,r]x_{[l,r]}x[l,r]â€‹ï¼›xlâˆ’1x_{l-1}xlâˆ’1â€‹ é،¶هˆ°ن¸ٹç•Œ/ن¸‹ç•Œï¼Œوک¯هگ¦هœ¨ç¬¬ ppp ن½چè§£é™¤é™گهˆ¶ï¼›xr+1x_{r+1}xr+1â€‹ é،¶هˆ°ن¸ٹç•Œ/ن¸‹ç•Œï¼Œوک¯هگ¦هœ¨ç¬¬ ppp ن½چè§£é™¤é™گهˆ¶م€‚ و³¨و„ڈè؟™و ·è®¾è®،çٹ¶و€پهگژ fâˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,0,âˆ—,0f_{*,*,*,*,0,*,0}fâˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,0,âˆ—,0â€‹ و‰چوک¯وˆ‘ن»¬وƒ³è¦پçڑ„ن¸œè¥؟ï¼Œfâˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,1,âˆ—,âˆ—f_{*,*,*,*,1,*,*}fâˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,1,âˆ—,âˆ—â€‹ ه’Œ fâˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,1f_{*,*,*,*,*,*,1}fâˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,1â€‹ هڈھوک¯ن¸­é—´çٹ¶و€پم€‚ è½¬ç§»è¾ƒن¸؛ç®€هچ•ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈهˆ° fp,l,r,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—f_{p,l,r,*,*,*,*}fp,l,r,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—â€‹ هڈھوœ‰ن¸¤ن¸ھو‌¥و؛گï¼Œهچ³ fp+1,l,r,âˆ—,0,âˆ—,0+ç¬¬ p ن½چçڑ„ن»£ن»·f_{p+1,l,r,*,0,*,0}+\\text{ç¬¬ }p\\text{ ن½چçڑ„ن»£ن»·}fp+1,l,r,âˆ—,0,âˆ—,0â€‹+ç¬¬ p ن½چçڑ„ن»£ن»· ه’Œ fp,l,kâˆ’1,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,1+fp,k+1,r,âˆ—,1,âˆ—,âˆ—f_{p,l,k-1,*,*,*,1}+f_{p,k+1,r,*,1,*,*}fp,l,kâˆ’1,âˆ—,âˆ—,âˆ—,1â€‹+fp,k+1,r,âˆ—,1,âˆ—,âˆ—â€‹م€‚ه‰چè€…ه¯¹ه؛” x[l,r]x_{[l,r]}x[l,r]â€‹ و²،وœ‰هœ¨ç¬¬ ppp ن½چè§£é™¤é™گهˆ¶çڑ„هڈکé‡ڈï¼Œهگژè€…هˆ™ه¯¹ه؛”وœ‰è؟™و ·çڑ„هڈکé‡ڈم€‚ و³¨و„ڈ p=0p=0p=0 و—¶هگژé‌¢و²،وœ‰ن½چن؛†ï¼Œè¦پç‰¹هˆ¤م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(kn3)O(kn^3)O(kn3)ï¼Œن½؟ç”¨è®°ه؟†هŒ–وگœç´¢ه®‍çژ°ن¼ڑç®€و´په¾ˆه¤ڑï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> using namespace std; const int S=55; const long long inf=1e18; int n,m; long long L[S],R[S],c[S]; long long f[S][S][S][2][2][2][2]; inline void tom(long long &x,long long y){x=min(x,y);} long long g(int p,int l,int r,int l0,int l1,int r0,int r1) { if(p==m) return l>r?0:inf; long long &u=f[p][l][r][l0][l1][r0][r1]; if(u!=-1) return u; int stl=(((l0==0?L[l-1]:R[l-1])>>p)&1)^l1; int str=(((r0==0?L[r+1]:R[r+1])>>p)&1)^r1; u=inf; tom(u,g(p+1,l,r,l0,0,r0,0)+(l!=1&&r!=n&&stl!=str)*c[p]); for(int k=l;k<=r;k++) { for(int t=0;t<=1;t++) { if(p==0) tom(u,g(p,l,k-1,l0,l1,t,0)+g(p,k+1,r,t,0,r0,r1)); long long vk=(t==0?L[k]:R[k])^(1ll<<p); if((vk&(~((1ll<<p)-1)))>=L[k]&&(vk|((1ll<<p)-1))<=R[k]) { tom(u,g(p,l,k-1,l0,l1,t,1)+g(p,k+1,r,t,1,r0,r1)); } } } return u; } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%lld%lld",&L[i],&R[i]); for(int i=0;i<=m-1;i++) scanf("%lld",&c[i]); memset(f,-1,sizeof(f)); printf("%lld\\n",g(0,1,n,0,0,0,0)); return 0; } lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x],râ€²âˆˆ[x,r]l'\\in [l,x],r'\\in [x,r]lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x],râ€²âˆˆ[x,r] çڑ„ [lâ€²,râ€²][l',r'][lâ€²,râ€²] çڑ„è´،çŒ®ï¼› هˆ†و²»ه¤„çگ† [l,xâˆ’1][l,x-1][l,xâˆ’1] ه’Œ [x+1,r][x+1,r][x+1,r]ï¼› ن½†وک¯è؟™و ·هپڑçڑ„و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وœ€هٹ£وک¯ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) çڑ„ï¼Œè€ƒè™‘ç±»ن¼¼ meet-in-middle çڑ„و€‌وƒ³ï¼ڑ ن»ژه·¦هڈ³ن¸¤ç«¯هگŒو—¶ه¾€ن¸­é—´éپچهژ†هŒ؛é—´ / é¢„ه¤„çگ†ï¼Œو‰¾هˆ°ن»£è،¨ه…ƒ xxxï¼› ه¤„çگ† lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x],râ€²âˆˆ[x,r]l'\\in [l,x],r'\\in [x,r]lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x],râ€²âˆˆ[x,r] çڑ„ [lâ€²,râ€²][l',r'][lâ€²,râ€²] çڑ„è´،çŒ®ï¼ڑ è‹¥ xâˆ’l+1<râˆ’x+1x-l+1<r-x+1xâˆ’l+1<râˆ’x+1ï¼Œهچ³ [l,x][l,x][l,x] و›´çں­ï¼Œهˆ™و‍ڑن¸¾ lâ€²l'lâ€²ï¼Œه؟«é€ںè®،ç®—و‰€وœ‰ râ€²r'râ€² çڑ„è´،çŒ®ه’Œ / ه¯¹ [x+1,r][x+1,r][x+1,r] çڑ„ه½±ه“چï¼› هگ¦هˆ™و‍ڑن¸¾ râ€²r'râ€²ï¼Œه؟«é€ںè®،ç®—و‰€وœ‰ lâ€²l'lâ€² çڑ„è´،çŒ®ه’Œ / ه¯¹ [l,xâˆ’1][l,x-1][l,xâˆ’1] çڑ„ه½±ه“چï¼› هˆ†و²»ه¤„çگ† [l,xâˆ’1][l,x-1][l,xâˆ’1] ه’Œ [x+1,r][x+1,r][x+1,r]ï¼› è؟™و ·هپڑçڑ„وœ¬è´¨هڈ¯ن»¥çœ‹هپڑهœ¨ dfs و ‘ن¸ٹهگ¯هڈ‘ه¼ڈهگˆه¹¶ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)م€‚ وœ‰ن؛›و—¶ه€™éœ€è¦پو³¨و„ڈهˆ†و²»ه¤„çگ†و—¶ه·¦هڈ³هŒ؛é—´çڑ„é،؛ه؛ڈم€‚ Part 3 ن¾‹é¢ک 3.1 P4755 Beautiful Pair ه°ڈ D وœ‰ن¸ھو•°هˆ— {a}\\{a\\}{a}ï¼Œه½“ن¸€ن¸ھو•°ه¯¹ (i,j)(i,j)(i,j)ï¼ˆiâ‰¤ji \\le jiâ‰¤jï¼‰و»،è¶³ aia_iaiâ€‹ ه’Œ aja_jajâ€‹ çڑ„ç§¯ن¸چه¤§ن؛ژ ai,ai+1,â€¦,aja_i, a_{i+1}, \\ldots, a_jaiâ€‹,ai+1â€‹,â€¦,ajâ€‹ ن¸­çڑ„وœ€ه¤§ه€¼و—¶ï¼Œه°ڈ D è®¤ن¸؛è؟™ن¸ھو•°ه¯¹وک¯ç¾ژن¸½çڑ„م€‚è¯·ن½ و±‚ه‡؛ç¾ژن¸½çڑ„و•°ه¯¹çڑ„و•°é‡ڈم€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤1051\\le n\\le{10}^51â‰¤nâ‰¤105ï¼Œ1â‰¤aiâ‰¤1091\\le a_i\\le{10}^91â‰¤aiâ€‹â‰¤109م€‚ é¢کè§£ هگ¯هڈ‘ه¼ڈهˆ†è£‚ï¼Œه…ˆç¦»و•£هŒ–ï¼Œهœ¨ه¤„çگ† [1,n][1,n][1,n] ه‰چوٹٹو‰€وœ‰ aia_iaiâ€‹ و‰”è؟›و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„é‡Œم€‚ ه¤„çگ† [l,r][l,r][l,r] و—¶ï¼ڑ è‹¥ l>rl>rl>rï¼Œç›´وژ¥è؟”ه›‍ï¼› è‹¥ l=rl=rl=rï¼Œهœ¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ن¸­هˆ é™¤ ala_lalâ€‹ ه¹¶è؟”ه›‍ï¼› é¢„ه¤„çگ† ST è،¨ه؟«é€ںو‰¾هˆ° [l,r][l,r][l,r] ن¸­وœ€ه¤§ه€¼çڑ„ن½چç½® xxx; ه¤„çگ† lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x],râ€²âˆˆ[x,r]l'\\in [l,x],r'\\in [x,r]lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x],râ€²âˆˆ[x,r] çڑ„ [lâ€²,râ€²][l',r'][lâ€²,râ€²] çڑ„è´،çŒ®ï¼ڑ è‹¥ xâˆ’l+1<râˆ’x+1x-l+1<r-x+1xâˆ’l+1<râˆ’x+1ï¼ڑ هœ¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ن¸­هˆ é™¤ a[l,xâˆ’1]a_{[l,x-1]}a[l,xâˆ’1]â€‹ï¼› éپچهژ† lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x]l'\\in [l,x]lâ€²âˆˆ[l,x]ï¼Œç®—ه‡؛و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ن¸­ â‰¤âŒٹaxalâ€²âŒ‹\\le \\lfloor\\frac{a_x}{a_{l'}}\\rfloorâ‰¤âŒٹalâ€²â€‹axâ€‹â€‹âŒ‹ çڑ„و•°çڑ„ن¸ھو•° cntcntcntï¼Œن»¤ç­”و،ˆه¢‍هٹ  cntcntcntï¼› هœ¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ن¸­هˆ é™¤ axa_{x}axâ€‹ï¼› هˆ†و²»ه¤„çگ† [x+1,r][x+1,r][x+1,r]ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈه¤„çگ†هگژو ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ن¸­çڑ„ a[x+1,r]a_{[x+1,r]}a[x+1,r]â€‹ ه·²ç»ڈè¢«هˆ é™¤ï¼› هœ¨و ‘çٹ¶و•°ç»„ن¸­هٹ ه…¥ a[l,xâˆ’1]a_{[l,x-1]}a[l,xâˆ’1]â€‹ ه¹¶هˆ†و²»ه¤„çگ† [l,xâˆ’1][l,x-1][l,xâˆ’1]ï¼› هگ¦هˆ™و‍ڑن¸¾ râ€²r'râ€²ï¼Œه¤„çگ†و–¹و³•ç±»ن¼¼ï¼Œو³¨و„ڈè¦په…ˆهˆ†و²»ه¤„çگ† [l,xâˆ’1][l,x-1][l,xâˆ’1]ï¼› و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log^2 n)O(nlog2n)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=100005,BS=25; int n,a[S]; int m,b[S]; int mlog[S],mx[S][BS]; int c[S]; long long ans; inline int que(int l,int r) { int k=mlog[r-l+1]; int x=mx[l][k],y=mx[r-(1<<k)+1][k]; return a[x]>a[y]?x:y; } inline void addtr(int pos,int val) { for(int i=pos;i<=m;i+=i&-i) c[i]+=val; } inline int quetr(int pos) { int res=0; for(int i=pos;i>=1;i-=i&-i) res+=c[i]; return res; } void slove(int l,int r) { if(l>r) return; if(l==r) return ans+=b[a[l]]==1,addtr(a[l],-1),void(); int x=que(l,r); if(x-l+1<r-x+1) { for(int i=l;i<=x-1;i++) addtr(a[i],-1); for(int i=l;i<=x;i++) { int p=upper_bound(b+1,b+m+1,b[a[x]]/b[a[i]])-b-1; ans+=quetr(p); } addtr(a[x],-1); slove(x+1,r); for(int i=l;i<=x-1;i++) addtr(a[i],1); slove(l,x-1); } else { for(int i=x+1;i<=r;i++) addtr(a[i],-1); for(int i=x;i<=r;i++) { int p=upper_bound(b+1,b+m+1,b[a[x]]/b[a[i]])-b-1; ans+=quetr(p); } addtr(a[x],-1); slove(l,x-1); for(int i=x+1;i<=r;i++) addtr(a[i],1); slove(x+1,r); } } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]),b[++m]=a[i]; sort(b+1,b+m+1),m=unique(b+1,b+m+1)-b-1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) a[i]=lower_bound(b+1,b+m+1,a[i])-b; mlog[0]=-1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) mlog[i]=mlog[i>>1]+1,mx[i][0]=i; for(int j=1;j<=BS-3;j++) { for(int i=1;i<=n-(1<<j)+1;i++) { int x=mx[i][j-1],y=mx[i+(1<<j-1)][j-1]; mx[i][j]=a[x]>a[y]?x:y; } } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) addtr(a[i],1); slove(1,n); printf("%lld\\n",ans); return 0; } 3.2 LOJ6198 è°¢ç‰¹ ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھé•؟ nnn çڑ„ه­—ç¬¦ن¸² SSS ه’Œ nnn ن¸ھو•´و•° wiw_iwiâ€‹ï¼Œه®ڑن¹‰ن؛Œه…ƒç»„ (i,j)(i,j)(i,j)ï¼ˆiî€ =ji\\not=jiî€ â€‹=jï¼‰çڑ„و‌ƒه€¼ن¸؛ LCP(S[i,n],S[j,n])+(wiâٹ•wj)\\text{LCP}(S_{[i,n]},S_{[j,n]})+(w_i\\oplus w_j)LCP(S[i,n]â€‹,S[j,n]â€‹)+(wiâ€‹âٹ•wjâ€‹)ï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ âٹ•\\oplusâٹ• ن¸؛وŒ‰ن½چه¼‚وˆ–è؟گç®—م€‚ه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰ (i,j)(i,j)(i,j)ï¼ˆiî€ =ji\\not=jiî€ â€‹=jï¼‰ï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛وœ€ه¤§çڑ„و‌ƒه€¼م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤1051\\le n\\le 10^51â‰¤nâ‰¤105ï¼Œ0â‰¤wi<n0\\le w_i<n0â‰¤wiâ€‹<nم€‚ é¢کè§£ ه¦‚و‍œن¸چه¾€هگ¯هڈ‘ه¼ڈهˆ†è£‚è؟™و–¹é‌¢وƒ³وک¯وŒ؛éڑ¾وƒ³هˆ°çڑ„م€‚ LCP(S[i,n],S[j,n])\\text{LCP}(S_{[i,n]},S_{[j,n]})LCP(S[i,n]â€‹,S[j,n]â€‹) ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژè·‘ SA ن¹‹هگژçڑ„ minâپ،k=rkirkjâˆ’1heightk\\min\\limits_{k=rk_i}^{rk_j-1}height_kk=rkiâ€‹minrkjâ€‹âˆ’1â€‹heightkâ€‹ï¼Œهچ³وںگن¸ھهŒ؛é—´ن¸­çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈه€¼ï¼Œè€Œوœ€ه¤§ه¼‚وˆ–هڈˆه¾ˆه¥½ç»´وٹ¤ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ç›´وژ¥ SA + trie + هگ¯هڈ‘ه¼ڈهˆ†è£‚هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،2n)O(n\\log^2 n)O(nlog2n)م€‚ 3.3 م€گ2023NOIPو¨،و‹ںèµ›06م€‘وˆ‘وک¯ C é¢ک \n

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€و£µ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و— و ¹و ‘ï¼Œو¯ڈو‌،è¾¹وœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھوœھçں¥çڑ„و­£و•´و•°è¾¹و‌ƒم€‚

\n

ه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰çڑ„ 1â‰¤i<n1 \\le i < n1â‰¤i<nï¼Œç»™ه‡؛ç‚¹ iii هˆ°ç‚¹ i+1i + 1i+1 çڑ„è·‌ç¦» did_idiâ€‹ï¼Œè¯·è؟کهژںه‡؛ن»»و„ڈن¸€ç»„هگˆو³•çڑ„è¾¹و‌ƒï¼Œهڈ¯èƒ½و— è§£م€‚

\n

2â‰¤nâ‰¤1052\\le n\\le 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤105ï¼Œ1â‰¤diâ‰¤10121\\le d_i\\le 10^{12}1â‰¤diâ€‹â‰¤1012م€‚

\n
\n","content":" ç»™ه®ڑن¸€و£µ nnn ن¸ھç‚¹çڑ„و— و ¹و ‘ï¼Œو¯ڈو‌،è¾¹وœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھوœھçں¥çڑ„و­£و•´و•°è¾¹و‌ƒم€‚ ه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰çڑ„ 1â‰¤i<n1 \\le i < n1â‰¤i<nï¼Œç»™ه‡؛ç‚¹ iii هˆ°ç‚¹ i+1i + 1i+1 çڑ„è·‌ç¦» did_idiâ€‹ï¼Œè¯·è؟کهژںه‡؛ن»»و„ڈن¸€ç»„هگˆو³•çڑ„è¾¹و‌ƒï¼Œهڈ¯èƒ½و— è§£م€‚ 2â‰¤nâ‰¤1052\\le n\\le 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤105ï¼Œ1â‰¤diâ‰¤10121\\le d_i\\le 10^{12}1â‰¤diâ€‹â‰¤1012م€‚ é€گن½چç،®ه®ڑم€‚ ن»¤و ¹ن¸؛ç‚¹ 111ï¼Œè®¾ depudep_{u}depuâ€‹ ن¸؛ uuu هˆ°و ¹çڑ„è·‌ç¦»ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ di=depi+depi+1âˆ’2deplcad_i=dep_{i}+dep_{i+1}-2dep_{lca}diâ€‹=depiâ€‹+depi+1â€‹âˆ’2deplcaâ€‹ï¼Œه¹¶ن¸”وˆ‘ن»¬ه·²çں¥ dep1=0dep_1=0dep1â€‹=0م€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ° 2deplcaâ‰،0(mod2)2dep_{lca}\\equiv 0\\pmod 22deplcaâ€‹â‰،0(mod2)ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هڈ¯ن»¥çں¥éپ“ depi mod 2dep_i\\text{ mod }2depiâ€‹ mod 2ï¼›ç„¶هگژو³¨و„ڈهˆ° 2deplca mod 4=2(deplca mod 2)2dep_{lca}\\text{ mod }4=2(dep_{lca}\\text{ mod }2)2deplcaâ€‹ mod 4=2(deplcaâ€‹ mod 2)ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وژ¥ن¸‹و‌¥ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥çں¥éپ“ depi mod 4dep_i\\text{ mod }4depiâ€‹ mod 4 â€¦â€¦ è؟™هگ¯هڈ‘وˆ‘ن»¬ن»ژه°ڈهˆ°ه¤§و‍ڑن¸¾ kkkï¼Œن¾‌و¬،ç،®ه®ڑ depi mod 2kdep_{i}\\text{ mod } 2^kdepiâ€‹ mod 2kم€‚ ç”±ن؛ژ diâ‰¤1012d_i\\le 10^{12}diâ€‹â‰¤1012ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ depi mod 260=depidep_i\\text{ mod }2^{60}=dep_idepiâ€‹ mod 260=depiâ€‹ï¼Œه†چهپڑن¸€و¬، dfs هچ³هڈ¯çں¥éپ“è¾¹و‌ƒم€‚ و³¨و„ڈè‹¥و±‚ه‡؛çڑ„è¾¹و‌ƒ â‰¤0\\le 0â‰¤0 وˆ– 2depi>2602dep_i>2^{60}2depiâ€‹>260 هˆ™و— è§£م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،V)O(n\\log V)O(nlogV)ï¼Œن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <vector> using namespace std; const int S=100005,BS=25,B=60; int n; vector<pair<int,int>> g[S]; long long a[S]; int dep[S],fat[S][BS]; int b[S]; long long tmp[S],res[S],ans[S]; void dfs(int u,int fa) { dep[u]=dep[fa]+1; fat[u][0]=fa; for(int i=1;i<=BS-3;i++) fat[u][i]=fat[fat[u][i-1]][i-1]; for(auto v:g[u]) if(v.first!=fa) dfs(v.first,u); } inline int getlca(int x,int y) { if(dep[x]<dep[y]) swap(x,y); for(int i=BS-3;i>=0;i--) if(dep[fat[x][i]]>=dep[y]) x=fat[x][i]; if(x==y) return x; for(int i=BS-3;i>=0;i--) if(fat[x][i]!=fat[y][i]) x=fat[x][i],y=fat[y][i]; return fat[x][0]; } void getans(int u,int fa,int faid) { if(faid!=0) ans[faid]=res[u]-res[fa]; for(auto v:g[u]) if(v.first!=fa) getans(v.first,u,v.second); } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); g[x].push_back(make_pair(y,i)),g[y].push_back(make_pair(x,i)); } for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]); dfs(1,0); for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) b[i]=getlca(i,i+1); for(int i=1;i<=B;i++) { long long pre=1ll<<i; for(int j=1;j<=n-1;j++) tmp[j+1]=((a[j]+2*res[b[j]]%pre-tmp[j])%pre+pre)%pre; for(int j=1;j<=n;j++) res[j]=tmp[j]; } for(int j=2;j<=n;j++) if(res[j]==0||2*res[j]>(1ll<<B)) return puts("-1"),0; getans(1,0,0); for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) if(ans[i]<=0) return puts("-1"),0; for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) printf("%lld\\n",ans[i]); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç»“è®؛","slug":"qErN0WkdA","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/qErN0WkdA/"},{"name":"و‍„é€ ","slug":"Kb6MJqy9f","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Kb6MJqy9f/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"و•°ه­¦","slug":"Dkn2lgn3B","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Dkn2lgn3B/"}],"title":"CF1844G Tree Weights هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/cf1844g-tree-weights-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"5 min read","time":243000,"words":721,"minutes":5},"date":"2023-07-17 15:19:55","dateFormat":"2023-07-17"},{"abstract":"

ه¯¹ن؛ژوژ’هˆ— {pi}\\{p_i\\}{piâ€‹}ï¼Œه®ڑن¹‰ن¸€و¬،و“چن½œن¸؛وŒ‰é،؛ه؛ڈو‰§è،Œن»¥ن¸‹و­¥éھ¤ï¼ڑ

\n
    \n
  1. ن»¤ pip_ipiâ€‹ ن¸؛وژ’هˆ—ن¸­وœ€ه¤§çڑ„و»،è¶³ piâ‰ ip_i\\neq ipiâ€‹î€ â€‹=i çڑ„و•°ï¼›
    2. \n

    3. \n
  3. ن؛¤وچ¢ pip_ipiâ€‹ ه’Œ pjp_jpjâ€‹ï¼›
    \nه®ڑن¹‰ f(p)f(p)f(p) ن¸؛ه°† ppp هچ‡ه؛ڈوژ’ه؛ڈو‰€éœ€çڑ„و“چن½œو¬،و•°م€‚
    4. \n
\n

ç»™ه®ڑن¸€ن¸ھوژ’هˆ— pppï¼Œن¼ڑè؟›è،Œ qqq و¬،ن؛¤وچ¢ pxi,pyip_{x_i},p_{y_i}pxiâ€‹â€‹,pyiâ€‹â€‹ çڑ„و“چن½œï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،و“چن½œهگژè¾“ه‡؛ f(p)f(p)f(p)ï¼Œن؛¤وچ¢و“چن½œوک¯و°¸ن¹…çڑ„م€‚

\n

2â‰¤nâ‰¤5أ—1052\\le n\\le 5\\times 10^52â‰¤nâ‰¤5أ—105ï¼Œ1â‰¤qâ‰¤5أ—1041\\le q\\le 5\\times 10^41â‰¤qâ‰¤5أ—104م€‚
