é¦–ه…ˆه®¹وک“هڈ‘çژ°ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬،هˆ è¾¹ن¹‹هگژه¤§ه°ڈè¾ƒه°ڈçڑ„é‚£éƒ¨هˆ†çڑ„ه¤§ه°ڈè‡³ه°‘ه‡ڈهچٹï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ‚ç…§هگ¯هڈ‘ه¼ڈهگˆه¹¶çڑ„و€‌è·¯ï¼Œè€ƒè™‘و¯ڈو¬،و–­è¾¹ن¹‹هگژهœ¨ه¤§ه°ڈè¾ƒه°ڈçڑ„éƒ¨هˆ†ن¸ٹè·‘ن¸€و¬، dfsï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ن¸ٹو¬،و–­è¾¹هˆ°è؟™و¬،و–­è¾¹ن¹‹é—´çڑ„è¯¢é—®çڑ„ç­”و،ˆم€‚ ه…·ن½“çڑ„ï¼ڑ é¦–ه…ˆه¯¹ه›¾ن¸ٹçڑ„و¯ڈن¸ھè؟‍é€ڑه‌—éƒ½è·‘ن¸€éپچ dfsï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ه®ƒن»¬ه†…éƒ¨èٹ‚ç‚¹وŒ‰ç…§و‌ƒه€¼ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈوژ’ه؛ڈن¹‹هگژçڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ—م€‚ه¹¶ن¸”وٹٹو‰€وœ‰هˆ è¾¹و“چن½œه€’è؟‡و‌¥ï¼Œهڈکوˆگهٹ è¾¹و“چن½œï¼Œç”¨ه¹¶وں¥é›†و‰¾هˆ°و‰€وœ‰و”¹هڈکه›¾çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑو€§çڑ„هˆ è¾¹و“چن½œï¼› ه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈن¸€و¬،è¯¢é—®و“چن½œï¼Œç›´وژ¥هڈ–ه¯¹ه؛”è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ه†…و‌ƒه€¼وœ€ه¤§çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹ uuuï¼ˆو‌ƒه€¼ه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸­ç¬¬ن¸€ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼‰ï¼Œوٹٹه®ƒçڑ„و‌ƒه€¼هڈکن¸؛ 000 ن¹‹هگژو”¾هˆ°و‌ƒه€¼ه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„وœ«ه°¾هچ³هڈ¯ï¼› ه¯¹ن؛ژو¯ڈن¸€و¬،هˆ è¾¹و“چن½œï¼Œè‹¥è؟™و¬،و“چن½œن¸چو”¹هڈکه›¾çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑو€§ï¼Œç›´وژ¥هˆ وژ‰ه®ƒهچ³هڈ¯ï¼›هگ¦هˆ™هˆ وژ‰ه®ƒن¹‹هگژهœ¨ه¤§ه°ڈè¾ƒه°ڈçڑ„é‚£ن¸€éƒ¨هˆ†ن¸ٹè·‘ن¸€و¬، dfsï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ه®ƒه†…éƒ¨èٹ‚ç‚¹وژ’ه؛ڈهگژçڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ—ï¼Œو ¹وچ®è؟™ن¸ھه؛ڈهˆ—ه’Œè؟‍é€ڑه‌—هˆ†è£‚ن¹‹ه‰چçڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ—ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥و±‚ه‡؛هڈ¦ن¸€éƒ¨هˆ†çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ—م€‚ ç”¨ set ç»´وٹ¤è؟‍é€ڑه‌—و‌ƒه€¼ه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(logâپ،V)O(\\log V)O(logV) çڑ„ï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ VVV وک¯ه€¼هںںï¼Œهڈˆه› ن¸؛â€œهگ¯هڈ‘ه¼ڈهˆ†è£‚â€‌çڑ„و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ (n+m)logâپ،n(n+m)\\log n(n+m)logn çڑ„ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O((n+m)logâپ،2n+q)O((n+m)\\log^2 n+q)O((n+m)log2n+q)ï¼Œهچ،ن¸€هچ،هڈ¯ن»¥è؟‡م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑï¼ˆهچ،ه¸¸ç”¨çڑ„çپ«è½¦ه¤´çœپç•¥ن؛†ï¼‰ #include <cstdio> #include <vector> #include <set> using namespace std; char buf[1<<23],*p1=buf,*p2=buf,obuf[1<<23],*O=obuf; #define getchar() (p1==p2&&(p2=(p1=buf)+fread(buf,1,1<<21,stdin),p1==p2)?EOF:*p1++) inline int rd() { int x=0,f=1;char ch=getchar(); while(ch<'0'||ch>'9'){if(ch=='-') f=-1;ch=getchar();} while(ch>='0'&&ch<='9') x=x*10+(ch^48),ch=getchar(); return x*f; } void print(int x) { if(x>9) print(x/10); *O++=x%10|48; } const int MS=200005,S=300005,QS=500005; struct edge { int x,y; bool del; // وک¯هگ¦è¢«هˆ é™¤ }ed[S]; struct opt { int tpe,id; // و“چن½œç±»ه‍‹ï¼Œهˆ è¾¹çڑ„ç¼–هڈ·/èٹ‚ç‚¹ç¼–هڈ· bool imp; int mnx; // هˆ è¾¹ن¹‹هگژه±‍ن؛ژه¤§ه°ڈè¾ƒه°ڈçڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—çڑ„ç‚¹ }que[QS]; int n,m,q,qdel; int a[MS]; vector<int> g[MS]; int fa[MS],siz[MS]; set<pair<int,int> > st[MS]; int cnt,uid[MS]; inline int fnd(int x) { return fa[x]==x?x:fa[x]=fnd(fa[x]); } void dfs(int u,int stid) { st[stid].erase(make_pair(-a[u],u)); st[uid[u]].insert(make_pair(-a[u],u)); for(int i:g[u]) { if(ed[i].del) continue; int v=ed[i].x==u?ed[i].y:ed[i].x; if(uid[v]==uid[u]) continue; uid[v]=uid[u]; dfs(v,stid); } } int main() { n=rd(); m=rd(); q=rd(); for(register int i=1;i<=n;++i) a[i]=rd(); for(register int i=1;i<=m;++i) { ed[i].x=rd(); ed[i].y=rd(); g[ed[i].x].push_back(i),g[ed[i].y].push_back(i); } for(register int i=1;i<=q;++i) { que[i].tpe=rd(); que[i].id=rd(); if(que[i].tpe==2) ed[que[i].id].del=true; } for(register int i=1;i<=n;++i) siz[i]=(fa[i]=i)==i; for(register int i=1;i<=m;++i) { if(!ed[i].del) { int rx=fnd(ed[i].x),ry=fnd(ed[i].y); if(rx!=ry) fa[rx]=ry,siz[ry]+=siz[rx]; } } for(register int i=q;i>=1;--i) { if(que[i].tpe==2) { int rx=fnd(ed[que[i].id].x),ry=fnd(ed[que[i].id].y); if(rx!=ry) { que[i].imp=true; if(siz[rx]<siz[ry]) que[i].mnx=ed[que[i].id].x; else que[i].mnx=ed[que[i].id].y; fa[rx]=ry,siz[ry]+=siz[rx]; ed[que[i].id].del=false; } } } for(register int i=1;i<=n;++i) if(fa[i]==i) uid[i]=++cnt; for(register int i=1;i<=n;++i) st[uid[i]=uid[fnd(i)]].insert(make_pair(-a[i],i)); for(register int i=1;i<=q;++i) { if(que[i].tpe==1) { int id=uid[que[i].id]; pair<int,int> fir=*st[id].begin(); print(-fir.first); *O++='\\n'; st[id].erase(fir); a[fir.second]=0; st[id].insert(make_pair(0,fir.second)); } else { ed[que[i].id].del=true; if(que[i].imp) { uid[que[i].mnx]=++cnt; int oth=uid[ed[que[i].id].x==que[i].mnx?ed[que[i].id].y:ed[que[i].id].x]; dfs(que[i].mnx,oth); } } if(O-obuf>(1<<22)) fwrite(obuf,O-obuf,1,stdout),O=obuf; } fwrite(obuf,O-obuf,1,stdout); return 0; } هڈ–و¨،م€‚ 1â‰¤nâ‰¤100,1â‰¤mâ‰¤n,1â‰¤kâ‰¤n,1â‰¤pâ‰¤1091 \\le n \\le 100, 1 \\le m \\le n, 1 \\le k \\le n, 1 \\le p \\le 10^91â‰¤nâ‰¤100,1â‰¤mâ‰¤n,1â‰¤kâ‰¤n,1â‰¤pâ‰¤109م€‚ é¦–ه…ˆه®ڑن¹‰ iâˆ’ه¥½و•°i-\\text{ه¥½و•°}iâˆ’ه¥½و•° ن¸؛و‰€وœ‰هŒ…هگ«è؟™ن¸ھو•°çڑ„هŒ؛é—´ن¸­ï¼Œن¸چهگŒçڑ„وœ€ه¤§ه€¼وپ°ه¥½وœ‰ iii ن¸ھçڑ„و•°ï¼Œé—®é¢که°±هڈکوˆگن؛†و±‚ mâˆ’ه¥½و•°m-\\text{ه¥½و•°}mâˆ’ه¥½و•° وپ°ه¥½وœ‰ kkk ن¸ھçڑ„ nnn çڑ„وژ’هˆ—çڑ„ن¸ھو•°م€‚ è®¾ dpi,j,kdp_{i,j,k}dpi,j,kâ€‹ ن¸؛و»،è¶³وپ°ه¥½وœ‰ kkk ن¸ھ jâˆ’ه¥½و•°j-\\text{ه¥½و•°}jâˆ’ه¥½و•° çڑ„ iii çڑ„وژ’هˆ—ن¸ھو•°ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥é€ڑè؟‡و‍ڑن¸¾وœ€ه¤§ه€¼çڑ„ن½چç½® ppp ه’Œ ppp ه·¦ن¾§ه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„ (jâˆ’1)âˆ’ه¥½و•°(j-1)-\\text{ه¥½و•°}(jâˆ’1)âˆ’ه¥½و•° ن¸ھو•°و‌¥è½¬ç§»ï¼ڑ dpi,j,k=âˆ‘p=2iâˆ’1(iâˆ’1pâˆ’1)âˆ‘lft=0kâˆ’[j=1]dppâˆ’1,jâˆ’1,lftأ—dpiâˆ’p,jâˆ’1,kâˆ’[j=1]âˆ’lftdp_{i,j,k}=\\sum\\limits_{p=2}^{i-1}\\dbinom{i-1}{p-1}\\sum\\limits_{lft=0}^{k-[j=1]}dp_{p-1,j-1,lft}\\times dp_{i-p,j-1,k-[j=1]-lft} dpi,j,kâ€‹=p=2âˆ‘iâˆ’1â€‹(pâˆ’1iâˆ’1â€‹)lft=0âˆ‘kâˆ’[j=1]â€‹dppâˆ’1,jâˆ’1,lftâ€‹أ—dpiâˆ’p,jâˆ’1,kâˆ’[j=1]âˆ’lftâ€‹ و³¨و„ڈè¾¹ç•Œ dp1,1,1=1dp_{1,1,1}=1dp1,1,1â€‹=1 ن¸” p=1p=1p=1 ه’Œ p=ip=ip=i çڑ„وƒ…ه†µè¦پهچ•ç‹¬è½¬ç§»ï¼Œه¹¶ن¸” j>ij>ij>i وˆ–è€… j<1j<1j<1 çڑ„ dpi,j,0=i!dp_{i,j,0}=i!dpi,j,0â€‹=i!م€‚ è½¬ç§»çڑ„و—¶ه€™è¦پو³¨و„ڈهچ،ه¸¸ï¼Œوœ‰ 000 ه°±ن¸چهپڑن¹کو³•م€‚ \n

P5298 [PKUWC2018]Minimax

\n
\n","content":" P5298 [PKUWC2018]Minimax é¦–ه…ˆوœ‰وڑ´هٹ›è½¬ç§»ï¼ڑ Du,i=Ds1,i((Puâˆ‘j<iDs2,j)+((1âˆ’Pu)âˆ‘j>iDs2,j))+Ds2,i((Puâˆ‘j<iDs1,j)+((1âˆ’Pu)âˆ‘j>iDs1,j))D_{u,i}=D_{s1,i}\\left(\\left(P_u\\sum\\limits_{j<i}D_{s2,j}\\right)+\\left((1-P_u)\\sum\\limits_{j>i}D_{s2,j}\\right)\\right)+D_{s2,i}\\left(\\left(P_u\\sum\\limits_{j<i}D_{s1,j}\\right)+\\left((1-P_u)\\sum\\limits_{j>i}D_{s1,j}\\right)\\right) Du,iâ€‹=Ds1,iâ€‹((Puâ€‹j<iâˆ‘â€‹Ds2,jâ€‹)+((1âˆ’Puâ€‹)j>iâˆ‘â€‹Ds2,jâ€‹))+Ds2,iâ€‹((Puâ€‹j<iâˆ‘â€‹Ds1,jâ€‹)+((1âˆ’Puâ€‹)j>iâˆ‘â€‹Ds1,jâ€‹)) ç„¶هگژهڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ç؛؟و®µو ‘هگˆه¹¶و‌¥è½¬ç§»م€‚èٹ‚ç‚¹ uuu çڑ„ç؛؟و®µو ‘çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹ç»´وٹ¤هŒ؛é—´ه†… Du,iD_{u,i}Du,iâ€‹ çڑ„ه’Œï¼Œهگˆه¹¶çڑ„و—¶ه€™ç»´وٹ¤ه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´ه·¦è¾¹çڑ„ه’Œن¸ژه½“ه‰چهŒ؛é—´هڈ³è¾¹çڑ„ه’Œï¼Œو‰“ن¸ٹ lazytag هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ // Problem: P5298 [PKUWC2018]Minimax // Contest: Luogu // URL: https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/P5298 // Memory Limit: 500 MB // Time Limit: 1000 ms // // Powered by CP Editor (https://cpeditor.org) #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int MS=300005,S=5000005; const int p=998244353,inv=796898467; struct node { int sm,mu; int ls,rs; }tr[S]; int n,a[MS]; int m,b[MS]; int ls[MS],rs[MS]; int cnt,rt[MS]; inline void adtg(int u,int val) { tr[u].sm=1ll*tr[u].sm*val%p,tr[u].mu=1ll*tr[u].mu*val%p; } inline void dntg(int u) { adtg(tr[u].ls,tr[u].mu),adtg(tr[u].rs,tr[u].mu),tr[u].mu=1; } inline void upda(int u) { tr[u].sm=(tr[tr[u].ls].sm+tr[tr[u].rs].sm)%p; } void upd(int &u,int l,int r,int pos,int val) { if(u==0) tr[u=++cnt]=(node){0,1,0,0}; if(l==r) { tr[u].sm=val; return; } dntg(u); int mid=l+r>>1; if(pos<=mid) upd(tr[u].ls,l,mid,pos,val); else upd(tr[u].rs,mid+1,r,pos,val); upda(u); } int que(int u,int l,int r,int pos) { if(l==r) return tr[u].sm; dntg(u); int mid=l+r>>1; if(pos<=mid) return que(tr[u].ls,l,mid,pos); else return que(tr[u].rs,mid+1,r,pos); } int meg(int x,int y,int lftx,int rigx,int lfty,int rigy,int u) { if(x==0&&y==0) return 0; if(y==0) { int val=(1ll*a[u]*lftx%p+1ll*(1-a[u]+p)*rigx%p)%p; return adtg(x,val),x; } if(x==0) { int val=(1ll*a[u]*lfty%p+1ll*(1-a[u]+p)*rigy%p)%p; return adtg(y,val),y; } dntg(x),dntg(y); int xlsm=tr[tr[x].ls].sm,xrsm=tr[tr[x].rs].sm; int ylsm=tr[tr[y].ls].sm,yrsm=tr[tr[y].rs].sm; tr[x].ls=meg(tr[x].ls,tr[y].ls,lftx,(rigx+yrsm)%p,lfty,(rigy+xrsm)%p,u); tr[x].rs=meg(tr[x].rs,tr[y].rs,(lftx+ylsm)%p,rigx,(lfty+xlsm)%p,rigy,u); upda(x); return x; } void dfs(int u) { if(ls[u]!=0) dfs(ls[u]); if(rs[u]!=0) dfs(rs[u]); if(ls[u]==0&&rs[u]==0) upd(rt[u],1,m,a[u],1); else if(ls[u]==0||rs[u]==0) rt[u]=rt[ls[u]]+rt[rs[u]]; else rt[u]=meg(rt[ls[u]],rt[rs[u]],0,0,0,0,u); } int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { int fa; scanf("%d",&fa); if(fa!=0) { if(ls[fa]==0) ls[fa]=i; else rs[fa]=i; } } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); if(ls[i]!=0||rs[i]!=0) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*inv%p; else b[++m]=a[i]; } sort(b+1,b+m+1); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) if(ls[i]==0&&rs[i]==0) a[i]=lower_bound(b+1,b+m+1,a[i])-b; dfs(1); int ans=0; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int Di=que(rt[1],1,m,i); ans=(ans+1ll*i*b[i]%p*Di%p*Di%p)%p; } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"ç؛؟و®µو ‘هگˆه¹¶","slug":"V6vz5Da7_","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/V6vz5Da7_/"},{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"ç؛؟و®µو ‘","slug":"Mhc6P6aymU","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Mhc6P6aymU/"}],"title":"P5298 [PKUWC2018]Minimax هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/p5298-pkuwc2018minimax-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"5 min read","time":293000,"words":813,"minutes":5},"date":"2023-03-26 10:57:35","dateFormat":"2023-03-26"},{"abstract":"
\n

ç»™ه®ڑé•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ NNN çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ— AAAï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬ه®ڑن¹‰ن¸€ç§چه°† AAA هˆ’هˆ†ن¸؛è‹¥ه¹²و®µçڑ„و–¹و،ˆçڑ„ن»·ه€¼ن¸؛و¯ڈن¸€و®µçڑ„وœ€ه¤§ه€¼ه‡ڈهژ»وœ€ه°ڈه€¼çڑ„ه·®çڑ„ن¹کç§¯ï¼Œن½ éœ€è¦پو±‚ه‡؛و‰€وœ‰هˆ’هˆ†و–¹و،ˆçڑ„ن»·ه€¼çڑ„و€»ه’Œï¼Œç­”و،ˆه¯¹ 998244353998244353998244353 هڈ–و¨،م€‚

\n
    \n
  • 1â‰¤Nâ‰¤3أ—1051 \\leq N \\leq 3 \\times 10^51â‰¤Nâ‰¤3أ—105
    • \n
  • 1â‰¤Aiâ‰¤1091 \\leq A_i \\leq 10^91â‰¤Aiâ€‹â‰¤109

for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); } sm[0]=1; int sm0=0,sm1=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { while(mxq[0]>0&&a[mxq[mxq[0]]]<=a[i]) sm1=(sm1-1ll*a[mxq[mxq[0]]]%p*(sm[mxq[mxq[0]]-1]-(mxq[0]>1?sm[mxq[mxq[0]-1]-1]:0)+p)%p+p)%p,mxq[0]--; (nm)=(nâˆ’1m)+(nâˆ’1mâˆ’1)\\binom{n}{m}=\\binom{n-1}{m}+\\binom{n-1}{m-1} (mnâ€‹)=(mnâˆ’1â€‹)+(mâˆ’1nâˆ’1â€‹) è€ƒè™‘وœ€هگژن¸€ن¸ھه…ƒç´ وœ‰و²،وœ‰é€‰م€‚ âˆ‘i=0n(ni)=2n\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n\\binom{n}{i}=2^n i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹(inâ€‹)=2n و‍ڑن¸¾هœ¨ nnn ن¸ھه…ƒç´ çڑ„é›†هگˆن¸­é€‰ه¤ڑه°‘ن¸ھه…ƒç´ ï¼Œه†چو‍ڑن¸¾é€‰ه‡؛çڑ„وک¯é‚£ن؛›ه…ƒç´ ï¼Œç­‰ن؛ژو‍ڑن¸¾و¯ڈن¸ھه…ƒç´ وœ‰و²،وœ‰é€‰م€‚ âˆ‘i=0n(âˆ’1)i(ni)=0\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}=0 i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹(âˆ’1)i(inâ€‹)=0 ن؛Œé،¹ه¼ڈه®ڑçگ†ï¼ڑ (âˆ’1+1)n=âˆ‘i=0n(âˆ’1)i1i(ni)=âˆ‘i=0n(âˆ’1)i(ni)=0(-1+1)^n=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i1^i\\binom{n}{i}=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n(-1)^i\\binom{n}{i}=0(âˆ’1+1)n=i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹(âˆ’1)i1i(inâ€‹)=i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹(âˆ’1)i(inâ€‹)=0 âˆ‘i=nm(in)=(m+1n+1)\\sum\\limits_{i=n}^m\\binom{i}{n}=\\binom{m+1}{n+1} i=nâˆ‘mâ€‹(niâ€‹)=(n+1m+1â€‹) è€ƒè™‘و‌¨è¾‰ن¸‰è§’ï¼ڑ âˆ‘i=0m(n+ii)=(m+1n+m)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^m\\binom{n+i}{i}=\\binom{m+1}{n+m} i=0âˆ‘mâ€‹(in+iâ€‹)=(n+mm+1â€‹) ن¾‌و—§وک¯è€ƒè™‘و‌¨è¾‰ن¸‰è§’ï¼ڑ (nm)=nâˆ’m+1m(nmâˆ’1)\\binom{n}{m}=\\frac{n-m+1}{m}\\binom{n}{m-1} (mnâ€‹)=mnâˆ’m+1â€‹(mâˆ’1nâ€‹) (nm)=k(nmâˆ’1)\\binom{n}{m}=k\\binom{n}{m-1}(mnâ€‹)=k(mâˆ’1nâ€‹) k=(nm)(nmâˆ’1)=n!m!(nâˆ’m)!n!(mâˆ’1)!(nâˆ’m+1)!=(mâˆ’1)!(nâˆ’m+1)!m!(nâˆ’m)!=nâˆ’m+1mk=\\frac{\\binom{n}{m}}{\\binom{n}{m-1}}=\\frac{\\frac{n!}{m!(n-m)!}}{\\frac{n!}{(m-1)!(n-m+1)!}}=\\frac{(m-1)!(n-m+1)!}{m!(n-m)!}=\\frac{n-m+1}{m}k=(mâˆ’1nâ€‹)(mnâ€‹)â€‹=(mâˆ’1)!(nâˆ’m+1)!n!â€‹m!(nâˆ’m)!n!â€‹â€‹=m!(nâˆ’m)!(mâˆ’1)!(nâˆ’m+1)!â€‹=mnâˆ’m+1â€‹ âˆ‘i=0k(ni)(mkâˆ’i)=(n+mk)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^k\\binom{n}{i}\\binom{m}{k-i}=\\binom{n+m}{k} i=0âˆ‘kâ€‹(inâ€‹)(kâˆ’imâ€‹)=(kn+mâ€‹) è‘—هگچçڑ„èŒƒه¾·è’™ه¾·هچ·ç§¯ï¼Œç»„هگˆو„ڈن¹‰وک¯ن»ژن¸¤ن¸ھو²،وœ‰é‡چه¤چه…ƒç´ çڑ„é›†هگˆن¸­é€‰و‹© kkk ن¸ھه…ƒç´ هڈ¯ن»¥é€ڑè؟‡و‍ڑن¸¾و¯ڈن¸ھé›†هگˆن¸­é€‰ن؛†ه‡ ن¸ھو‌¥è®،ç®—م€‚ xy=(x+y2)âˆ’(x2)âˆ’(y2)xy=\\binom{x+y}{2}-\\binom{x}{2}-\\binom{y}{2} xy=(2x+yâ€‹)âˆ’(2xâ€‹)âˆ’(2yâ€‹) ن»ژ xxx ن¸ھهگ„ن¸چç›¸هگŒçڑ„ه°ڈçگƒن¸­é€‰ه‡؛ن¸€ن¸ھï¼Œه†چن»ژ yyy \n","content":" P1758 [NOI2009] ç®،éپ“هڈ–çڈ  و–¹و،ˆو•°çڑ„ه¹³و–¹هڈ¯ن»¥çœ‹هپڑوک¯ن¸¤ن¸ھن؛؛هˆ†هˆ«و“چن½œï¼Œو“چن½œهˆ°هگŒن¸€ç§چç»“و‍œçڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°م€‚ ç›´وژ¥ dp ن¸€ن¸‹هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int S=505,p=1024523; int n,m; int a[S],b[S]; int dp[2][S][S]; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf(" %c",&a[i]),a[i]-='A'; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) scanf(" %c",&b[i]),b[i]-='A'; for(int i=1;i<=n/2;i++) swap(a[i],a[n-i+1]); for(int i=1;i<=m/2;i++) swap(b[i],b[m-i+1]); dp[0][0][0]=1; for(int i=0;i<=n+m;i++) { int u=i&1,v=i&1^1; for(int j=0;j<=i-1&&j<=n;j++) for(int k=0;k<=i-1&&k<=n;k++) dp[v][j][k]=0; for(int j=0;j<=i&&j<=n;j++) { for(int k=0;k<=i&&k<=n;k++) { if(dp[u][j][k]==0) continue; int jb=i-j,kb=i-k; if(j<n&&k<n&&a[j+1]==a[k+1]) add(dp[v][j+1][k+1],dp[u][j][k]); if(jb<m&&k<n&&b[jb+1]==a[k+1]) add(dp[v][j][k+1],dp[u][j][k]); if(j<n&&kb<m&&a[j+1]==b[kb+1]) add(dp[v][j+1][k],dp[u][j][k]); if(jb<m&&kb<m&&b[jb+1]==b[kb+1]) add(dp[v][j][k],dp[u][j][k]); } } } printf("%d\\n",dp[n+m&1][n][n]); return 0; } ","tags":[{"name":"DP","slug":"9IQfpBtLQ","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9IQfpBtLQ/"},{"name":"ç»„هگˆè®،و•°","slug":"vqtoUvqF8","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/vqtoUvqF8/"},{"name":"هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","slug":"9Q1f-EwaH","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/9Q1f-EwaH/"},{"name":"و•°ه­¦","slug":"Dkn2lgn3B","used":true,"link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/tag/Dkn2lgn3B/"}],"title":"P1758 [NOI2009] ç®،éپ“هڈ–çڈ  هپڑé¢کè®°ه½•","feature":"","link":"https://Rebxe.github.io/post/p1758-noi2009-guan-dao-qu-zhu-zuo-ti-ji-lu/","stats":{"text":"3 min read","time":138000,"words":391,"minutes":3},"date":"2023-03-25 22:12:57","dateFormat":"2023-03-25"},{"abstract":"

وœ€ه¤ڑهڈھن¼ڑو“چن½œن¸€و¬،م€‚و‰€ن»¥وˆ‘ن»¬ه…³ه؟ƒçڑ„هڈھوک¯ A[biâˆ’1+1,bi]A_{[b_{i-1}+1,b_i]}A[biâˆ’1â€‹+1,biâ€‹]â€‹ وک¯هگ¦ç­‰ن؛ژ B[biâˆ’1+1,bi]B_{[b_{i-1}+1,b_i]}B[biâˆ’1â€‹+1,biâ€‹]â€‹م€‚ه› ن¸؛è‹¥ن¸چç­‰هˆ™ن؛¤وچ¢هگژç»“و‍œن¸چن¸€و ·ï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™ç»“و‍œن¸€و ·م€‚ن¸؛ن؛†è،¨è؟°و–¹ن¾؟ï¼Œن¸چه¦¨è®°ه®ƒن»¬ن¸؛ A[i]A_{[i]}A[i]â€‹ ه’Œ B[i]B_{[i]}B[i]â€‹م€‚ ن¸‹é‌¢çڑ„éƒ¨هˆ†ç‍ںن؛†ن¸€çœ¼é¢کè§£و‰چن¼ڑم€‚ è€ƒè™‘و‍ڑن¸¾و¯ڈن¸€ن¸ھ iiiï¼ڑ A[i]=B[i]A_{[i]}=B_{[i]}A[i]â€‹=B[i]â€‹ çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼ڑه…±وœ‰ Vâˆ£A[i]âˆ£V^{|A_{[i]}|}Vâˆ£A[i]â€‹âˆ£ ç§چو–¹و،ˆï¼› A[i]î€ =B[i]A_{[i]}\\not=B_{[i]}A[i]â€‹î€ â€‹=B[i]â€‹ çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼ڑه…±وœ‰ Vâˆ£A[i]âˆ£(Vâˆ£B[i]âˆ£âˆ’1)2\\dfrac{V^{|A_{[i]}|}(V^{|B_{[i]}|}-1)}{2}2Vâˆ£A[i]â€‹âˆ£(Vâˆ£B[i]â€‹âˆ£âˆ’1)â€‹ ç§چو–¹و،ˆï¼Œé™¤ن»¥ 222 وک¯ه› ن¸؛ن؛¤وچ¢هگژçڑ„ن¹ںو‍ڑن¸¾è؟‡م€‚ è؟™ن¸¤ç§چوƒ…ه†µçڑ„و–¹و،ˆو•°هٹ èµ·و‌¥ï¼Œه†چن¹کèµ·و‌¥ï¼Œوœ€هگژو°¸è؟œن¸چن¼ڑè¢«و“چن½œهˆ°çڑ„هچ•ç‹¬ه¤„çگ†هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ éƒ¨هˆ†ن»£ç پï¼ڑ int ans=1; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { scanf("%d",&b[i]); int eq=qpow(v,b[i]-b[i-1]); int neq=1ll*qpow(v,b[i]-b[i-1])*(qpow(v,b[i]-b[i-1])-1)%p*qpow(2,p-2)%p; ans=1ll*ans*(eq+neq)%p; } ans=1ll*ans*qpow(v,n-b[m]-b[m])%p; \n

وœ‰ nnn ن¸ھç®±ه­گه’Œ mmm ن¸ھه°ڈçگƒï¼Œهˆ‌ه§‹و—¶ç¬¬ iii ن¸ھç®±ه­گوœ‰ aia_iaiâ€‹ ن¸ھه°ڈçگƒم€‚و¯ڈو¬،و“چن½œهڈ¯ن»¥ه°†ن¸€ن¸ھه°ڈçگƒç§»هˆ°ç›¸é‚»çڑ„ç®±ه­گé‡Œم€‚و±‚è¦پن½؟ه¾—وœ€ç»ˆو•°ç»„ aiâ‰¥ai+1a_i\\ge a_{i+1}aiâ€‹â‰¥ai+1â€‹ çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈو“چن½œو¬،و•°م€‚

\n

1â‰¤n,mâ‰¤2501\\le n,m\\le 2501â‰¤n,mâ‰¤250م€‚

aiâ‰¥ai+1a_i\\ge a_{i+1}aiâ€‹â‰¥ai+1â€‹ çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈو“چن½œو¬،و•°م€‚ 1â‰¤n,mâ‰¤2501\\le n,m\\le 2501â‰¤n,mâ‰¤250م€‚ وٹٹ aaa هڈچè؟‡و‌¥ï¼Œé—®é¢کهڈکوˆگن؛†è®© aiâ‰¥aiâˆ’1a_i\\ge a_{i-1}aiâ€‹â‰¥aiâˆ’1â€‹ çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈو“چن½œو¬،و•°م€‚ è€ƒè™‘è®¾ dpi,j,kdp_{i,j,k}dpi,j,kâ€‹ ن¸؛ه‰چ iâˆ’1i-1iâˆ’1 ن¸ھو»،è¶³و‌،ن»¶ï¼Œai=ja_i=jaiâ€‹=j ن¸” aiâˆ’aiâˆ’1=ka_i-a_{i-1}=kaiâ€‹âˆ’aiâˆ’1â€‹=k çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈو“چن½œو¬،و•°ï¼Œه¹¶ن¸” iii هگژé‌¢çڑ„ن½چç½®و²،وœ‰و”¹هٹ¨م€‚è؟™ن¹ˆè®¾ç½®çٹ¶و€پوک¯ه› ن¸؛ aia_iaiâ€‹ ن¸چن¼ڑه½±ه“چهˆ° aiâˆ’2a_{i-2}aiâˆ’2â€‹ï¼Œè€Œ aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ ه¯¹ aiâˆ’2a_{i-2}aiâˆ’2â€‹ çڑ„ه½±ه“چه·²ç»ڈç®—è؟‡ن؛†ï¼Œه®‍çژ°ن؛†و— هگژو•ˆو€§م€‚ وک¾ç„¶وœ‰ dp1,a1,a1=0dp_{1,a_1,a_1}=0dp1,a1â€‹,a1â€‹â€‹=0م€‚ è€ƒè™‘è½¬ç§»ï¼ŒوŒ‰ jjj ه’Œ aia_iaiâ€‹ çڑ„ه¤§ه°ڈه…³ç³»هˆ†ç±»ï¼ڑ j>aij>a_ij>aiâ€‹ï¼ڑه¤ڑه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„هڈھهڈ¯èƒ½وک¯ aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ ç»™çڑ„ï¼Œو­¤و—¶ aia_iaiâ€‹ è‚¯ه®ڑو²،ç»™ aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ dpi,j,k=jâˆ’ai+minâپ،l=jâˆ’aimdpiâˆ’1,jâˆ’k+jâˆ’ai,ldp_{i,j,k}=j-a_i+\\min\\limits_{l=j-a_i}^{m}dp_{i-1,j-k+j-a_i,l}dpi,j,kâ€‹=jâˆ’aiâ€‹+l=jâˆ’aiâ€‹minmâ€‹dpiâˆ’1,jâˆ’k+jâˆ’aiâ€‹,lâ€‹ï¼› j<aij<a_ij<aiâ€‹ï¼ڑه°‘وژ‰çڑ„هڈھهڈ¯èƒ½وک¯ç»™ن؛† aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ï¼Œو­¤و—¶ aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ è‚¯ه®ڑو²،ç»™ aia_iaiâ€‹م€‚ه¹¶ن¸”و³¨و„ڈهˆ°ه› ن¸؛ç»™ن؛† aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ ن¸€ن؛›ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ aiâˆ’1a_{i-1}aiâˆ’1â€‹ هœ¨و²،ç»™ن¹‹ه‰چهڈ¯ن»¥و¯” aiâˆ’2a_{i-2}aiâˆ’2â€‹ ه°ڈï¼Œن¹ںه°±وک¯è¯´ dpi,j,k=aiâˆ’j+minâپ،l=jâˆ’aimâˆ’ai+jdpiâˆ’1,jâˆ’kâˆ’ai+j,ldp_{i,j,k}=a_i-j+\\min\\limits_{l=j-a_i}^{m-a_i+j} dp_{i-1,j-k-a_i+j,l}dpi,j,kâ€‹=aiâ€‹âˆ’j+l=jâˆ’aiâ€‹minmâˆ’aiâ€‹+jâ€‹dpiâˆ’1,jâˆ’kâˆ’aiâ€‹+j,lâ€‹ï¼› j=aij=a_ij=aiâ€‹ï¼ڑè°پن¹ںو²،ç»™è°پï¼Œdpi,j,k=minâپ،l=0mdpiâˆ’1,jâˆ’k,ldp_{i,j,k}=\\min\\limits_{l=0}^{m}dp_{i-1,j-k,l}dpi,j,kâ€‹=l=0minmâ€‹dpiâˆ’1,jâˆ’k,lâ€‹م€‚ وœ€هگژç­”و،ˆهچ³ن¸؛ minâپ،i=0mminâپ،j=0idpn,i,j\\min\\limits_{i=0}^m\\min\\limits_{j=0}^idp_{n,i,j}i=0minmâ€‹j=0miniâ€‹dpn,i,jâ€‹م€‚ و³¨و„ڈهˆ°è½¬ç§»ن¸­çڑ„ minâپ،\\minmin هڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨هگژç¼€ minâپ،\\minmin و‌¥ن¼کهŒ–هˆ° O(1)O(1)O(1)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥هœ¨ O(nm2)O(nm^2)O(nm2) çڑ„و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه†…è§£ه†³و­¤é¢کم€‚ ه®Œو•´ن»£ç پï¼ڑ // Problem: CF1675G Sorting Pancakes // Contest: Luogu // URL: https://www.luogu.com.cn/problem/CF1675G // Memory Limit: 250 MB // Time Limit: 2000 ms // // Powered by CP Editor (https://cpeditor.org) #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> using namespace std; const long long MS=255; const int mov=252,mov2=502; int n,m,a[MS]; int dp[2][MS*3][MS*3],mn[2][MS*3][MS*3]; int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); } for(int i=1;i<=n/2;i++) { swap(a[i],a[n-i+1]); } memset(dp,127,sizeof(dp)); memset(mn,127,sizeof(mn)); dp[1][a[1]+mov][a[1]+mov2]=0; for(int i=m;i>=-m*2;i--) { int id1=a[1]+mov; int id2=i+mov2; mn[1][id1][id2]=min(mn[1][id1][id2+1],dp[1][id1][id2]); } for(int i=2;i<=n;i++) { int u=i&1; int v=u^1; memset(dp[u],127,sizeof(dp[u])); memset(mn[u],127,sizeof(mn[u])); for(int j=-m;j<=m;j++) { int idj=j+mov; for(int k=j-m;k<=j;k++) { int idk=k+mov2; if(j>a[i]) { dp[u][idj][idk]=j-a[i]+mn[v][j-k+j-a[i]+mov][j-a[i]+mov2]; } else if(j<a[i]) { dp[u][idj][idk]=a[i]-j+mn[v][j-k+j-a[i]+mov][j-a[i]+mov2]; } else { dp[u][idj][idk]=mn[v][j-k+mov][mov2]; } } for(int k=m;k>=-m*2;k--) { int idk=k+mov2; mn[u][idj][idk]=min(mn[u][idj][idk+1],dp[u][idj][idk]); } } } int ans=1e8; for(int i=0;i<=m;i++) { ans=min(ans,mn[n&1][i+mov][mov2]); } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } read","time":306000,"words":934,"minutes":6},"date":"2023-03-25 22:04:18","dateFormat":"2023-03-25"},{"abstract":"","content":"éœ€è¦پو±‚ n,mâ‰¤limn,m\\le limn,mâ‰¤lim çڑ„ن¸€ن؛› CnmC_n^mCnmâ€‹ و¨، ppp çڑ„ç»“و‍œï¼Œن½†وک¯é€’وژ¨é¢„ه¤„çگ†ç»„هگˆو•°و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦و— و³•وژ¥هڈ—و—¶ï¼Œè¯¥و€ژن¹ˆهٹ‍ه‘¢ï¼ں 0x0 و™®é€ڑو–¹و³• وœ€هں؛ç،€çڑ„و–¹و³•وک¯é¢„ه¤„çگ†ه‡؛éک¶ن¹که’Œéک¶ن¹کçڑ„é€†ه…ƒï¼Œç›´وژ¥ه¥—ه…¬ه¼ڈè®،ç®—ï¼ڑ inline void init() { fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=lim;i++) { fra[i]=1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p; } inv[lim]=qpow(fra[lim],p-2); for(int i=lim;i>=1;i--) { inv[i-1]=1ll*inv[i]*i%p; } } inline int C(int n,int m) { return n<m?0:1ll*fra[n]*fra[n-m]%p*fra[m]%p; } è؟™و ·هپڑçڑ„è¯‌هچ•و¬،و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(1)O(1)O(1) çڑ„ï¼Œé¢„ه¤„çگ†و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦هˆ™وک¯ O(lim)O(lim)O(lim)م€‚ 1x0 ç‰¹و®ٹو‰‹و®µ و™®é€ڑو–¹و³•ه·²ç»ڈèƒ½و»،è¶³ه¤§ه¤ڑو•°وƒ…ه†µï¼Œن½†وک¯وœ‰ن¸¤ç§چç‰¹و®ٹوƒ…ه†µé™¤ه¤–م€‚ 1x1 limâ‰¥plim\\ge plimâ‰¥pï¼Œن½† ppp وک¯è´¨و•°çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼ˆLucasï¼‰ ه½“ limâ‰¥plim\\ge plimâ‰¥p و—¶ï¼Œو‰€وœ‰ iâ‰¥pi\\ge piâ‰¥p çڑ„ i!i!i! éƒ½ن¸چن¸ژ ppp ن؛’è´¨ï¼Œو²،وœ‰و¨، ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„é€†ه…ƒï¼Œو™®é€ڑو–¹و³•ه°±è،Œن¸چé€ڑن؛†م€‚ è؟™و—¶هڈ¯ن»¥ه€ںهٹ© Lucas ه®ڑçگ†ï¼ڑ Cnmâ‰،Cnmodâپ،pmmodâپ،pâ‹…CâŒٹnpâŒ‹âŒٹmpâŒ‹(modp)C_n^m\\equiv C_{n\\operatorname{mod}p}^{m\\operatorname{mod} p}\\cdot C_{\\lfloor\\frac{n}{p}\\rfloor}^{\\lfloor\\frac{m}{p}\\rfloor}\\pmod p Cnmâ€‹â‰،Cnmodpmmodpâ€‹â‹…CâŒٹpnâ€‹âŒ‹âŒٹpmâ€‹âŒ‹â€‹(modp) و‌¥ه®‍çژ°é€’ه½’و±‚è§£ï¼ڑ inline void init() { int lim2=min(lim,p-1); fra[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=lim2;i++) { fra[i]=1ll*fra[i-1]*i%p; } inv[lim2]=qpow(fra[lim2],p-2); for(int i=lim2;i>=1;i--) { inv[i-1]=1ll*inv[i]*i%p; } } inline int C(int n,int m) { return n<m?0:1ll*fra[n]*inv[m]%p*inv[n-m]%p; } int lucas(int n,int m) { return m==0?1:1ll*C(n%p,m%p)*lucas(n/p,m/p)%p; } è؟™و ·هپڑçڑ„è¯‌هچ•و¬،و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(logâپ،pm)O(\\log_p m)O(logpâ€‹m) çڑ„ï¼Œé¢„ه¤„çگ†و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦هˆ™وک¯ O(minâپ،(lim,p))O(\\min(lim,p))O(min(lim,p))م€‚ ه®ڑçگ†è¯پوکژï¼ڑ م€گه¼•çگ† 1م€‘ ه¯¹ن؛ژن»»و„ڈن¸€ن¸ھو»،è¶³ 1â‰¤x<p1\\le x<p1â‰¤x<p çڑ„و­£و•´و•° xxxï¼Œه‌‡وœ‰ Cpxâ‰،0(modp)C_p^x\\equiv0\\pmod pCpxâ€‹â‰،0(modp)ï¼Œè¯پوکژه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ Cpxâ‰،p!x!(pâˆ’x)!(modp)â‰،pâ‹…(pâˆ’1)!x!(pâˆ’x)!(modp)â‰،0(modp)\\begin{aligned}C_p^x&\\equiv\\dfrac{p!}{x!(p-x)!}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv p\\cdot\\dfrac{(p-1)!}{x!(p-x)!}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv 0\\pmod p\\end{aligned} Cpxâ€‹â€‹â‰،x!(pâˆ’x)!p!â€‹(modp)â‰،pâ‹…x!(pâˆ’x)!(pâˆ’1)!â€‹(modp)â‰،0(modp)â€‹ م€گه¼•çگ† 2م€‘ (a+b)pâ‰،ap+bp(modp)(a+b)^p\\equiv a^p+b^p\\pmod p(a+b)pâ‰،ap+bp(modp)ï¼Œè¯پوکژه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ و ¹وچ®ن؛Œé،¹ه¼ڈه®ڑçگ†ï¼ڑ (a+b)pâ‰،âˆ‘i=0pCpiâ‹…aiâ‹…bpâˆ’i(modp)â‰،ap+bp+âˆ‘i=1pâˆ’1Cpiâ‹…aiâ‹…bpâˆ’i(modp)â‰،ap+bp(modp)ï¼ˆç”±ه¼•çگ† 1 ه¾—ï¼‰\\begin{aligned}(a+b)^p&\\equiv\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^pC_p^i\\cdot a^i\\cdot b^{p-i}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv a^p+b^p+\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{p-1}C_p^i\\cdot a^i\\cdot b^{p-i}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv a^p+b^p\\pmod p\\text{ï¼ˆç”±ه¼•çگ† 1 ه¾—ï¼‰}\\end{aligned} (a+b)pâ€‹â‰،i=0âˆ‘pâ€‹Cpiâ€‹â‹…aiâ‹…bpâˆ’i(modp)â‰،ap+bp+i=1âˆ‘pâˆ’1â€‹Cpiâ€‹â‹…aiâ‹…bpâˆ’i(modp)â‰،ap+bp(modp)ï¼ˆç”±ه¼•çگ† 1 ه¾—ï¼‰â€‹ م€گه®ڑçگ† 1ï¼ˆLucas ه®ڑçگ†ï¼‰م€‘ Cnmâ‰،Cnmodâپ،pmmodâپ،pâ‹…CâŒٹnpâŒ‹âŒٹmpâŒ‹(modp)C_n^m\\equiv C_{n\\operatorname{mod}p}^{m\\operatorname{mod} p}\\cdot C_{\\lfloor\\frac{n}{p}\\rfloor}^{\\lfloor\\frac{m}{p}\\rfloor}\\pmod pCnmâ€‹â‰،Cnmodpmmodpâ€‹â‹…CâŒٹpnâ€‹âŒ‹âŒٹpmâ€‹âŒ‹â€‹(modp)ï¼Œè¯پوکژه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ è®¾ xxx ن¸؛ن¸€ن¸ھو»،è¶³ 1â‰¤x<p1\\le x<p1â‰¤x<p çڑ„و­£و•´و•°ï¼Œç”±ن؛Œé،¹ه¼ڈه®ڑçگ†ه¾—ï¼ڑ(1+x)nâ‰،âˆ‘i=0nCnixi(1+x)^n\\equiv \\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n C_n^ix^i(1+x)nâ‰،i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹Cniâ€‹xiم€‚ ن»¤ pn=âŒٹnpâŒ‹,pm=âŒٹmpâŒ‹,rn=nmodâپ،p,rm=mmodâپ،pp_n=\\lfloor\\frac{n}{p}\\rfloor,p_m=\\lfloor\\frac{m}{p}\\rfloor,r_n=n\\operatorname{mod}p,r_m=m\\operatorname{mod} ppnâ€‹=âŒٹpnâ€‹âŒ‹,pmâ€‹=âŒٹpmâ€‹âŒ‹,rnâ€‹=nmodp,rmâ€‹=mmodpï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ (1+x)nâ‰،(1+x)pâ‹…pn+rn(modp)â‰،[(1+x)p]pnâ‹…(1+x)rn(modp)â‰،(1+xp)pnâ‹…(1+x)rn(modp)â‰،âˆ‘i=0pnâˆ‘j=0rnCpniâ‹…Crnjâ‹…xip+j(modp)ï¼ˆو ¹وچ®ن؛Œé،¹ه¼ڈه®ڑçگ†ï¼‰â‰،âˆ‘i=0nCpnâŒٹipâŒ‹â‹…Crnimodâپ،pâ‹…xi(modp)\\begin{aligned}(1+x)^n&\\equiv (1+x)^{p\\cdot p_n+r_n}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv [(1+x)^p]^{p_n}\\cdot(1+x)^{r_n}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv (1+x^p)^{p_n}\\cdot (1+x)^{r_n}\\pmod p\\\\&\\equiv \\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{p_n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{r_n}C_{p_n}^i\\cdot C_{r_n}^j\\cdot x^{ip+j}\\pmod p\\text{ï¼ˆو ¹وچ®ن؛Œé،¹ه¼ڈه®ڑçگ†ï¼‰}\\\\&\\equiv\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^nC_{p_n}^{\\lfloor\\frac{i}{p}\\rfloor}\\cdot C_{r_n}^{i\\operatorname{mod} p}\\cdot x^i\\pmod p\\end{aligned} (1+x)nâ€‹â‰،(1+x)pâ‹…pnâ€‹+rnâ€‹(modp)â‰،[(1+x)p]pnâ€‹â‹…(1+x)rnâ€‹(modp)â‰،(1+xp)pnâ€‹â‹…(1+x)rnâ€‹(modp)â‰،i=0âˆ‘pnâ€‹â€‹j=0âˆ‘rnâ€‹â€‹Cpnâ€‹iâ€‹â‹…Crnâ€‹jâ€‹â‹…xip+j(modp)ï¼ˆو ¹وچ®ن؛Œé،¹ه¼ڈه®ڑçگ†ï¼‰â‰،i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹Cpnâ€‹âŒٹpiâ€‹âŒ‹â€‹â‹…Crnâ€‹imodpâ€‹â‹…xi(modp)â€‹ و‰€ن»¥ï¼ڑ âˆ‘i=0nCnixiâ‰،âˆ‘i=0nCpnâŒٹipâŒ‹â‹…Crnimodâپ،pâ‹…xi(modp)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^n C_n^ix^i\\equiv\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^nC_{p_n}^{\\lfloor\\frac{i}{p}\\rfloor}\\cdot C_{r_n}^{i\\operatorname{mod} p}\\cdot x^i\\pmod p i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹Cniâ€‹xiâ‰،i=0âˆ‘nâ€‹Cpnâ€‹âŒٹpiâ€‹âŒ‹â€‹â‹…Crnâ€‹imodpâ€‹â‹…xi(modp) Cnmâ‰،Cpnpmâ‹…Crnrm(modp)C_n^m\\equiv C_{p_n}^{p_m}\\cdot C_{r_n}^{r_m}\\pmod p Cnmâ€‹â‰،Cpnâ€‹pmâ€‹â€‹â‹…Crnâ€‹rmâ€‹â€‹(modp) è¯پو¯•م€‚ ç»ƒن¹ ï¼ڑP3773 [CTSC2017]هگ‰ه¤«ç‰¹ 1x2 ppp ن¸چوک¯è´¨و•°çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼ˆexLucasï¼‰ وœھه®Œه¾…ç»­م€‚ R(a_i)P(x)=âˆڈR(aiâ€‹)م€‚ è€ƒè™‘و‍پé•؟ن¸چه¥½ç®—ï¼Œن¸چه¦¨ç®—é’¦ه®ڑï¼Œهچ³و¯ڈو¬،é’¦ه®ڑه¾€هگژوژ¥ن¸€و®µن¸ٹهچ‡و®µم€‚ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°è؟™و ·وک¯ه¥½è½¬ç§»çڑ„ï¼Œوœ‰ (2nn)âˆ’(2nnâˆ’1)=(2n)!n!2âˆ’(2n)!(nâˆ’1)!(n+1)!=(2n)!(n+1)âˆ’n(2n)!n!2(n+1)=(2nn)n+1\\binom{2n}{n}-\\binom{2n}{n-1}=\\frac{(2n)!}{n!^2}-\\frac{(2n)!}{(n-1)!(n+1)!}=\\frac{(2n)!(n+1)-n(2n)!}{n!^2(n+1)}=\\frac{\\binom{2n}{n}}{n+1}(n2nâ€‹)âˆ’(nâˆ’12nâ€‹)=n!2(2n)!â€‹âˆ’(nâˆ’1)!(n+1)!(2n)!â€‹=n!2(n+1)(2n)!(n+1)âˆ’n(2n)!â€‹=n+1(n2nâ€‹)â€‹م€‚ sum=0sum=0sum=0ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬ه‰²و–­ن»»و„ڈن¸€و‌،è¾¹éƒ½ن¸€ه®ڑهگˆو³•م€‚ه› ن¸؛ه‰²ه‡؛و‌¥çڑ„ن¸¤éƒ¨هˆ†هڈھوœ‰ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œç›¸هگŒه®ƒن»¬ه¼‚وˆ–èµ·و‌¥çڑ„ç»“و‍œ sumsumsum و‰چن¸؛ 000م€‚ è‹¥ sum=ksum=ksum=kï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه‰²و–­ن¸¤و‌،è¾¹ï¼Œهˆ†ه‰²ه‡؛ن¸‰ن¸ھه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œن¸؛ kkk çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—وک¾ç„¶وک¯وœ€ن¼کçڑ„م€‚و‰€ن»¥è€ƒè™‘و‰¾هˆ°ن¸¤ن¸ھه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œéƒ½ن¸؛ kkk çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—ï¼Œه‰©ن¸‹é‚£ن¸€ه‌—ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œه°±è‡ھç„¶ن¸؛ kkkم€‚ه› ن¸؛è‚¯ه®ڑوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھو»،è¶³و‌،ن»¶çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—وک¯ن¸€و£µه­گو ‘ï¼Œه‡ڈوژ‰ه®ƒçڑ„è´،çŒ®هگژهڈˆن¼ڑوœ‰ن¸€ن¸ھو»،è¶³و‌،ن»¶çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—وک¯ن¸€و£µه­گو ‘ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è·‘ن¸€و¬، dfsdfsdfsï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛و¯ڈن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ه­گو ‘هژ»وژ‰ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œن¸؛çڑ„ kkk ه­گو ‘هگژçڑ„ه¼‚وˆ–ه’Œ dpu=xorâپ،v وک¯ u çڑ„ه„؟ه­گ[dpvî€ =k]dpvdp_u=\\operatorname{xor}_{v\\text{ وک¯ }u\\text{ çڑ„ه„؟ه­گ}}[dp_v\\not=k]dp_vdpuâ€‹=xorv وک¯ u çڑ„ه„؟ه­گâ€‹[dpvâ€‹î€ â€‹=k]dpvâ€‹ هچ³هڈ¯م€‚وœ€هگژè‹¥ âˆ‘u[dpu=k]â‰¥2\\sum\\limits_{u} [dp_u=k]\\ge2uâˆ‘â€‹[dpuâ€‹=k]â‰¥2 ه°±è¯´وکژوœ‰è§£م€‚ éƒ¨هˆ†ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ void dfs(int u,int fa,long long val) { dp[u]=a[u]; for(int i=h[u];i;i=nxt[i]) { int v=to[i]; if(v==fa) { continue; } dfs(v,u,val); if(dp[v]!=val) { dp[u]^=dp[v]; } } } inline void slove() { esum=0; scanf("%d%d",&n,&k); long long sm=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { h[i]=0; dp[i]=0; scanf("%lld",&a[i]); sm^=a[i]; } for(int i=1;i<=n-1;i++) { int x,y; scanf("%d%d",&x,&y); add(x,y); add(y,x); } if(sm==0) { puts("YES"); return; } if(k==2) { puts("NO"); return; } dfs(1,0,sm); int cnt=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { cnt+=dp[i]==sm; } puts(cnt>=2?"YES":"NO"); } ن؛¤ن؛’ ans=0,lb=1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { while(lb<i&&que(lb,i)<i-lb+1) { lb++; } if(que(lb,i)==i-lb+1) { ans++; lb=i+1; } printf("%d ",ans); } printf("\\n"); CF1594D The Number of Imposters 000ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه°±è®©هپڈه؟ƒهڈ¦ن¸€ç§چه­—ç¬¦ن¸²çڑ„هپ¶و•°و®µهˆ†ن¸€ن؛›ن½چç½®و”¾è؟™ç§چه­—ç¬¦ن¸²هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ç”±ن؛ژو²،هˆ†ن¹‹ه‰چهپ¶و•°و®µو€»ه…±èƒ½و”¾ âŒٹcnt2âŒ‹\\lfloor\\frac{cnt}{2}\\rfloorâŒٹ2cntâ€‹âŒ‹ ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ن¸²ï¼Œهˆ†ن؛†ن¹‹هگژهڈھèƒ½و”¾ âŒٹcnt2âŒ‹âˆ’1\\lfloor\\frac{cnt}{2}\\rfloor-1âŒٹ2cntâ€‹âŒ‹âˆ’1 ن¸ھï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هˆ†çڑ„و®µو•°è‚¯ه®ڑوک¯è¶ٹه°‘è¶ٹه¥½م€‚é‚£ن¹ˆوŒ‰و®µçڑ„é•؟ه؛¦ن»ژه¤§هˆ°ه°ڈهˆ†هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ // Problem: D. Linguistics // Contest: Codeforces Round #794 (Div. 2) // URL: https://codeforces.com/contest/1686/problem/D // Memory Limit: 256 MB // Time Limit: 1000 ms // // Powered by CP Editor (https://cpeditor.org) #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <cstdio> #include <cstring> #include <vector> #include <queue> #include <vector> #include <map> #include <set> using namespace std; const int S=1919810; struct node { int x,y; }vala[S],valb[S]; int n,a,b,c,d; char str[S]; inline bool cmp(node x,node y) { return x.y>y.y; } inline void slove() { cin>>a>>b>>c>>d>>(str+1); n=strlen(str+1); int cnta=0,cntb=0; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { cnta+=str[i]=='A'; cntb+=str[i]=='B'; } if(cnta-c-d!=a||cntb-c-d!=b) // A وˆ– B çڑ„و•°é‡ڈن¸چç¬¦هگˆçڑ„وƒ…ه†µ { cout<<"NO"<<endl; return; } int m1=0,m2=0,bot=0; str[n+1]=str[n]; for(int i=1,cnt=0;i<=n+1;i++) { if(str[i]!=str[i-1]) { cnt++; } else { if(cnt>1) { if(cnt&1) // ه…¬ه¹³çڑ„ه¥‡و•°و®µ { bot+=cnt/2; } else { if(str[i-1]=='B') { vala[++m1]=(node){cnt/2,cnt/2-1}; // هپڈه؟ƒ AB c-=cnt/2; } else { valb[++m2]=(node){cnt/2,cnt/2-1}; // هپڈه؟ƒ BA d-=cnt/2; } } } cnt=1; } } if(d>0) { sort(vala+1,vala+m1+1,cmp); for(int i=1;i<=m1;i++) { if(c+vala[i].x<=0) { c+=vala[i].x; d-=vala[i].y; } else { int lft=vala[i].x+c; if(lft>vala[i].y) { continue; } d-=vala[i].y-lft; c=0; } } } else { sort(valb+1,valb+m2+1,cmp); for(int i=1;i<=m2;i++) { if(d+valb[i].x<=0) { d+=valb[i].x; c-=valb[i].y; } else { int lft=valb[i].x+d; if(lft>valb[i].y) { continue; } c-=valb[i].y-lft; d=0; } } } c=max(c,0); d=max(d,0); cout<<(c+d<=bot?"YES":"NO")<<endl; } int main() { ios::sync_with_stdio(false); int _=1; cin>>_; while(_--) { slove(); } return 0; } è‹¥ه½“ه‰چن½چç½®وک¯هڈ¶èٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼Œو–°ه»؛ن¸€ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ن؟‌ه­کهگˆه¹¶çڑ„ن؟،وپ¯ï¼Œه¹¶ه›‍و؛¯ï¼› è‹¥ن¸¤و£µو ‘çڑ„ه½“ه‰چن½چç½®éƒ½وœ‰èٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼Œç»§ç»­ه¾€ن¸‹é€’ه½’ï¼› è‹¥وœ‰ن¸€و£µو ‘ه½“ه‰چن½چç½®و²،وœ‰èٹ‚ç‚¹ن؛†ï¼Œç›´وژ¥وٹٹهڈ¦ن¸€و£µو ‘ه½“ه‰چن½چç½®çڑ„èٹ‚ç‚¹و‹؟و‌¥ç”¨ï¼Œه¹¶ه›‍و؛¯ï¼› ه½“ه‰چن½چç½®é€’ه½’ه¤„çگ†ه®Œهگژï¼Œو–°ه»؛ن¸€ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹و‌¥ن؟‌ه­که­گو ‘ن؟،وپ¯ï¼Œه¹¶ه›‍و؛¯م€‚ ه…¶ن¸­é™¤ن؛†ç¬¬ن؛Œو‌،ï¼Œه…¶ه®ƒهœ¨ه›¾ç¤؛é‡Œé‌¢éƒ½è§پè؟‡م€‚ç¬¬ن؛Œو‌،ن¹ںه¾ˆه¥½çگ†è§£ï¼Œه› ن¸؛هڈ¶èٹ‚ç‚¹و— éœ€ن¹ںو²،و³•ç»§ç»­é€’ه½’ن¸‹هژ»م€‚ ه°†ه…±وœ‰ nnn ن¸ھهڈ¶ه­گèٹ‚ç‚¹çڑ„ن»»و„ڈه¤ڑو£µç؛؟و®µو ‘ن»¥ن»»و„ڈé،؛ه؛ڈهگˆه¹¶çڑ„و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦وک¯ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn) çڑ„م€‚è¯پوکژه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ ن¸چéڑ¾هڈ‘çژ°ï¼Œو¯ڈو¬، dfs هگˆه¹¶ن¸¤ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹هڈ¯ن»¥çœ‹وˆگن¸¢وژ‰ن¸€ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼Œç”±ن؛ژو€»ه…±هڈھوœ‰ nlogâپ،nn\\log nnlogn ن¸ھèٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه°±وک¯ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn) çڑ„م€‚ ه…·ن½“ن»£ç په®‍çژ°ه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ struct node { int lson,rson; int val; }tree[500005]; int cnt; // èٹ‚ç‚¹و•°é‡ڈï¼ˆç”¨ن؛ژهٹ¨و€په¼€ç‚¹ï¼‰ int meg(int x,int y) { if(x==0||y==0) return x+y; if(tree[x].lson==0&&tree[x].rson==0) { int res=++cnt; tree[res]=tree[x]; tree[res].val+=tree[y].val; return res; } else { int res=++cnt; tree[res].lson=meg(tree[x].lson,tree[y].lson); tree[res].rson=meg(tree[x].rson,tree[y].rson); upd(res); return res; } } وœ‰ن؛›و—¶ه€™ç©؛é—´هچ،ه¾—ç´§ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هœ¨هگˆه¹¶çڑ„و—¶ه€™هڈ¯ن»¥ن¸چو–°ه»؛èٹ‚ç‚¹ï¼Œن»£ن»·وک¯ç ´ه‌ڈوںگو£µç؛؟و®µو ‘çڑ„ç»“و‍„ï¼ڑ struct node { int lson,rson; int val; }tree[500005]; int cnt; // èٹ‚ç‚¹و•°é‡ڈï¼ˆç”¨ن؛ژهٹ¨و€په¼€ç‚¹ï¼‰ int meg(int x,int y) { if(x==0||y==0) return x+y; if(tree[x].lson==0&&tree[x].rson==0) { tree[x].val+=tree[y].val; return x; } else { tree[x].lson=meg(tree[x].lson,tree[y].lson); tree[x].rson=meg(tree[x].rson,tree[y].rson); upd(x); return x; } } ç»ƒن¹ é¢کç›® P4556 [Vaniوœ‰ç؛¦ن¼ڑ]é›¨ه¤©çڑ„ه°¾ه·´ /م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ç؛؟و®µو ‘هگˆه¹¶ H=13H2+23xH+23H=\\dfrac{1}{3}H^2+\\dfrac{2}{3}xH+\\dfrac{2}{3}H=31â€‹H2+32â€‹xH+32â€‹ï¼ˆهٹ ن¸ٹ 23\\dfrac{2}{3}32â€‹ وک¯ه› ن¸؛ h0h_0h0â€‹ï¼‰ H=1âˆ’23xآ±49x2âˆ’43x+1âˆ’8923H=\\dfrac{1-\\frac{2}{3}x\\pm\\sqrt{\\frac{4}{9}x^2-\\frac{4}{3}x+1-\\frac{8}{9}}}{\\frac{2}{3}}H=32â€‹1âˆ’32â€‹xآ±94â€‹x2âˆ’34â€‹x+1âˆ’98â€‹â€‹â€‹ =3âˆ’2xآ±4x2âˆ’12x+12=\\dfrac{3-2x\\pm\\sqrt{4x^2-12x+1}}{2}=23âˆ’2xآ±4x2âˆ’12x+1â€‹â€‹ ه› ن¸؛ H(0)=1H(0)=1H(0)=1ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وک¾ç„¶هڈ–ه‡ڈهڈ·م€‚ H=3âˆ’2xâˆ’4x2âˆ’12x+12H=\\dfrac{3-2x-\\sqrt{4x^2-12x+1}}{2}H=23âˆ’2xâˆ’4x2âˆ’12x+1â€‹â€‹ è€ƒè™‘و‹†وژ‰و ¹هڈ·ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥è®¾ =âˆ‘i=0infâپ،bi+1(i+1)xiâˆ’12bi+1(i+1)xi+1+4bi+1(i+1)xi+2=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{\\inf}b_{i+1}(i+1)x^i-12b_{i+1}(i+1)x^{i+1}+4b_{i+1}(i+1)x^{i+2}=i=0âˆ‘infâ€‹bi+1â€‹(i+1)xiâˆ’12bi+1â€‹(i+1)xi+1+4bi+1â€‹(i+1)xi+2 =âˆ‘i=0infâپ،(bi+1(i+1)âˆ’12bii+4biâˆ’1(iâˆ’1))xi=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{\\inf}(b_{i+1}(i+1)-12b_{i}i+4b_{i-1}(i-1))x^i=i=0âˆ‘infâ€‹(bi+1â€‹(i+1)âˆ’12biâ€‹i+4biâˆ’1â€‹(iâˆ’1))xiï¼ˆهپ‡è®¾ bâˆ’1=0b_{-1}=0bâˆ’1â€‹=0ï¼‰ =âˆ‘i=0infâپ،4bixi+1âˆ’6bixi=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{\\inf}4b_ix^{i+1}-6b_ix^i=i=0âˆ‘infâ€‹4biâ€‹xi+1âˆ’6biâ€‹xi \n

ç»™ه‡؛ن¸€ن¸ھé—¨é™گه€¼ kkk ه’Œن¸¤ن¸ھهڈھهŒ…هگ« AGCT\\texttt{AGCT}AGCT ه››ç§چه­—ç¬¦çڑ„هں؛ه› ن¸² SSS ه’Œ TTTم€‚çژ°هœ¨ن½ è¦پو‰¾ه‡؛هœ¨ن¸‹هˆ—è§„هˆ™ن¸­ TTT هœ¨ SSS ن¸­ه‡؛çژ°ن؛†ه‡ و¬،م€‚

\n

TTT هœ¨ SSS çڑ„ç¬¬ iii ن¸ھن½چç½®ن¸­ه‡؛çژ°ï¼Œه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“وٹٹ TTT çڑ„é¦–ه­—ç¬¦ه’Œ SSS çڑ„ç¬¬ iii ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦ه¯¹é½گهگژï¼ŒTTT ن¸­çڑ„و¯ڈن¸€ن¸ھه­—ç¬¦èƒ½ه¤ںهœ¨ SSS ن¸­و‰¾هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھن½چç½®هپڈه·®ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ kkk çڑ„ç›¸هگŒه­—ç¬¦م€‚

\n

ن¾‹é¢کن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑï¼ˆè؟œهڈ¤ن»£ç پï¼Œه°†ه°±ç‌€çœ‹هگ§ï¼‰ #include <iostream> #include <algorithm> #include <math.h> #include <string.h> #include <vector> #include <queue> #include <stack> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; typedef long long lnt; const int maxn=1e4+5; int h[maxn]; int find(int a) { if(h[a]==a) { return a; } int root=find(h[a]); h[a]=root; return root; } int hb(int a,int b) { int ar,br; ar=find(a); br=find(b); h[br]=ar; } int is(int a,int b) { if(find(a)==find(b)) { return 1; } return 0; } int main() { int n,m; cin>>n>>m; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { h[i]=i; } for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) { int x,y,z; cin>>z>>x>>y; if(z==1) { hb(x,y); } else if(z==2) { if(is(x,y)) { cout<<"Y\\n"; } else { cout<<"N\\n"; } } } return 0; } 0x01 ه°ڈوٹ€ه·§ ن؟‌ه­کé›†هگˆن؟،وپ¯ وک¾ç„¶ç»“و‍œçڑ„ه®‍é™…ه€¼ن¸چè¶…è؟‡ 109أ—109أ—105=102310^9\\times 10^9\\times 10^5=10^{23}109أ—109أ—105=1023ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥و±‚ه‡؛ç»“و‍œو¨،ن¸‰ن¸ھو»،è¶³ ABCâ‰¥1023ABC\\ge 10^{23}ABCâ‰¥1023 çڑ„è´¨و•° AAAم€پBBB ه’Œ CCC çڑ„ه€¼ï¼Œç„¶هگژç”¨ن¸­ه›½ه‰©ن½™ه®ڑçگ†هگˆه¹¶ç­”و،ˆم€‚ ن½†وک¯è؟™ç§چو–¹و³•éœ€è¦پ 999 و¬، NTTï¼Œه¸¸و•°و‍په…¶ه·¨ه¤§م€‚ هں؛ن؛ژ FFT çڑ„ه®‍çژ° و—¢ç„¶ FFT وœ‰ç²¾ه؛¦é™گهˆ¶ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬ه°±è¦پوƒ³هٹ‍و³•é™چن½ژè؟گç®—و‰€éœ€è¦پçڑ„ç²¾ه؛¦م€‚ ن¸چéڑ¾وƒ³هˆ°ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥ن»¤ k=pk=\\sqrt pk=pâ€‹ï¼ŒF(x)=kA1(x)+B1(x)F(x)=kA_1(x)+B_1(x)F(x)=kA1â€‹(x)+B1â€‹(x)ï¼ŒG(x)=kA2(x)+B2(x)G(x)=kA_2(x)+B_2(x)G(x)=kA2â€‹(x)+B2â€‹(x)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ Fâˆ—G=(kA1+B1)(kA2+B2)F*G=(kA_1+B_1)(kA_2+B_2) Fâˆ—G=(kA1â€‹+B1â€‹)(kA2â€‹+B2â€‹) =k2A1A2+k(A1B2+A2B1)+B1B2=k^2A_1A_2+k(A_1B_2+A_2B_1)+B_1B_2 =k2A1â€‹A2â€‹+k(A1â€‹B2â€‹+A2â€‹B1â€‹)+B1â€‹B2â€‹ DFTâپ،(A1),DFTâپ،(A2),DFTâپ،(B1),DFTâپ،(B2)\\operatorname{DFT}(A_1),\\operatorname{DFT}(A_2),\\operatorname{DFT}(B_1),\\operatorname{DFT}(B_2)DFT(A1â€‹),DFT(A2â€‹),DFT(B1â€‹),DFT(B2â€‹) ه†چ IDFTâپ،(A1A2),IDFTâپ،(A1B2+A2B1),DFTâپ،(B1B2)\\operatorname{IDFT}(A_1A_2),\\operatorname{IDFT}(A_1B_2+A_2B_1),\\operatorname{DFT}(B_1B_2)IDFT(A1â€‹A2â€‹),IDFT(A1â€‹B2â€‹+A2â€‹B1â€‹),DFT(B1â€‹B2â€‹) هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œه…±éœ€ 777 و¬، FFTم€‚ هڈ¯ن»¥ه†چه؟«ç‚¹هگ—ï¼ں ه½“ç„¶هڈ¯ن»¥ï¼پن½†وک¯ه¤ھè؟‡ه¤چو‌‚ن¸چن¾؟ن؛ژè®°ه؟†ï¼Œè€Œن¸”ن¼کهŒ–و•ˆو‍œè²Œن¼¼ن¸چه¤ںوکژوک¾ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن»¥هگژه†چè،¥ه‌‘هگ§م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cmath> using namespace std; const long long MS=500005; const long double PI=acos(-1); struct plex { long double x,y; plex(long double a=0,long double b=0) {x=a,y=b;} }; plex operator+(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x+b.x,a.y+b.y);} plex operator-(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y);} plex operator*(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x*b.x-a.y*b.y,a.x*b.y+b.x*a.y);} inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; inline void FFT(int n,plex a[],int tpe) { if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1; plex Wn=plex(cos(2*PI/len),tpe*sin(2*PI/len)); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { plex Wk=plex(1,0); for(int k=0;k<mid;k++,Wk=Wk*Wn) { plex x=a[l+k],y=Wk*a[l+mid+k]; a[l+k]=x+y,a[l+mid+k]=x-y; } } } } inline void DFT(int n,plex a[]) {FFT(n,a,1);} inline void IDFT(int n,plex a[]) { FFT(n,a,-1); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i].x/=n,a[i].y/=n; } plex A1[MS],B1[MS],A2[MS],B2[MS]; plex p_mul_tmp1[MS],p_mul_tmp2[MS],p_mul_tmp3[MS]; inline void PMUL(int n,int m,int resn,int F[],int G[],int res[],int p) { int len=getlen(n+m); int k=ceil(sqrt(p)); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) A1[i].x=F[i]/k,B1[i].x=F[i]%k; for(int i=0;i<m;i++) A2[i].x=G[i]/k,B2[i].x=G[i]%k; DFT(len,A1),DFT(len,A2),DFT(len,B1),DFT(len,B2); for(int i=0;i<len;i++) p_mul_tmp1[i]=A1[i]*A2[i],p_mul_tmp2[i]=A1[i]*B2[i]+A2[i]*B1[i],p_mul_tmp3[i]=B1[i]*B2[i]; IDFT(len,p_mul_tmp1),IDFT(len,p_mul_tmp2),IDFT(len,p_mul_tmp3); for(int i=0;i<resn;i++) { int x=(long long)(p_mul_tmp1[i].x+0.5)%p,y=(long long)(p_mul_tmp2[i].x+0.5)%p,z=(long long)(p_mul_tmp3[i].x+0.5)%p; res[i]=((1ll*k*k%p*x%p+1ll*k*y%p)%p+z)%p; } for(int i=0;i<len;i++) A1[i]=A2[i]=B1[i]=B2[i]=p_mul_tmp1[i]=p_mul_tmp2[i]=p_mul_tmp3[i]=plex(); } int n,m,p; int F[MS],G[MS],res[MS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d%d",&n,&m,&p); n++; m++; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) { scanf("%d",&F[i]); F[i]=(F[i]%p+p)%p; } for(int i=0;i<m;i++) { scanf("%d",&G[i]); G[i]=(G[i]%p+p)%p; } PMUL(n,m,n+m-1,F,G,res,p); for(int i=0;i<n+m-1;i++) { printf("%d ",res[i]); } printf("\\n"); return 0; } ن¹ںه°±وک¯ن»ژ{ai}\\{a_i\\}{aiâ€‹} é‡Œé‌¢é€‰ه‡؛ن¸€ن¸ھé‌‍ç©؛ه­گé›†ن½؟è؟™ن؛›و•°وŒ‰ن½چن¸ژèµ·و‌¥ن¸؛0م€‚

i_k(1\\le{k}\\le{n})i1â€‹<i2â€‹<...<ikâ€‹(1â‰¤kâ‰¤n) ن½؟ه¾— ai1&ai2&...&aik=0a_{i_1}\\&a_{i_2}\\&...\\&a_{i_k}=0ai1â€‹â€‹&ai2â€‹â€‹&...&aikâ€‹â€‹=0م€‚و±‚و–¹و،ˆو•°و¨، 109+710^9+7109+7م€‚ ن¹ںه°±وک¯ن»ژ{ai}\\{a_i\\}{aiâ€‹} é‡Œé‌¢é€‰ه‡؛ن¸€ن¸ھé‌‍ç©؛ه­گé›†ن½؟è؟™ن؛›و•°وŒ‰ن½چن¸ژèµ·و‌¥ن¸؛0م€‚ é¦–ه…ˆè®° xxxâ€œهŒ…هگ«â€‌yyy ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ x&y=yx\\&y=yx&y=yï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ dpidp_idpiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛وŒ‰ن½چن¸ژه’ŒهŒ…هگ« iii çڑ„وœ€é•؟ه­گه؛ڈهˆ—é•؟ه؛¦ï¼Œوœ‰è½¬ç§» dpiâˆ’2jâ†’dpiâˆ’2j+dpidp_{i-2^j}\\to dp_{i-2^j}+dp_{i}dpiâˆ’2jâ€‹â†’dpiâˆ’2jâ€‹+dpiâ€‹ï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ iii هŒ…هگ« 2j2^j2jم€‚è¾¹ç•Œوک¯ dpai=1dp_{a_i}=1dpaiâ€‹â€‹=1م€‚ scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); dp[a[i]]++; } for(int j=0;j<=25;j++) // و³¨و„ڈè½¬ç§»é،؛ه؛ڈï¼Œè¦په…ˆو‍ڑن¸¾ j ه†چو‍ڑن¸¾ iï¼Œè¦پن¸چç„¶ن¼ڑç®—é‡چ { for(int i=1;i<=1000002;i++) { if((i>>j)&1) { dp[i^(1<<j)]=dp[i^(1<<j)]+dp[i]; } } } è€ƒè™‘ç­”و،ˆçڑ„و±‚è§£ï¼Œن»¤ pdipd_ipdiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛ن¸ژه’ŒهŒ…هگ« iii çڑ„ه­گه؛ڈهˆ—ن¸ھو•°ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶وœ‰ pdi=2dpiâˆ’1pd_i=2^{dp_i}-1pdiâ€‹=2dpiâ€‹âˆ’1م€‚è¯•ç‌€ç”¨ه®¹و–¥و±‚ه‡؛ç­”و،ˆï¼Œن»¤ gig_igiâ€‹ è،¨ç¤؛و‰€وœ‰و»،è¶³ jjj çڑ„ن؛Œè؟›هˆ¶ن¸­وœ‰ iii ن¸ھ 111 çڑ„ pdjpd_jpdjâ€‹ çڑ„ه’Œï¼Œç­”و،ˆهچ³ن¸؛ g0âˆ’g1+g2âˆ’g3+g4âˆ’g5+â€¦g_0-g_1+g_2-g_3+g_4-g_5+\\dotsg0â€‹âˆ’g1â€‹+g2â€‹âˆ’g3â€‹+g4â€‹âˆ’g5â€‹+â€¦ ه®Œو•´ن»£ç پï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const int mod=1000000007; int n,a[1000005]; int bse[1000005],dp[1000005],g[30]; int main() { scanf("%d",&n); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); dp[a[i]]++; } for(int j=0;j<=25;j++) // و³¨و„ڈè½¬ç§»é،؛ه؛ڈï¼Œè¦په…ˆو‍ڑن¸¾ j ه†چو‍ڑن¸¾ iï¼Œè¦پن¸چç„¶ن¼ڑç®—é‡چ { for(int i=1;i<=1000002;i++) { if((i>>j)&1) { dp[i^(1<<j)]=dp[i^(1<<j)]+dp[i]; } } } bse[0]=1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { bse[i]=2ll*bse[i-1]%mod; } for(int i=0;i<=1000002;i++) { int cnt=0; for(int j=0;j<=25;j++) { cnt+=(i>>j)&1; } g[cnt]=((long long)g[cnt]+bse[dp[i]]-1+mod)%mod; // é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ dp[i] çڑ„ه؛ڈهˆ—é‡Œهڈ–ه­گه؛ڈهˆ—وœ‰ 2^dp[i]-1 ç§چو–¹و،ˆ } int ans=g[0]; for(int i=1;i<=25;i++) { if(i&1) { ans=(ans-g[i]+mod)%mod; } else { ans=(ans+g[i])%mod; } } printf("%d\\n",ans); return 0; } @command_block çڑ„و–‡ç« م€ٹNTT ن¸ژه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه…¨ه®¶و،¶م€‹ن»¥هڈٹ @Epsilon_Cubeم€پ@MoYuFang ه’Œ @Diu ç»™ن؛ˆوˆ‘çڑ„è®¸ه¤ڑه¸®هٹ©م€‚ ه› ن¸؛و‌؟ه­گهœ¨ن¸چو–­ن؟® bugï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن»£ç پوœ€هگژç»ںن¸€و”¾م€‚ ه‰چç½®èٹ‌ه£« ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„هگ„ç§چè؟گç®—وک¯و€ژن¹ˆه®ڑن¹‰çڑ„ ç”±ن؛ژوˆ‘ن»¬هڈھçں¥éپ“ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈهٹ و³•ه’Œه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈن¹کو³•ï¼Œن½†وک¯è؟™ه·²ç»ڈه¤ںن؛†م€‚و‰€ن»¥و‰€وœ‰çڑ„ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈè؟گç®—éƒ½وک¯ç”¨ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈهٹ و³•ه’Œن¹کو³•ه®ڑن¹‰çڑ„م€‚ و¬،و•°ç•Œ ه¾ˆه¤ڑو—¶ه€™وˆ‘ن»¬هڈھه¯¹ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ fff çڑ„ه‰چ nnn é،¹و„ںه…´è¶£ï¼ˆè؟™و—¶ه¾€ه¾€ fff ن¼ڑوœ‰و— é™گé،¹ï¼‰ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥éœ€è¦پهœ¨ (modxn)\\pmod{x^n}(modxn) çڑ„و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹è؟گç®—م€‚ ç”±ن؛ژه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈهٹ و³•ه’Œه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈن¹کو³•çڑ„ç»“و‍œهڈھن¼ڑن»ژن½ژو¬،é،¹هگ‘é«کو¬،é،¹è´،çŒ®ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وœ‰ï¼ڑ F(x)modâپ،xn+G(x)modâپ،xnâ‰،F(x)+G(x)(modxn)F(x)modâپ،xnâ‹…G(x)modâپ،xnâ‰،F(x)G(x)(modxn)\\begin{aligned} F(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}+G(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}&\\equiv F(x)+G(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ F(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}\\cdot G(x)\\operatorname{mod}{x^n}&\\equiv F(x)G(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} F(x)modxn+G(x)modxnF(x)modxnâ‹…G(x)modxnâ€‹â‰،F(x)+G(x)â‰،F(x)G(x)â€‹(modxn)(modxn)â€‹ هچ³وˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥هœ¨وœ‰و¬،و•°ç•Œçڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¸‹ه®ڑن¹‰و‰€وœ‰ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈè؟گç®—م€‚ ç®€هچ•ه¾®ç§¯هˆ† ن¸€ن؛›è®°هڈ· [xi]F(x)[x^i]F(x)[xi]F(x)ï¼ڑه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ F(x)F(x)F(x) çڑ„ iii و¬،é،¹çڑ„ç³»و•°ï¼Œهچ³ xix^ixi çڑ„ç³»و•°ï¼› FR(x)F_R(x)FRâ€‹(x)ï¼ڑnnn و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„ç؟»è½¬ FR(x)=xnF(1x)F_R(x)=x^nF(\\frac{1}{x})FRâ€‹(x)=xnF(x1â€‹)ï¼Œوک¾ç„¶ FR(x)F_R(x)FRâ€‹(x) çڑ„ç³»و•°وک¯ F(x)F(x)F(x) çڑ„ç³»و•°çڑ„ç؟»è½¬ï¼› F(n)(x)F^{(n)}(x)F(n)(x)ï¼ڑه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ F(x)F(x)F(x) çڑ„ nnn éک¶ه¯¼و•°ï¼Œهچ³ه¯¹ F(x)F(x)F(x) و±‚ه¯¼ nnn و¬،çڑ„ç»“و‍œï¼› ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈو±‚ه¯¼ه’Œç§¯هˆ† ه®ڑن¹‰ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„و±‚ه¯¼ï¼ڑ Fâ€²(x)=âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1ai+1(i+1)xiF^\\prime(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1} a_{i+1}(i+1)x^{i} Fâ€²(x)=i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹ai+1â€‹(i+1)xi ه®ڑن¹‰ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„ç§¯هˆ†ï¼ˆن¸چه®ڑç§¯هˆ†ï¼‰ï¼ڑ âˆ«F(x) dx=C+âˆ‘i=1naiâˆ’1xii\\int F(x)\\,dx=C+\\sum\\limits_{i=1}^{n} \\dfrac{a_{i-1}x^{i}}{i} âˆ«F(x)dx=C+i=1âˆ‘nâ€‹iaiâˆ’1â€‹xiâ€‹ هگŒو ·çڑ„ï¼Œه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈو±‚ه¯¼ه’Œç§¯هˆ†ن¹ںوک¯ن؛’ن¸؛é€†و“چن½œم€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈç‰›é،؟è؟­ن»£ è؟™وک¯ن¸€ن¸ھو¯”è¾ƒé‡چè¦پçڑ„çں¥è¯†ï¼Œوœ‰ن؛†ه®ƒï¼Œه°±هڈ¯ن»¥و— è„‘وژ¨ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈهگ„ç§چو“چن½œçڑ„é€’وژ¨ه¼ڈن؛†م€‚ ه½¢ه¼ڈï¼ڑه·²çں¥ه‡½و•° GGG و»،è¶³ G(F(x))=0G(F(x))=0G(F(x))=0ï¼Œو±‚ F(x)modâپ،xnF(x)\\operatorname{mod} x^nF(x)modxnم€‚ ه®‍è·µن¸­ GGG ن¸€èˆ¬è¾ƒن¸؛و‰‹هٹ¨و‍„é€ çڑ„ç®€هچ•ه‡½و•°م€‚ ç»“è®؛ï¼ڑF(x)â‰،Fâˆ—(x)âˆ’G(Fâˆ—(x))Gâ€²(Fâˆ—(x))(modxn)F(x)\\equiv ه’Œن¸€èˆ¬çڑ„ç‰›è؟­هچپهˆ†ç›¸ن¼¼ï¼Œن½†وک¯و¬،و•°و¯ڈو¬،ç؟»ه€چم€‚è¯پوکژه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ هپ‡è®¾ç›®ه‰چه·²ç»ڈو±‚ه‡؛ن؛† Fâˆ—(x)F_*(x)Fâˆ—â€‹(x)ï¼Œè€ƒè™‘ G(F(x))G(F(x))G(F(x))هœ¨ Fâˆ—(x)F_*(x)Fâˆ—â€‹(x) ه¤„çڑ„و³°ه‹’ه±•ه¼€ï¼ڑ âˆ‘i=0âˆ‍G(i)(Fâˆ—(x))i!(F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—(x))iâ‰،0(modxn)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{\\infin} \\frac{G^{(i)}(F_*(x))}{i!}(F(x)-F_*(x))^i\\equiv0\\pmod{x^n} i=0âˆ‘âˆ‍â€‹i!G(i)(Fâˆ—â€‹(x))â€‹(F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—â€‹(x))iâ‰،0(modxn) و³¨و„ڈهˆ° F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—(x)F(x)-F_*(x)F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—â€‹(x) çڑ„وœ€ن½ژç³»و•°é‌‍ 000 é،¹è‡³ه°‘وک¯ xn2x^{\\frac{n}{2}}x2nâ€‹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه¯¹ن؛ژو‰€وœ‰ iâ‰¥2i\\ge2iâ‰¥2 çڑ„ iii éƒ½وœ‰ (F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—(x))iâ‰،0(modxn)(F(x)-F_*(x))^i\\equiv 0\\pmod{x^n}(F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—â€‹(x))iâ‰،0(modxn)ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ï¼ڑ G(Fâˆ—(x))+Gâ€²(Fâˆ—(x))(F(x)âˆ’Fâˆ—(x))â‰،0(modxn)F(x)â‰،Fâˆ—(x)âˆ’G(Fâˆ—(x))Gâ€²(Fâˆ—(x))(modxn)\\begin{aligned} G(F_*(x))+G'(F_*(x))(F(x)-F_*(x))&\\equiv0&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ F(x)&\\equiv è¯پو¯•م€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈن¹کو³•é€† P4238 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈن¹کو³•é€† هپ‡è®¾ه·²ç»ڈو±‚ه‡؛ن؛† Bâˆ—(x)F(x)â‰،1(modxn2)B_*(x)F(x)\\equiv 1\\pmod{x^{\\frac{n}{2}}}Bâˆ—â€‹(x)F(x)â‰،1(modx2nâ€‹)ï¼Œçژ°هœ¨è¦پو±‚ B(x)F(x)â‰،1(modxn)B(x)F(x)\\equiv1\\pmod{x^n}B(x)F(x)â‰،1(modxn)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ G(B(x))=1B(x)âˆ’F(x)â‰،0(modxn)\\begin{aligned} G(B(x))=\\frac{1}{B(x)}-F(x)\\equiv 0\\pmod{x^n} \\end{aligned} G(B(x))=B(x)1â€‹âˆ’F(x)â‰،0(modxn)â€‹ هˆ™هڈ¯ن»¥ç›´وژ¥ه¥—ç‰›é،؟è؟­ن»£ï¼ڑ B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’G(Bâˆ—(x))Gâ€²(Bâˆ—(x))(modxn)B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’1Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’F(x)âˆ’1Bâˆ—2(x)(modxn)B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)+Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’Bâˆ—2F(x)(modxn)B(x)â‰،2Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’Bâˆ—2F(x)(modxn)\\begin{aligned} B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{G(B_*(x))}{G'(B_*(x))}&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{\\frac{1}{B_*(x)}-F(x)}{-\\frac{1}{B_*^2(x)}}&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)+B_*(x)-B_*^2F(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv 2B_*(x)-B_*^2F(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} B(x)B(x)B(x)B(x)â€‹â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’Gâ€²(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))G(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))â€‹â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’âˆ’Bâˆ—2â€‹(x)1â€‹Bâˆ—â€‹(x)1â€‹âˆ’F(x)â€‹â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)+Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’Bâˆ—2â€‹F(x)â‰،2Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’Bâˆ—2â€‹F(x)â€‹(modxn)(modxn)(modxn)(modxn)â€‹ é،¹éƒ½ن¸؛ 000ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥é•؟ه؛¦ن¸؛ lenlenlen çڑ„ه¾ھçژ¯هچ·ç§¯هڈھن¼ڑç ´ه‌ڈه‰چé‌¢çڑ„ 111 ه’Œ 000م€‚ وœ€هگژن¹کن¸ٹن¸€ن¸ھ Bâˆ—(x)B_*(x)Bâˆ—â€‹(x) هچ³هڈ¯ï¼Œو­¤و—¶ه¾ھçژ¯هچ·ç§¯هڈھن¼ڑç ´ه‌ڈه‰چ len2\\dfrac{len}{2}2lenâ€‹ é،¹م€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¼€و ¹ P5205 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¼€و ¹ P5277 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¼€و ¹ï¼ˆهٹ ه¼؛ç‰ˆï¼‰ هپ‡è®¾ه·²ç»ڈو±‚ه‡؛ن؛† Bâˆ—2(x)â‰،F(x)(modxn2)B_*^2(x)\\equiv B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’G(Bâˆ—(x))Gâ€²(Bâˆ—(x))(mod2n)B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’Bâˆ—2(x)âˆ’F(x)2Bâˆ—(x)(mod2n)B(x)â‰،2Bâˆ—(x)2âˆ’Bâˆ—2(x)+F(x)2Bâˆ—(x)(mod2n)B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—2(x)+F(x)2Bâˆ—(x)(mod2n)\\begin{aligned} B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{G(B_*(x))}{G'(B_*(x))}&\\pmod{2^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-\\frac{B_*^2(x)-F(x)}{2B_*(x)}&\\pmod{2^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B(x)B(x)B(x)B(x)â€‹â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’Gâ€²(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))G(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))â€‹â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’2Bâˆ—â€‹(x)Bâˆ—2â€‹(x)âˆ’F(x)â€‹â‰،2Bâˆ—â€‹(x)2Bâˆ—â€‹(x)2âˆ’Bâˆ—2â€‹(x)+F(x)â€‹â‰،2Bâˆ—â€‹(x)Bâˆ—2â€‹(x)+F(x)â€‹â€‹(mod2n)(mod2n)(mod2n)(mod2n)â€‹ وœ€هگژ [x0]B(x)[x^0]B(x)[x0]B(x) éœ€è¦پو±‚ن¸€و¬،ن؛Œو¬،ه‰©ن½™ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ BSGS/exBSGS و±‚هچ•ن½چو ¹çڑ„é«کو¬،هگŒن½™و–¹ç¨‹و‌¥و±‚è§£ï¼Œه†چهٹ ن¸ٹن¸€ن¸ھو±‚é€†ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھن¹کو³•ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھهٹ و³•ه°±هپڑه®Œن؛†م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ T(n)=T(n2)+O(nlogâپ،n)=O(nlogâپ،n)T(n)=T(\\frac{n}{2})+O(n\\log n)=O(n\\log n)T(n)=T(2nâ€‹)+O(nlogn)=O(nlogn)م€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ lnâپ،\\lnln P4725 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¯¹و•°ه‡½و•°ï¼ˆه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ lnï¼‰ lnâپ،(A(x))â‰،B(x)(modxn)\\ln(A(x))\\equiv B(x)\\pmod{x^n} ln(A(x))â‰،B(x)(modxn) ن¸¤è¾¹هگŒو—¶و±‚ه¯¼ï¼Œه¾—ï¼ڑ lnâپ،â€²(A(x))Aâ€²(x)â‰،Bâ€²(x)(modxn)\\ln'(A(x))A'(x)\\equiv B'(x)\\pmod{x^n} lnâ€²(A(x))Aâ€²(x)â‰،Bâ€²(x)(modxn) و³¨و„ڈهˆ° lnâپ،â€²(x)=1x\\ln'(x)=\\dfrac{1}{x}lnâ€²(x)=x1â€‹ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ï¼ڑ Aâ€²(x)A(x)â‰،Bâ€²(x)(modxn)\\dfrac{A'(x)}{A(x)}\\equiv B'(x)\\pmod{x^n} A(x)Aâ€²(x)â€‹â‰،Bâ€²(x)(modxn) ه†چç§¯هˆ†ه›‍و‌¥ï¼ڑ B(x)â‰،âˆ«Aâ€²(x)A(x)dx(modxn)B(x)\\equiv \\int \\dfrac{A'(x)}{A(x)}dx\\pmod{x^n} B(x)â‰،âˆ«A(x)Aâ€²(x)â€‹dx(modxn) و‰€ن»¥ن¸€ن¸ھو±‚ه¯¼ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھé€†ه…ƒï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھن¹کو³•ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھç§¯هˆ†هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و³¨و„ڈç”±ن؛ژ [x0]A(x)=1[x^0]A(x)=1[x0]A(x)=1ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وœ‰ [x0]B(x)=0[x^0]B(x)=0[x0]B(x)=0م€‚ه¹¶ن¸”è‹¥ [x0]A(x)î€ =1[x^0]A(x)\\not=1[x0]A(x)î€ â€‹=1 هˆ™و— و³•و±‚ lnâپ،\\lnln ه› ن¸؛و±‚ن¸چه‡؛و¨،و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„ lnâپ،([x0]A(x))\\ln([x^0]A(x))ln([x0]A(x))م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)م€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ expâپ،\\expexp P4726 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈوŒ‡و•°ه‡½و•°ï¼ˆه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈ expï¼‰ B(x)â‰،expâپ،(A(x))(modxn)B(x)\\equiv \\exp(A(x))\\pmod{x^n} B(x)â‰،exp(A(x))(modxn) وˆ‘ن»¬è®¾ G(F(x))=lnâپ،(F(x))âˆ’A(x)G(F(x))=\\ln(F(x))-A(x)G(F(x))=ln(F(x))âˆ’A(x)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوک¾ç„¶ G(B(x))â‰،0(modxn)G(B(x))\\equiv0\\pmod{x^n}G(B(x))â‰،0(modxn)ï¼Œهڈ¯ن»¥ن½؟ç”¨ç‰›é،؟è؟­ن»£ن؛†م€‚ ه›‍ه؟†ç‰›è؟­ه¼ڈه­گï¼ڑF(x)â‰،Fâˆ—(x)âˆ’G(Fâˆ—(x))Gâ€²(Fâˆ—(x))(modxn)F(x)\\equiv F_*(x)-\\dfrac{G(F_*(x))}{G'(F_*(x))}\\pmod{x^n}F(x)â‰،Fâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’Gâ€²(Fâˆ—â€‹(x))G(Fâˆ—â€‹(x))â€‹(modxn) وک¾ç„¶ï¼Œè؟™é‡Œçڑ„ Gâ€²(F(x))=1F(X)G'(F(x))=\\dfrac{1}{F(X)}Gâ€²(F(x))=F(X)1â€‹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهپ‡è®¾وˆ‘ن»¬ه·²ç»ڈو±‚ه‡؛ن؛† Bâˆ—(x)â‰،expâپ،(A(x))(modxn2)B_*(x)\\equiv \\exp(A(x))\\pmod{x^{\\frac{n}{2}}}Bâˆ—â€‹(x)â‰،exp(A(x))(modx2nâ€‹)ï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’G(Bâˆ—(x))Bâˆ—(x)(modxn)B(x)â‰،Bâˆ—(x)âˆ’(lnâپ،(Bâˆ—(x))âˆ’A(x))Bâˆ—(x)(modxn)B(x)â‰،(1âˆ’lnâپ،(Bâˆ—(x))+A(x))Bâˆ—(x)(modxn)\\begin{aligned} B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-G(B_*(x))B_*(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv B_*(x)-(\\ln(B_*(x))-A(x))B_*(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ B(x)&\\equiv (1-\\ln(B_*(x))+A(x))B_*(x)&\\pmod{x^n}\\\\ \\end{aligned} B(x)B(x)B(x)â€‹â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’G(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))Bâˆ—â€‹(x)â‰،Bâˆ—â€‹(x)âˆ’(ln(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))âˆ’A(x))Bâˆ—â€‹(x)â‰،(1âˆ’ln(Bâˆ—â€‹(x))+A(x))Bâˆ—â€‹(x)â€‹(modxn)(modxn)(modxn)â€‹ و‰€ن»¥ه€چه¢‍و±‚هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ و³¨و„ڈç”±ن؛ژ [x0]A(x)=0[x^0]A(x)=0[x0]A(x)=0ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وœ‰ [x0]B(x)=1[x^0]B(x)=1[x0]B(x)=1م€‚ه¹¶ن¸”è‹¥ [x0]A(x)î€ =0[x^0]A(x)\\not=0[x0]A(x)î€ â€‹=0 هˆ™و— و³•و±‚ expâپ،\\expexp ه› ن¸؛و±‚ن¸چه‡؛و¨،و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„ expâپ،([x0]A(x))\\exp([x^0]A(x))exp([x0]A(x))م€‚ و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ T(n)=T(n2)+O(nlogâپ،n)=O(nlogâپ،n)T(n)=T(\\frac{n}{2})+O(n\\log n)=O(n\\log n)T(n)=T(2nâ€‹)+O(nlogn)=O(nlogn)م€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه؟«é€ںه¹‚ P5245 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه؟«é€ںه¹‚ è§‚ه¯ںهˆ° (A(x))k=expâپ،(klnâپ،(A(x)))(A(x))^k=\\exp(k\\ln(A(x)))(A(x))k=exp(kln(A(x)))ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¸€ن¸ھ lnâپ،\\lnlnï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھé€گé،¹ن¹کو³•ï¼Œن¸€ن¸ھ expâپ،\\expexp ه°±هپڑه®Œن؛†م€‚ P5273 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¹‚ه‡½و•°ï¼ˆهٹ ه¼؛ç‰ˆï¼‰ è؟™é¢که’Œن¸ٹن¸€é¢کçڑ„هŒ؛هˆ«هœ¨ن؛ژوœ‰ A0î€ =1A_0\\not=1A0â€‹î€ â€‹=1 çڑ„وƒ…ه†µï¼Œè؟™و—¶وˆ‘ن»¬ه°±و²،هٹ‍و³•و±‚ lnâپ،\\lnln ه’Œ expâپ،\\expexp ن؛†م€‚ ن½†وک¯ A0î€ =1A_0\\not=1A0â€‹î€ â€‹=1 و²،ه…³ç³»ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥è®©و‰€وœ‰é،¹éƒ½ن¹کن¸ٹ 1A0\\dfrac{1}{A_0}A0â€‹1â€‹ï¼Œوœ€هگژه†چéƒ½ن¹کن¸ٹ A0kA_0^kA0kâ€‹ هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ éپ‡هˆ° A0=0A_0=0A0â€‹=0 çڑ„وƒ…ه†µن¹ںو²،ه…³ç³»ï¼Œوٹٹç³»و•°ه¾€ه‰چç§»ï¼Œو±‚ه‡؛ç­”و،ˆهگژه†چç§»ه›‍هژ»هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ن¸چè؟‡è¦پو³¨و„ڈهژںو‌¥ه‰چé‌¢ cntcntcnt ن¸ھ 000 هœ¨هپڑه¹‚è؟گç®—هگژن¼ڑهڈکوˆگ cntأ—kcnt\\times kcntأ—k ن¸ھ 000م€‚ ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¸¦ن½™é™¤و³• P4512 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈé™¤و³• هڈ‘çژ°ن½™و•°ه¾ˆçƒ¦ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وˆ‘ن»¬وƒ³هٹ‍و³•هژ»وژ‰ه®ƒم€‚ èˆچه¼ƒه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„é،¹çڑ„و–¹و³•وک¯ن¸€èˆ¬وک¯هٹ ن¸ٹو¬،و•°ç•Œï¼Œن½†و³¨و„ڈهˆ°و¬،و•°ç•Œهڈھèƒ½èˆچه¼ƒé«کو¬،ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è€ƒè™‘وٹٹه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„ç³»و•°هڈچè؟‡و‌¥وگ‍م€‚ é‚£ن¹ˆه›‍هˆ°é¢کç›®çڑ„ه¼ڈه­گï¼ڑ F(x)=Q(x)G(x)+R(x)F(x)=Q(x)G(x)+R(x) F(x)=Q(x)G(x)+R(x) ه…¶ن¸­ FFF وک¯ nnn و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼ˆه·²çں¥ï¼‰ï¼ŒGGG وک¯ mmm و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼ˆه·²çں¥ï¼‰ï¼ŒQQQ وک¯ nâˆ’mn-mnâˆ’m و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼ˆوœھçں¥ï¼‰ï¼ŒRRR وک¯ mâˆ’1m-1mâˆ’1 و¬،ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼ˆوœھçں¥ï¼‰م€‚ وچ¢ه…ƒï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ F(1x)=Q(1x)G(1x)+R(1x)F(\\frac{1}{x})=Q(\\frac{1}{x})G(\\frac{1}{x})+R(\\frac{1}{x}) F(x1â€‹)=Q(x1â€‹)G(x1â€‹)+R(x1â€‹) هگŒن¹ک xnx^nxnï¼Œوœ‰: xnF(1x)=xnQ(1x)G(1x)+xnR(1x)x^nF(\\frac{1}{x})=x^nQ(\\frac{1}{x})G(\\frac{1}{x})+x^nR(\\frac{1}{x}) xnF(x1â€‹)=xnQ(x1â€‹)G(x1â€‹)+xnR(x1â€‹) هڈ‘çژ° xnF(1x)=FR(x)x^nF(\\frac{1}{x})=F_R(x)xnF(x1â€‹)=FRâ€‹(x)ï¼ŒxnQ(1x)G(1x)=QR(x)GR(x)x^nQ(\\frac{1}{x})G(\\frac{1}{x})=Q_R(x)G_R(x)xnQ(x1â€‹)G(x1â€‹)=QRâ€‹(x)GRâ€‹(x)ï¼ŒxnR(1x)=xnâˆ’m+1RR(x)x^nR(\\frac{1}{x})=x^{n-m+1}R_R(x)xnR(x1â€‹)=xnâˆ’m+1RRâ€‹(x)ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وœ‰ï¼ڑ FR(x)=QR(x)GR(x)+xnâˆ’m+1RR(x)F_R(x)=Q_R(x)G_R(x)+x^{n-m+1}R_R(x) FRâ€‹(x)=QRâ€‹(x)GRâ€‹(x)+xnâˆ’m+1RRâ€‹(x) é‚£ن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬وœ؛و™؛هœ°هٹ ن¸ٹو¬،و•°ç•Œï¼Œmodâپ،\\operatorname{mod}mod ن¸ٹ xnâˆ’m+1x^{n-m+1}xnâˆ’m+1ï¼Œه°±وœ‰ï¼ڑ FR(x)â‰،QR(x)GR(x)(modxnâˆ’m+1)F_R(x)\\equiv Q_R(x)G_R(x)\\pmod{x^{n-m+1}} FRâ€‹(x)â‰،QRâ€‹(x)GRâ€‹(x)(modxnâˆ’m+1) é‚£ن¹ˆه°±هڈ¯ن»¥و±‚ه‡؛ QR(x)Q_R(x)QRâ€‹(x) ن؛†ï¼Œç³»و•°هڈچè؟‡و‌¥ه°±وک¯ Q(x)Q(x)Q(x)ï¼Œç„¶هگژهچ³هڈ¯ç”¨ن¹کو³•ه’Œه‡ڈو³•و±‚ه‡؛ R(x)R(x)R(x)ï¼Œو—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn)م€‚ ه®Œو•´و¨،و‌؟ هŒ…و‹¬ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه¤ڑç‚¹و±‚ه€¼م€په¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈه؟«é€ںوڈ’ه€¼م€‚ ه±•ه¼€ const int p=998244353,ginv=332748118; inline void add(int &x,int y) { x+=y; if(x>=p) x-=p; } inline int gcd(int a,int b) { int t=a%b; while(t!=0) a=b,b=t,t=a%b; return b; } inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1) res=((y&1)?1ll*res*x%p:res),x=1ll*x*x%p; return res; } inline int exBSGS(int a,int b,int p) { a%=p,b%=p; if(b==1||p==1) return 0; int cnt=0,val=1; while(1) { int d=gcd(a,p); if(d==1) break; if(b%d!=0) return -1; p/=d; b/=d; val=1ll*val*(a/d)%p; cnt++; if(val==b) return cnt; } map<int,int> mp; int val2=1,t=sqrt(p)+1; for(int B=1;B<=t;B++) { val2=1ll*val2*a%p; mp[1ll*b*val2%p]=B; } int cur=val; for(int A=1;A<=t;A++) { cur=1ll*cur*val2%p; if(mp.find(cur)!=mp.end()) return A*t-mp[cur]+cnt; } return -1; } inline int mosqrt(int x) { int bse=exBSGS(3,x,p); if(bse==-1||(bse&1)) return -1; return qpow(3,bse/2); } namespace PLOY { const int MS=5000005; typedef vector<int> ploy; inline ploy operator+(ploy a,ploy b); inline ploy operator+(ploy a,int b); inline ploy operator+(int a,ploy b); inline ploy operator-(ploy a,ploy b); inline ploy operator-(ploy a,int b); inline ploy operator-(int a,ploy b); inline ploy operator*(int b,ploy a); inline ploy operator*(ploy a,int b); inline ploy operator*(int b,ploy a); inline ploy inv(ploy a); inline ploy dao(ploy a); inline ploy jif(ploy a); inline ploy ln(ploy a); inline ploy exp(ploy a); inline ploy pow(ploy a,int b); inline ploy pow2(ploy a,int b,int b2); // b%p b2%(p-1) inline void divi(ploy a,ploy b,ploy &res,ploy &r); inline ploy operator%(ploy a,ploy b); inline vector<int> getval(ploy a,vector<int> x); inline ploy getploy(vector<int> x,vector<int> y); int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; int p_tmpinv[MS]; inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } inline void NTT(ploy &a,int tpe) { int n=a.size(); if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); int g=tpe==1?3:ginv; for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1,Wn=qpow(g,(p-1)/len); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { for(int k=0,Wk=1;k<mid;k++,Wk=1ll*Wk*Wn%p) { int x=a[l+k],y=1ll*Wk*a[l+mid+k]%p; a[l+k]=(x+y)%p,a[l+mid+k]=(x-y+p)%p; } } } } inline void DFT(ploy &a){NTT(a,1);} inline void IDFT(ploy &a) { int n=a.size(); NTT(a,-1); int inv=qpow(n,p-2); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*inv%p; } inline ploy operator+(ploy a,ploy b) { if(a.size()<b.size()) swap(a,b); for(int i=0;i<b.size();i++) add(a[i],b[i]); return a; } inline ploy operator+(ploy a,int b){return add(a[0],b),a;} inline ploy operator+(int a,ploy b){return add(b[0],a),b;} inline ploy operator-(ploy a,ploy b) { if(a.size()<b.size()) a.resize(b.size(),0); for(int i=0;i<b.size();i++) add(a[i],p-b[i]); return a; } inline ploy operator-(ploy a,int b){return add(a[0],p-b),a;} inline ploy operator-(int a,ploy b) { add(b[0],p-a); for(int i=0;i<b.size();i++) b[i]=p-b[i]; return b; } inline ploy operator*(ploy a,int b) { for(int i=0;i<a.size();i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b%p; return a; } inline ploy operator*(int b,ploy a) { for(int i=0;i<a.size();i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b%p; return a; } inline ploy operator*(ploy a,ploy b) { int n=a.size()+b.size()-1,m=getlen(n); a.resize(m,0),b.resize(m,0); DFT(a),DFT(b); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b[i]%p; IDFT(a); a.resize(n,0); return a; } inline ploy inv(ploy a) { int n=a.size(),m=getlen(n); ploy res={qpow(a[0],p-2)}; for(int len=2;len<=m;len<<=1) { ploy tmp=a; tmp.resize(len,0); res=res*2-res*res*tmp; res.resize(len,0); } res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy sqrt(ploy a) { ploy res={mosqrt(a[0])}; if(res[0]==-1) return ploy(); int n=a.size(),m=getlen(n)*2; // ن¸چçں¥éپ“ن¸؛ن»€ن¹ˆè¦پن¹کن؛Œ for(int len=2;len<=m;len<<=1) { ploy tmp=a; tmp.resize(len,0); res=(res*res+tmp)*inv(res*2); res.resize(len,0); } res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy dao(ploy a) { int n=a.size();ploy res=a; res[n-1]=0;for(int i=1;i<n;i++) res[i-1]=1ll*a[i]*i%p; return res; } inline ploy jif(ploy a) { int n=a.size();ploy res=a; for(int i=1;i<n;i++) if(p_tmpinv[i]==0) p_tmpinv[i]=(i==1?1:1ll*p_tmpinv[p%i]*(p-p/i)%p); res[0]=0;for(int i=1;i<n;i++) res[i]=1ll*a[i-1]*p_tmpinv[i]%p; return res; } inline ploy ln(ploy a) { int n=a.size(); ploy res=jif(dao(a)*inv(a)); res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy exp(ploy a) { int n=a.size(),m=getlen(n)*2; ploy res={1}; for(int len=2;len<=m;len<<=1) { ploy tmp=a; tmp.resize(len,0); res=(1-ln(res)+tmp)*res; res.resize(len,0); } res.resize(n,0); return res; } inline ploy pow(ploy a,int b) { ploy tmp=ln(a); for(int i=0;i<a.size();i++) tmp[i]=1ll*tmp[i]*b%p; return exp(tmp); } inline ploy pow2(ploy a,int b,int b2) { int n=a.size(),cnt=0; for(int i=0;i<n&&a[i]==0;i++) cnt++; if(1ll*cnt*b2>=n) return ploy(n,0); int pos=cnt*b2,m=n-pos; ploy tmp; for(int i=cnt;i<cnt+m;i++) tmp.push_back(a[i]); int inv=qpow(tmp[0],p-2),ml=qpow(tmp[0],b2); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) tmp[i]=1ll*tmp[i]*inv%p; tmp=pow(tmp,b); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) tmp[i]=1ll*tmp[i]*ml%p; ploy res(pos,0); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) res.push_back(tmp[i]); return res; } inline void divi(ploy a,ploy b,ploy &res,ploy &r) { int n=a.size(),m=b.size(); if(n<m) return res={0},r=a,void(); int rl=n-m+1; ploy ta=a,tb=b; reverse(ta.begin(),ta.end()),reverse(tb.begin(),tb.end()); ta.resize(rl,0),tb.resize(rl,0); res=ta*inv(tb); res.resize(rl,0); reverse(res.begin(),res.end()); r=a-b*res; r.resize(m-1,0); } inline ploy operator%(ploy a,ploy b) { ploy res,r; divi(a,b,res,r); return r; } inline vector<int> getval(ploy a,vector<int> x) { int n=x.size(); vector<ploy> ml(n<<2|1),res(n<<2|1); vector<pair<pair<int,int>,pair<int,int> > > sta; vector<int> ans(n); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,stp=t.first.second,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { ml[u]={p-x[l],1}; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(stp==0) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); } else if(stp==1) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } else ml[u]=ml[u<<1]*ml[u<<1|1]; } res[1]=a%ml[1]; sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { ans[l]=res[u][0]; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; res[u<<1]=res[u]%ml[u<<1]; res[u<<1|1]=res[u]%ml[u<<1|1]; sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } return ans; } inline ploy getploy(vector<int> x,vector<int> y) { int n=x.size(); vector<ploy> ml(n<<2|1),res(n<<2|1); vector<pair<pair<int,int>,pair<int,int> > > sta; vector<int> ans(n); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,stp=t.first.second,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { ml[u]={p-x[l],1}; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(stp==0) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); } else if(stp==1) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } else ml[u]=ml[u<<1]*ml[u<<1|1]; } ploy M=dao(ml[1]); vector<int> val=getval(M,x); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) val[i]=1ll*qpow(val[i],p-2)*y[i]%p; sta.emplace_back(make_pair(1,0),make_pair(0,n-1)); while(!sta.empty()) { auto t=*sta.rbegin(); sta.pop_back(); int u=t.first.first,stp=t.first.second,l=t.second.first,r=t.second.second; if(l==r) { res[u]={val[l]}; continue; } int mid=l+r>>1; if(stp==0) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1,0),make_pair(l,mid)); } else if(stp==1) { t.first.second++; sta.push_back(t); sta.emplace_back(make_pair(u<<1|1,0),make_pair(mid+1,r)); } else res[u]=res[u<<1]*ml[u<<1|1]+ml[u<<1]*res[u<<1|1]; } return res[1]; } } و›´ه؟«çڑ„و‌؟ه­گ ه±•ه¼€ #include <bits/stdc++.h> using ull = unsigned long long; const int N = 280000; const int Mod = 998244353; typedef std::vector<int> Poly; namespace Pol { int pow(int a, int b, int ans = 1); int add(int a, int b) { return (a += b) >= Mod ? a -= Mod : a; } int sub(int a, int b) { return (a -= b) < 0 ? a += Mod : a; } void inc(int &a, int b) { (a += b) >= Mod ? a -= Mod : a; } void dec(int &a, int b) { (a -= b) < 0 ? a += Mod : a; } void init_Poly(int n = N); void DIT(int *A, int lim); void DIF(int *A, int lim); Poly inv(Poly A, int n); Poly mult(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m); Poly operator*(const Poly &A, const Poly &B) { return mult(A, A.size(), B, B.size()); } Poly Tmul(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m); Poly getv(Poly A, int n, const std::vector<int> &f, int m); Poly drv(const Poly &A, int n); Poly itg(const Poly &A, int n); Poly ln(const Poly &A, int n); Poly exp(Poly A, int n); int fac[N], ifac[N], iv[N]; Poly G[N << 1]; ull tmp[N]; int gw[N]; } // namespace Pol int main() { Pol::init_Poly(); int n, m; scanf("%d %d", &n, &m); Poly F(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) scanf("%d", &F[i]); Poly G = Pol::ln(Pol::inv(Pol::exp(F, n), n), n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) printf("%d%c", G[i], " \\n"[i == n - 1]); std::vector<int> f(m); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) scanf("%d", &f[i]); G = Pol::getv(F, n, f, m); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) printf("%d%c", G[i], " \\n"[i == m - 1]); return 0; } namespace Pol { void DIT(int *A, int lim) { for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tmp[i] = A[i]; for (int l = 1; l < lim; l <<= 1) { ull *k = tmp; for (int *g = gw; k < tmp + lim; k += (l << 1), ++g) { for (ull *x = k; x < k + l; ++x) { int o = x[l] % Mod; x[l] = 1ll * (*x + Mod - o) **g % Mod, *x += o; } } } int iv = pow(lim, Mod - 2); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) A[i] = 1ll * tmp[i] % Mod * iv % Mod; std::reverse(A + 1, A + lim); } void DIF(int *A, int lim) { for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tmp[i] = A[i]; for (int l = lim / 2; l >= 1; l >>= 1) { ull *k = tmp; for (int *g = gw; k < tmp + lim; k += (l << 1), ++g) { for (ull *x = k; x < k + l; ++x) { int o = 1ll * x[l] **g % Mod; x[l] = *x + Mod - o, *x += o; } } } for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) A[i] = tmp[i] % Mod; } Poly mult(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m) { if (n + m < 255) { Poly ans(n + m - 1); std::fill(tmp, tmp + n + m, 0); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) for (int j = 0; j < m; ++j) tmp[i + j] += 1ll * A[i] * B[j] % Mod; for (int i = 0; i < n + m - 1; ++i) ans[i] = tmp[i] % Mod; return ans; } int lim = 1; while (lim < (n + m - 1)) lim <<= 1; static int tA[N], tB[N]; std::copy_n(A.begin(), n, tA), std::fill(tA + n, tA + lim, 0); std::copy_n(B.begin(), m, tB), std::fill(tB + m, tB + lim, 0); DIF(tA, lim), DIF(tB, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tA[i] = 1ll * tA[i] * tB[i] % Mod; DIT(tA, lim); Poly ans(n + m - 1); std::copy_n(tA, n + m - 1, ans.begin()); return ans; } Poly Tmul(const Poly &A, int n, const Poly &B, int m) { if (n + m < 255) { Poly ans(m - n + 1); std::fill(tmp, tmp + m - n + 2, 0); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) for (int j = i; j < n; ++j) tmp[j - i] += 1ll * B[i] * A[j] % Mod; for (int i = 0; i < m - n + 1; ++i) ans[i] = tmp[i] % Mod; } int lim = 1; while (lim < m) lim <<= 1; static int tA[N], tB[N]; std::reverse_copy(A.begin(), A.begin() + n, tA), std::fill(tA + n, tA + lim, 0); std::copy_n(B.begin(), m, tB), std::fill(tB + m, tB + lim, 0); DIF(tA, lim), DIF(tB, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tA[i] = 1ll * tA[i] * tB[i] % Mod; DIT(tA, lim); Poly ans(m - n + 1); std::copy_n(tA + n - 1, m - n + 1, ans.begin()); return ans; } Poly inv(Poly A, int n) { int lim = 1; while (lim < (n << 1)) lim <<= 1; Poly F(lim), G(lim); A.resize(lim); G[0] = pow(A[0], Mod - 2); int now = 1; static int tA[N], tB[N]; while (now < n) { std::copy_n(A.begin(), now << 1, F.begin()); int lim = now << 2; std::copy_n(G.begin(), lim, tA); std::copy_n(F.begin(), lim, tB); DIF(tA, lim), DIF(tB, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tA[i] = 1ll * sub(2, 1ll * tA[i] * tB[i] % Mod) * tA[i] % Mod; DIT(tA, lim); std::copy_n(tA, now << 1, G.begin()); now <<= 1; } G.resize(n); return G; } Poly drv(const Poly &A, int n) { Poly ans(n - 1); for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) ans[i] = 1ll * A[i + 1] * (i + 1) % Mod; return ans; } Poly itg(const Poly &A, int n) { Poly ans(n + 1); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) ans[i + 1] = 1ll * A[i] * iv[i + 1] % Mod; return ans; } Poly ln(const Poly &A, int n) { Poly F = drv(A, n), G = inv(A, n); F = mult(F, n - 1, G, n); F.resize(n - 1); F = itg(F, n - 1); return F; } Poly exp(Poly A, int n) { int lim = 1; while (lim < (n << 1)) lim <<= 1; A.resize(lim); Poly L(lim); int now = 1; static int tF[N], tG[N], tL[N]; std::fill(tG, tG + lim, 0), std::fill(tF, tF + lim, 0); tG[0] = 1; while (now < n) { int lim = now << 2; std::copy_n(tG, now, L.begin()); L = ln(L, std::min(now << 1, n)); L.resize(lim); std::copy_n(A.begin(), now << 1, tF); std::copy_n(L.begin(), lim, tL); DIF(tF, lim), DIF(tG, lim), DIF(tL, lim); for (int i = 0; i < lim; ++i) tG[i] = 1ll * tG[i] * sub(add(1, tF[i]), tL[i]) % Mod; DIT(tG, lim); std::fill(tG + (now << 1), tG + lim, 0); now <<= 1; } Poly G(n); std::copy_n(tG, n, G.begin()); return G; } void getg(int x, int xl, int xr, const Poly &f, int m) { if (xl == xr) { G[x].resize(2); G[x][0] = 1; if (xl >= m) G[x][1] = 0; else G[x][1] = Mod - f[xl]; return; } int xm = (xl + xr) >> 1; getg(x << 1, xl, xm, f, m), getg(x << 1 | 1, xm + 1, xr, f, m); G[x] = mult(G[x << 1], xm - xl + 2, G[x << 1 | 1], xr - xm + 1); } void getans(int x, int xl, int xr, Poly &ans, int m, const Poly &h) { if (xl >= m) return; if (xl == xr) return void(ans[xl] = h[0]); int xm = (xl + xr) >> 1; Poly hl = Tmul(G[x << 1 | 1], xr - xm + 1, h, xr - xl + 1); getans(x << 1, xl, xm, ans, m, hl); Poly hr = Tmul(G[x << 1], xm - xl + 2, h, xr - xl + 1); getans(x << 1 | 1, xm + 1, xr, ans, m, hr); } Poly getv(Poly A, int n, const std::vector<int> &f, int m) { n = std::max(n, m); A.resize(n); getg(1, 0, n - 1, f, m); Poly now = inv(G[1], n); std::reverse(now.begin(), now.begin() + n); Poly h = mult(now, n, A, n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) h[i] = h[i + n - 1]; h.resize(n); Poly ans(m); getans(1, 0, n - 1, ans, m, h); return ans; } void init_Poly(int n) { int t = 1; while ((1 << t) < n) ++t; t = std::min(t - 1, 21); gw[0] = 1, gw[1 << t] = pow(31, 1 << (21 - t)); for (int i = t; i; --i) gw[1 << (i - 1)] = 1ll * gw[1 << i] * gw[1 << i] % Mod; for (int i = 1; i < (1 << t); ++i) gw[i] = 1ll * gw[i & (i - 1)] * gw[i & -i] % Mod; --n; fac[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) fac[i] = 1ll * fac[i - 1] * i % Mod; ifac[n] = Pol::pow(fac[n], Mod - 2); for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) ifac[i] = 1ll * ifac[i + 1] * (i + 1) % Mod; for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) iv[i] = 1ll * ifac[i] * fac[i - 1] % Mod; } int pow(int a, int b, int ans) { while (b) { if (b & 1) ans = 1ll * ans * a % Mod; a = 1ll * a * a % Mod; b >>= 1; } return ans; } } // namespace Pol çڑ„وœ€ه°ڈè‡ھç„¶و•°è§£ xxxم€‚ وک¾ç„¶ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥وڑ´هٹ›ن»ژه°ڈهˆ°ه¤§و‍ڑن¸¾ xxxï¼Œهˆ¤و–­و¯ڈن¸ھ xxx وک¯هگ¦هگˆو³•م€‚و ¹وچ®و¬§و‹‰çڑ„ç¥‍ه¥‡ه®ڑçگ†ï¼Œaد†(p)â‰،1(modp)a^{\\varphi(p)}\\equiv 1\\pmod paد†(p)â‰،1(modp)ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هڈھéœ€è¦پو‍ڑن¸¾هˆ° د†(p)\\varphi(p)د†(p) هچ³هڈ¯م€‚و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ O(p)O(p)O(p)م€‚ è؟™و ·وک¾ç„¶ن¸چه¤ںه¥½ï¼Œه¾ˆه¤ڑو—¶ه€™ ppp éƒ½هچپهˆ†ه·¨ه¤§م€‚è€ƒè™‘ن¼کهŒ–ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥وٹٹ xxx و‹†ه¼€ï¼Œو‹†وˆگ x=tAâˆ’Bx=tA-Bx=tAâˆ’Bï¼Œه…¶ن¸­ Bâ‰¤tB\\le tBâ‰¤tم€‚é‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ atAâˆ’Bâ‰،b(modp)a^{tA-B}\\equiv b\\pmod p atAâˆ’Bâ‰،b(modp) atAâ‰،baB(modp)a^{tA}\\equiv ba^B\\pmod p atAâ‰،baB(modp) è؟™و ·وˆ‘ن»¬ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ن¸€ن¸ھه“ˆه¸Œè،¨ه­کو¯ڈن¸ھ baBmodâپ،pba^B\\operatorname{mod} pbaBmodp ه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„وœ€ه¤§çڑ„ BBBï¼Œç„¶هگژو‍ڑن¸¾ AAAï¼Œه؟«é€ںو‰¾هˆ° atAa^{tA}atA ه¯¹ه؛”çڑ„ BBBï¼Œç­”و،ˆهچ³ن¸؛ x=tAâˆ’Bx=tA-Bx=tAâˆ’Bم€‚ وک¾ç„¶ï¼Œو­¤و—¶ ttt هڈ– âŒˆpâŒ‰\\left\\lceil\\sqrt p\\right\\rceilâŒˆpâ€‹âŒ‰ وک¯وœ€ن¼کçڑ„م€‚و­¤و—¶و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¸؛ O(âŒˆpâŒ‰)O(\\left\\lceil\\sqrt p\\right\\rceil)O(âŒˆpâ€‹âŒ‰)م€‚ه¦‚و‍œç”¨ map و‌¥ه“ˆه¸Œçڑ„è¯‌و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ن¼ڑه¤ڑهڈھ logâپ،\\loglogم€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cmath> #include <map> using namespace std; inline int BSGS(int a,int b,int p) { map<int,int> mp; int val=1,t=sqrt(p)+1; for(int B=1;B<=t;B++) { val=1ll*val*a%p; mp[1ll*b*val%p]=B; } int cur=val; for(int A=1;A<=t;A++) { if(mp.find(val)!=mp.end()) { return A*t-mp[val]; } val=1ll*val*cur%p; } return -1; } int main() { int p,a,b; scanf("%d%d%d",&p,&a,&b); int x=BSGS(a,b,p); if(x==-1) { puts("no solution"); return 0; } printf("%d\\n",x); return 0; } ن½†وک¯وœ‰ن؛›و—¶ه€™ï¼Œgcdâپ،(a,p)î€ =1\\gcd(a,p)\\not=1gcd(a,p)î€ â€‹=1ï¼Œç”¨ن¸چن؛† BSGSم€‚è؟™و—¶ه€™وˆ‘ن»¬ه°±éœ€è¦پ exBSGS ن؛†م€‚ ن¾‹ه¦‚è؟™éپ“é¢کï¼ڑP4195 م€گو¨،و‌؟م€‘و‰©ه±• BSGS/exBSGS ه½“ gcdâپ،(a,p)î€ =1\\gcd(a,p)\\not=1gcd(a,p)î€ â€‹=1 و—¶ï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬ن»¤ d=gcdâپ،(a,p)d=\\gcd(a,p)d=gcd(a,p)ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ axâ‰،b(modp)a^x\\equiv b\\pmod p axâ‰،b(modp) adaxâˆ’1â‰،bd(modpd)\\dfrac{a}{d}a^{x-1}\\equiv \\dfrac{b}{d}\\pmod{\\dfrac{p}{d}} daâ€‹axâˆ’1â‰،dbâ€‹(moddpâ€‹) ه¦‚و‍œ gcdâپ،(ad,pd)\\gcd(\\dfrac{a}{d},\\dfrac{p}{d})gcd(daâ€‹,dpâ€‹) ن»چç„¶ن¸چن¸؛ 111ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆç»§ç»­هپڑن¸‹هژ»ï¼Œç›´هˆ° gcdâپ،(aD,pD)=1\\gcd(\\dfrac{a}{D},\\dfrac{p}{D})=1gcd(Daâ€‹,Dpâ€‹)=1 ن¸؛و­¢ï¼ˆDDD ن¸؛و‰€وœ‰ ddd çڑ„ن¹کç§¯ï¼‰م€‚ è؟™و—¶وˆ‘ن»¬çڑ„و–¹ç¨‹هڈکوˆگن؛†è؟™و ·ï¼ˆcntcntcnt وک¯و“چن½œçڑ„و¬،و•°ï¼‰ï¼ڑ acntDaxâˆ’cntâ‰،bD(modpD)\\dfrac{a^{cnt}}{D}a^{x-cnt}\\equiv \\dfrac{b}{D}\\pmod{\\dfrac{p}{D}} Dacntâ€‹axâˆ’cntâ‰،Dbâ€‹(modDpâ€‹) ه°±هڈ¯ن»¥ç”¨ BSGS è®،ç®—ç­”و،ˆن؛†م€‚ و³¨و„ڈç‰¹هˆ¤ x=0x=0x=0 ه’Œ x=cntx=cntx=cnt çڑ„ç‰¹و®ٹوƒ…ه†µم€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <map> #include <cmath> using namespace std; inline int gcd(int a,int b) { int t=a%b; while(t>0) { a=b; b=t; t=a%b; } return b; } inline int exBSGS(int a,int b,int p) { a%=p; b%=p; if(b==1||p==1) { return 0; } int cnt=0,val=1; while(1) { int d=gcd(a,p); if(d==1) { break; } if(b%d!=0) { return -1; } cnt++; p/=d; b/=d; val=1ll*val*(a/d)%p; if(val==b) { return cnt; } } map<int,int> mp; int val2=1,t=sqrt(p)+1; for(int B=1;B<=t;B++) { val2=1ll*val2*a%p; mp[1ll*b*val2%p]=B; } int cur=1ll*val2*val%p; for(int A=1;A<=t;A++) { if(mp.find(cur)!=mp.end()) { return A*t-mp[cur]+cnt; } cur=1ll*cur*val2%p; } return -1; } int main() { int a,b,p; while(1) { scanf("%d%d%d",&a,&p,&b); if(a==0&&b==0&&p==0) { break; } int res=exBSGS(a,b,p); if(res<0) { puts("No Solution"); } else { printf("%d\\n",res); } } return 0; } ç»ƒن¹ é¢کç›® SP3105 MOD - Power Modulo Inverted UVA10225 Discrete Logging P2485 [SDOI2011]è®،ç®—ه™¨ وœ‰ç²¾ه؛¦é—®é¢کçڑ„هژںه› وک¾ç„¶وک¯و¶‰هڈٹن؛†وœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹ï¼Œه®ƒè¦پç”¨ن¸‰è§’ه‡½و•°و±‚ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥è€ƒè™‘و‰¾ن¸€ن¸ھهœ¨و¨،ç´ و•°و—¶çڑ„â€œوœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹â€‌م€‚ هژںو ¹ ن¼—و‰€ه‘¨çں¥ï¼Œهœ¨و¨، ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹هڈھوœ‰ pâˆ’1p-1pâˆ’1 ن¸ھèƒ½ن»£ه…¥ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈçڑ„ه€¼ï¼ˆ000 و²،ç”¨ï¼‰ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وˆ‘ن»¬هڈھè¦پو‰¾هˆ°ن¸€ن¸ھèƒ½â€œéپچهژ†â€‌è؟™ pâˆ’1p-1pâˆ’1 ن¸ھه€¼çڑ„و•°ï¼Œه°±èƒ½و‍„وˆگن¸€ن¸ھâ€œهچ•ن½چهœ†â€‌ï¼Œن¹ںه°±èƒ½و‰¾هˆ°â€œوœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹â€‌ن؛†م€‚ è؟™ن¸ھèƒ½و‍„وˆگâ€œهچ•ن½چهœ†â€‌çڑ„و•°ه°±è¢«ç§°ن¸؛هژںو ¹ gggم€‚ ه½¢ه¼ڈهŒ–çڑ„ï¼Œggg ن¸؛و¨، ppp çڑ„هژںو ¹ï¼Œه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“هœ¨و¨، ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹ g0î€ =g1î€ =g2î€ =...î€ =gpâˆ’2g^0\\not=g^1\\not=g^2\\not=...\\not=g^{p-2}g0î€ â€‹=g1î€ â€‹=g2î€ â€‹=...î€ â€‹=gpâˆ’2م€‚ ن¹ںه°±وک¯è¯´هœ¨و¨،ن¸–ç•Œçڑ„ه¹‚è؟گç®—è؟™ه¼ ç؛¸ن¸ٹï¼Œهژںو ¹ ggg وک¯ن¸€ن¸ھهœ†م€‚ ه®¹وک“هڈ‘çژ° ggg ه°±وک¯هœ¨و¨، ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„ pâˆ’1p-1pâˆ’1 و¬،وœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹م€‚ هڈ¯ن»¥è¯پوکژï¼Œهœ¨و¨،ç´ و•° ppp çڑ„و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹ï¼Œggg و€»وک¯ه­کهœ¨çڑ„م€‚و‰€ن»¥ NTT çڑ„و¨،و•°ه؟…é،»è¦پوک¯ç´ و•°م€‚ وˆ‘ن»¬è€ƒè™‘و¨، ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„ nnn و¬،وœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹ د‰n\\omega_nد‰nâ€‹م€‚ç”±ن؛ژ ggg çڑ„و¬،ه¹‚و‍„وˆگن؛†â€œهڈ¯ن»¥è¢«هˆ†ن¸؛ pâˆ’1p-1pâˆ’1 ç­‰هˆ†çڑ„هچ•ن½چهœ†â€‌ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ د‰n=gpâˆ’1n\\omega_n=g^{\\frac{p-1}{n}}د‰nâ€‹=gnpâˆ’1â€‹م€‚ وک¾ç„¶ï¼Œو¨، ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„ د‰n\\omega_nد‰nâ€‹ ه­کهœ¨ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“ nâˆ£pâˆ’1n\\mid p-1nâˆ£pâˆ’1م€‚ NTT ه¦‚و‍œ n=2kn=2^kn=2kï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥وٹٹ FFT ن¸­çڑ„è™ڑو•°وœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹éƒ½و›؟وچ¢وˆگو¨،ç´ و•° ppp و„ڈن¹‰ن¸‹çڑ„وœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹ï¼Œو‌¥ه®‍çژ° NTTم€‚ ن½†ه› ن¸؛ه؟…é،»و»،è¶³ 2k=nâˆ£pâˆ’12^k=n\\mid p-12k=nâˆ£pâˆ’1ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ NTT ه¯¹و¨،و•°وœ‰ç‰¹و®ٹé™گهˆ¶م€‚ NTT هڈ¯ç”¨çڑ„و¨،و•° ppp éœ€è¦پو»،è¶³ï¼ڑ ppp وک¯ن¸ھè´¨و•° p=aâ‹…2b+1p=a\\cdot2^b+1p=aâ‹…2b+1 ن¾‹ه¦‚ 998244353998244353998244353 ه°±وک¯هگˆو³•çڑ„ï¼Œه› ن¸؛ 998244353=7â‹…17â‹…223+1998244353=7\\cdot17\\cdot2^{23}+1998244353=7â‹…17â‹…223+1م€‚ه®ƒçڑ„ن¸€ن¸ھهژںو ¹وک¯ g=3g=3g=3م€‚ è؟کوœ‰ 167772161167772161167772161 ه’Œ 104857601104857601104857601 ن¹ںوک¯هگˆو³•çڑ„ï¼Œg=3g=3g=3 éƒ½وک¯ه®ƒن»¬çڑ„هژںو ¹م€‚ و¨،و‌؟é¢کن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> using namespace std; const long long MS=5000005; const int p=998244353,ginv=332748118; inline int qpow(int x,int y) { int res=1; for(;y>0;y>>=1) res=((y&1)?1ll*res*x%p:res),x=1ll*x*x%p; return res; } inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; inline void NTT(int n,int a[],int tpe) { if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); int g=tpe==1?3:ginv; for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1,Wn=qpow(g,(p-1)/len); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { for(int k=0,Wk=1;k<mid;k++,Wk=1ll*Wk*Wn%p) { int x=a[l+k],y=1ll*Wk*a[l+mid+k]%p; a[l+k]=(x+y)%p,a[l+mid+k]=(x-y+p)%p; } } } } inline void DFT(int n,int a[]){NTT(n,a,1);} inline void IDFT(int n,int a[]) { NTT(n,a,-1); int inv=qpow(n,p-2); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i]=1ll*a[i]*inv%p; } int n,m,a[MS],b[MS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%d",&a[i]); } for(int i=0;i<=m;i++) { scanf("%d",&b[i]); } int len=getlen(n+m+1); DFT(len,a); DFT(len,b); for(int i=0;i<len;i++) { a[i]=1ll*a[i]*b[i]%p; } IDFT(len,a); for(int i=0;i<n+m+1;i++) { printf("%d ",a[i]); } printf("\\n"); return 0; } n\\omega_n^k=\\omega_n^{k\\mod n}د‰nkâ€‹=د‰nkmodnâ€‹ï¼Œç›¸ه½“ن؛ژè½¬ن¸€هœˆهگژن¼ڑè½¬ه›‍و‌¥م€‚وœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹ن¼ڑè½¬وک¯ن¸€ن¸ھه¾ˆé‡چè¦پçڑ„و€§è´¨ï¼پï¼ˆè™½ç„¶وڑ‚و—¶و²،وœ‰ç”¨ ï¼‰ DFT ه’Œ IDFT f_k=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}f_i\\cdot\\omega_n^{ki} f^â€‹kâ€‹=i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹fiâ€‹â‹…د‰nkiâ€‹ ن¸‹é‌¢è®©وˆ‘ن»¬è¯پوکژ DFT çڑ„é€†هڈکوچ¢ IDFTï¼ڑ fk=1nâˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1f^iâ‹…د‰nâˆ’kif_k=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\hat f_i\\cdot\\omega_n^{-ki} fkâ€‹=n1â€‹i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹f^â€‹iâ€‹â‹…د‰nâˆ’kiâ€‹ ه°† DFT çڑ„وں؟ه­گن»£ه…¥ï¼ڑ fk=1nâˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰nâˆ’kiâˆ‘j=0nâˆ’1fjâ‹…د‰nijf_k=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{-ki}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\cdot\\omega_n^{ij} fkâ€‹=n1â€‹i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰nâˆ’kiâ€‹j=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹fjâ€‹â‹…د‰nijâ€‹ =1nâˆ‘j=0nâˆ’1fjâˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰nâˆ’kiâ‹…د‰nij=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{-ki}\\cdot\\omega_n^{ij} =n1â€‹j=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹fjâ€‹i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰nâˆ’kiâ€‹â‹…د‰nijâ€‹ =1nâˆ‘j=0nâˆ’1fjâˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰ni(jâˆ’k)=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)} =n1â€‹j=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹fjâ€‹i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰ni(jâˆ’k)â€‹ è€ƒè™‘ âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰ni(jâˆ’k)\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)}i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰ni(jâˆ’k)â€‹ è؟™éƒ¨هˆ†ï¼ڑ è‹¥ j=kj=kj=kï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆ âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰ni(jâˆ’k)=âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰n0=n\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)}=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{0}=ni=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰ni(jâˆ’k)â€‹=i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰n0â€‹=n è‹¥ jî€ =kj\\not=kjî€ â€‹=kï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه› ن¸؛ 0â‰¤j,k<n0\\le j,k<n0â‰¤j,k<nï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ âˆ£jâˆ’kâˆ£<n,د‰njâˆ’kî€ =0|j-k|<n,\\omega_n^{j-k}\\not=0âˆ£jâˆ’kâˆ£<n,د‰njâˆ’kâ€‹î€ â€‹=0ï¼Œç”±ç­‰و¯”و•°هˆ—و±‚ه’Œه…¬ه¼ڈه¾—هˆ°ï¼ڑ âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1د‰ni(jâˆ’k)=âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1(د‰njâˆ’k)i\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}\\omega_n^{i(j-k)}=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}(\\omega_n^{j-k})^i i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹د‰ni(jâˆ’k)â€‹=i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹(د‰njâˆ’kâ€‹)i =1âˆ’(د‰njâˆ’k)n1âˆ’د‰njâˆ’k=\\dfrac{1-(\\omega_n^{j-k})^n}{1-\\omega_n^{j-k}} =1âˆ’د‰njâˆ’kâ€‹1âˆ’(د‰njâˆ’kâ€‹)nâ€‹ =1âˆ’(د‰nn)jâˆ’k1âˆ’د‰njâˆ’k=\\dfrac{1-(\\omega_n^n)^{j-k}}{1-\\omega_n^{j-k}} =1âˆ’د‰njâˆ’kâ€‹1âˆ’(د‰nnâ€‹)jâˆ’kâ€‹ =1âˆ’11âˆ’د‰njâˆ’k=\\dfrac{1-1}{1-\\omega_n^{j-k}} =1âˆ’د‰njâˆ’kâ€‹1âˆ’1â€‹ =0=0 =0 و‰€ن»¥ fk=1nâˆ‘j=0nâˆ’1fjâ‹…nâ‹…[j=k]f_k=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\sum\\limits_{j=0}^{n-1}f_j\\cdot n\\cdot[j=k] fkâ€‹=n1â€‹j=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹fjâ€‹â‹…nâ‹…[j=k] =1nâ‹…nâ‹…fk=\\dfrac{1}{n}\\cdot n\\cdot f_k =n1â€‹â‹…nâ‹…fkâ€‹ =fk=f_k =fkâ€‹ ه¾—è¯پم€‚ هڈ¯ن»¥هڈ‘çژ° DFT ه’Œ IDFT çڑ„وں؟ه­گوƒٹن؛؛هœ°ç›¸ن¼¼ï¼Œهڈھن¸چè؟‡وک¯ه¤ڑن؛†ن¸ھ 1n\\dfrac{1}{n}n1â€‹ ه’Œوœ¬هژںهچ•ن½چو ¹وŒ‡و•°ن¸ٹé‌¢çڑ„è´ںهڈ·è€Œه·²م€‚و‰€ن»¥وˆ‘ن»¬هڈھéœ€è¦پè§£ه†³ DFTï¼ŒIDFT ه°±èƒ½è؟ژهˆƒè€Œè§£م€‚ FFT è®¾ fff وک¯ن¸€ن¸ھو¬،و•°ن¸؛ nâˆ’1n-1nâˆ’1 ن¸” nnn وک¯هپ¶و•°çڑ„ه¤ڑé،¹ه¼ڈï¼ˆه¦‚و‍œهژںو‌¥çڑ„ nnn وک¯ه¥‡و•°é‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥è،¥ن¸€é،¹ç³»و•°ن¸؛ 000 çڑ„é،¹ï¼‰ï¼Œè®¾ m=n2m=\\dfrac{n}{2}m=2nâ€‹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ f(x)=âˆ‘i=0nâˆ’1fixif(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{n-1}f_ix^i f(x)=i=0âˆ‘nâˆ’1â€‹fiâ€‹xi و ¹وچ®ه¥‡هپ¶و€§هˆ†ç±»ï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ f(x)=âˆ‘i=0mâˆ’1f2ix2i+âˆ‘i=0mâˆ’1f2i+1x2i+1f(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i}x^{2i}+\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i+1}x^{2i+1} f(x)=i=0âˆ‘mâˆ’1â€‹f2iâ€‹x2i+i=0âˆ‘mâˆ’1â€‹f2i+1â€‹x2i+1 =âˆ‘i=0mâˆ’1f2ix2i+xâˆ‘i=0mâˆ’1f2i+1x2i=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i}x^{2i}+x\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i+1}x^{2i} =i=0âˆ‘mâˆ’1â€‹f2iâ€‹x2i+xi=0âˆ‘mâˆ’1â€‹f2i+1â€‹x2i ه®ڑن¹‰ f0(x)=âˆ‘i=0mâˆ’1f2ixif0(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i}x^{i}f0(x)=i=0âˆ‘mâˆ’1â€‹f2iâ€‹xiï¼Œf1(x)=âˆ‘i=0mâˆ’1f2i+1xif1(x)=\\sum\\limits_{i=0}^{m-1}f_{2i+1}x^{i}f1(x)=i=0âˆ‘mâˆ’1â€‹f2i+1â€‹xiï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆوœ‰ï¼ڑ f(x)=f0(x2)+xâ‹…f1(x2)f(x)=f0(x^2)+x \\cdot f1(x^2)f(x)=f0(x2)+xâ‹…f1(x2) هœ¨ن»£ه…¥هچ•ن½چو ¹ن¹‹ه‰چï¼Œوˆ‘ن»¬ه…ˆو‌¥çœ‹ن¸¤ن¸ھهچ•ن½چو ¹çڑ„و€§è´¨ï¼ڑ د‰2n2k=د‰nk\\omega_{2n}^{2k}=\\omega_{n}^k د‰2n2kâ€‹=د‰nkâ€‹ د‰2nn+k=âˆ’د‰2nk\\omega_{2n}^{n+k}=-\\omega_{2n}^k د‰2nn+kâ€‹=âˆ’د‰2nkâ€‹ ç¬¬ن¸€و‌،و€§è´¨وک¯ه› ن¸؛ن»¥ د‰2n\\omega_{2n}د‰2nâ€‹ çڑ„è¾گè§’è½¬ 2k2k2k و¬،ç›¸ه½“ن؛ژن»¥ د‰n\\omega_{n}د‰nâ€‹ çڑ„è¾گè§’è½¬ kkk و¬،م€‚ è€Œç¬¬ن؛Œو‌،و€§è´¨وک¯ه› ن¸؛ن»¥ د‰2n\\omega_{2n}د‰2nâ€‹ çڑ„è¾گè§’è½¬ nnn و¬،ه°±هˆ°è¾¾ن؛† âˆ’1-1âˆ’1 çڑ„ن½چç½®م€‚ è®°ن½ڈè؟™ن¸¤و‌،و€§è´¨ï¼Œن»£ه…¥هچ•ن½چو ¹ï¼Œه¯¹ن؛ژو»،è¶³ 0â‰¤k<m0\\le k<m0â‰¤k<m çڑ„ kkkï¼Œوœ‰ï¼ڑ f(د‰nk)=f0(د‰n2k)+د‰nkâ‹…f1(د‰n2k)f(\\omega_n^k)=f0(\\omega_n^{2k})+\\omega_n^k\\cdot f1(\\omega_n^{2k}) f(د‰nkâ€‹)=f0(د‰n2kâ€‹)+د‰nkâ€‹â‹…f1(د‰n2kâ€‹) =f0(د‰mk)+د‰nkâ‹…f1(د‰mk)=f0(\\omega_m^k)+\\omega_n^k\\cdot f1(\\omega_m^k) =f0(د‰mkâ€‹)+د‰nkâ€‹â‹…f1(د‰mkâ€‹) f(د‰nm+k)=f0(د‰n2(m+k))+د‰nm+kâ‹…f1(د‰n2(m+k))f(\\omega_n^{m+k})=f0(\\omega_n^{2(m+k)})+\\omega_n^{m+k}\\cdot f1(\\omega_n^{2(m+k)}) f(د‰nm+kâ€‹)=f0(د‰n2(m+k)â€‹)+د‰nm+kâ€‹â‹…f1(د‰n2(m+k)â€‹) =f0(د‰mk)âˆ’د‰nkâ‹…f1(د‰mk)=f0(\\omega_m^k)-\\omega_n^{k}\\cdot f1(\\omega_m^k) =f0(د‰mkâ€‹)âˆ’د‰nkâ€‹â‹…f1(د‰mkâ€‹) ن»¥ن¸ٹن¸¤ن¸ھوں؟ه­گهچپهˆ†ç›¸ن¼¼ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è¢«ç§°ن½œè‌´è‌¶و“چن½œم€‚ ç”±è‌´è‌¶و“چن½œن¸چéڑ¾ه¾—ه‡؛ï¼Œهڈھè¦پوˆ‘ن»¬ç®—ه‡؛ن؛† f0(د‰m0,د‰m1,د‰m2,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1)f0(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f0(د‰m0â€‹,د‰m1â€‹,د‰m2â€‹,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1â€‹) ه’Œ f1(د‰m0,د‰m1,د‰m2,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1)f1(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f1(د‰m0â€‹,د‰m1â€‹,د‰m2â€‹,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1â€‹)ï¼Œه°±هڈ¯ن»¥ه؟«é€ںه¾—هˆ° f(د‰n0,د‰n1,د‰n2,â€¦,د‰nnâˆ’1)f(\\omega_n^0,\\omega_n^1,\\omega_n^2,\\dots,\\omega_n^{n-1})f(د‰n0â€‹,د‰n1â€‹,د‰n2â€‹,â€¦,د‰nnâˆ’1â€‹)م€‚ è€Œ f0(د‰m0,د‰m1,د‰m2,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1)f0(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f0(د‰m0â€‹,د‰m1â€‹,د‰m2â€‹,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1â€‹) ه’Œ f1(د‰m0,د‰m1,د‰m2,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1)f1(\\omega_m^0,\\omega_m^1,\\omega_m^2,\\dots,\\omega_m^{m-1})f1(د‰m0â€‹,د‰m1â€‹,د‰m2â€‹,â€¦,د‰mmâˆ’1â€‹) هڈˆهڈ¯ن»¥é€’ه½’ن¸‹هژ»ç®—ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥وˆ‘ن»¬هڈ¯ن»¥هˆ†و²»ن¸‹هژ»ï¼Œç”¨ O(nlogâپ،n)O(n\\log n)O(nlogn) çڑ„و—¶é—´ه¤چو‌‚ه؛¦ه®Œوˆگ DFTï¼پ ن¸چè؟‡éœ€è¦پو³¨و„ڈçڑ„وک¯ï¼Œnnn ه؟…é،»وک¯ 222 çڑ„ه¹‚ï¼Œè¦پن¸چç„¶و— و³•هˆ†و²»م€‚ ه؟«é€ںè؟›è،Œ IDFT ن¹ںç›¸ه½“ه¥½هٹ‍ï¼Œهڈھè¦پوٹٹ FFT ن¸­ç”¨هˆ°çڑ„و‰€وœ‰ د‰n\\omega_nد‰nâ€‹ وچ¢وˆگ د‰nâˆ’1\\omega_n^{-1}د‰nâˆ’1â€‹ ï¼Œوœ€هگژه†چوٹٹو‰€وœ‰ç‚¹ه€¼ن¹کن¸ٹ 1n\\dfrac{1}{n}n1â€‹ هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ ن½†وک¯è؟™è؟کن¸چه¤ںه؟«ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥ن¼ڑè¢«هچ،ه¸¸م€‚è§‚ه¯ںهˆ°ه½±ه“چو•ˆçژ‡çڑ„وک¯وŒ‰ه¥‡هپ¶و€§هˆ†و²»ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥هڈ¯ن»¥è€ƒè™‘ن»¤ revâپ،(x)\\operatorname{rev}(x)rev(x) è،¨ç¤؛ xxx çڑ„ن؛Œè؟›هˆ¶هڈچè؟‡و‌¥ç»„وˆگçڑ„و•°ï¼Œن»¤ fiâ€²=frevâپ،(i)f^\\prime_i=f_{\\operatorname{rev}(i)}fiâ€²â€‹=frev(i)â€‹ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهœ¨ fâ€²f^\\primefâ€² ن¸ٹçڑ„هˆ†و²»و“چن½œه…¶ه®‍ه°±وک¯ç›¸é‚»ن¸¤ن¸ھه؛ڈهˆ—çڑ„هˆ†و²»ï¼Œè؟™و ·هڈ¯ن»¥ه¤§ه¤§هٹ ه؟« FFT çڑ„é€ںه؛¦ï¼Œه¹¶ن¸”هڈ¯ن»¥وٹٹ FFT ه†™وˆگé‌‍é€’ه½’çڑ„م€‚ ن»£ç په¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑï¼ˆو¨،و‌؟é¢کï¼‰ #include <iostream> #include <cstdio> #include <cmath> using namespace std; const long long MS=5000005; const double PI=acos(-1); struct plex { double x,y; plex(double a=0,double b=0) {x=a,y=b;} }; plex operator+(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x+b.x,a.y+b.y);} plex operator-(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y);} plex operator*(plex a,plex b) {return plex(a.x*b.x-a.y*b.y,a.x*b.y+b.x*a.y);} inline int getlen(int n) { int res=1; while(res<n) res<<=1; return res; } int p_rev[MS],p_rev_lstn; inline void FFT(int n,plex a[],int tpe) { if(p_rev_lstn!=n) { p_rev_lstn=n; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p_rev[i]=(p_rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)?n>>1:0); } for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p_rev[i]<i) swap(a[p_rev[i]],a[i]); for(int mid=1;mid<n;mid<<=1) { int len=mid<<1; plex Wn=plex(cos(2*PI/len),tpe*sin(2*PI/len)); for(int l=0;l<n-len+1;l+=len) { plex Wk=plex(1,0); for(int k=0;k<mid;k++,Wk=Wk*Wn) { plex x=a[l+k],y=Wk*a[l+mid+k]; a[l+k]=x+y,a[l+mid+k]=x-y; } } } } inline void DFT(int n,plex a[]) {FFT(n,a,1);} inline void IDFT(int n,plex a[]) { FFT(n,a,-1); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) a[i].x/=n,a[i].y/=n; } int n,m; plex a[MS],b[MS]; int main() { scanf("%d%d",&n,&m); for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) { scanf("%lf",&a[i].x); } for(int i=0;i<=m;i++) { scanf("%lf",&b[i].x); } int len=getlen(n+m+1); DFT(len,a); DFT(len,b); for(int i=0;i<len;i++) { a[i]=a[i]*b[i]; } IDFT(len,a); for(int i=0;i<n+m+1;i++) { printf("%d ",(int)(a[i].x+0.5)); } printf("\\n"); return 0; } min read","time":850000,"words":2767,"minutes":15},"date":"2023-03-23 16:25:24","dateFormat":"2023-03-23"},{"abstract":"","content":"è؟™وک¯ن¸ھه¤§ه·¥ç¨‹ï¼Œن»¥هگژن¼ڑن¸چو–­è،¥ه……م€‚ وœ€ه¤§وµپ وœ€ه¤§وµپçڑ„ه»؛و¨،ï¼Œه¾€ه¾€وک¯وٹٹوµپé‡ڈه’Œé¢کç›®è¦پو±‚çڑ„ن¸œè¥؟ç›´وژ¥ه…³èپ”èµ·و‌¥ï¼Œوک¯وœ€ç®€هچ•ç›´ç™½çڑ„ه»؛و¨،م€‚وœ€ه¤§وµپçڑ„و¨،ه‍‹وœ‰و—¶ه€™هڈ¯ن»¥è½¬هŒ–ن¸؛ن؛Œهˆ†ه›¾وœ€ه¤§هŒ¹é…چم€‚ و‹†ç‚¹و¨،ه‍‹ P2472 [SCOI2007] èœ¥èœ´ ç½‘ç»œوµپه›¾ن¸­çڑ„ç‚¹ه¦‚و‍œوœ‰وµپé‡ڈé™گهˆ¶ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆهڈ¯ن»¥وٹٹن¸€ن¸ھç‚¹ uuu و‹†وˆگه…¥ç‚¹ u1u_1u1â€‹ ه’Œه‡؛ç‚¹ u2u_2u2â€‹ï¼Œu1u_1u1â€‹ è´ںè´£وژ¥و”¶وµپé‡ڈï¼Œu2u_2u2â€‹ è´ںè´£è¾“é€پوµپé‡ڈï¼Œu1u1u1 هگ‘ u2u2u2 è؟‍ن¸€و‌،وµپé‡ڈن¸؛ç‚¹و‌ƒçڑ„è¾¹هچ³هڈ¯م€‚ هˆ†ه±‚ه›¾و¨،ه‍‹ P2754 [CTSC1999]ه®¶ه›­ / وکںé™…è½¬ç§»é—®é¢ک ç½‘ç»œوµپه›¾ن¸­çڑ„ç‚¹ه¦‚و‍œن¼ڑâ€œهٹ¨â€‌ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆن¸چه¦¨وŒ‰و—¶é—´هˆ†ه±‚ه»؛ه›¾ï¼Œو¨،و‹ںو—¶é—´وµپé€‌م€‚ و­£éڑ¾هˆ™هڈچï¼Œé¦–ه…ˆè€ƒè™‘è®©و‰€وœ‰ç‚¹éƒ½è‡ھوˆگè·¯ه¾„ï¼Œç„¶هگژè€ƒè™‘ه°½هڈ¯èƒ½é€ڑè؟‡è¾¹و‌¥â€œهگˆه¹¶â€‌è؟™ن؛›è·¯ه¾„م€‚ ه› ن¸؛و¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹هڈھèƒ½هœ¨ن¸€و‌،è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹï¼Œو‰€ن»¥è€ƒè™‘و‹†ç‚¹م€‚وٹٹو¯ڈن¸ھç‚¹ uuu و‹†وˆگ u1u_1u1â€‹ ه’Œ u2u_2u2â€‹ï¼Œو؛گç‚¹هگ‘ U1U_1U1â€‹ è؟‍ن¸€و‌،وµپé‡ڈن¸؛ 111 çڑ„è¾¹ï¼Œu2u_2u2â€‹ هگ‘و±‡ç‚¹è؟‍ن¸€و‌،وµپé‡ڈن¸؛ 111 çڑ„è¾¹ï¼Œè،¨ç¤؛ uuu هœ¨è·¯ه¾„ن¸ٹçڑ„ه‰چé©±ه’Œهگژç»§هڈھèƒ½وœ‰ 111 و¬،ï¼Œbbb ن¹ںن¸€و ·ï¼Œو‰€ن»¥é—®é¢کè½¬هŒ–ن¸؛ï¼ڑ وœ‰ن¸¤ç»„و؛گو±‡ç‚¹ s1,t1s1,t1s1,t1 ه’Œ s2,t2s2,t2s2,t2ï¼Œs1â†’t1s1\\to t1s1â†’t1 وœ€ه¤ڑوµپ a1a1a1 çڑ„وµپé‡ڈï¼Œs2â†’t2s2\\to t2s2â†’t2 وœ€ه¤ڑوµپ a2a2a2 é‚£ن¹ˆهژںه›¾ه؟…ه®ڑن¸چهڈ¯èƒ½و»،وµپم€‚ه› ن¸؛هپ‡è‹¥è؟™ن¸¤ç§چوƒ…ه†µهگŒو—¶ه‡؛çژ°ï¼Œé‚£ن¹ˆه°±هڈ¯ن»¥è؟™و ·وµپï¼ڑ و‰€ن»¥هڈھè¦پè؟™ن¸¤ن¸ھه›¾éƒ½èƒ½و»،وµپه°±è¯پوکژهژںé—®é¢کوœ‰è§£م€‚ و¬،وœ€ه¤§وµپï¼Œهˆ™هژںé—®é¢کوœ‰è§£ه½“ن¸”ن»…ه½“و¯ڈو¬،éƒ½وک¯و»،وµپم€‚ وœ€ه°ڈه‰² ن»ژوœ€ه°ڈه‰²è§’ه؛¦ه»؛و¨،ن¹ںوک¯ن¸€ç§چو¯”è¾ƒه¸¸è§پçڑ„ه»؛و¨،و–¹ه¼ڈم€‚ è®¾ç‚¹ uuu وœ€ç»ˆهœ¨و؛گç‚¹ SSS و‰€هœ¨çڑ„è؟‍é€ڑه‌—هˆ™ bu=1b_u=1buâ€‹=1ï¼Œهگ¦هˆ™ bu=0b_u=0buâ€‹=0م€‚ هں؛وœ¬و¨،ه‍‹ è€ƒè™‘وœ€ه°ڈه‰²çڑ„و•°ه­¦ه®ڑن¹‰ï¼ڑ è¾¹ (S,x,a)(S,x,a)(S,x,a) ه¯¹ç­”و،ˆçڑ„è´،çŒ®ن¸؛ aأ—(1âˆ’bx)a\\times (1-b_x)aأ—(1âˆ’bxâ€‹)ï¼› è¾¹ (x,T,a)(x,T,a)(x,T,a) ه¯¹ç­”و،ˆçڑ„è´،çŒ®ن¸؛ aأ—bxa\\times b_xaأ—bxâ€‹ï¼› è¾¹ (x,y,a)(x,y,a)(x,y,a) ه¯¹ç­”و،ˆçڑ„è´،çŒ®ن¸؛ aأ—bx(1âˆ’by)a\\times b_x(1-b_y)aأ—bxâ€‹(1âˆ’byâ€‹)ï¼› و‰€ن»¥هں؛وœ¬é™گهˆ¶ه¦‚ن¸‹ï¼ڑ وœ‰ nnn ن¸ھ 01 هڈکé‡ڈ bib_ibiâ€‹ï¼Œن½ éœ€è¦پç،®ه®ڑو¯ڈن¸ھ bib_ibiâ€‹ çڑ„هڈ–ه€¼ن½؟ه¾—ن»£ن»·وœ€ه°ڈم€‚ ن»£ن»·هˆ†ن¸؛ن¸‰ç±»ï¼ڑ è‹¥ bi=0b_i=0biâ€‹=0ï¼Œوœ‰ن»£ن»· w1iw1_iw1iâ€‹ï¼›
